authors_text: Wanhua Li,Xiaoke Huang,Zheng Zhu,Yansong Tang,Xiu Li,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu
title: OrdinalCLIP: Learning Rank Prompts for Language-Guided Ordinal Regression
title_zh: OrdinalCLIP：语言引导序数回归的学习排名提示
comment: Accepted by NeurIPS2022. Code is available at https://github.com/xk-huang/OrdinalCLIP
comments: Accepted by NeurIPS2022. Code is available at https://github.com/xk-huang/OrdinalCLIP
abstract: This paper presents a language-powered paradigm for ordinal regression. Existing methods usually treat each rank as a category and employ a set of weights to learn these concepts. These methods are easy to overfit and usually attain unsatisfactory performance as the learned concepts are mainly derived from the training set. Recent large pre-trained vision-language models like CLIP have shown impressive performance on various visual tasks. In this paper, we propose to learn the rank concepts from the rich semantic CLIP latent space. Specifically, we reformulate this task as an image-language matching problem with a contrastive objective, which regards labels as text and obtains a language prototype from a text encoder for each rank. While prompt engineering for CLIP is extremely time-consuming, we propose OrdinalCLIP, a differentiable prompting method for adapting CLIP for ordinal regression. OrdinalCLIP consists of learnable context tokens and learnable rank embeddings; The learnable rank embeddings are constructed by explicitly modeling numerical continuity, resulting in well-ordered, compact language prototypes in the CLIP space. Once learned, we can only save the language prototypes and discard the huge language model, resulting in zero additional computational overhead compared with the linear head counterpart. Experimental results show that our paradigm achieves competitive performance in general ordinal regression tasks, and gains improvements in few-shot and distribution shift settings for age estimation. The code is available at https://github.com/xk-huang/OrdinalCLIP.

These methods are easy to overfit and usually attain unsatisfactory performance as the learned concepts are mainly derived from the training set. In this paper, we propose to learn the rank concepts from the rich semantic CLIP latent space. While prompt engineering for CLIP is extremely time-consuming, we propose OrdinalCLIP, a differentiable prompting method for adapting CLIP for ordinal regression. OrdinalCLIP consists of learnable context tokens and learnable rank embeddings; The learnable rank embeddings are constructed by explicitly modeling numerical continuity, resulting in well-ordered, compact language prototypes in the CLIP space. Once learned, we can only save the language prototypes and discard the huge language model, resulting in zero additional computational overhead compared with the linear head counterpart. Experimental results show that our paradigm achieves competitive performance in general ordinal regression tasks, and gains improvements in few-shot and distribution shift settings for age estimation. The code is available at https://github.com/xk-huang/OrdinalCLIP.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于语言的序数回归范例。现有的方法通常将每个排名视为一个类别，并采用一组权重来学习这些概念。这些方法很容易过拟合，并且通常效果不佳，因为学习的概念主要来自训练集。最近的大型预训练视觉语言模型（例如 CLIP）在各种视觉任务上表现出了令人印象深刻的性能。在本文中，我们建议从丰富的语义 CLIP 潜在空间中学习排名概念。具体来说，我们将这个任务重新表述为具有对比目标的图像语言匹配问题，它将标签视为文本，并从每个等级的文本编码器中获取语言原型。虽然 CLIP 的提示工程非常耗时，但我们提出了 OrdinalCLIP，这是一种可微提示方法，用于使 CLIP 适应序数回归。 OrdinalCLIP 由可学习的上下文标记和可学习的排名嵌入组成；可学习的排名嵌入是通过显式建模数值连续性来构建的，从而在 CLIP 空间中产生有序、紧凑的语言原型。一旦学习，我们只能保存语言原型并丢弃庞大的语言模型，与线性头对应物相比，额外的计算开销为零。实验结果表明，我们的范例在一般序数回归任务中实现了有竞争力的性能，并在年龄估计的少样本和分布偏移设置中获得了改进。代码可在 https://github.com/xk-huang/OrdinalCLIP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OrdinalCLIP方法，通过语言引导的序数回归任务，利用CLIP模型的语义空间学习排名概念。
AI.motivation: 现有序数回归方法易过拟合且性能不足，而CLIP等预训练视觉-语言模型具有强大的语义表示能力，可为序数概念学习提供更丰富的语义空间。
AI.method: 将序数回归转化为图像-语言匹配问题，通过对比目标将标签视为文本，生成每个等级的语言原型。提出可微分提示方法OrdinalCLIP，包含可学习的上下文标记和显式建模数值连续性的等级嵌入，最终仅需保存语言原型以实现零额外计算开销。
AI.result: 在通用序数回归任务中表现优异，在少量样本和分布偏移场景下（如年龄估计）取得性能提升。
AI.conclusion: OrdinalCLIP通过语言引导的序数概念学习，在保持高效计算的同时提升了序数回归的性能，尤其适用于数据稀缺或分布变化的场景。

authors_text: Yifei Li,Zeqi Lin,Shizhuo Zhang,Qiang Fu,Bei Chen,Jian-Guang Lou,Weizhu Chen
title: Making Large Language Models Better Reasoners with Step-Aware Verifier
title_zh: 使用逐步感知验证器使大型语言模型成为更好的推理器
abstract: Few-shot learning is a challenging task that requires language models to generalize from limited examples. Large language models like GPT-3 and PaLM have made impressive progress in this area, but they still face difficulties in reasoning tasks such as GSM8K, a benchmark for arithmetic problems. To improve their reasoning skills, previous work has proposed to guide the language model with prompts that elicit a series of reasoning steps before giving the final answer, achieving a significant improvement on GSM8K from 17.9% to 58.1% in problem-solving rate. In this paper, we present DIVERSE (Diverse Verifier on Reasoning Step), a novel approach that further enhances the reasoning capability of language models. DIVERSE has three main components: first, it generates diverse prompts to explore different reasoning paths for the same question; second, it uses a verifier to filter out incorrect answers based on a weighted voting scheme; and third, it verifies each reasoning step individually instead of the whole chain. We evaluate DIVERSE on the latest language model code-davinci-002 and show that it achieves new state-of-the-art results on six of eight reasoning benchmarks (e.g., GSM8K 74.4% to 83.2%).
summary: Few-shot learning is a challenging task that requires language models to generalize from limited examples. Large language models like GPT-3 and PaLM have made impressive progress in this area, but they still face difficulties in reasoning tasks such as GSM8K, a benchmark for arithmetic problems. To improve their reasoning skills, previous work has proposed to guide the language model with prompts that elicit a series of reasoning steps before giving the final answer, achieving a significant improvement on GSM8K from 17.9% to 58.1% in problem-solving rate. In this paper, we present DIVERSE (Diverse Verifier on Reasoning Step), a novel approach that further enhances the reasoning capability of language models. DIVERSE has three main components: first, it generates diverse prompts to explore different reasoning paths for the same question; second, it uses a verifier to filter out incorrect answers based on a weighted voting scheme; and third, it verifies each reasoning step individually instead of the whole chain. We evaluate DIVERSE on the latest language model code-davinci-002 and show that it achieves new state-of-the-art results on six of eight reasoning benchmarks (e.g., GSM8K 74.4% to 83.2%).
abstract_zh: 小样本学习是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要语言模型从有限的示例中进行概括。 GPT-3和PaLM等大型语言模型在这一领域取得了令人瞩目的进展，但它们在推理任务（例如算术问题的基准GSM8K）中仍然面临困难。为了提高推理能力，之前的工作提出用提示来引导语言模型，在给出最终答案之前引发一系列推理步骤，实现了 GSM8K 的问题解决率从 17.9% 显着提高到 58.1%。在本文中，我们提出了 DIVERSE（推理步骤多样化验证器），这是一种进一步增强语言模型推理能力的新方法。 DIVERSE具有三个主要组成部分：第一，它生成不同的提示，以探索同一问题的不同推理路径；其次，它使用验证器根据加权投票方案过滤掉不正确的答案；第三，它单独验证每个推理步骤而不是整个链条。我们在最新的语言模型代码 davinci-002 上评估 DIVERSE，并表明它在八个推理基准中的六个上取得了新的最先进结果（例如，GSM8K 74.4% 到 83.2%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DIVERSE方法，通过生成多样化提示、分步验证和加权投票机制，提升大型语言模型在数学推理任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有模型在少量样本学习上取得进展，但在需要复杂推理的任务（如GSM8K）中仍表现不足，需进一步优化推理能力。
AI.method: DIVERSE包含三个核心组件：1）生成多样化提示探索不同推理路径；2）通过加权投票过滤错误答案；3）对每个推理步骤进行独立验证而非整体验证。
AI.result: 在code-davinci-002模型上，DIVERSE在8个基准中的6个达到新SOTA，例如GSM8K正确率从74.4%提升至83.2%。
AI.conclusion: DIVERSE通过分步验证和多样化推理路径探索，有效提升了语言模型的数学推理能力，为复杂任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xiaofeng Gao,Xingwei Wu,Samson Ho,Teruhisa Misu,Kumar Akash
title: Effects of Augmented-Reality-Based Assisting Interfaces on Drivers' Object-wise Situational Awareness in Highly Autonomous Vehicles
title_zh: 基于增强现实的辅助界面对高度自主车辆中驾驶员的物体情境意识的影响
abstract: Although partially autonomous driving (AD) systems are already available in production vehicles, drivers are still required to maintain a sufficient level of situational awareness (SA) during driving. Previous studies have shown that providing information about the AD's capability using user interfaces can improve the driver's SA. However, displaying too much information increases the driver's workload and can distract or overwhelm the driver. Therefore, to design an efficient user interface (UI), it is necessary to understand its effect under different circumstances. In this paper, we focus on a UI based on augmented reality (AR), which can highlight potential hazards on the road. To understand the effect of highlighting on drivers' SA for objects with different types and locations under various traffic densities, we conducted an in-person experiment with 20 participants on a driving simulator. Our study results show that the effects of highlighting on drivers' SA varied by traffic densities, object locations and object types. We believe our study can provide guidance in selecting which object to highlight for the AR-based driver-assistance interface to optimize SA for drivers driving and monitoring partially autonomous vehicles.
summary: Although partially autonomous driving (AD) systems are already available in production vehicles, drivers are still required to maintain a sufficient level of situational awareness (SA) during driving. Previous studies have shown that providing information about the AD's capability using user interfaces can improve the driver's SA. However, displaying too much information increases the driver's workload and can distract or overwhelm the driver. Therefore, to design an efficient user interface (UI), it is necessary to understand its effect under different circumstances. In this paper, we focus on a UI based on augmented reality (AR), which can highlight potential hazards on the road. To understand the effect of highlighting on drivers' SA for objects with different types and locations under various traffic densities, we conducted an in-person experiment with 20 participants on a driving simulator. Our study results show that the effects of highlighting on drivers' SA varied by traffic densities, object locations and object types. We believe our study can provide guidance in selecting which object to highlight for the AR-based driver-assistance interface to optimize SA for drivers driving and monitoring partially autonomous vehicles.
abstract_zh: 尽管部分自动驾驶（AD）系统已经在量产车辆中使用，但驾驶员在驾驶过程中仍需要保持足够水平的态势感知（SA）。先前的研究表明，使用用户界面提供有关 AD 功能的信息可以提高驾驶员的 SA。然而，显示太多信息会增加驾驶员的工作量，并可能分散驾驶员的注意力或让驾驶员不知所措。因此，要设计一个高效的用户界面（UI），有必要了解其在不同情况下的效果。在本文中，我们重点研究基于增强现实（AR）的用户界面，它可以突出显示道路上的潜在危险。为了了解不同交通密度下不同类型和位置的物体的突出显示对驾驶员 SA 的影响，我们在驾驶模拟器上对 20 名参与者进行了亲身实验。我们的研究结果表明，突出显示对驾驶员 SA 的影响因交通密度、物体位置和物体类型而异。我们相信我们的研究可以为基于 AR 的驾驶员辅助界面选择突出显示的对象提供指导，从而优化驾驶员驾驶和监控部分自动驾驶车辆的 SA。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于增强现实（AR）的辅助界面如何影响高度自动驾驶车辆驾驶员对道路上不同物体的态势感知（SA），通过实验分析不同交通密度、物体位置和类型下的效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有部分自动驾驶系统已应用，但驾驶员仍需保持足够的态势感知。传统界面信息过多可能增加认知负担，需探索AR界面如何高效辅助驾驶员识别关键信息。
AI.method: 通过驾驶模拟器进行实验，邀请20名参与者测试AR界面在不同交通密度、物体位置和类型下对驾驶员态势感知的影响。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，AR界面的提示效果因交通密度、物体位置和类型的不同而显著变化，不同条件下驾驶员的态势感知表现差异明显。
AI.conclusion: 研究为AR辅助界面设计提供了指导，建议根据交通场景动态选择需突出显示的物体类型和位置，以优化驾驶员态势感知能力。

search_text: Effects of Augmented-Reality-Based Assisting Interfaces on Drivers' Object-wise Situational Awareness in Highly Autonomous Vehicles 基于增强现实的辅助界面对高度自主车辆中驾驶员的物体情境意识的影响 Although partially autonomous driving (AD) systems are already available in production vehicles, drivers are still required to maintain a sufficient level of situational awareness (SA) during driving. Previous studies have shown that providing information about the AD's capability using user interfaces can improve the driver's SA. However, displaying too much information increases the driver's workload and can distract or overwhelm the driver. Therefore, to design an efficient user interface (UI), it is necessary to understand its effect under different circumstances. In this paper, we focus on a UI based on augmented reality (AR), which can highlight potential hazards on the road. To understand the effect of highlighting on drivers' SA for objects with different types and locations under various traffic densities, we conducted an in-person experiment with 20 participants on a driving simulator. Our study results show that the effects of highlighting on drivers' SA varied by traffic densities, object locations and object types. We believe our study can provide guidance in selecting which object to highlight for the AR-based driver-assistance interface to optimize SA for drivers driving and monitoring partially autonomous vehicles. 尽管部分自动驾驶（AD）系统已经在量产车辆中使用，但驾驶员在驾驶过程中仍需要保持足够水平的态势感知（SA）。先前的研究表明，使用用户界面提供有关 AD 功能的信息可以提高驾驶员的 SA。然而，显示太多信息会增加驾驶员的工作量，并可能分散驾驶员的注意力或让驾驶员不知所措。因此，要设计一个高效的用户界面（UI），有必要了解其在不同情况下的效果。在本文中，我们重点研究基于增强现实（AR）的用户界面，它可以突出显示道路上的潜在危险。为了了解不同交通密度下不同类型和位置的物体的突出显示对驾驶员 SA 的影响，我们在驾驶模拟器上对 20 名参与者进行了亲身实验。我们的研究结果表明，突出显示对驾驶员 SA 的影响因交通密度、物体位置和物体类型而异。我们相信我们的研究可以为基于 AR 的驾驶员辅助界面选择突出显示的对象提供指导，从而优化驾驶员驾驶和监控部分自动驾驶车辆的 SA。 本文研究基于增强现实（AR）的辅助界面如何影响高度自动驾驶车辆驾驶员对道路上不同物体的态势感知（SA），通过实验分析不同交通密度、物体位置和类型下的效果。 Xiaofeng Gao,Xingwei Wu,Samson Ho,Teruhisa Misu,Kumar Akash cs.HC,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Hongbin Zhou,Yupeng Ren,Qiankun Li,Jun Yin,Yonggang Lin
title: MASNet:Improve Performance of Siamese Networks with Mutual-attention for Remote Sensing Change Detection Tasks
title_zh: MASNet：通过相互关注提高连体网络在遥感变化检测任务中的性能
abstract: Siamese networks are widely used for remote sensing change detection tasks. A vanilla siamese network has two identical feature extraction branches which share weights, these two branches work independently and the feature maps are not fused until about to be sent to a decoder head. However we find that it is critical to exchange information between two feature extraction branches at early stage for change detection task. In this work we present Mutual-Attention Siamese Network (MASNet), a general siamese network with mutual-attention plug-in, so to exchange information between the two feature extraction branches. We show that our modification improve the performance of siamese networks on multi change detection datasets, and it works for both convolutional neural network and visual transformer.
summary: Siamese networks are widely used for remote sensing change detection tasks. A vanilla siamese network has two identical feature extraction branches which share weights, these two branches work independently and the feature maps are not fused until about to be sent to a decoder head. However we find that it is critical to exchange information between two feature extraction branches at early stage for change detection task. In this work we present Mutual-Attention Siamese Network (MASNet), a general siamese network with mutual-attention plug-in, so to exchange information between the two feature extraction branches. We show that our modification improve the performance of siamese networks on multi change detection datasets, and it works for both convolutional neural network and visual transformer.
abstract_zh: 连体网络广泛用于遥感变化检测任务。普通暹罗网络有两个相同的特征提取分支，它们共享权重，这两个分支独立工作，并且特征图在发送到解码器头之前不会融合。然而，我们发现在早期阶段在两个特征提取分支之间交换信息对于变化检测任务至关重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了相互注意连体网络（MASNet），这是一个带有相互注意插件的通用连体网络，以便在两个特征提取分支之间交换信息。我们表明，我们的修改提高了暹罗网络在多变化检测数据集上的性能，并且它适用于卷积神经网络和视觉变压器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MASNet，通过引入互注意机制改进孪生网络在遥感变化检测任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统孪生网络的两个分支在早期阶段独立工作，特征融合较晚，限制了信息交互，影响变化检测效果。
AI.method: 设计互注意机制作为插件，使两个特征提取分支在早期阶段交换信息，增强特征交互。
AI.result: MASNet在多个变化检测数据集上优于基线方法，且适用于卷积神经网络和视觉Transformer。
AI.conclusion: 互注意机制有效提升了孪生网络在遥感变化检测中的性能，证明了早期信息交互的重要性，并具有方法通用性。

authors_text: Jaime Moraga
title: JigsawHSI: a network for Hyperspectral Image classification
title_zh: JigsawHSI：高光谱图像分类网络
abstract: This article describes Jigsaw, a convolutional neural network (CNN) used in geosciences and based on Inception but tailored for geoscientific analyses. Introduces JigsawHSI (based on Jigsaw) and uses it on the land-use land-cover (LULC) classification problem with the Indian Pines, Pavia University and Salinas hyperspectral image data sets. The network is compared against HybridSN, a spectral-spatial 3D-CNN followed by 2D-CNN that achieves state-of-the-art results on the datasets. This short article proves that JigsawHSI is able to meet or exceed HybridSN's performance in all three cases. It also introduces a generalized Jigsaw architecture in d-dimensional space for any number of multimodal inputs. Additionally, the use of jigsaw in geosciences is highlighted, while the code and toolkit are made available.
summary: This article describes Jigsaw, a convolutional neural network (CNN) used in geosciences and based on Inception but tailored for geoscientific analyses. Introduces JigsawHSI (based on Jigsaw) and uses it on the land-use land-cover (LULC) classification problem with the Indian Pines, Pavia University and Salinas hyperspectral image data sets. The network is compared against HybridSN, a spectral-spatial 3D-CNN followed by 2D-CNN that achieves state-of-the-art results on the datasets. This short article proves that JigsawHSI is able to meet or exceed HybridSN's performance in all three cases. It also introduces a generalized Jigsaw architecture in d-dimensional space for any number of multimodal inputs. Additionally, the use of jigsaw in geosciences is highlighted, while the code and toolkit are made available.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Jigsaw，这是一种用于地球科学的卷积神经网络 (CNN)，基于 Inception，但专为地球科学分析而定制。引入 JigsawHSI（基于 Jigsaw），并将其用于印第安松树、帕维亚大学和萨利纳斯高光谱图像数据集的土地利用土地覆盖 (LULC) 分类问题。该网络与 HybridSN 进行了比较，HybridSN 是一个光谱空间 3D-CNN，随后是 2D-CNN，在数据集上取得了最先进的结果。这篇短文证明了 JigsawHSI 在所有三种情况下都能够达到或超过 HybridSN 的性能。它还为任意数量的多模态输入引入了 d 维空间中的广义 Jigsaw 架构。此外，还强调了拼图在地球科学中的使用，同时提供了代码和工具包。

AI.tldr: 本文提出JigsawHSI网络用于高光谱图像分类，并在多个数据集上验证其性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理高光谱图像分类时存在性能瓶颈，需更高效的多模态输入处理架构。
AI.method: 基于Inception改进的Jigsaw网络结构，适配多维空间并应用于土地利用分类任务。
AI.result: JigsawHSI在Indian Pines等三个数据集上性能优于或等于HybridSN，且提出通用d维架构。
AI.conclusion: JigsawHSI验证了其在高光谱分类中的有效性，通用架构和工具包可促进地球科学应用。

Additionally, the use of jigsaw in geosciences is highlighted, while the code and toolkit are made available. 本文介绍了 Jigsaw，这是一种用于地球科学的卷积神经网络 (CNN)，基于 Inception，但专为地球科学分析而定制。引入 JigsawHSI（基于 Jigsaw），并将其用于印第安松树、帕维亚大学和萨利纳斯高光谱图像数据集的土地利用土地覆盖 (LULC) 分类问题。该网络与 HybridSN 进行了比较，HybridSN 是一个光谱空间 3D-CNN，随后是 2D-CNN，在数据集上取得了最先进的结果。这篇短文证明了 JigsawHSI 在所有三种情况下都能够达到或超过 HybridSN 的性能。它还为任意数量的多模态输入引入了 d 维空间中的广义 Jigsaw 架构。此外，还强调了拼图在地球科学中的使用，同时提供了代码和工具包。 本文提出JigsawHSI网络用于高光谱图像分类，并在多个数据集上验证其性能。 Jaime Moraga cs.CV,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Yuge Huang,Jiaxiang Wu,Xingkun Xu,Shouhong Ding
title: Evaluation-oriented Knowledge Distillation for Deep Face Recognition
title_zh: 面向评估的深度人脸识别知识蒸馏
abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) is a widely-used technique that utilizes large networks to improve the performance of compact models. Previous KD approaches usually aim to guide the student to mimic the teacher's behavior completely in the representation space. However, such one-to-one corresponding constraints may lead to inflexible knowledge transfer from the teacher to the student, especially those with low model capacities. Inspired by the ultimate goal of KD methods, we propose a novel Evaluation oriented KD method (EKD) for deep face recognition to directly reduce the performance gap between the teacher and student models during training. Specifically, we adopt the commonly used evaluation metrics in face recognition, i.e., False Positive Rate (FPR) and True Positive Rate (TPR) as the performance indicator. According to the evaluation protocol, the critical pair relations that cause the TPR and FPR difference between the teacher and student models are selected. Then, the critical relations in the student are constrained to approximate the corresponding ones in the teacher by a novel rank-based loss function, giving more flexibility to the student with low capacity. Extensive experimental results on popular benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of our EKD over state-of-the-art competitors.
summary: Knowledge distillation (KD) is a widely-used technique that utilizes large networks to improve the performance of compact models. Previous KD approaches usually aim to guide the student to mimic the teacher's behavior completely in the representation space. However, such one-to-one corresponding constraints may lead to inflexible knowledge transfer from the teacher to the student, especially those with low model capacities. Inspired by the ultimate goal of KD methods, we propose a novel Evaluation oriented KD method (EKD) for deep face recognition to directly reduce the performance gap between the teacher and student models during training. Specifically, we adopt the commonly used evaluation metrics in face recognition, i.e., False Positive Rate (FPR) and True Positive Rate (TPR) as the performance indicator. According to the evaluation protocol, the critical pair relations that cause the TPR and FPR difference between the teacher and student models are selected. Then, the critical relations in the student are constrained to approximate the corresponding ones in the teacher by a novel rank-based loss function, giving more flexibility to the student with low capacity. Extensive experimental results on popular benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of our EKD over state-of-the-art competitors.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏（KD）是一种广泛使用的技术，它利用大型网络来提高紧凑模型的性能。以前的 KD 方法通常旨在引导学生在表征空间中完全模仿教师的行为。然而，这种一对一对应的约束可能会导致从教师到学生的知识转移不灵活，尤其是那些模型能力较低的学生。受 KD 方法最终目标的启发，我们提出了一种新颖的面向深度人脸识别的评估导向 KD 方法（EKD），以直接缩小训练期间教师和学生模型之间的性能差距。具体来说，我们采用人脸识别中常用的评估指标，即假阳性率（FPR）和真阳性率（TPR）作为性能指标。根据评估协议，选择导致教师模型和学生模型之间TPR和FPR差异的关键配对关系。然后，通过一种新颖的基于排名的损失函数，将学生中的关键关系限制为近似教师中的相应关系，从而为能力较低的学生提供更大的灵活性。针对流行基准的大量实验结果证明了我们的 EKD 相对于最先进的竞争对手的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向评估的深度人脸识别知识蒸馏方法（EKD），旨在通过优化学生模型与教师模型的性能差距来提升紧凑模型的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏方法强制学生模型完全模仿教师模型的表示空间，可能导致低容量模型知识传递不灵活，无法有效缩小性能差距。
AI.method: 采用人脸识别常用评估指标（FPR和TPR）作为性能指标，通过筛选教师与学生模型间的关键样本对，设计基于排序的损失函数约束学生模型的关键关系。
AI.result: 在主流基准数据集上实验表明，EKD方法在性能上优于现有最先进方法，有效缩小了教师与学生模型的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: EKD方法通过直接优化评估指标，为低容量学生模型提供了更灵活的知识传递方式，显著提升了深度人脸识别中的知识蒸馏效果。

authors_text: Nader Zare,Aref Sayareh,Mahtab Sarvmaili,Omid Amini,Amilcar Soares,Stan Matwin
title: CYRUS Soccer Simulation 2D Team Description Paper 2021
title_zh: CYRUS 足球模拟 2D 球队描述文件 2021
abstract: In this report, we briefly present the technical procedure and simulation steps for the 2D soccer simulation of team Cyrus. We emphasize on this document on how the prediction of teammates' behavior is performed. In our proposed method, the agent receives the noisy inputs from the server, and predicts the ball holder full state behavior. Taking advantage of this approach for choosing the optimal view angle shows 11.30% improvement on the expected win rate.
summary: In this report, we briefly present the technical procedure and simulation steps for the 2D soccer simulation of team Cyrus. We emphasize on this document on how the prediction of teammates' behavior is performed. In our proposed method, the agent receives the noisy inputs from the server, and predicts the ball holder full state behavior. Taking advantage of this approach for choosing the optimal view angle shows 11.30% improvement on the expected win rate.
abstract_zh: 在本报告中，我们简要介绍了 Cyrus 队的 2D 足球模拟的技术流程和模拟步骤。我们在这篇文档中强调了如何预测队友的行为。在我们提出的方法中，代理接收来自服务器的噪声输入，并预测球持有者的全状态行为。利用这种方法来选择最佳视角，预期获胜率提高了 11.30%。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了CYRUS团队在2D足球模拟中的技术流程和步骤，重点阐述了队友行为预测方法。
AI.motivation: 通过准确预测队友行为以优化决策，提升团队在模拟比赛中的表现和胜率。
AI.method: 代理接收服务器噪声输入，预测持球者完整状态行为，并基于此选择最佳视角。
AI.result: 预期胜率提升11.30%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过行为预测优化视角选择，有效提升了团队在模拟中的表现。

authors_text: Chenyu You,Weicheng Dai,Yifei Min,Lawrence Staib,James S. Duncan
title: Bootstrapping Semi-supervised Medical Image Segmentation with Anatomical-aware Contrastive Distillation
title_zh: 通过解剖感知对比蒸馏引导半监督医学图像分割
comment: Accepted at Information Processing in Medical Imaging (IPMI 2023)
comments: Accepted at Information Processing in Medical Imaging (IPMI 2023)
abstract: Contrastive learning has shown great promise over annotation scarcity problems in the context of medical image segmentation. Existing approaches typically assume a balanced class distribution for both labeled and unlabeled medical images. However, medical image data in reality is commonly imbalanced (i.e., multi-class label imbalance), which naturally yields blurry contours and usually incorrectly labels rare objects. Moreover, it remains unclear whether all negative samples are equally negative. In this work, we present ACTION, an Anatomical-aware ConTrastive dIstillatiON framework, for semi-supervised medical image segmentation. Specifically, we first develop an iterative contrastive distillation algorithm by softly labeling the negatives rather than binary supervision between positive and negative pairs. We also capture more semantically similar features from the randomly chosen negative set compared to the positives to enforce the diversity of the sampled data. Second, we raise a more important question: Can we really handle imbalanced samples to yield better performance? Hence, the key innovation in ACTION is to learn global semantic relationship across the entire dataset and local anatomical features among the neighbouring pixels with minimal additional memory footprint. During the training, we introduce anatomical contrast by actively sampling a sparse set of hard negative pixels, which can generate smoother segmentation boundaries and more accurate predictions. Extensive experiments across two benchmark datasets and different unlabeled settings show that ACTION significantly outperforms the current state-of-the-art semi-supervised methods.
summary: Contrastive learning has shown great promise over annotation scarcity problems in the context of medical image segmentation. Existing approaches typically assume a balanced class distribution for both labeled and unlabeled medical images. However, medical image data in reality is commonly imbalanced (i.e., multi-class label imbalance), which naturally yields blurry contours and usually incorrectly labels rare objects. Moreover, it remains unclear whether all negative samples are equally negative. In this work, we present ACTION, an Anatomical-aware ConTrastive dIstillatiON framework, for semi-supervised medical image segmentation. Specifically, we first develop an iterative contrastive distillation algorithm by softly labeling the negatives rather than binary supervision between positive and negative pairs. We also capture more semantically similar features from the randomly chosen negative set compared to the positives to enforce the diversity of the sampled data. Second, we raise a more important question: Can we really handle imbalanced samples to yield better performance? Hence, the key innovation in ACTION is to learn global semantic relationship across the entire dataset and local anatomical features among the neighbouring pixels with minimal additional memory footprint. During the training, we introduce anatomical contrast by actively sampling a sparse set of hard negative pixels, which can generate smoother segmentation boundaries and more accurate predictions. Extensive experiments across two benchmark datasets and different unlabeled settings show that ACTION significantly outperforms the current state-of-the-art semi-supervised methods.
abstract_zh: 对比学习在医学图像分割背景下的注释稀缺问题上显示出了巨大的前景。现有方法通常假设标记和未标记的医学图像具有平衡的类分布。然而，现实中的医学图像数据通常是不平衡的（即多类标签不平衡），这自然会产生模糊的轮廓，并且通常会错误地标记稀有物体。此外，目前还不清楚是否所有负样本都是同样的负样本。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ACTION，一种解剖感知的对比蒸馏框架，用于半监督医学图像分割。具体来说，我们首先通过软标记负数而不是正负对之间的二元监督来开发迭代对比蒸馏算法。与正例相比，我们还从随机选择的负例集中捕获更多语义相似的特征，以增强采样数据的多样性。其次，我们提出一个更重要的问题：我们真的可以处理不平衡样本以获得更好的性能吗？因此，ACTION 的关键创新是以最小的额外内存占用来学习整个数据集的全局语义关系和相邻像素之间的局部解剖特征。在训练过程中，我们通过主动采样一组稀疏的硬负像素来引入解剖对比度，这可以生成更平滑的分割边界和更准确的预测。跨两个基准数据集和不同的未标记设置的广泛实验表明，ACTION 显着优于当前最先进的半监督方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ACTION框架，通过解剖感知的对比蒸馏方法解决医学图像分割中标签不平衡和负样本质量差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督医学图像分割方法假设数据类别平衡，但实际医学图像存在多类别标签不平衡问题，导致分割边界模糊和罕见目标误标，且未明确区分负样本质量差异。
AI.method: 设计迭代对比蒸馏算法，通过软标签替代二元监督处理负样本；利用随机负样本集提取语义相似特征；引入解剖对比机制，主动采样硬负像素以学习全局语义关系和局部解剖特征。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集的多种未标注设置下，ACTION显著优于当前最先进的半监督分割方法。
AI.conclusion: ACTION通过解剖感知的对比蒸馏有效处理标签不平衡问题，在保持低内存消耗的同时提升了分割边界准确性和预测精度。

search_text: Bootstrapping Semi-supervised Medical Image Segmentation with Anatomical-aware Contrastive Distillation 通过解剖感知对比蒸馏引导半监督医学图像分割 Contrastive learning has shown great promise over annotation scarcity problems in the context of medical image segmentation. Existing approaches typically assume a balanced class distribution for both labeled and unlabeled medical images. However, medical image data in reality is commonly imbalanced (i.e., multi-class label imbalance), which naturally yields blurry contours and usually incorrectly labels rare objects. Moreover, it remains unclear whether all negative samples are equally negative. In this work, we present ACTION, an Anatomical-aware ConTrastive dIstillatiON framework, for semi-supervised medical image segmentation. Specifically, we first develop an iterative contrastive distillation algorithm by softly labeling the negatives rather than binary supervision between positive and negative pairs. We also capture more semantically similar features from the randomly chosen negative set compared to the positives to enforce the diversity of the sampled data. Second, we raise a more important question: Can we really handle imbalanced samples to yield better performance? Hence, the key innovation in ACTION is to learn global semantic relationship across the entire dataset and local anatomical features among the neighbouring pixels with minimal additional memory footprint. During the training, we introduce anatomical contrast by actively sampling a sparse set of hard negative pixels, which can generate smoother segmentation boundaries and more accurate predictions. Extensive experiments across two benchmark datasets and different unlabeled settings show that ACTION significantly outperforms the current state-of-the-art semi-supervised methods. 对比学习在医学图像分割背景下的注释稀缺问题上显示出了巨大的前景。现有方法通常假设标记和未标记的医学图像具有平衡的类分布。然而，现实中的医学图像数据通常是不平衡的（即多类标签不平衡），这自然会产生模糊的轮廓，并且通常会错误地标记稀有物体。此外，目前还不清楚是否所有负样本都是同样的负样本。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ACTION，一种解剖感知的对比蒸馏框架，用于半监督医学图像分割。具体来说，我们首先通过软标记负数而不是正负对之间的二元监督来开发迭代对比蒸馏算法。与正例相比，我们还从随机选择的负例集中捕获更多语义相似的特征，以增强采样数据的多样性。其次，我们提出一个更重要的问题：我们真的可以处理不平衡样本以获得更好的性能吗？因此，ACTION 的关键创新是以最小的额外内存占用来学习整个数据集的全局语义关系和相邻像素之间的局部解剖特征。在训练过程中，我们通过主动采样一组稀疏的硬负像素来引入解剖对比度，这可以生成更平滑的分割边界和更准确的预测。跨两个基准数据集和不同的未标记设置的广泛实验表明，ACTION 显着优于当前最先进的半监督方法。 本文提出ACTION框架，通过解剖感知的对比蒸馏方法解决医学图像分割中标签不平衡和负样本质量差异问题。 Chenyu You,Weicheng Dai,Yifei Min,Lawrence Staib,James S. Duncan cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Sathwik Karnik,Tomás Lozano-Pérez,Leslie Pack Kaelbling,Gustavo Nunes Goretkin
title: Fully Persistent Spatial Data Structures for Efficient Queries in Path-Dependent Motion Planning Applications
title_zh: 完全持久的空间数据结构，可在路径相关的运动规划应用中进行高效查询
comment: Presented at the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) and will appear in the official proceedings
comments: Presented at the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) and will appear in the official proceedings
abstract: Motion planning is a ubiquitous problem that is often a bottleneck in robotic applications. We demonstrate that motion planning problems such as minimum constraint removal, belief-space planning, and visibility-aware motion planning (VAMP) benefit from a path-dependent formulation, in which the state at a search node is represented implicitly by the path to that node. A naive approach to computing the feasibility of a successor node in such a path-dependent formulation takes time linear in the path length to the node, in contrast to a (possibly very large) constant time for a more typical search formulation. For long-horizon plans, performing this linear-time computation, which we call the lookback, for each node becomes prohibitive. To improve upon this, we introduce the use of a fully persistent spatial data structure (FPSDS), which bounds the size of the lookback. We then focus on the application of the FPSDS in VAMP, which involves incremental geometric computations that can be accelerated by filtering configurations with bounding volumes using nearest-neighbor data structures. We demonstrate an asymptotic and practical improvement in the runtime of finding VAMP solutions in several illustrative domains. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first use of a fully persistent data structure for accelerating motion planning.
summary: Motion planning is a ubiquitous problem that is often a bottleneck in robotic applications. We demonstrate that motion planning problems such as minimum constraint removal, belief-space planning, and visibility-aware motion planning (VAMP) benefit from a path-dependent formulation, in which the state at a search node is represented implicitly by the path to that node. A naive approach to computing the feasibility of a successor node in such a path-dependent formulation takes time linear in the path length to the node, in contrast to a (possibly very large) constant time for a more typical search formulation. For long-horizon plans, performing this linear-time computation, which we call the lookback, for each node becomes prohibitive. To improve upon this, we introduce the use of a fully persistent spatial data structure (FPSDS), which bounds the size of the lookback. We then focus on the application of the FPSDS in VAMP, which involves incremental geometric computations that can be accelerated by filtering configurations with bounding volumes using nearest-neighbor data structures. We demonstrate an asymptotic and practical improvement in the runtime of finding VAMP solutions in several illustrative domains. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first use of a fully persistent data structure for accelerating motion planning.
abstract_zh: 运动规划是一个普遍存在的问题，通常是机器人应用中的瓶颈。我们证明了运动规划问题（例如最小约束去除、置信空间规划和可见性感知运动规划（VAMP））受益于路径相关的公式，其中搜索节点的状态由到该节点的路径隐式表示。在这种路径相关的公式中计算后继节点的可行性的简单方法需要与节点的路径长度成线性关系的时间，这与更典型的搜索公式的（可能非常大）恒定时间相反。对于长期计划，为每个节点执行这种线性时间计算（我们称之为回溯）变得令人望而却步。为了改进这一点，我们引入了完全持久的空间数据结构（FPSDS）的使用，它限制了回溯的大小。然后，我们重点关注 FPSDS 在 VAMP 中的应用，其中涉及增量几何计算，可以通过使用最近邻数据结构过滤具有边界体积的配置来加速计算。我们展示了在几个说明性领域中寻找 VAMP 解决方案的运行时的渐近且实用的改进。据我们所知，这是首次使用完全持久的数据结构来加速运动规划。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种全持久化空间数据结构（FPSDS），用于优化路径依赖型运动规划中的查询效率，通过减少路径回溯时间来加速规划过程。
AI.motivation: 传统路径依赖型运动规划方法在计算节点可行性时需线性时间回溯路径，导致长路径规划效率低下，亟需更高效的数据结构优化。
AI.method: 引入全持久化空间数据结构（FPSDS）以限制回溯规模，并结合包围盒与最近邻数据结构加速VAMP（可见性感知运动规划）中的几何计算。
AI.result: 在多个示例领域中，VAMP解决方案的运行时间实现了渐近级和实际应用中的显著提升。
AI.conclusion: FPSDS是首个应用于运动规划的全持久化数据结构，有效解决了路径依赖型规划的效率瓶颈问题。

A naive approach to computing the feasibility of a successor node in such a path-dependent formulation takes time linear in the path length to the node, in contrast to a (possibly very large) constant time for a more typical search formulation. For long-horizon plans, performing this linear-time computation, which we call the lookback, for each node becomes prohibitive. To improve upon this, we introduce the use of a fully persistent spatial data structure (FPSDS), which bounds the size of the lookback. We then focus on the application of the FPSDS in VAMP, which involves incremental geometric computations that can be accelerated by filtering configurations with bounding volumes using nearest-neighbor data structures. We demonstrate an asymptotic and practical improvement in the runtime of finding VAMP solutions in several illustrative domains. authors_text: Jiajia Zhou,Junbin Zhuang,Yan Zheng,Di Wu
title: HIFI-Net: A Novel Network for Enhancement to Underwater Images
title_zh: HIFI-Net：一种增强水下图像的新型网络
abstract: A novel network for enhancement to underwater images is proposed in this paper. It contains a Reinforcement Fusion Module for Haar wavelet images (RFM-Haar) based on Reinforcement Fusion Unit (RFU), which is used to fuse an original image and some important information within it. Fusion is achieved for better enhancement. As this network make "Haar Images into Fusion Images", it is called HIFI-Net. The experimental results show the proposed HIFI-Net performs best among many state-of-the-art methods on three datasets at three normal metrics and a new metric.
summary: A novel network for enhancement to underwater images is proposed in this paper. It contains a Reinforcement Fusion Module for Haar wavelet images (RFM-Haar) based on Reinforcement Fusion Unit (RFU), which is used to fuse an original image and some important information within it. Fusion is achieved for better enhancement. As this network make "Haar Images into Fusion Images", it is called HIFI-Net. The experimental results show the proposed HIFI-Net performs best among many state-of-the-art methods on three datasets at three normal metrics and a new metric.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于增强水下图像的新型网络。它包含一个基于强化融合单元（RFU）的哈尔小波图像强化融合模块（RFM-Haar），用于融合原始图像和其中的一些重要信息。融合是为了更好的增强而实现的。由于该网络将“Haar 图像转化为融合图像”，因此被称为 HIFI-Net。实验结果表明，所提出的 HIFI-Net 在三个数据集、三个正常指标和一个新指标上的许多最先进方法中表现最好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为HIFI-Net的新网络，用于水下图像增强，通过融合原始图像与重要信息提升效果。
AI.motivation: 现有水下图像增强方法在融合原始图像与关键信息时存在不足，需更高效的融合机制以提升增强效果。
AI.method: 设计基于强化融合单元（RFU）的RFM-Haar模块，将Haar小波图像与原始图像融合生成增强图像。
AI.result: HIFI-Net在三个数据集上于三个常规指标及新指标均优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: HIFI-Net通过创新融合机制有效提升了水下图像增强性能，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Sachin Gavali,Karen Ross,Chuming Chen,Julie Cowart,Cathy H. Wu
title: A knowledge graph representation learning approach to predict novel kinase-substrate interactions
title_zh: 预测新型激酶-底物相互作用的知识图表示学习方法
abstract: The human proteome contains a vast network of interacting kinases and substrates. Even though some kinases have proven to be immensely useful as therapeutic targets, a majority are still understudied. In this work, we present a novel knowledge graph representation learning approach to predict novel interaction partners for understudied kinases. Our approach uses a phosphoproteomic knowledge graph constructed by integrating data from iPTMnet, Protein Ontology, Gene Ontology and BioKG. The representation of kinases and substrates in this knowledge graph are learned by performing directed random walks on triples coupled with a modified SkipGram or CBOW model. These representations are then used as an input to a supervised classification model to predict novel interactions for understudied kinases. We also present a post-predictive analysis of the predicted interactions and an ablation study of the phosphoproteomic knowledge graph to gain an insight into the biology of the understudied kinases.
summary: The human proteome contains a vast network of interacting kinases and substrates. Even though some kinases have proven to be immensely useful as therapeutic targets, a majority are still understudied. In this work, we present a novel knowledge graph representation learning approach to predict novel interaction partners for understudied kinases. Our approach uses a phosphoproteomic knowledge graph constructed by integrating data from iPTMnet, Protein Ontology, Gene Ontology and BioKG. The representation of kinases and substrates in this knowledge graph are learned by performing directed random walks on triples coupled with a modified SkipGram or CBOW model. These representations are then used as an input to a supervised classification model to predict novel interactions for understudied kinases. We also present a post-predictive analysis of the predicted interactions and an ablation study of the phosphoproteomic knowledge graph to gain an insight into the biology of the understudied kinases.
abstract_zh: 人类蛋白质组包含相互作用的激酶和底物的庞大网络。尽管一些激酶已被证明作为治疗靶点非常有用，但大多数激酶仍没有得到充分研究。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的知识图表示学习方法来预测未充分研究的激酶的新相互作用伙伴。我们的方法使用通过整合 iPTMnet、Protein Ontology、Gene Ontology 和 BioKG 的数据构建的磷酸化蛋白质组学知识图。该知识图中激酶和底物的表示是通过对三元组执行定向随机游走并结合修改的 SkipGram 或 CBOW 模型来学习的。然后将这些表示用作监督分类模型的输入，以预测未充分研究的激酶的新相互作用。我们还对预测的相互作用进行了事后预测分析，并对磷酸化蛋白质组知识图进行了消融研究，以深入了解所研究的激酶的生物学。

AI.motivation: 人类蛋白质组中存在大量激酶-底物相互作用网络，但多数激酶尚未被充分研究，亟需有效方法预测其潜在相互作用。
AI.method: 整合iPTMnet、Protein Ontology等数据库构建磷酸化蛋白质知识图谱，通过定向随机游走结合改进的SkipGram/CBOW模型学习节点表示，并输入监督分类模型预测新相互作用。
AI.result: 成功预测出未研究激酶的潜在相互作用，并通过事后分析和消融实验验证了方法的有效性及生物学意义。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为激酶功能研究提供新思路，同时展示了知识图谱在生物医学预测中的应用潜力。

authors_text: Xiaofeng Liu,Fangxu Xing,Nadya Shusharina,Ruth Lim,C-C Jay Kuo,Georges El Fakhri,Jonghye Woo
title: ACT: Semi-supervised Domain-adaptive Medical Image Segmentation with Asymmetric Co-training
title_zh: ACT：具有非对称协同训练的半监督领域自适应医学图像分割
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) has been vastly explored to alleviate domain shifts between source and target domains, by applying a well-performed model in an unlabeled target domain via supervision of a labeled source domain. Recent literature, however, has indicated that the performance is still far from satisfactory in the presence of significant domain shifts. Nonetheless, delineating a few target samples is usually manageable and particularly worthwhile, due to the substantial performance gain. Inspired by this, we aim to develop semi-supervised domain adaptation (SSDA) for medical image segmentation, which is largely underexplored. We, thus, propose to exploit both labeled source and target domain data, in addition to unlabeled target data in a unified manner. Specifically, we present a novel asymmetric co-training (ACT) framework to integrate these subsets and avoid the domination of the source domain data. Following a divide-and-conquer strategy, we explicitly decouple the label supervisions in SSDA into two asymmetric sub-tasks, including semi-supervised learning (SSL) and UDA, and leverage different knowledge from two segmentors to take into account the distinction between the source and target label supervisions. The knowledge learned in the two modules is then adaptively integrated with ACT, by iteratively teaching each other, based on the confidence-aware pseudo-label. In addition, pseudo label noise is well-controlled with an exponential MixUp decay scheme for smooth propagation. Experiments on cross-modality brain tumor MRI segmentation tasks using the BraTS18 database showed, even with limited labeled target samples, ACT yielded marked improvements over UDA and state-of-the-art SSDA methods and approached an "upper bound" of supervised joint training.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) has been vastly explored to alleviate domain shifts between source and target domains, by applying a well-performed model in an unlabeled target domain via supervision of a labeled source domain. Recent literature, however, has indicated that the performance is still far from satisfactory in the presence of significant domain shifts. Nonetheless, delineating a few target samples is usually manageable and particularly worthwhile, due to the substantial performance gain. Inspired by this, we aim to develop semi-supervised domain adaptation (SSDA) for medical image segmentation, which is largely underexplored. We, thus, propose to exploit both labeled source and target domain data, in addition to unlabeled target data in a unified manner. Specifically, we present a novel asymmetric co-training (ACT) framework to integrate these subsets and avoid the domination of the source domain data. Following a divide-and-conquer strategy, we explicitly decouple the label supervisions in SSDA into two asymmetric sub-tasks, including semi-supervised learning (SSL) and UDA, and leverage different knowledge from two segmentors to take into account the distinction between the source and target label supervisions. The knowledge learned in the two modules is then adaptively integrated with ACT, by iteratively teaching each other, based on the confidence-aware pseudo-label. In addition, pseudo label noise is well-controlled with an exponential MixUp decay scheme for smooth propagation. Experiments on cross-modality brain tumor MRI segmentation tasks using the BraTS18 database showed, even with limited labeled target samples, ACT yielded marked improvements over UDA and state-of-the-art SSDA methods and approached an "upper bound" of supervised joint training.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应（UDA）已被广泛探索，通过对标记源域的监督，在未标记目标域中应用性能良好的模型，以减轻源域和目标域之间的域转移。然而，最近的文献表明，在存在重大域转移的情况下，性能仍然远不能令人满意。尽管如此，由于性能的显着提升，描绘一些目标样本通常是易于管理的，并且特别值得。受此启发，我们的目标是开发用于医学图像分割的半监督域适应（SSDA），这在很大程度上尚未得到充分探索。因此，除了未标记的目标数据之外，我们建议以统一的方式利用标记的源域数据和目标域数据。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的非对称协同训练（ACT）框架来集成这些子集并避免源域数据的支配。按照分而治之的策略，我们将 SSDA 中的标签监督明确地解耦为两个不对称子任务，包括半监督学习（SSL）和 UDA，并利用两个分割器的不同知识来考虑源标签监督和目标标签监督之间的区别。然后，基于置信感知伪标签，通过迭代相互教学，将两个模块中学到的知识自适应地与 ACT 集成。此外，通过指数 MixUp 衰减方案可以很好地控制伪标签噪声，以实现平滑传播。使用 BraTS18 数据库进行的跨模态脑肿瘤 MRI 分割任务实验表明，即使标记目标样本有限，ACT 也比 UDA 和最先进的 SSDA 方法取得了显着改进，并接近监督联合训练的“上限”。

AI.tldr: 提出一种半监督领域自适应方法ACT，用于解决医学图像分割中的领域差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现有UDA方法在显著领域差异下效果有限，而标注少量目标样本可提升性能，但半监督领域自适应（SSDA）在医学图像分割中研究不足。
AI.method: 提出ACT框架，结合源域和目标域数据，采用不对称共训练策略，将监督分为SSL和UDA子任务，利用伪标签和MixUp衰减控制噪声。
AI.result: 在BraTS18数据集上，ACT在少量标注目标样本下显著优于UDA和现有SSDA方法，接近监督联合训练的上限。
AI.conclusion: ACT有效缓解了领域差异，为医学图像分割的半监督领域自适应提供了新思路。

ai_content.conclusion: ACT有效缓解了领域差异，为医学图像分割的半监督领域自适应提供了新思路。

authors_text: Kyle Otstot,Andrew Yang,John Kevin Cava,Lalitha Sankar
title: AugLoss: A Robust Augmentation-based Fine Tuning Methodology
title_zh: AugLoss：一种基于增强的鲁棒微调方法
abstract: Deep Learning (DL) models achieve great successes in many domains. However, DL models increasingly face safety and robustness concerns, including noisy labeling in the training stage and feature distribution shifts in the testing stage. Previous works made significant progress in addressing these problems, but the focus has largely been on developing solutions for only one problem at a time. For example, recent work has argued for the use of tunable robust loss functions to mitigate label noise, and data augmentation (e.g., AugMix) to combat distribution shifts. As a step towards addressing both problems simultaneously, we introduce AugLoss, a simple but effective methodology that achieves robustness against both train-time noisy labeling and test-time feature distribution shifts by unifying data augmentation and robust loss functions. We conduct comprehensive experiments in varied settings of real-world dataset corruption to showcase the gains achieved by AugLoss compared to previous state-of-the-art methods. Lastly, we hope this work will open new directions for designing more robust and reliable DL models under real-world corruptions.
summary: Deep Learning (DL) models achieve great successes in many domains. However, DL models increasingly face safety and robustness concerns, including noisy labeling in the training stage and feature distribution shifts in the testing stage. Previous works made significant progress in addressing these problems, but the focus has largely been on developing solutions for only one problem at a time. For example, recent work has argued for the use of tunable robust loss functions to mitigate label noise, and data augmentation (e.g., AugMix) to combat distribution shifts. As a step towards addressing both problems simultaneously, we introduce AugLoss, a simple but effective methodology that achieves robustness against both train-time noisy labeling and test-time feature distribution shifts by unifying data augmentation and robust loss functions. We conduct comprehensive experiments in varied settings of real-world dataset corruption to showcase the gains achieved by AugLoss compared to previous state-of-the-art methods. Lastly, we hope this work will open new directions for designing more robust and reliable DL models under real-world corruptions.
abstract_zh: 深度学习（DL）模型在许多领域取得了巨大成功。然而，深度学习模型越来越多地面临安全性和鲁棒性问题，包括训练阶段的噪声标签和测试阶段的特征分布变化。以前的工作在解决这些问题方面取得了重大进展，但重点主要集中在一次仅针对一个问题开发解决方案。例如，最近的工作主张使用可调鲁棒损失函数来减轻标签噪声，并使用数据增强（例如 AugMix）来对抗分布变化。作为同时解决这两个问题的一步，我们引入了 AugLoss，这是一种简单但有效的方法，通过统一数据增强和鲁棒损失函数，实现了针对训练时噪声标签和测试时特征分布变化的鲁棒性。我们在现实世界数据集损坏的各种设置中进行了全面的实验，以展示 AugLoss 与之前最先进的方法相比所取得的成果。最后，我们希望这项工作能够为在现实世界的腐败情况下设计更强大、更可靠的深度学习模型开辟新的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为AugLoss的鲁棒增强型微调方法，旨在同时解决训练阶段的噪声标签和测试阶段的特征分布偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常单独针对噪声标签或分布偏移问题进行优化，缺乏同时应对两者的技术方案，导致模型在现实场景中的鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 通过统一数据增强（如AugMix）与鲁棒损失函数，设计AugLoss方法，在训练过程中同时增强模型对噪声标签的容忍度和对分布偏移的适应性。
AI.result: 在多个现实数据集的损坏场景下，AugLoss相比现有最先进方法显著提升了模型性能，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: AugLoss为同时应对训练噪声和测试分布偏移提供了新思路，有望推动更鲁棒的深度学习模型设计。

search_text: AugLoss: A Robust Augmentation-based Fine Tuning Methodology AugLoss：一种基于增强的鲁棒微调方法 Deep Learning (DL) models achieve great successes in many domains. However, DL models increasingly face safety and robustness concerns, including noisy labeling in the training stage and feature distribution shifts in the testing stage. Previous works made significant progress in addressing these problems, but the focus has largely been on developing solutions for only one problem at a time. For example, recent work has argued for the use of tunable robust loss functions to mitigate label noise, and data augmentation (e.g., AugMix) to combat distribution shifts. As a step towards addressing both problems simultaneously, we introduce AugLoss, a simple but effective methodology that achieves robustness against both train-time noisy labeling and test-time feature distribution shifts by unifying data augmentation and robust loss functions. We conduct comprehensive experiments in varied settings of real-world dataset corruption to showcase the gains achieved by AugLoss compared to previous state-of-the-art methods. Lastly, we hope this work will open new directions for designing more robust and reliable DL models under real-world corruptions. 深度学习（DL）模型在许多领域取得了巨大成功。然而，深度学习模型越来越多地面临安全性和鲁棒性问题，包括训练阶段的噪声标签和测试阶段的特征分布变化。以前的工作在解决这些问题方面取得了重大进展，但重点主要集中在一次仅针对一个问题开发解决方案。例如，最近的工作主张使用可调鲁棒损失函数来减轻标签噪声，并使用数据增强（例如 AugMix）来对抗分布变化。作为同时解决这两个问题的一步，我们引入了 AugLoss，这是一种简单但有效的方法，通过统一数据增强和鲁棒损失函数，实现了针对训练时噪声标签和测试时特征分布变化的鲁棒性。我们在现实世界数据集损坏的各种设置中进行了全面的实验，以展示 AugLoss 与之前最先进的方法相比所取得的成果。最后，我们希望这项工作能够为在现实世界的腐败情况下设计更强大、更可靠的深度学习模型开辟新的方向。 本文提出一种名为AugLoss的鲁棒增强型微调方法，旨在同时解决训练阶段的噪声标签和测试阶段的特征分布偏移问题。 Kyle Otstot,Andrew Yang,John Kevin Cava,Lalitha Sankar cs.LG,cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Xiaofeng Liu,Fangxu Xing,Jerry L. Prince,Jiachen Zhuo,Maureen Stone,Georges El Fakhri,Jonghye Woo
title: Tagged-MRI Sequence to Audio Synthesis via Self Residual Attention Guided Heterogeneous Translator
title_zh: 通过自我残留注意力引导异构翻译器进行音频合成的标记 MRI 序列
abstract: Understanding the underlying relationship between tongue and oropharyngeal muscle deformation seen in tagged-MRI and intelligible speech plays an important role in advancing speech motor control theories and treatment of speech related-disorders. Because of their heterogeneous representations, however, direct mapping between the two modalities -- i.e., two-dimensional (mid-sagittal slice) plus time tagged-MRI sequence and its corresponding one-dimensional waveform -- is not straightforward. Instead, we resort to two-dimensional spectrograms as an intermediate representation, which contains both pitch and resonance, from which to develop an end-to-end deep learning framework to translate from a sequence of tagged-MRI to its corresponding audio waveform with limited dataset size.~Our framework is based on a novel fully convolutional asymmetry translator with guidance of a self residual attention strategy to specifically exploit the moving muscular structures during speech.~In addition, we leverage a pairwise correlation of the samples with the same utterances with a latent space representation disentanglement strategy.~Furthermore, we incorporate an adversarial training approach with generative adversarial networks to offer improved realism on our generated spectrograms.~Our experimental results, carried out with a total of 63 tagged-MRI sequences alongside speech acoustics, showed that our framework enabled the generation of clear audio waveforms from a sequence of tagged-MRI, surpassing competing methods. Thus, our framework provides the great potential to help better understand the relationship between the two modalities.
summary: Understanding the underlying relationship between tongue and oropharyngeal muscle deformation seen in tagged-MRI and intelligible speech plays an important role in advancing speech motor control theories and treatment of speech related-disorders. Because of their heterogeneous representations, however, direct mapping between the two modalities -- i.e., two-dimensional (mid-sagittal slice) plus time tagged-MRI sequence and its corresponding one-dimensional waveform -- is not straightforward. Instead, we resort to two-dimensional spectrograms as an intermediate representation, which contains both pitch and resonance, from which to develop an end-to-end deep learning framework to translate from a sequence of tagged-MRI to its corresponding audio waveform with limited dataset size.~Our framework is based on a novel fully convolutional asymmetry translator with guidance of a self residual attention strategy to specifically exploit the moving muscular structures during speech.~In addition, we leverage a pairwise correlation of the samples with the same utterances with a latent space representation disentanglement strategy.~Furthermore, we incorporate an adversarial training approach with generative adversarial networks to offer improved realism on our generated spectrograms.~Our experimental results, carried out with a total of 63 tagged-MRI sequences alongside speech acoustics, showed that our framework enabled the generation of clear audio waveforms from a sequence of tagged-MRI, surpassing competing methods. Thus, our framework provides the great potential to help better understand the relationship between the two modalities.
abstract_zh: 了解标记 MRI 中观察到的舌头和口咽肌肉变形和可理解语音之间的潜在关系，对于推进言语运动控制理论和言语相关疾病的治疗发挥着重要作用。然而，由于它们的异构表示，两种模态（即二维（中矢状切片）加时间标记的 MRI 序列及其相应的一维波形）之间的直接映射并不简单。相反，我们采用二维声谱图作为中间表示，其中包含音调和共鸣，从中开发一个端到端深度学习框架，将一系列标记的 MRI 转换为其相应的音频波形（数据集大小有限）。~我们的框架基于一种新颖的全卷积不对称翻译器，在自残差注意力策略的指导下专门利用语音过程中移动的肌肉结构。~此外，我们利用具有相同话语的样本与潜在的成对相关性空间表示解缠结策略。~此外，我们将对抗性训练方法与生成对抗网络相结合，以提高生成的声谱图的真实感。~我们的实验结果是使用总共 63 个标记 MRI 序列和语音声学进行的，结果表明，我们的框架能够从一系列标记 MRI 序列中生成清晰的音频波形，超越了竞争方法。因此，我们的框架提供了帮助更好地理解两种模式之间关系的巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的框架，将标记MRI序列转化为对应的音频波形，以探索语音运动控制理论及相关障碍的治疗方法。
AI.motivation: 由于标记MRI与语音信号存在异构性，直接映射困难，需通过中间表示（如频谱图）建立跨模态关系，以促进对语音运动机制的理解和疾病治疗。
AI.method: 设计全卷积不对称转换器，结合自残差注意力机制捕捉肌肉动态，并通过对抗训练和潜在空间解耦策略提升生成音频质量。
AI.result: 在63组MRI与语音数据实验中，该框架生成的音频波形清晰度优于现有方法，验证了跨模态转换的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为解析MRI与语音的关联提供了新工具，具有推动语音运动控制理论研究及临床应用的潜力。

authors_text: Zhenyu Hu,Zhenyu Wu,Pengcheng Pi,Yunhe Xue,Jiayi Shen,Jianchao Tan,Xiangru Lian,Zhangyang Wang,Ji Liu
title: E^2VTS: Energy-Efficient Video Text Spotting from Unmanned Aerial Vehicles
title_zh: E^2VTS：无人机的节能视频文本识别
abstract: Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) based video text spotting has been extensively used in civil and military domains. UAV's limited battery capacity motivates us to develop an energy-efficient video text spotting solution. In this paper, we first revisit RCNN's crop & resize training strategy and empirically find that it outperforms aligned RoI sampling on a real-world video text dataset captured by UAV. To reduce energy consumption, we further propose a multi-stage image processor that takes videos' redundancy, continuity, and mixed degradation into account. Lastly, the model is pruned and quantized before deployed on Raspberry Pi. Our proposed energy-efficient video text spotting solution, dubbed as E^2VTS, outperforms all previous methods by achieving a competitive tradeoff between energy efficiency and performance. All our codes and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/wuzhenyusjtu/LPCVC20-VideoTextSpotting.
summary: Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) based video text spotting has been extensively used in civil and military domains. UAV's limited battery capacity motivates us to develop an energy-efficient video text spotting solution. In this paper, we first revisit RCNN's crop & resize training strategy and empirically find that it outperforms aligned RoI sampling on a real-world video text dataset captured by UAV. To reduce energy consumption, we further propose a multi-stage image processor that takes videos' redundancy, continuity, and mixed degradation into account. Lastly, the model is pruned and quantized before deployed on Raspberry Pi. Our proposed energy-efficient video text spotting solution, dubbed as E^2VTS, outperforms all previous methods by achieving a competitive tradeoff between energy efficiency and performance. All our codes and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/wuzhenyusjtu/LPCVC20-VideoTextSpotting.
abstract_zh: 基于无人机（UAV）的视频文本定位已广泛应用于民用和军事领域。无人机的电池容量有限促使我们开发节能的视频文本定位解决方案。在本文中，我们首先重新审视 RCNN 的裁剪和调整大小训练策略，并凭经验发现它在无人机捕获的真实视频文本数据集上优于对齐的 RoI 采样。为了降低能耗，我们进一步提出了一种多级图像处理器，该处理器考虑了视频的冗余性、连续性和混合退化。最后，在部署到 Raspberry Pi 上之前对模型进行修剪和量化。我们提出的节能视频文本识别解决方案（称为 E^2VTS）通过实现能源效率和性能之间的竞争性权衡，优于以前的所有方法。我们所有的代码和预训练模型均可在 https://github.com/wuzhenyusjtu/LPCVC20-VideoTextSpotting 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向无人机的高效视频文本识别方法E^2VTS，旨在解决无人机电池容量限制下的实时文本检测问题。
AI.motivation: 无人机在民用和军事领域广泛应用，但其有限的电池容量要求视频文本识别系统必须兼顾能效与性能。
AI.method: 改进RCNN的裁剪策略，设计多阶段图像处理器应对视频冗余性和退化问题，并通过模型剪枝与量化优化部署在树莓派上。
AI.result: E^2VTS在实际无人机采集的数据集上实现了能效与性能的最优平衡，优于所有现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过算法优化与硬件适配，本文提出的E^2VTS为无人机视频文本识别提供了可行的能效解决方案。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过算法优化与硬件适配，本文提出的E^2VTS为无人机视频文本识别提供了可行的能效解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种面向无人机的高效视频文本识别方法E^2VTS，旨在解决无人机电池容量限制下的实时文本检测问题。
motivation: 无人机在民用和军事领域广泛应用，但其有限的电池容量要求视频文本识别系统必须兼顾能效与性能。
method: 改进RCNN的裁剪策略，设计多阶段图像处理器应对视频冗余性和退化问题，并通过模型剪枝与量化优化部署在树莓派上。
result: E^2VTS在实际无人机采集的数据集上实现了能效与性能的最优平衡，优于所有现有方法。
conclusion: 通过算法优化与硬件适配，本文提出的E^2VTS为无人机视频文本识别提供了可行的能效解决方案。
search_text: E^2VTS: Energy-Efficient Video Text Spotting from Unmanned Aerial Vehicles E^2VTS：无人机的节能视频文本识别 Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) based video text spotting has been extensively used in civil and military domains. UAV's limited battery capacity motivates us to develop an energy-efficient video text spotting solution. In this paper, we first revisit RCNN's crop & resize training strategy and empirically find that it outperforms aligned RoI sampling on a real-world video text dataset captured by UAV. To reduce energy consumption, we further propose a multi-stage image processor that takes videos' redundancy, continuity, and mixed degradation into account. Lastly, the model is pruned and quantized before deployed on Raspberry Pi. Our proposed energy-efficient video text spotting solution, dubbed as E^2VTS, outperforms all previous methods by achieving a competitive tradeoff between energy efficiency and performance. All our codes and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/wuzhenyusjtu/LPCVC20-VideoTextSpotting. 基于无人机（UAV）的视频文本定位已广泛应用于民用和军事领域。无人机的电池容量有限促使我们开发节能的视频文本定位解决方案。在本文中，我们首先重新审视 RCNN 的裁剪和调整大小训练策略，并凭经验发现它在无人机捕获的真实视频文本数据集上优于对齐的 RoI 采样。为了降低能耗，我们进一步提出了一种多级图像处理器，该处理器考虑了视频的冗余性、连续性和混合退化。最后，在部署到 Raspberry Pi 上之前对模型进行修剪和量化。我们提出的节能视频文本识别解决方案（称为 E^2VTS）通过实现能源效率和性能之间的竞争性权衡，优于以前的所有方法。我们所有的代码和预训练模型均可在 https://github.com/wuzhenyusjtu/LPCVC20-VideoTextSpotting 获取。 本文提出了一种面向无人机的高效视频文本识别方法E^2VTS，旨在解决无人机电池容量限制下的实时文本检测问题。 Zhenyu Hu,Zhenyu Wu,Pengcheng Pi,Yunhe Xue,Jiayi Shen,Jianchao Tan,Xiangru Lian,Zhangyang Wang,Ji Liu cs.CV

authors_text: B. G. Palm,D. I. Alves,V. T. Vu,M. I. Pettersson,F. M. Bayer,R. J. Cintra,R. Machado,P. Dammert,H. Hellsten
title: Autoregressive Model for Multi-Pass SAR Change Detection Based on Image Stacks
title_zh: 基于图像堆栈的多通道SAR变化检测自回归模型
abstract: Change detection is an important synthetic aperture radar (SAR) application, usually used to detect changes on the ground scene measurements in different moments in time. Traditionally, change detection algorithm (CDA) is mainly designed for two synthetic aperture radar (SAR) images retrieved at different instants. However, more images can be used to improve the algorithms performance, witch emerges as a research topic on SAR change detection. Image stack information can be treated as a data series over time and can be modeled by autoregressive (AR) models. Thus, we present some initial findings on SAR change detection based on image stack considering AR models. Applying AR model for each pixel position in the image stack, we obtained an estimated image of the ground scene which can be used as a reference image for CDA. The experimental results reveal that ground scene estimates by the AR models is accurate and can be used for change detection applications.
summary: Change detection is an important synthetic aperture radar (SAR) application, usually used to detect changes on the ground scene measurements in different moments in time. Traditionally, change detection algorithm (CDA) is mainly designed for two synthetic aperture radar (SAR) images retrieved at different instants. However, more images can be used to improve the algorithms performance, witch emerges as a research topic on SAR change detection. Image stack information can be treated as a data series over time and can be modeled by autoregressive (AR) models. Thus, we present some initial findings on SAR change detection based on image stack considering AR models. Applying AR model for each pixel position in the image stack, we obtained an estimated image of the ground scene which can be used as a reference image for CDA. The experimental results reveal that ground scene estimates by the AR models is accurate and can be used for change detection applications.
abstract_zh: 变化检测是合成孔径雷达（SAR）的重要应用，通常用于检测不同时刻地面场景测量的变化。传统上，变化检测算法（CDA）主要针对在不同时刻检索的两个合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像而设计。然而，更多的图像可以用来提高算法性能，这成为SAR变化检测的研究课题。图像堆栈信息可以被视为随时间变化的数据序列，并且可以通过自回归 (AR) 模型进行建模。因此，我们提出了考虑 AR 模型的基于图像堆栈的 SAR 变化检测的一些初步发现。对图像堆栈中的每个像素位置应用 AR 模型，我们获得了地面场景的估计图像，该图像可以用作 CDA 的参考图像。实验结果表明，AR 模型对地面场景的估计是准确的，可用于变化检测应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图像堆栈的自回归模型多通道SAR变化检测方法，通过建模时间序列数据提升变化检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统SAR变化检测算法仅针对两幅图像设计，无法充分利用多时相图像堆栈信息，限制了算法性能提升空间。
AI.method: 对图像堆栈中每个像素位置建立自回归模型，通过时间序列建模生成地表场景参考图像，作为变化检测的基准。
AI.result: 实验验证了自回归模型对地表场景的估计具有较高准确性，能够有效支持变化检测应用。
AI.conclusion: 自回归模型可有效利用多时相SAR图像堆栈信息，为变化检测提供新思路，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Kevin Mayer,Lukas Haas,Tianyuan Huang,Juan Bernabé-Moreno,Ram Rajagopal,Martin Fischer
title: Estimating building energy efficiency from street view imagery, aerial imagery, and land surface temperature data
title_zh: 根据街景图像、航空图像和地表温度数据估算建筑能源效率
abstract: Current methods to determine the energy efficiency of buildings require on-site visits of certified energy auditors which makes the process slow, costly, and geographically incomplete. To accelerate the identification of promising retrofit targets on a large scale, we propose to estimate building energy efficiency from widely available and remotely sensed data sources only, namely street view, aerial view, footprint, and satellite-borne land surface temperature (LST) data. After collecting data for almost 40,000 buildings in the United Kingdom, we combine these data sources by training multiple end-to-end deep learning models with the objective to classify buildings as energy efficient (EU rating A-D) or inefficient (EU rating E-G). After evaluating the trained models quantitatively as well as qualitatively, we extend our analysis by studying the predictive power of each data source in an ablation study. We find that the end-to-end deep learning model trained on all four data sources achieves a macro-averaged F1 score of 64.64% and outperforms the k-NN and SVM-based baseline models by 14.13 to 12.02 percentage points, respectively. Thus, this work shows the potential and complementary nature of remotely sensed data in predicting energy efficiency and opens up new opportunities for future work to integrate additional data sources.
summary: Current methods to determine the energy efficiency of buildings require on-site visits of certified energy auditors which makes the process slow, costly, and geographically incomplete. To accelerate the identification of promising retrofit targets on a large scale, we propose to estimate building energy efficiency from widely available and remotely sensed data sources only, namely street view, aerial view, footprint, and satellite-borne land surface temperature (LST) data. After collecting data for almost 40,000 buildings in the United Kingdom, we combine these data sources by training multiple end-to-end deep learning models with the objective to classify buildings as energy efficient (EU rating A-D) or inefficient (EU rating E-G). After evaluating the trained models quantitatively as well as qualitatively, we extend our analysis by studying the predictive power of each data source in an ablation study. We find that the end-to-end deep learning model trained on all four data sources achieves a macro-averaged F1 score of 64.64% and outperforms the k-NN and SVM-based baseline models by 14.13 to 12.02 percentage points, respectively. Thus, this work shows the potential and complementary nature of remotely sensed data in predicting energy efficiency and opens up new opportunities for future work to integrate additional data sources.
abstract_zh: 目前确定建筑物能源效率的方法需要经过认证的能源审核员进行现场访问，这使得该过程缓慢、成本高昂且在地理上不完整。为了加速大规模确定有希望的改造目标，我们建议仅根据广泛可用的遥感数据源（即街景、鸟瞰图、足迹和卫星地面温度（LST）数据）来估计建筑能源效率。在收集了英国近 40,000 座建筑物的数据后，我们通过训练多个端到端深度学习模型来组合这些数据源，目的是将建筑物分类为节能（欧盟评级 A-D）或低效（欧盟评级 E-G）。在定量和定性评估训练模型后，我们通过研究消融研究中每个数据源的预测能力来扩展我们的分析。我们发现，在所有四个数据源上训练的端到端深度学习模型的宏观平均 F1 分数为 64.64%，分别优于 k-NN 和基于 SVM 的基线模型 14.13 至 12.02 个百分点。因此，这项工作展示了遥感数据在预测能源效率方面的潜力和互补性，并为未来整合其他数据源的工作开辟了新的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用街景图像、航拍图像、建筑 footprint 和地表温度数据，通过深度学习模型估算建筑能源效率。
AI.motivation: 传统建筑能源效率评估依赖人工现场审计，存在成本高、覆盖范围有限的问题，需开发基于远程数据的大规模自动化方法。
AI.method: 收集英国近4万栋建筑的多源数据，训练端到端深度学习模型进行分类，并通过消融实验分析各数据源的预测能力。
AI.result: 融合四类数据的深度学习模型在宏观F1分数达64.64%，较k-NN和SVM基线模型分别提升14.13和12.02个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 远程感知数据在能源效率预测中具有潜力，未来可整合更多数据源提升预测性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出利用街景图像、航拍图像、建筑 footprint 和地表温度数据，通过深度学习模型估算建筑能源效率。

authors_text: Maria Stennett,Daniel I. Rubenstein,Tilo Burghardt
title: Towards Individual Grevy's Zebra Identification via Deep 3D Fitting and Metric Learning
title_zh: 通过深度 3D 拟合和度量学习实现个体细纹斑马识别
comment: 4 pages, 5 figures, 1 table; typos corrected, references updated
comments: 4 pages, 5 figures, 1 table; typos corrected, references updated
abstract: This paper combines deep learning techniques for species detection, 3D model fitting, and metric learning in one pipeline to perform individual animal identification from photographs by exploiting unique coat patterns. This is the first work to attempt this and, compared to traditional 2D bounding box or segmentation based CNN identification pipelines, the approach provides effective and explicit view-point normalisation and allows for a straight forward visualisation of the learned biometric population space. Note that due to the use of metric learning the pipeline is also readily applicable to open set and zero shot re-identification scenarios. We apply the proposed approach to individual Grevy's zebra (Equus grevyi) identification and show in a small study on the SMALST dataset that the use of 3D model fitting can indeed benefit performance. In particular, back-projected textures from 3D fitted models improve identification accuracy from 48.0% to 56.8% compared to 2D bounding box approaches for the dataset. Whilst the study is far too small accurately to estimate the full performance potential achievable in larger-scale real-world application settings and in comparisons against polished tools, our work lays the conceptual and practical foundations for a next step in animal biometrics towards deep metric learning driven, fully 3D-aware animal identification in open population settings. We publish network weights and relevant facilitating source code with this paper for full reproducibility and as inspiration for further research.
summary: This paper combines deep learning techniques for species detection, 3D model fitting, and metric learning in one pipeline to perform individual animal identification from photographs by exploiting unique coat patterns. This is the first work to attempt this and, compared to traditional 2D bounding box or segmentation based CNN identification pipelines, the approach provides effective and explicit view-point normalisation and allows for a straight forward visualisation of the learned biometric population space. Note that due to the use of metric learning the pipeline is also readily applicable to open set and zero shot re-identification scenarios. We apply the proposed approach to individual Grevy's zebra (Equus grevyi) identification and show in a small study on the SMALST dataset that the use of 3D model fitting can indeed benefit performance. In particular, back-projected textures from 3D fitted models improve identification accuracy from 48.0% to 56.8% compared to 2D bounding box approaches for the dataset. Whilst the study is far too small accurately to estimate the full performance potential achievable in larger-scale real-world application settings and in comparisons against polished tools, our work lays the conceptual and practical foundations for a next step in animal biometrics towards deep metric learning driven, fully 3D-aware animal identification in open population settings. We publish network weights and relevant facilitating source code with this paper for full reproducibility and as inspiration for further research.
abstract_zh: 本文将用于物种检测、3D 模型拟合和度量学习的深度学习技术结合在一个管道中，通过利用独特的皮毛图案从照片中执行个体动物识别。这是第一个尝试这样做的工作，与传统的 2D 边界框或基于分割的 CNN 识别管道相比，该方法提供了有效且明确的视点归一化，并允许对学习的生物识别群体空间进行直接可视化。请注意，由于使用了度量学习，该管道也很容易适用于开放集和零样本重新识别场景。我们将所提出的方法应用于个体细纹斑马 (Equus grevyi) 识别，并在 SMALST 数据集的一项小型研究中表明，使用 3D 模型拟合确实可以提高性能。特别是，与数据集的 2D 边界框方法相比，3D 拟合模型的反向投影纹理将识别精度从 48.0% 提高到 56.8%。虽然这项研究规模太小，无法准确估计在更大规模的现实世界应用环境中可实现的全部性能潜力，并与完善的工具进行比较，但我们的工作为动物生物识别技术的下一步发展奠定了概念和实践基础，以在开放种群环境中实现深度度量学习驱动、完全 3D 感知的动物识别。我们在本文中发布了网络权重和相关的促进源代码，以实现完全可重复性并为进一步研究提供灵感。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合深度学习、3D模型拟合和度量学习的综合方法，用于通过照片实现Grevy斑马的个体识别。
AI.motivation: 传统2D方法在视角归一化和生物特征空间可视化方面存在局限，而3D模型拟合能提供更有效的视角归一化，并适用于开放集和零样本重识别场景。
AI.method: 整合物种检测、3D模型拟合与度量学习，通过反投影3D模型纹理增强特征表示，构建端到端识别流水线。
AI.result: 在SMALST数据集上，3D方法将识别准确率从48.0%提升至56.8%，但受限于小规模数据集，未充分验证大规模应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为3D驱动的动物生物识别奠定了基础，提供了可复现的代码和权重，未来需更大规模数据验证其实际效能。

Rubenstein,Tilo Burghardt cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ekaterina Nepovinnykh,Tuomas Eerola,Vincent Biard,Piia Mutka,Marja Niemi,Heikki Kälviäinen,Mervi Kunnasranta
title: SealID: Saimaa ringed seal re-identification dataset
title_zh: SealID：塞马环斑海豹重新识别数据集
abstract: Wildlife camera traps and crowd-sourced image material provide novel possibilities to monitor endangered animal species. However, massive image volumes that these methods produce are overwhelming for researchers to go through manually which calls for automatic systems to perform the analysis. The analysis task that has gained the most attention is the re-identification of individuals, as it allows, for example, to study animal migration or to estimate the population size. The Saimaa ringed seal (Pusa hispida saimensis) is an endangered subspecies only found in the Lake Saimaa, Finland, and is one of the few existing freshwater seal species. Ringed seals have permanent pelage patterns that are unique to each individual which can be used for the identification of individuals. Large variation in poses further exacerbated by the deformable nature of seals together with varying appearance and low contrast between the ring pattern and the rest of the pelage makes the Saimaa ringed seal re-identification task very challenging, providing a good benchmark to evaluate state-of-the-art re-identification methods. Therefore, we make our Saimaa ringed seal image (SealID) dataset (N=57) publicly available for research purposes. In this paper, the dataset is described, the evaluation protocol for re-identification methods is proposed, and the results for two baseline methods HotSpotter and NORPPA are provided. The SealID dataset has been made publicly available.

Large variation in poses further exacerbated by the deformable nature of seals together with varying appearance and low contrast between the ring pattern and the rest of the pelage makes the Saimaa ringed seal re-identification task very challenging, providing a good benchmark to evaluate state-of-the-art re-identification methods. In this paper, the dataset is described, the evaluation protocol for re-identification methods is proposed, and the results for two baseline methods HotSpotter and NORPPA are provided. abstract_zh: 野生动物相机陷阱和众包图像材料为监测濒危动物物种提供了新的可能性。然而，这些方法产生的大量图像对于研究人员来说是难以手动处理的，这就需要自动系统来执行分析。最受关注的分析任务是个体的重新识别，因为它可以用来研究动物迁徙或估计种群规模。塞马环斑海豹（Pusa hispida saimensis）是仅在芬兰塞马湖发现的濒危亚种，也是现存的少数淡水海豹物种之一。环斑海豹具有永久的毛皮图案，每个个体都是独一无二的，可用于识别个体。海豹的可变形特性进一步加剧了姿势的巨大变化，再加上外观的变化以及环纹与其余毛皮之间的低对比度，使得塞马环斑海豹的重新识别任务非常具有挑战性，这为评估最先进的重新识别方法提供了良好的基准。因此，我们将塞马环斑海豹图像 (SealID) 数据集 (N=57) 公开用于研究目的。本文描述了数据集，提出了重新识别方法的评估协议，并提供了两种基线方法 HotSpotter 和 NORPPA 的结果。 SealID 数据集已公开。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了用于赛马环海豹个体重识别的SealID数据集，并提出了评估方法及基线结果。
AI.motivation: 野生动物相机陷阱和众包图像数据量庞大，人工分析效率低，需自动系统辅助。赛马环海豹作为濒危物种，其个体识别对研究迁徙和种群数量至关重要，但其皮毛图案复杂且姿态多变，识别难度高。
AI.method: 构建包含57张图像的SealID数据集，设计重识别评估协议，并采用HotSpotter和NORPPA两种基线方法进行测试。
AI.result: 提供了两种基线方法在SealID数据集上的实验结果，验证了数据集的挑战性。
AI.conclusion: SealID数据集已公开，为重识别算法研究提供了基准，推动了濒危物种保护技术的发展。

authors_text: Takehiko Ohkawa,Ryosuke Furuta,Yoichi Sato
title: Efficient Annotation and Learning for 3D Hand Pose Estimation: A Survey
title_zh: 3D 手势估计的高效注释和学习：一项调查
abstract: In this survey, we present a systematic review of 3D hand pose estimation from the perspective of efficient annotation and learning. 3D hand pose estimation has been an important research area owing to its potential to enable various applications, such as video understanding, AR/VR, and robotics. However, the performance of models is tied to the quality and quantity of annotated 3D hand poses. Under the status quo, acquiring such annotated 3D hand poses is challenging, e.g., due to the difficulty of 3D annotation and the presence of occlusion. To reveal this problem, we review the pros and cons of existing annotation methods classified as manual, synthetic-model-based, hand-sensor-based, and computational approaches. Additionally, we examine methods for learning 3D hand poses when annotated data are scarce, including self-supervised pretraining, semi-supervised learning, and domain adaptation. Based on the study of efficient annotation and learning, we further discuss limitations and possible future directions in this field.
summary: In this survey, we present a systematic review of 3D hand pose estimation from the perspective of efficient annotation and learning. 3D hand pose estimation has been an important research area owing to its potential to enable various applications, such as video understanding, AR/VR, and robotics. However, the performance of models is tied to the quality and quantity of annotated 3D hand poses. Under the status quo, acquiring such annotated 3D hand poses is challenging, e.g., due to the difficulty of 3D annotation and the presence of occlusion. To reveal this problem, we review the pros and cons of existing annotation methods classified as manual, synthetic-model-based, hand-sensor-based, and computational approaches. Additionally, we examine methods for learning 3D hand poses when annotated data are scarce, including self-supervised pretraining, semi-supervised learning, and domain adaptation. Based on the study of efficient annotation and learning, we further discuss limitations and possible future directions in this field.
abstract_zh: 在本次调查中，我们从高效注释和学习的角度对 3D 手部姿势估计进行了系统回顾。 3D 手部姿势估计因其在视频理解、AR/VR 和机器人等各种应用中的潜力而成为一个重要的研究领域。然而，模型的性能与带注释的 3D 手势的质量和数量有关。在现状下，获取此类带注释的 3D 手部姿势具有挑战性，例如，由于 3D 注释的困难和遮挡的存在。为了揭示这个问题，我们回顾了现有注释方法的优缺点，这些方法分为手动、基于合成模型、基于手传感器和计算方法。此外，我们还研究了在注释数据稀缺时学习 3D 手势的方法，包括自监督预训练、半监督学习和领域适应。基于高效标注和学习的研究，我们进一步讨论了该领域的局限性和未来可能的方向。

AI.tldr: 系统综述3D手部姿态估计中的高效标注与学习方法
AI.motivation: 3D手部姿态估计在多个领域有应用潜力，但高质量标注数据的获取困难，限制了模型性能，需探索高效方法
