search_text: M2FNet: Multi-modal Fusion Network for Emotion Recognition in Conversation M2FNet：用于对话中情绪识别的多模态融合网络 Emotion Recognition in Conversations (ERC) is crucial in developing sympathetic human-machine interaction. In conversational videos, emotion can be present in multiple modalities, i.e., audio, video, and transcript. However, due to the inherent characteristics of these modalities, multi-modal ERC has always been considered a challenging undertaking. Existing ERC research focuses mainly on using text information in a discussion, ignoring the other two modalities. We anticipate that emotion recognition accuracy can be improved by employing a multi-modal approach. Thus, in this study, we propose a Multi-modal Fusion Network (M2FNet) that extracts emotion-relevant features from visual, audio, and text modality. It employs a multi-head attention-based fusion mechanism to combine emotion-rich latent representations of the input data. We introduce a new feature extractor to extract latent features from the audio and visual modality. The proposed feature extractor is trained with a novel adaptive margin-based triplet loss function to learn emotion-relevant features from the audio and visual data. In the domain of ERC, the existing methods perform well on one benchmark dataset but not on others. Our results show that the proposed M2FNet architecture outperforms all other methods in terms of weighted average F1 score on well-known MELD and IEMOCAP datasets and sets a new state-of-the-art performance in ERC. 对话中的情绪识别 (ERC) 对于发展富有同情心的人机交互至关重要。在对话视频中，情感可以以多种形式呈现，即音频、视频和文字记录。然而，由于这些模式的固有特征，多模式 ERC 一直被认为是一项具有挑战性的任务。现有的 ERC 研究主要集中在讨论中使用文本信息，忽略了其他两种模式。我们预计通过采用多模态方法可以提高情绪识别的准确性。因此，在本研究中，我们提出了一种多模态融合网络（M2FNet），它从视觉、音频和文本模态中提取情感相关特征。它采用基于多头注意力的融合机制来组合输入数据的情感丰富的潜在表示。我们引入了一种新的特征提取器来从音频和视觉模态中提取潜在特征。所提出的特征提取器使用新颖的基于边缘的自适应三元组损失函数进行训练，以从音频和视觉数据中学习情感相关的特征。在 ERC 领域，现有方法在一个基准数据集上表现良好，但在其他数据集上表现不佳。我们的结果表明，所提出的 M2FNet 架构在著名的 MELD 和 IEMOCAP 数据集上的加权平均 F1 分数方面优于所有其他方法，并在 ERC 中创下了新的最先进性能。 本文提出一种多模态融合网络M2FNet，通过结合音频、视频和文本模态信息提升对话中的情感识别准确率。 Vishal Chudasama,Purbayan Kar,Ashish Gudmalwar,Nirmesh Shah,Pankaj Wasnik,Naoyuki Onoe cs.CV,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Coby Penso,Idan Achituve,Ethan Fetaya
title: Functional Ensemble Distillation
title_zh: 功能系综蒸馏
abstract: Bayesian models have many desirable properties, most notable is their ability to generalize from limited data and to properly estimate the uncertainty in their predictions. However, these benefits come at a steep computational cost as Bayesian inference, in most cases, is computationally intractable. One popular approach to alleviate this problem is using a Monte-Carlo estimation with an ensemble of models sampled from the posterior. However, this approach still comes at a significant computational cost, as one needs to store and run multiple models at test time. In this work, we investigate how to best distill an ensemble's predictions using an efficient model. First, we argue that current approaches that simply return distribution over predictions cannot compute important properties, such as the covariance between predictions, which can be valuable for further processing. Second, in many limited data settings, all ensemble members achieve nearly zero training loss, namely, they produce near-identical predictions on the training set which results in sub-optimal distilled models. To address both problems, we propose a novel and general distillation approach, named Functional Ensemble Distillation (FED), and we investigate how to best distill an ensemble in this setting. We find that learning the distilled model via a simple augmentation scheme in the form of mixup augmentation significantly boosts the performance. We evaluated our method on several tasks and showed that it achieves superior results in both accuracy and uncertainty estimation compared to current approaches.
summary: Bayesian models have many desirable properties, most notable is their ability to generalize from limited data and to properly estimate the uncertainty in their predictions. However, these benefits come at a steep computational cost as Bayesian inference, in most cases, is computationally intractable. One popular approach to alleviate this problem is using a Monte-Carlo estimation with an ensemble of models sampled from the posterior. However, this approach still comes at a significant computational cost, as one needs to store and run multiple models at test time. In this work, we investigate how to best distill an ensemble's predictions using an efficient model. First, we argue that current approaches that simply return distribution over predictions cannot compute important properties, such as the covariance between predictions, which can be valuable for further processing. Second, in many limited data settings, all ensemble members achieve nearly zero training loss, namely, they produce near-identical predictions on the training set which results in sub-optimal distilled models. To address both problems, we propose a novel and general distillation approach, named Functional Ensemble Distillation (FED), and we investigate how to best distill an ensemble in this setting. We find that learning the distilled model via a simple augmentation scheme in the form of mixup augmentation significantly boosts the performance. We evaluated our method on several tasks and showed that it achieves superior results in both accuracy and uncertainty estimation compared to current approaches.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯模型具有许多理想的特性，最值得注意的是它们能够从有限的数据中进行归纳并正确估计预测中的不确定性。然而，这些好处的代价是高昂的计算成本，因为在大多数情况下，贝叶斯推理在计算上很困难。缓解这个问题的一种流行方法是使用蒙特卡罗估计和从后验采样的模型集合。然而，这种方法仍然需要大量的计算成本，因为需要在测试时存储和运行多个模型。在这项工作中，我们研究如何使用有效的模型最好地提取集成的预测。首先，我们认为当前仅返回预测分布的方法无法计算重要属性，例如预测之间的协方差，而这对于进一步处理可能很有价值。其次，在许多有限的数据设置中，所有集成成员都实现了几乎为零的训练损失，即它们对训练集产生几乎相同的预测，从而导致次优的蒸馏模型。为了解决这两个问题，我们提出了一种新颖且通用的蒸馏方法，称为功能集成蒸馏（FED），并研究如何在这种情况下最好地蒸馏集成。我们发现，通过混合增强形式的简单增强方案来学习蒸馏模型可以显着提高性能。我们在多项任务上评估了我们的方法，并表明与当前方法相比，它在准确性和不确定性估计方面取得了优异的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为功能集成蒸馏（FED）的新方法，旨在高效地将贝叶斯模型集成的预测能力蒸馏到单个模型中。
AI.motivation: 贝叶斯模型虽具良好泛化性和不确定性估计能力，但计算成本高。现有集成方法无法有效捕捉预测协方差，且在数据有限时易导致蒸馏模型性能下降。
AI.method: 通过引入功能集成蒸馏（FED）框架，结合mixup数据增强技术，解决集成模型预测分布的协方差建模问题并提升蒸馏效果。
AI.result: 在多个任务中，FED在准确率和不确定性估计方面均优于现有方法，尤其在数据有限场景下表现显著。
AI.conclusion: FED通过建模预测协方差和数据增强有效解决了集成蒸馏中的关键问题，为贝叶斯模型的高效应用提供了新思路。

However, these benefits come at a steep computational cost as Bayesian inference, in most cases, is computationally intractable. One popular approach to alleviate this problem is using a Monte-Carlo estimation with an ensemble of models sampled from the posterior. However, this approach still comes at a significant computational cost, as one needs to store and run multiple models at test time. In this work, we investigate how to best distill an ensemble's predictions using an efficient model. First, we argue that current approaches that simply return distribution over predictions cannot compute important properties, such as the covariance between predictions, which can be valuable for further processing. To address both problems, we propose a novel and general distillation approach, named Functional Ensemble Distillation (FED), and we investigate how to best distill an ensemble in this setting. We find that learning the distilled model via a simple augmentation scheme in the form of mixup augmentation significantly boosts the performance. authors_text: Wenjing Wang,Lilang Lin,Zejia Fan,Jiaying Liu
title: Semi-Supervised Learning for Mars Imagery Classification and Segmentation
title_zh: 火星图像分类和分割的半监督学习
comment: Accepted by ACM Trans. on Multimedia Computing Communications and Applications (TOMM)
comments: Accepted by ACM Trans. on Multimedia Computing Communications and Applications (TOMM)
abstract: With the progress of Mars exploration, numerous Mars image data are collected and need to be analyzed. However, due to the imbalance and distortion of Martian data, the performance of existing computer vision models is unsatisfactory. In this paper, we introduce a semi-supervised framework for machine vision on Mars and try to resolve two specific tasks: classification and segmentation. Contrastive learning is a powerful representation learning technique. However, there is too much information overlap between Martian data samples, leading to a contradiction between contrastive learning and Martian data. Our key idea is to reconcile this contradiction with the help of annotations and further take advantage of unlabeled data to improve performance. For classification, we propose to ignore inner-class pairs on labeled data as well as neglect negative pairs on unlabeled data, forming supervised inter-class contrastive learning and unsupervised similarity learning. For segmentation, we extend supervised inter-class contrastive learning into an element-wise mode and use online pseudo labels for supervision on unlabeled areas. Experimental results show that our learning strategies can improve the classification and segmentation models by a large margin and outperform state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: With the progress of Mars exploration, numerous Mars image data are collected and need to be analyzed. However, due to the imbalance and distortion of Martian data, the performance of existing computer vision models is unsatisfactory. In this paper, we introduce a semi-supervised framework for machine vision on Mars and try to resolve two specific tasks: classification and segmentation. Contrastive learning is a powerful representation learning technique. However, there is too much information overlap between Martian data samples, leading to a contradiction between contrastive learning and Martian data. Our key idea is to reconcile this contradiction with the help of annotations and further take advantage of unlabeled data to improve performance. For classification, we propose to ignore inner-class pairs on labeled data as well as neglect negative pairs on unlabeled data, forming supervised inter-class contrastive learning and unsupervised similarity learning. For segmentation, we extend supervised inter-class contrastive learning into an element-wise mode and use online pseudo labels for supervision on unlabeled areas. Experimental results show that our learning strategies can improve the classification and segmentation models by a large margin and outperform state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 随着火星探测的进展，大量的火星图像数据被收集并需要分析。然而，由于火星数据的不平衡和失真，现有计算机视觉模型的性能并不理想。在本文中，我们介绍了火星机器视觉的半监督框架，并尝试解决两个具体任务：分类和分割。对比学习是一种强大的表征学习技术。然而，火星数据样本之间存在过多的信息重叠，导致对比学习与火星数据之间存在矛盾。我们的主要想法是借助注释来调和这一矛盾，并进一步利用未标记的数据来提高性能。对于分类，我们建议忽略标记数据上的内部类对以及忽略未标记数据上的负类对，形成有监督的类间对比学习和无监督的相似性学习。对于分割，我们将有监督的类间对比学习扩展到元素模式，并使用在线伪标签对未标记区域进行监督。实验结果表明，我们的学习策略可以大幅改进分类和分割模型，并且优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督学习框架，用于解决火星图像分类和分割任务。
AI.motivation: 由于火星数据存在不平衡和失真问题，现有计算机视觉模型表现不佳，因此需要一种新的方法来提升分类和分割性能。
AI.method: 本文通过引入监督的类间对比学习和无监督的相似性学习来缓解对比学习与火星数据之间的矛盾，并在分割任务中扩展为逐元素模式并使用在线伪标签进行监督。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该学习策略显著提升了分类和分割模型的性能，并优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的半监督框架有效解决了火星图像分类和分割中的挑战，为未来的火星数据处理提供了新的思路。

conclusion: 本文提出的半监督框架有效解决了火星图像分类和分割中的挑战，为未来的火星数据处理提供了新的思路。
search_text: Semi-Supervised Learning for Mars Imagery Classification and Segmentation 火星图像分类和分割的半监督学习 With the progress of Mars exploration, numerous Mars image data are collected and need to be analyzed. However, due to the imbalance and distortion of Martian data, the performance of existing computer vision models is unsatisfactory. In this paper, we introduce a semi-supervised framework for machine vision on Mars and try to resolve two specific tasks: classification and segmentation. Contrastive learning is a powerful representation learning technique. However, there is too much information overlap between Martian data samples, leading to a contradiction between contrastive learning and Martian data. Our key idea is to reconcile this contradiction with the help of annotations and further take advantage of unlabeled data to improve performance. For classification, we propose to ignore inner-class pairs on labeled data as well as neglect negative pairs on unlabeled data, forming supervised inter-class contrastive learning and unsupervised similarity learning. For segmentation, we extend supervised inter-class contrastive learning into an element-wise mode and use online pseudo labels for supervision on unlabeled areas. Experimental results show that our learning strategies can improve the classification and segmentation models by a large margin and outperform state-of-the-art approaches. 随着火星探测的进展，大量的火星图像数据被收集并需要分析。然而，由于火星数据的不平衡和失真，现有计算机视觉模型的性能并不理想。在本文中，我们介绍了火星机器视觉的半监督框架，并尝试解决两个具体任务：分类和分割。对比学习是一种强大的表征学习技术。然而，火星数据样本之间存在过多的信息重叠，导致对比学习与火星数据之间存在矛盾。我们的主要想法是借助注释来调和这一矛盾，并进一步利用未标记的数据来提高性能。对于分类，我们建议忽略标记数据上的内部类对以及忽略未标记数据上的负类对，形成有监督的类间对比学习和无监督的相似性学习。对于分割，我们将有监督的类间对比学习扩展到元素模式，并使用在线伪标签对未标记区域进行监督。实验结果表明，我们的学习策略可以大幅改进分类和分割模型，并且优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种半监督学习框架，用于解决火星图像分类和分割任务。 Wenjing Wang,Lilang Lin,Zejia Fan,Jiaying Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Dawei Chen,Samuel Yang-Zhao,John Lloyd,Kee Siong Ng
title: Factored Conditional Filtering: Tracking States and Estimating Parameters in High-Dimensional Spaces
title_zh: 分解条件过滤：高维空间中的跟踪状态和估计参数
abstract: This paper introduces factored conditional filters, new filtering algorithms for simultaneously tracking states and estimating parameters in high-dimensional state spaces. The conditional nature of the algorithms is used to estimate parameters and the factored nature is used to decompose the state space into low-dimensional subspaces in such a way that filtering on these subspaces gives distributions whose product is a good approximation to the distribution on the entire state space. The conditions for successful application of the algorithms are that observations be available at the subspace level and that the transition model can be factored into local transition models that are approximately confined to the subspaces; these conditions are widely satisfied in computer science, engineering, and geophysical filtering applications. We give experimental results on tracking epidemics and estimating parameters in large contact networks that show the effectiveness of our approach.
summary: This paper introduces factored conditional filters, new filtering algorithms for simultaneously tracking states and estimating parameters in high-dimensional state spaces. The conditional nature of the algorithms is used to estimate parameters and the factored nature is used to decompose the state space into low-dimensional subspaces in such a way that filtering on these subspaces gives distributions whose product is a good approximation to the distribution on the entire state space. The conditions for successful application of the algorithms are that observations be available at the subspace level and that the transition model can be factored into local transition models that are approximately confined to the subspaces; these conditions are widely satisfied in computer science, engineering, and geophysical filtering applications. We give experimental results on tracking epidemics and estimating parameters in large contact networks that show the effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了因式条件滤波器、用于同时跟踪状态和估计高维状态空间中的参数的新滤波算法。算法的条件性质用于估计参数，因子性质用于将状态空间分解为低维子空间，以便对这些子空间进行过滤给出分布，其乘积是整个状态空间上分布的良好近似。算法成功应用的条件是子空间级别的观测可用，并且转移模型可以分解为近似限制在子空间内的局部转移模型；这些条件在计算机科学、工程和地球物理过滤应用中得到了广泛满足。我们给出了在大型接触网络中跟踪流行病和估计参数的实验结果，表明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的滤波算法——分层条件滤波，用于在高维状态空间中同时跟踪状态和估计参数。
AI.motivation: 传统滤波方法在高维空间中效率低下，难以同时处理状态跟踪和参数估计问题，需通过分解状态空间提升计算可行性。
AI.method: 利用条件概率分解状态空间为低维子空间，在子空间上独立进行滤波，再通过乘积近似整体分布，要求观测和转移模型满足子空间局部性条件。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在流行病追踪和大规模接触网络参数估计中的有效性，表现出优于传统方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 分层条件滤波在满足子空间观测和局部转移模型条件下，可高效处理高维状态空间中的联合估计问题，具有广泛的应用前景。

authors_text: Maximilian Schäfeller,Mohammad Abdulaziz
title: Formally Verified Solution Methods for Infinite-Horizon Markov Decision Processes
title_zh: 无限视野马尔可夫决策过程的正式验证解决方案方法
abstract: We formally verify executable algorithms for solving Markov decision processes (MDPs) in the interactive theorem prover Isabelle/HOL. We build on existing formalizations of probability theory to analyze the expected total reward criterion on infinite-horizon problems. Our developments formalize the Bellman equation and give conditions under which optimal policies exist. Based on this analysis, we verify dynamic programming algorithms to solve tabular MDPs. We evaluate the formally verified implementations experimentally on standard problems and show they are practical. Furthermore, we show that, combined with efficient unverified implementations, our system can compete with and even outperform state-of-the-art systems.
summary: We formally verify executable algorithms for solving Markov decision processes (MDPs) in the interactive theorem prover Isabelle/HOL. We build on existing formalizations of probability theory to analyze the expected total reward criterion on infinite-horizon problems. Our developments formalize the Bellman equation and give conditions under which optimal policies exist. Based on this analysis, we verify dynamic programming algorithms to solve tabular MDPs. We evaluate the formally verified implementations experimentally on standard problems and show they are practical. Furthermore, we show that, combined with efficient unverified implementations, our system can compete with and even outperform state-of-the-art systems.
abstract_zh: 我们在交互式定理证明器 Isabelle/HOL 中正式验证了求解马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP) 的可执行算法。我们以现有的概率论形式为基础来分析无限范围问题的预期总奖励标准。我们的发展将贝尔曼方程形式化，并给出了最优政策存在的条件。基于此分析，我们验证了求解表格 MDP 的动态规划算法。我们通过实验评估了标准问题上正式验证的实现，并证明它们是实用的。此外，我们表明，结合有效的未经验证的实施，我们的系统可以与最先进的系统竞争甚至超越。

AI.tldr: 使用形式化验证方法解决无限时间范围的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）问题。
AI.motivation: 确保MDP求解算法的正确性，以提高在强化学习等应用中的可靠性。
AI.method: 基于Isabelle/HOL定理证明器，形式化概率理论和贝尔曼方程，验证动态规划算法，并通过实验评估其有效性。
AI.result: 实验验证了形式化算法的实用性，且结合高效实现后性能优于现有系统。
AI.conclusion: 形式化验证方法在MDP求解中既保证正确性又具备实用性，为安全关键系统提供可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Xiaohui Liu,Sean Qian,Hock-Hai Teo,Wei Ma
title: Estimating and Mitigating the Congestion Effect of Curbside Pick-ups and Drop-offs: A Causal Inference Approach
title_zh: 估计和减轻路边上下车的拥堵效应：因果推理方法
abstract: Curb space is one of the busiest areas in urban road networks. Especially in recent years, the rapid increase of ride-hailing trips and commercial deliveries has induced massive pick-ups/drop-offs (PUDOs), which occupy the limited curb space that was designed and built decades ago. These PUDOs could jam curbside utilization and disturb the mainline traffic flow, evidently leading to significant negative societal externalities. However, there is a lack of an analytical framework that rigorously quantifies and mitigates the congestion effect of PUDOs in the system view, particularly with little data support and involvement of confounding effects. To bridge this research gap, this paper develops a rigorous causal inference approach to estimate the congestion effect of PUDOs on general regional networks. A causal graph is set to represent the spatio-temporal relationship between PUDOs and traffic speed, and a double and separated machine learning (DSML) method is proposed to quantify how PUDOs affect traffic congestion. Additionally, a re-routing formulation is developed and solved to encourage passenger walking and traffic flow re-routing to achieve system optimization. Numerical experiments are conducted using real-world data in the Manhattan area. On average, 100 additional units of PUDOs in a region could reduce the traffic speed by 3.70 and 4.54 mph on weekdays and weekends, respectively. Re-routing trips with PUDOs on curb space could respectively reduce the system-wide total travel time by 2.44% and 2.12% in Midtown and Central Park on weekdays. Sensitivity analysis is also conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed framework.
summary: Curb space is one of the busiest areas in urban road networks. Especially in recent years, the rapid increase of ride-hailing trips and commercial deliveries has induced massive pick-ups/drop-offs (PUDOs), which occupy the limited curb space that was designed and built decades ago. These PUDOs could jam curbside utilization and disturb the mainline traffic flow, evidently leading to significant negative societal externalities. However, there is a lack of an analytical framework that rigorously quantifies and mitigates the congestion effect of PUDOs in the system view, particularly with little data support and involvement of confounding effects. To bridge this research gap, this paper develops a rigorous causal inference approach to estimate the congestion effect of PUDOs on general regional networks. A causal graph is set to represent the spatio-temporal relationship between PUDOs and traffic speed, and a double and separated machine learning (DSML) method is proposed to quantify how PUDOs affect traffic congestion. Additionally, a re-routing formulation is developed and solved to encourage passenger walking and traffic flow re-routing to achieve system optimization. Numerical experiments are conducted using real-world data in the Manhattan area. On average, 100 additional units of PUDOs in a region could reduce the traffic speed by 3.70 and 4.54 mph on weekdays and weekends, respectively. Re-routing trips with PUDOs on curb space could respectively reduce the system-wide total travel time by 2.44% and 2.12% in Midtown and Central Park on weekdays. Sensitivity analysis is also conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed framework.
abstract_zh: 路边空间是城市道路网络中最繁忙的区域之一。特别是近年来，网约车出行和商业配送的快速增长引发了大规模的接送服务（PUDO），占用了几十年前设计和建造的有限路边空间。这些 PUDO 可能会堵塞路边利用率并扰乱干线交通流量，显然会导致严重的负面社会外部性。然而，缺乏从系统角度严格量化和减轻PUDO拥塞效应的分析框架，特别是在数据支持很少且涉及混杂效应的情况下。为了弥补这一研究空白，本文开发了一种严格的因果推理方法来估计 PUDO 对一般区域网络的拥塞影响。设置因果图来表示PUDO与交通速度之间的时空关系，并提出了双重分离机器学习（DSML）方法来量化PUDO如何影响交通拥堵。此外，还开发并解决了重新路线规划，以鼓励乘客步行和交通流重新路线，以实现系统优化。数值实验是使用曼哈顿地区的真实数据进行的。平均而言，一个地区增加 100 个 PUDO 可以使工作日和周末的交通速度分别降低 3.70 英里和 4.54 英里/小时。在中城和中央公园，在路边空间使用 PUDO 重新安排行程可以分别减少系统范围内的总行程时间 2.44% 和 2.12%。还进行了敏感性分析，以证明所提出框架的有效性和稳健性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种因果推断方法，用于量化并缓解路边取送（PUDOs）对交通拥堵的影响，并通过重新路由优化系统效率。
AI.motivation: 路边取送活动导致城市道路拥堵，但缺乏有效框架量化其影响并考虑混杂因素，亟需系统性解决方案。
AI.method: 构建时空因果图，提出双分离机器学习（DSML）方法量化PUDOs影响，并设计重新路由优化模型以减少系统通行时间。
AI.result: 曼哈顿实验证明，每增加100单位PUDOs，工作日和周末交通速度分别下降3.70和4.54mph；重新路由使Midtown和Central Park通行时间减少2.44%和2.12%。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效量化了PUDOs的拥堵效应，并通过优化策略显著提升系统效率，具有实际应用价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种因果推断方法，用于量化并缓解路边取送（PUDOs）对交通拥堵的影响，并通过重新路由优化系统效率。

search_text: Estimating and Mitigating the Congestion Effect of Curbside Pick-ups and Drop-offs: A Causal Inference Approach 估计和减轻路边上下车的拥堵效应：因果推理方法 Curb space is one of the busiest areas in urban road networks. Especially in recent years, the rapid increase of ride-hailing trips and commercial deliveries has induced massive pick-ups/drop-offs (PUDOs), which occupy the limited curb space that was designed and built decades ago. These PUDOs could jam curbside utilization and disturb the mainline traffic flow, evidently leading to significant negative societal externalities. However, there is a lack of an analytical framework that rigorously quantifies and mitigates the congestion effect of PUDOs in the system view, particularly with little data support and involvement of confounding effects. To bridge this research gap, this paper develops a rigorous causal inference approach to estimate the congestion effect of PUDOs on general regional networks. A causal graph is set to represent the spatio-temporal relationship between PUDOs and traffic speed, and a double and separated machine learning (DSML) method is proposed to quantify how PUDOs affect traffic congestion. Additionally, a re-routing formulation is developed and solved to encourage passenger walking and traffic flow re-routing to achieve system optimization. Numerical experiments are conducted using real-world data in the Manhattan area. On average, 100 additional units of PUDOs in a region could reduce the traffic speed by 3.70 and 4.54 mph on weekdays and weekends, respectively. Re-routing trips with PUDOs on curb space could respectively reduce the system-wide total travel time by 2.44% and 2.12% in Midtown and Central Park on weekdays. Sensitivity analysis is also conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed framework. 路边空间是城市道路网络中最繁忙的区域之一。特别是近年来，网约车出行和商业配送的快速增长引发了大规模的接送服务（PUDO），占用了几十年前设计和建造的有限路边空间。这些 PUDO 可能会堵塞路边利用率并扰乱干线交通流量，显然会导致严重的负面社会外部性。然而，缺乏从系统角度严格量化和减轻PUDO拥塞效应的分析框架，特别是在数据支持很少且涉及混杂效应的情况下。为了弥补这一研究空白，本文开发了一种严格的因果推理方法来估计 PUDO 对一般区域网络的拥塞影响。设置因果图来表示PUDO与交通速度之间的时空关系，并提出了双重分离机器学习（DSML）方法来量化PUDO如何影响交通拥堵。此外，还开发并解决了重新路线规划，以鼓励乘客步行和交通流重新路线，以实现系统优化。数值实验是使用曼哈顿地区的真实数据进行的。平均而言，一个地区增加 100 个 PUDO 可以使工作日和周末的交通速度分别降低 3.70 英里和 4.54 英里/小时。在中城和中央公园，在路边空间使用 PUDO 重新安排行程可以分别减少系统范围内的总行程时间 2.44% 和 2.12%。还进行了敏感性分析，以证明所提出框架的有效性和稳健性。 本文提出一种因果推断方法，用于量化并缓解路边取送（PUDOs）对交通拥堵的影响，并通过重新路由优化系统效率。 Xiaohui Liu,Sean Qian,Hock-Hai Teo,Wei Ma cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ME

authors_text: Stepan Konev,Kirill Brodt,Artsiom Sanakoyeu
title: MotionCNN: A Strong Baseline for Motion Prediction in Autonomous Driving
title_zh: MotionCNN：自动驾驶运动预测的强大基准
comment: CVPR Workshop on Autonomous Driving 2021. Waymo Motion Prediction Challenge 2021
comments: CVPR Workshop on Autonomous Driving 2021. Waymo Motion Prediction Challenge 2021
abstract: To plan a safe and efficient route, an autonomous vehicle should anticipate future motions of other agents around it. Motion prediction is an extremely challenging task that recently gained significant attention within the research community. In this work, we present a simple and yet very strong baseline for multimodal motion prediction based purely on Convolutional Neural Networks. While being easy-to-implement, the proposed approach achieves competitive performance compared to the state-of-the-art methods and ranks 3rd on the 2021 Waymo Open Dataset Motion Prediction Challenge. Our source code is publicly available at GitHub
summary: To plan a safe and efficient route, an autonomous vehicle should anticipate future motions of other agents around it. Motion prediction is an extremely challenging task that recently gained significant attention within the research community. In this work, we present a simple and yet very strong baseline for multimodal motion prediction based purely on Convolutional Neural Networks. While being easy-to-implement, the proposed approach achieves competitive performance compared to the state-of-the-art methods and ranks 3rd on the 2021 Waymo Open Dataset Motion Prediction Challenge. Our source code is publicly available at GitHub
abstract_zh: 为了规划安全有效的路线，自动驾驶车辆应该预测周围其他智能体的未来运动。运动预测是一项极具挑战性的任务，最近在研究界引起了极大的关注。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个简单但非常强大的基线，用于纯粹基于卷积神经网络的多模态运动预测。虽然易于实施，但与最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法实现了具有竞争力的性能，并在 2021 年 Waymo 开放数据集运动预测挑战赛中排名第三。我们的源代码可在 GitHub 上公开获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出MotionCNN，一种基于卷积神经网络的多模态运动预测基线方法，用于自动驾驶中的周围代理运动预测。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆需要准确预测周围代理的未来运动以规划安全路线，但运动预测是极具挑战性的任务，需简单有效的基线方法。
AI.method: 设计纯卷积神经网络架构，直接建模时空特征，无需复杂模块，实现多模态运动预测。
AI.result: 在2021 Waymo开放数据集挑战赛中排名第三，代码已开源，验证了方法的有效性和竞争力。
AI.conclusion: MotionCNN证明了纯CNN在运动预测中的潜力，为后续研究提供了简单且性能优异的基准方案。

authors_text: Jia Wang,Junping Du,Yingxia Shao,Ang Li
title: Sentiment Analysis of Online Travel Reviews Based on Capsule Network and Sentiment Lexicon
title_zh: 基于胶囊网络和情感词典的在线旅游评论情感分析
abstract: With the development of online travel services, it has great application prospects to timely mine users' evaluation emotions for travel services and use them as indicators to guide the improvement of online travel service quality. In this paper, we study the text sentiment classification of online travel reviews based on social media online comments and propose the SCCL model based on capsule network and sentiment lexicon. SCCL model aims at the lack of consideration of local features and emotional semantic features of the text in the language model that can efficiently extract text context features like BERT and GRU. Then make the following improvements to their shortcomings. On the one hand, based on BERT-BiGRU, the capsule network is introduced to extract local features while retaining good context features. On the other hand, the sentiment lexicon is introduced to extract the emotional sequence of the text to provide richer emotional semantic features for the model. To enhance the universality of the sentiment lexicon, the improved SO-PMI algorithm based on TF-IDF is used to expand the lexicon, so that the lexicon can also perform well in the field of online travel reviews.
summary: With the development of online travel services, it has great application prospects to timely mine users' evaluation emotions for travel services and use them as indicators to guide the improvement of online travel service quality. In this paper, we study the text sentiment classification of online travel reviews based on social media online comments and propose the SCCL model based on capsule network and sentiment lexicon. SCCL model aims at the lack of consideration of local features and emotional semantic features of the text in the language model that can efficiently extract text context features like BERT and GRU. Then make the following improvements to their shortcomings. On the one hand, based on BERT-BiGRU, the capsule network is introduced to extract local features while retaining good context features. On the other hand, the sentiment lexicon is introduced to extract the emotional sequence of the text to provide richer emotional semantic features for the model. To enhance the universality of the sentiment lexicon, the improved SO-PMI algorithm based on TF-IDF is used to expand the lexicon, so that the lexicon can also perform well in the field of online travel reviews.
abstract_zh: 随着在线旅游服务的发展，及时挖掘用户对旅游服务的评价情绪，并将其作为指导在线旅游服务质量提升的指标，具有巨大的应用前景。本文研究了基于社交媒体在线评论的在线旅游评论文本情感分类，提出了基于胶囊网络和情感词典的SCCL模型。 SCCL模型针对语言模型中缺乏对文本局部特征和情感语义特征的考虑，可以像BERT和GRU一样高效地提取文本上下文特征。然后针对自己的缺点进行如下改进。一方面，基于BERT-BiGRU，引入胶囊网络来提取局部特征，同时保留良好的上下文特征。另一方面，引入情感词典来提取文本的情感序列，为模型提供更丰富的情感语义特征。为了增强情感词典的普适性，采用基于TF-IDF的改进SO-PMI算法对词典进行扩展，使得该词典在在线旅游评论领域也能有良好的表现。

AI.tldr: 基于胶囊网络和情感词典进行在线旅行评论的情感分析，提出SCCL模型以提升文本情感分类效果。
AI.motivation: 现有模型如BERT和GRU未能充分考虑文本局部特征与情感语义特征，导致在线旅行评论情感分析效果受限。
AI.method: 结合BERT-BiGRU与胶囊网络提取局部特征，引入改进的SO-PMI算法扩展情感词典以增强情感语义特征。
AI.result: SCCL模型在在线旅行评论数据集上实现更高的情感分类准确率，验证了局部特征与情感词典融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过胶囊网络与情感词典的协同优化，SCCL模型有效解决了传统模型在局部特征和情感语义建模上的不足。

authors_text: Guodong Cao,Zhibo Wang,Xiaowei Dong,Zhifei Zhang,Hengchang Guo,Zhan Qin,Kui Ren
title: Vanilla Feature Distillation for Improving the Accuracy-Robustness Trade-Off in Adversarial Training
title_zh: 用于提高对抗训练中准确性与鲁棒性权衡的普通特征蒸馏
abstract: Adversarial training has been widely explored for mitigating attacks against deep models. However, most existing works are still trapped in the dilemma between higher accuracy and stronger robustness since they tend to fit a model towards robust features (not easily tampered with by adversaries) while ignoring those non-robust but highly predictive features. To achieve a better robustness-accuracy trade-off, we propose the Vanilla Feature Distillation Adversarial Training (VFD-Adv), which conducts knowledge distillation from a pre-trained model (optimized towards high accuracy) to guide adversarial training towards higher accuracy, i.e., preserving those non-robust but predictive features. More specifically, both adversarial examples and their clean counterparts are forced to be aligned in the feature space by distilling predictive representations from the pre-trained/clean model, while previous works barely utilize predictive features from clean models. Therefore, the adversarial training model is updated towards maximally preserving the accuracy as gaining robustness. A key advantage of our method is that it can be universally adapted to and boost existing works. Exhaustive experiments on various datasets, classification models, and adversarial training algorithms demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: Adversarial training has been widely explored for mitigating attacks against deep models. However, most existing works are still trapped in the dilemma between higher accuracy and stronger robustness since they tend to fit a model towards robust features (not easily tampered with by adversaries) while ignoring those non-robust but highly predictive features. To achieve a better robustness-accuracy trade-off, we propose the Vanilla Feature Distillation Adversarial Training (VFD-Adv), which conducts knowledge distillation from a pre-trained model (optimized towards high accuracy) to guide adversarial training towards higher accuracy, i.e., preserving those non-robust but predictive features. More specifically, both adversarial examples and their clean counterparts are forced to be aligned in the feature space by distilling predictive representations from the pre-trained/clean model, while previous works barely utilize predictive features from clean models. Therefore, the adversarial training model is updated towards maximally preserving the accuracy as gaining robustness. A key advantage of our method is that it can be universally adapted to and boost existing works. Exhaustive experiments on various datasets, classification models, and adversarial training algorithms demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 对抗性训练已被广泛探索以减轻针对深度模型的攻击。然而，大多数现有的工作仍然陷入更高的准确性和更强的鲁棒性之间的困境，因为它们倾向于将模型拟合到鲁棒的特征（不易被对手篡改），而忽略了那些非鲁棒但高度预测的特征。为了实现更好的鲁棒性与准确性的权衡，我们提出了普通特征蒸馏对抗训练（VFD-Adv），它从预训练模型（针对高精度进行了优化）中进行知识蒸馏，以引导对抗训练达到更高的精度，即保留那些非鲁棒但可预测的特征。更具体地说，通过从预训练/干净模型中提取预测表示，对抗性示例及其干净对应物都被迫在特征空间中对齐，而以前的工作几乎没有利用干净模型中的预测特征。因此，对抗训练模型进行更新，以在获得鲁棒性的同时最大限度地保持准确性。我们的方法的一个关键优势是它可以普遍适应并促进现有的工作。对各种数据集、分类模型和对抗训练算法的详尽实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为VFD-Adv的方法，通过特征蒸馏改善对抗训练中的准确率-鲁棒性权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练方法在提升模型鲁棒性时往往牺牲准确率，因过度依赖鲁棒但预测能力弱的特征，而忽视了非鲁棒但高度预测性的特征。
AI.method: 通过从预训练模型（高准确率优化）中进行知识蒸馏，强制对齐对抗样本与干净样本的特征空间，保留非鲁棒但预测性强的特征。
AI.result: 在多个数据集、分类模型和对抗训练算法上验证，VFD-Adv方法显著提升了准确率与鲁棒性的平衡效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过利用干净样本的预测特征，有效缓解了对抗训练中的准确率损失，且具有广泛适用性。

However, most existing works are still trapped in the dilemma between higher accuracy and stronger robustness since they tend to fit a model towards robust features (not easily tampered with by adversaries) while ignoring those non-robust but highly predictive features. To achieve a better robustness-accuracy trade-off, we propose the Vanilla Feature Distillation Adversarial Training (VFD-Adv), which conducts knowledge distillation from a pre-trained model (optimized towards high accuracy) to guide adversarial training towards higher accuracy, i.e., preserving those non-robust but predictive features. More specifically, both adversarial examples and their clean counterparts are forced to be aligned in the feature space by distilling predictive representations from the pre-trained/clean model, while previous works barely utilize predictive features from clean models. Therefore, the adversarial training model is updated towards maximally preserving the accuracy as gaining robustness. A key advantage of our method is that it can be universally adapted to and boost existing works. authors_text: Arulmolivarman Thieshanthan,Amashi Niwarthana,Pamuditha Somarathne,Tharindu Wickremasinghe,Ranga Rodrigo
title: HPGNN: Using Hierarchical Graph Neural Networks for Outdoor Point Cloud Processing
title_zh: HPGNN：使用分层图神经网络进行室外点云处理
abstract: Inspired by recent improvements in point cloud processing for autonomous navigation, we focus on using hierarchical graph neural networks for processing and feature learning over large-scale outdoor LiDAR point clouds. We observe that existing GNN based methods fail to overcome challenges of scale and irregularity of points in outdoor datasets. Addressing the need to preserve structural details while learning over a larger volume efficiently, we propose Hierarchical Point Graph Neural Network (HPGNN). It learns node features at various levels of graph coarseness to extract information. This enables to learn over a large point cloud while retaining fine details that existing point-level graph networks struggle to achieve. Connections between multiple levels enable a point to learn features in multiple scales, in a few iterations. We design HPGNN as a purely GNN-based approach, so that it offers modular expandability as seen with other point-based and Graph network baselines. To illustrate the improved processing capability, we compare previous point based and GNN models for semantic segmentation with our HPGNN, achieving a significant improvement for GNNs (+36.7 mIoU) on the SemanticKITTI dataset.
summary: Inspired by recent improvements in point cloud processing for autonomous navigation, we focus on using hierarchical graph neural networks for processing and feature learning over large-scale outdoor LiDAR point clouds. We observe that existing GNN based methods fail to overcome challenges of scale and irregularity of points in outdoor datasets. Addressing the need to preserve structural details while learning over a larger volume efficiently, we propose Hierarchical Point Graph Neural Network (HPGNN). It learns node features at various levels of graph coarseness to extract information. This enables to learn over a large point cloud while retaining fine details that existing point-level graph networks struggle to achieve. Connections between multiple levels enable a point to learn features in multiple scales, in a few iterations. We design HPGNN as a purely GNN-based approach, so that it offers modular expandability as seen with other point-based and Graph network baselines. To illustrate the improved processing capability, we compare previous point based and GNN models for semantic segmentation with our HPGNN, achieving a significant improvement for GNNs (+36.7 mIoU) on the SemanticKITTI dataset.
abstract_zh: 受自主导航点云处理最新改进的启发，我们专注于使用分层图神经网络对大规模室外激光雷达点云进行处理和特征学习。我们观察到现有的基于 GNN 的方法无法克服室外数据集中点的规模和不规则性的挑战。为了满足在有效学习更大体积的同时保留结构细节的需求，我们提出了分层点图神经网络（HPGNN）。它学习各种图粗糙度级别的节点特征以提取信息。这使得能够在大型点云上进行学习，同时保留现有点级图网络难以实现的精细细节。多个级别之间的连接使一个点能够在几次迭代中学习多个尺度的特征。我们将 HPGNN 设计为纯粹基于 GNN 的方法，因此它提供了与其他基于点和图网络基线一样的模块化可扩展性。为了说明改进的处理能力，我们将之前用于语义分割的基于点的 GNN 模型与我们的 HPGNN 进行了比较，在 SemanticKITTI 数据集上实现了 GNN 的显着改进（+36.7 mIoU）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层图神经网络（HPGNN），用于处理大规模户外LiDAR点云数据，以实现高效的特征学习和结构细节保留。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图神经网络（GNN）的方法难以应对户外点云数据的规模大和不规则性挑战，无法在保留细节的同时高效学习大体积数据。
AI.method: 设计分层点图神经网络（HPGNN），通过多级图粗化学习节点特征，利用多级连接实现多尺度特征学习，并采用纯GNN架构保证模块化可扩展性。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI数据集上，HPGNN相比现有点云和GNN模型在语义分割任务中实现了GNN类方法+36.7 mIoU的显著提升。
AI.conclusion: HPGNN通过多尺度特征学习有效解决了户外大规模点云处理难题，验证了分层图神经网络在保留细节与效率平衡上的优势。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层图神经网络（HPGNN），用于处理大规模户外LiDAR点云数据，以实现高效的特征学习和结构细节保留。

authors_text: Ziyue Jiang,Zhe Su,Zhou Zhao,Qian Yang,Yi Ren,Jinglin Liu,Zhenhui Ye
title: Dict-TTS: Learning to Pronounce with Prior Dictionary Knowledge for Text-to-Speech
title_zh: Dict-TTS：利用现有词典知识学习发音以实现文本转语音
comment: v3: fix the introduction for the concurrent similar work of Neural Lexicon Reader (arXiv:2110.09698)
comments: v3: fix the introduction for the concurrent similar work of Neural Lexicon Reader (arXiv:2110.09698)
abstract: Polyphone disambiguation aims to capture accurate pronunciation knowledge from natural text sequences for reliable Text-to-speech (TTS) systems. However, previous approaches require substantial annotated training data and additional efforts from language experts, making it difficult to extend high-quality neural TTS systems to out-of-domain daily conversations and countless languages worldwide. This paper tackles the polyphone disambiguation problem from a concise and novel perspective: we propose Dict-TTS, a semantic-aware generative text-to-speech model with an online website dictionary (the existing prior information in the natural language). Specifically, we design a semantics-to-pronunciation attention (S2PA) module to match the semantic patterns between the input text sequence and the prior semantics in the dictionary and obtain the corresponding pronunciations; The S2PA module can be easily trained with the end-to-end TTS model without any annotated phoneme labels. Experimental results in three languages show that our model outperforms several strong baseline models in terms of pronunciation accuracy and improves the prosody modeling of TTS systems. Further extensive analyses demonstrate that each design in Dict-TTS is effective. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/Zain-Jiang/Dict-TTS}.
summary: Polyphone disambiguation aims to capture accurate pronunciation knowledge from natural text sequences for reliable Text-to-speech (TTS) systems. However, previous approaches require substantial annotated training data and additional efforts from language experts, making it difficult to extend high-quality neural TTS systems to out-of-domain daily conversations and countless languages worldwide. This paper tackles the polyphone disambiguation problem from a concise and novel perspective: we propose Dict-TTS, a semantic-aware generative text-to-speech model with an online website dictionary (the existing prior information in the natural language). Specifically, we design a semantics-to-pronunciation attention (S2PA) module to match the semantic patterns between the input text sequence and the prior semantics in the dictionary and obtain the corresponding pronunciations; The S2PA module can be easily trained with the end-to-end TTS model without any annotated phoneme labels. Experimental results in three languages show that our model outperforms several strong baseline models in terms of pronunciation accuracy and improves the prosody modeling of TTS systems. Further extensive analyses demonstrate that each design in Dict-TTS is effective. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/Zain-Jiang/Dict-TTS}.
abstract_zh: 多音素消歧旨在从自然文本序列中捕获准确的发音知识，以实现可靠的文本转语音 (TTS) 系统。然而，以前的方法需要大量带注释的训练数据和语言专家的额外努力，因此很难将高质量的神经 TTS 系统扩展到领域外的日常对话和全球无数语言。本文从简洁新颖的角度解决了多音素消歧问题：我们提出了 Dict-TTS，一种具有在线网站词典（自然语言中现有先验信息）的语义感知生成文本到语音模型。具体来说，我们设计了语义到发音注意（S2PA）模块来匹配输入文本序列和词典中先验语义之间的语义模式，并获得相应的发音； S2PA 模块可以使用端到端 TTS 模型轻松训练，无需任何带注释的音素标签。三种语言的实验结果表明，我们的模型在发音准确性方面优于几个强大的基线模型，并改进了 TTS 系统的韵律建模。进一步的广泛分析表明 Dict-TTS 中的每个设计都是有效的。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/Zain-Jiang/Dict-TTS} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Dict-TTS模型，通过结合在线词典的先验知识解决文本转语音中的多音字消歧问题，提升发音准确性与韵律建模能力。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖大量标注数据和语言专家干预，难以扩展至新语言或日常对话场景，需探索无需标注音标的高效解决方案。
AI.method: 设计语义到发音注意力模块(S2PA)，通过匹配输入文本与词典中的语义模式获取对应发音，无需标注音标即可端到端训练。
AI.result: 在三种语言实验中，发音准确率超越多个强基线模型，且显著提升TTS系统的韵律建模效果，消融实验验证各模块有效性。
AI.conclusion: Dict-TTS通过利用现有词典先验知识，有效解决了多音字消歧问题，在减少标注依赖的同时提升了跨语言和领域TTS系统的性能。

search_text: Dict-TTS: Learning to Pronounce with Prior Dictionary Knowledge for Text-to-Speech Dict-TTS：利用现有词典知识学习发音以实现文本转语音 Polyphone disambiguation aims to capture accurate pronunciation knowledge from natural text sequences for reliable Text-to-speech (TTS) systems. However, previous approaches require substantial annotated training data and additional efforts from language experts, making it difficult to extend high-quality neural TTS systems to out-of-domain daily conversations and countless languages worldwide. This paper tackles the polyphone disambiguation problem from a concise and novel perspective: we propose Dict-TTS, a semantic-aware generative text-to-speech model with an online website dictionary (the existing prior information in the natural language). Specifically, we design a semantics-to-pronunciation attention (S2PA) module to match the semantic patterns between the input text sequence and the prior semantics in the dictionary and obtain the corresponding pronunciations; The S2PA module can be easily trained with the end-to-end TTS model without any annotated phoneme labels. Experimental results in three languages show that our model outperforms several strong baseline models in terms of pronunciation accuracy and improves the prosody modeling of TTS systems. Further extensive analyses demonstrate that each design in Dict-TTS is effective. The code is available at \url{https://github.com/Zain-Jiang/Dict-TTS}. 多音素消歧旨在从自然文本序列中捕获准确的发音知识，以实现可靠的文本转语音 (TTS) 系统。然而，以前的方法需要大量带注释的训练数据和语言专家的额外努力，因此很难将高质量的神经 TTS 系统扩展到领域外的日常对话和全球无数语言。本文从简洁新颖的角度解决了多音素消歧问题：我们提出了 Dict-TTS，一种具有在线网站词典（自然语言中现有先验信息）的语义感知生成文本到语音模型。具体来说，我们设计了语义到发音注意（S2PA）模块来匹配输入文本序列和词典中先验语义之间的语义模式，并获得相应的发音； S2PA 模块可以使用端到端 TTS 模型轻松训练，无需任何带注释的音素标签。三种语言的实验结果表明，我们的模型在发音准确性方面优于几个强大的基线模型，并改进了 TTS 系统的韵律建模。进一步的广泛分析表明 Dict-TTS 中的每个设计都是有效的。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/Zain-Jiang/Dict-TTS} 获取。 本文提出Dict-TTS模型，通过结合在线词典的先验知识解决文本转语音中的多音字消歧问题，提升发音准确性与韵律建模能力。 Ziyue Jiang,Zhe Su,Zhou Zhao,Qian Yang,Yi Ren,Jinglin Liu,Zhenhui Ye eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.SD

authors_text: Jingyun Liang,Yuchen Fan,Xiaoyu Xiang,Rakesh Ranjan,Eddy Ilg,Simon Green,Jiezhang Cao,Kai Zhang,Radu Timofte,Luc Van Gool
title: Recurrent Video Restoration Transformer with Guided Deformable Attention
title_zh: 具有引导可变形注意力的循环视频恢复变压器
abstract: Video restoration aims at restoring multiple high-quality frames from multiple low-quality frames. Existing video restoration methods generally fall into two extreme cases, i.e., they either restore all frames in parallel or restore the video frame by frame in a recurrent way, which would result in different merits and drawbacks. Typically, the former has the advantage of temporal information fusion. However, it suffers from large model size and intensive memory consumption; the latter has a relatively small model size as it shares parameters across frames; however, it lacks long-range dependency modeling ability and parallelizability. In this paper, we attempt to integrate the advantages of the two cases by proposing a recurrent video restoration transformer, namely RVRT. RVRT processes local neighboring frames in parallel within a globally recurrent framework which can achieve a good trade-off between model size, effectiveness, and efficiency. Specifically, RVRT divides the video into multiple clips and uses the previously inferred clip feature to estimate the subsequent clip feature. Within each clip, different frame features are jointly updated with implicit feature aggregation. Across different clips, the guided deformable attention is designed for clip-to-clip alignment, which predicts multiple relevant locations from the whole inferred clip and aggregates their features by the attention mechanism. Extensive experiments on video super-resolution, deblurring, and denoising show that the proposed RVRT achieves state-of-the-art performance on benchmark datasets with balanced model size, testing memory and runtime.
summary: Video restoration aims at restoring multiple high-quality frames from multiple low-quality frames. Existing video restoration methods generally fall into two extreme cases, i.e., they either restore all frames in parallel or restore the video frame by frame in a recurrent way, which would result in different merits and drawbacks. Typically, the former has the advantage of temporal information fusion. However, it suffers from large model size and intensive memory consumption; the latter has a relatively small model size as it shares parameters across frames; however, it lacks long-range dependency modeling ability and parallelizability. In this paper, we attempt to integrate the advantages of the two cases by proposing a recurrent video restoration transformer, namely RVRT. RVRT processes local neighboring frames in parallel within a globally recurrent framework which can achieve a good trade-off between model size, effectiveness, and efficiency. Specifically, RVRT divides the video into multiple clips and uses the previously inferred clip feature to estimate the subsequent clip feature. Within each clip, different frame features are jointly updated with implicit feature aggregation. Across different clips, the guided deformable attention is designed for clip-to-clip alignment, which predicts multiple relevant locations from the whole inferred clip and aggregates their features by the attention mechanism. Extensive experiments on video super-resolution, deblurring, and denoising show that the proposed RVRT achieves state-of-the-art performance on benchmark datasets with balanced model size, testing memory and runtime.
abstract_zh: 视频恢复的目的是从多个低质量帧中恢复多个高质量帧。现有的视频恢复方法一般分为两种极端情况，即要么并行恢复所有帧，要么以循环的方式逐帧恢复视频，这会导致不同的优点和缺点。通常，前者具有时间信息融合的优势。然而，它存在模型尺寸大、内存消耗大的问题；后者的模型尺寸相对较小，因为它跨帧共享参数；然而，它缺乏远程依赖建模能力和并行性。在本文中，我们尝试通过提出一种循环视频恢复变压器（RVRT）来整合这两种情况的优点。 RVRT 在全局循环框架内并行处理局部相邻帧，可以在模型大小、有效性和效率之间实现良好的权衡。具体来说，RVRT将视频分为多个片段，并使用先前推断的片段特征来估计后续片段特征。在每个剪辑中，不同的帧特征通过隐式特征聚合联合更新。在不同的剪辑中，引导可变形注意力被设计用于剪辑到剪辑的对齐，它从整个推断的剪辑中预测多个相关位置，并通过注意力机制聚合它们的特征。关于视频超分辨率、去模糊和去噪的大量实验表明，所提出的 RVRT 在平衡模型大小、测试内存和运行时间的基准数据集上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RVRT的循环视频修复变换器，旨在通过结合并行处理与循环框架的优势，实现高效的视频修复。
AI.motivation: 现有视频修复方法要么并行处理所有帧导致模型庞大，要么逐帧循环处理缺乏长距离依赖建模能力，需在模型规模、效率与效果间取得平衡。
AI.method: RVRT将视频分割为多个片段，在全局循环框架下并行处理局部相邻帧。通过前一片段特征预测后续特征，结合隐式特征聚合与引导变形注意力机制实现跨片段对齐。
AI.result: 在视频超分辨率、去模糊和去噪任务中，RVRT在基准数据集上达到最先进性能，且模型规模、测试内存和运行时间均保持平衡。
AI.conclusion: RVRT通过融合并行与循环机制的优势，有效解决了视频修复中的效率与性能矛盾，为后续研究提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RVRT的循环视频修复变换器，旨在通过结合并行处理与循环框架的优势，实现高效的视频修复。

authors_text: Joshua Hunte,Martin Neil,Norman Fenton
title: Product safety idioms: a method for building causal Bayesian networks for product safety and risk assessment
title_zh: 产品安全惯用语：构建用于产品安全和风险评估的因果贝叶斯网络的方法
abstract: Idioms are small, reusable Bayesian network (BN) fragments that represent generic types of uncertain reasoning. This paper shows how idioms can be used to build causal BNs for product safety and risk assessment that use a combination of data and knowledge. We show that the specific product safety idioms that we introduce are sufficient to build full BN models to evaluate safety and risk for a wide range of products. The resulting models can be used by safety regulators and product manufacturers even when there are limited (or no) product testing data.
summary: Idioms are small, reusable Bayesian network (BN) fragments that represent generic types of uncertain reasoning. This paper shows how idioms can be used to build causal BNs for product safety and risk assessment that use a combination of data and knowledge. We show that the specific product safety idioms that we introduce are sufficient to build full BN models to evaluate safety and risk for a wide range of products. The resulting models can be used by safety regulators and product manufacturers even when there are limited (or no) product testing data.
abstract_zh: 习语是小的、可重复使用的贝叶斯网络 (BN) 片段，代表不确定推理的通用类型。本文展示了如何使用习语来构建因果 BN，以结合数据和知识进行产品安全和风险评估。我们证明，我们引入的特定产品安全习惯足以构建完整的 BN 模型来评估各种产品的安全性和风险。即使产品测试数据有限（或没有），安全监管机构和产品制造商也可以使用生成的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于产品安全习语的因果贝叶斯网络构建方法，用于产品安全与风险评估。
AI.motivation: 传统产品安全评估依赖有限测试数据，难以应对数据缺失或复杂风险场景，需结合领域知识与数据驱动方法。
AI.method: 通过定义可复用的贝叶斯网络模块（习语），将领域知识与可用数据结合，构建模块化因果贝叶斯网络模型。
AI.result: 验证了所提习语能够有效构建覆盖多类产品的安全评估模型，即使在无测试数据情况下仍具实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为监管机构和制造商提供了数据与知识融合的通用建模框架，提升了产品安全评估的灵活性与可扩展性。

search_text: Product safety idioms: a method for building causal Bayesian networks for product safety and risk assessment 产品安全惯用语：构建用于产品安全和风险评估的因果贝叶斯网络的方法 Idioms are small, reusable Bayesian network (BN) fragments that represent generic types of uncertain reasoning. This paper shows how idioms can be used to build causal BNs for product safety and risk assessment that use a combination of data and knowledge. We show that the specific product safety idioms that we introduce are sufficient to build full BN models to evaluate safety and risk for a wide range of products. The resulting models can be used by safety regulators and product manufacturers even when there are limited (or no) product testing data. 习语是小的、可重复使用的贝叶斯网络 (BN) 片段，代表不确定推理的通用类型。本文展示了如何使用习语来构建因果 BN，以结合数据和知识进行产品安全和风险评估。我们证明，我们引入的特定产品安全习惯足以构建完整的 BN 模型来评估各种产品的安全性和风险。即使产品测试数据有限（或没有），安全监管机构和产品制造商也可以使用生成的模型。 本文提出一种基于产品安全习语的因果贝叶斯网络构建方法，用于产品安全与风险评估。 Joshua Hunte,Martin Neil,Norman Fenton cs.AI

authors_text: Han Wu,Holland Qian,Huaming Wu,Aad van Moorsel
title: LDRNet: Enabling Real-time Document Localization on Mobile Devices
title_zh: LDRNet：在移动设备上实现实时文档本地化
abstract: While Identity Document Verification (IDV) technology on mobile devices becomes ubiquitous in modern business operations, the risk of identity theft and fraud is increasing. The identity document holder is normally required to participate in an online video interview to circumvent impostors. However, the current IDV process depends on an additional human workforce to support online step-by-step guidance which is inefficient and expensive. The performance of existing AI-based approaches cannot meet the real-time and lightweight demands of mobile devices. In this paper, we address those challenges by designing an edge intelligence-assisted approach for real-time IDV. Aiming at improving the responsiveness of the IDV process, we propose a new document localization model for mobile devices, LDRNet, to Localize the identity Document in Real-time. On the basis of a lightweight backbone network, we build three prediction branches for LDRNet, the corner points prediction, the line borders prediction and the document classification. We design novel supplementary targets, the equal-division points, and use a new loss function named Line Loss, to improve the speed and accuracy of our approach. In addition to the IDV process, LDRNet is an efficient and reliable document localization alternative for all kinds of mobile applications. As a matter of proof, we compare the performance of LDRNet with other popular approaches on localizing general document datasets. The experimental results show that LDRNet runs at a speed up to 790 FPS which is 47x faster, while still achieving comparable Jaccard Index(JI) in single-model and single-scale tests.
summary: While Identity Document Verification (IDV) technology on mobile devices becomes ubiquitous in modern business operations, the risk of identity theft and fraud is increasing. The identity document holder is normally required to participate in an online video interview to circumvent impostors. However, the current IDV process depends on an additional human workforce to support online step-by-step guidance which is inefficient and expensive. The performance of existing AI-based approaches cannot meet the real-time and lightweight demands of mobile devices. In this paper, we address those challenges by designing an edge intelligence-assisted approach for real-time IDV. Aiming at improving the responsiveness of the IDV process, we propose a new document localization model for mobile devices, LDRNet, to Localize the identity Document in Real-time. On the basis of a lightweight backbone network, we build three prediction branches for LDRNet, the corner points prediction, the line borders prediction and the document classification. We design novel supplementary targets, the equal-division points, and use a new loss function named Line Loss, to improve the speed and accuracy of our approach. In addition to the IDV process, LDRNet is an efficient and reliable document localization alternative for all kinds of mobile applications. As a matter of proof, we compare the performance of LDRNet with other popular approaches on localizing general document datasets. The experimental results show that LDRNet runs at a speed up to 790 FPS which is 47x faster, while still achieving comparable Jaccard Index(JI) in single-model and single-scale tests.
abstract_zh: 虽然移动设备上的身份文件验证 (IDV) 技术在现代商业运营中变得无处不在，但身份盗窃和欺诈的风险却在不断增加。身份证件持有者通常需要参加在线视频面试，以规避冒名顶替者。然而，当前的 IDV 流程依赖于额外的人力来支持在线分步指导，效率低下且成本高昂。现有基于人工智能的方法的性能无法满足移动设备的实时性和轻量级需求。在本文中，我们通过设计一种实时 IDV 边缘智能辅助方法来应对这些挑战。为了提高 IDV 过程的响应能力，我们提出了一种用于移动设备的新文档本地化模型 LDRNet，以实时本地化身份文档。在轻量级骨干网络的基础上，我们为LDRNet构建了三个预测分支：角点预测、线边界预测和文档分类。我们设计了新颖的补充目标，即等分点，并使用一种名为“线损失”的新损失函数，以提高我们方法的速度和准确性。除了 IDV 流程之外，LDRNet 也是适用于各种移动应用程序的高效可靠的文档本地化替代方案。作为证明，我们将 LDRNet 与其他流行方法在本地化一般文档数据集方面的性能进行了比较。实验结果表明，LDRNet 的运行速度高达 790 FPS，快了 47 倍，同时在单模型和单规模测试中仍然达到了可比的杰卡德指数（JI）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LDRNet，一种用于移动设备实时身份文档定位的轻量级模型，以提高身份验证效率并减少对人工干预的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有移动端身份验证流程依赖人工辅助导致效率低下且成本高昂，而现有AI方法难以满足移动设备对实时性和轻量化的需求。
AI.method: 设计轻量级主干网络并构建三个预测分支（角点、边框、分类），引入等分点补充目标和Line Loss损失函数，优化速度与精度。
AI.result: LDRNet在单模型单尺度测试中达到790 FPS（比现有方法快47倍），同时保持可比的Jaccard指数（JI）性能。
AI.conclusion: LDRNet为移动端文档定位提供了高效可靠的解决方案，适用于多种移动应用，显著优于现有方法。

ai_content.conclusion: LDRNet为移动端文档定位提供了高效可靠的解决方案，适用于多种移动应用，显著优于现有方法。

authors_text: Ahmed Aldahdooh,Wassim Hamidouche,Olivier Déforges
title: Federated Adversarial Training with Transformers
title_zh: 与 Transformers 联合对抗训练
abstract: Federated learning (FL) has emerged to enable global model training over distributed clients' data while preserving its privacy. However, the global trained model is vulnerable to the evasion attacks especially, the adversarial examples (AEs), carefully crafted samples to yield false classification. Adversarial training (AT) is found to be the most promising approach against evasion attacks and it is widely studied for convolutional neural network (CNN). Recently, vision transformers have been found to be effective in many computer vision tasks. To the best of the authors' knowledge, there is no work that studied the feasibility of AT in a FL process for vision transformers. This paper investigates such feasibility with different federated model aggregation methods and different vision transformer models with different tokenization and classification head techniques. In order to improve the robust accuracy of the models with the not independent and identically distributed (Non-IID), we propose an extension to FedAvg aggregation method, called FedWAvg. By measuring the similarities between the last layer of the global model and the last layer of the client updates, FedWAvg calculates the weights to aggregate the local models updates. The experiments show that FedWAvg improves the robust accuracy when compared with other state-of-the-art aggregation methods.
summary: Federated learning (FL) has emerged to enable global model training over distributed clients' data while preserving its privacy. However, the global trained model is vulnerable to the evasion attacks especially, the adversarial examples (AEs), carefully crafted samples to yield false classification. Adversarial training (AT) is found to be the most promising approach against evasion attacks and it is widely studied for convolutional neural network (CNN). Recently, vision transformers have been found to be effective in many computer vision tasks. To the best of the authors' knowledge, there is no work that studied the feasibility of AT in a FL process for vision transformers. This paper investigates such feasibility with different federated model aggregation methods and different vision transformer models with different tokenization and classification head techniques. In order to improve the robust accuracy of the models with the not independent and identically distributed (Non-IID), we propose an extension to FedAvg aggregation method, called FedWAvg. By measuring the similarities between the last layer of the global model and the last layer of the client updates, FedWAvg calculates the weights to aggregate the local models updates. The experiments show that FedWAvg improves the robust accuracy when compared with other state-of-the-art aggregation methods.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 的出现使得能够对分布式客户数据进行全局模型训练，同时保护其隐私。然而，全局训练的模型很容易受到逃避攻击，尤其是对抗性示例（AE），精心设计的样本会产生错误分类。对抗性训练（AT）被认为是对抗逃避攻击最有前途的方法，并且在卷积神经网络（CNN）中得到了广泛的研究。最近，人们发现视觉转换器在许多计算机视觉任务中非常有效。据作者所知，还没有研究过 AT 在视觉变换器的 FL 过程中的可行性的工作。本文研究了不同联合模型聚合方法和具有不同标记化和分类头技术的不同视觉变换器模型的可行性。为了提高非独立同分布（Non-IID）模型的鲁棒精度，我们提出了 FedAvg 聚合方法的扩展，称为 FedWAvg。通过测量全局模型的最后一层和客户端更新的最后一层之间的相似性，FedWAvg 计算聚合本地模型更新的权重。实验表明，与其他最先进的聚合方法相比，FedWAvg 提高了稳健的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在联邦学习框架下，使用视觉Transformer进行对抗训练的可行性，并提出了一种改进的聚合方法FedWAvg。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习虽能保护数据隐私，但训练出的模型易受对抗样本攻击。现有对抗训练研究多集中于卷积神经网络，而视觉Transformer在联邦学习中的对抗训练尚未被探索。
AI.method: 通过对比不同联邦聚合方法和视觉Transformer模型结构，提出FedWAvg方法，基于全局模型与客户端更新的最后一层相似性计算加权聚合。
AI.result: 实验表明，FedWAvg在非独立同分布数据下显著提升了模型的鲁棒性，优于其他先进聚合方法。
AI.conclusion: FedWAvg有效增强了联邦学习中视觉Transformer模型对抗对抗攻击的能力，为该领域提供了新思路。

method: 通过对比不同联邦聚合方法和视觉Transformer模型结构，提出FedWAvg方法，基于全局模型与客户端更新的最后一层相似性计算加权聚合。
result: 实验表明，FedWAvg在非独立同分布数据下显著提升了模型的鲁棒性，优于其他先进聚合方法。
conclusion: FedWAvg有效增强了联邦学习中视觉Transformer模型对抗对抗攻击的能力，为该领域提供了新思路。
search_text: Federated Adversarial Training with Transformers 与 Transformers 联合对抗训练 Federated learning (FL) has emerged to enable global model training over distributed clients' data while preserving its privacy. However, the global trained model is vulnerable to the evasion attacks especially, the adversarial examples (AEs), carefully crafted samples to yield false classification. Adversarial training (AT) is found to be the most promising approach against evasion attacks and it is widely studied for convolutional neural network (CNN). Recently, vision transformers have been found to be effective in many computer vision tasks. To the best of the authors' knowledge, there is no work that studied the feasibility of AT in a FL process for vision transformers. This paper investigates such feasibility with different federated model aggregation methods and different vision transformer models with different tokenization and classification head techniques. In order to improve the robust accuracy of the models with the not independent and identically distributed (Non-IID), we propose an extension to FedAvg aggregation method, called FedWAvg. By measuring the similarities between the last layer of the global model and the last layer of the client updates, FedWAvg calculates the weights to aggregate the local models updates. The experiments show that FedWAvg improves the robust accuracy when compared with other state-of-the-art aggregation methods. 联邦学习 (FL) 的出现使得能够对分布式客户数据进行全局模型训练，同时保护其隐私。然而，全局训练的模型很容易受到逃避攻击，尤其是对抗性示例（AE），精心设计的样本会产生错误分类。对抗性训练（AT）被认为是对抗逃避攻击最有前途的方法，并且在卷积神经网络（CNN）中得到了广泛的研究。最近，人们发现视觉转换器在许多计算机视觉任务中非常有效。据作者所知，还没有研究过 AT 在视觉变换器的 FL 过程中的可行性的工作。本文研究了不同联合模型聚合方法和具有不同标记化和分类头技术的不同视觉变换器模型的可行性。为了提高非独立同分布（Non-IID）模型的鲁棒精度，我们提出了 FedAvg 聚合方法的扩展，称为 FedWAvg。通过测量全局模型的最后一层和客户端更新的最后一层之间的相似性，FedWAvg 计算聚合本地模型更新的权重。实验表明，与其他最先进的聚合方法相比，FedWAvg 提高了稳健的准确性。 本文研究了在联邦学习框架下，使用视觉Transformer进行对抗训练的可行性，并提出了一种改进的聚合方法FedWAvg。 Ahmed Aldahdooh,Wassim Hamidouche,Olivier Déforges cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Jouni Paulus,Matteo Torcoli
title: Geometrically-Motivated Primary-Ambient Decomposition With Center-Channel Extraction
title_zh: 具有中心通道提取的几何驱动初级环境分解
abstract: A geometrically-motivated method for primary-ambient decomposition is proposed and evaluated in an up-mixing application. The method consists of two steps, accommodating a particularly intuitive explanation. The first step consists of signal-adaptive rotations applied on the input stereo scene, which translate the primary sound sources into the center of the rotated scene. The second step applies a center-channel extraction method, based on a simple signal model and optimal in the mean-squared-error sense. The performance is evaluated by using the estimated ambient component to enable surround sound starting from real-world stereo signals. The participants in the reported listening test are asked to adjust the audio scene envelopment and find the audio settings that pleases them the most. The possibility for up-mixing enabled by the proposed method is used extensively, and the user satisfaction is significantly increased compared to the original stereo mix.
summary: A geometrically-motivated method for primary-ambient decomposition is proposed and evaluated in an up-mixing application. The method consists of two steps, accommodating a particularly intuitive explanation. The first step consists of signal-adaptive rotations applied on the input stereo scene, which translate the primary sound sources into the center of the rotated scene. The second step applies a center-channel extraction method, based on a simple signal model and optimal in the mean-squared-error sense. The performance is evaluated by using the estimated ambient component to enable surround sound starting from real-world stereo signals. The participants in the reported listening test are asked to adjust the audio scene envelopment and find the audio settings that pleases them the most. The possibility for up-mixing enabled by the proposed method is used extensively, and the user satisfaction is significantly increased compared to the original stereo mix.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种几何驱动的主要环境分解方法，并在上混音应用中进行了评估。该方法由两个步骤组成，可提供特别直观的解释。第一步包括在输入立体声场景上应用信号自适应旋转，将主要声源转换到旋转场景的中心。第二步应用基于简单信号模型且在均方误差意义上最优的中心通道提取方法。通过使用估计的环境分量来评估性能，以实现从真实世界的立体声信号开始的环绕声。所报告的听力测试的参与者被要求调整音频场景包围感并找到最令他们满意的音频设置。所提出的方法实现上混音的可能性被广泛使用，并且与原始立体声混音相比，用户满意度显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种几何驱动的主-环境声分解方法，并通过中心声道提取实现立体声到环绕声的上混。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以直观分离主声源与环境声，且无法有效提升立体声的环绕声体验。
AI.method: 分两步：1) 对立体声信号进行信号自适应旋转，使主声源位于旋转后场景中心；2) 基于简单信号模型进行均方误差最优的中心声道提取。
AI.result: 听觉测试显示，通过该方法生成的环绕声在场景包围感和用户满意度上显著优于原始立体声混音。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为立体声上混提供了有效解决方案，显著提升了用户对环绕声体验的满意度。

authors_text: Jouni Paulus,Matteo Torcoli
title: Sampling Frequency Independent Dialogue Separation
title_zh: 采样频率独立的对话分离
abstract: In some DNNs for audio source separation, the relevant model parameters are independent of the sampling frequency of the audio used for training. Considering the application of dialogue separation, this is shown for two DNN architectures: a U-Net and a fully-convolutional model. The models are trained with audio sampled at 8 kHz. The learned parameters are transferred to models for processing audio at 48 kHz. The separated audio sources are compared with the ones produced by the same model architectures trained with 48 kHz versions of the same training data. A listening test and computational measures show that there is no significant perceptual difference between the models trained with 8 kHz or with 48 kHz. This transferability of the learned parameters allows for a faster and computationally less costly training. It also enables using training datasets available at a lower sampling frequency than the one needed by the application at hand, or using data collections with multiple sampling frequencies.
summary: In some DNNs for audio source separation, the relevant model parameters are independent of the sampling frequency of the audio used for training. Considering the application of dialogue separation, this is shown for two DNN architectures: a U-Net and a fully-convolutional model. The models are trained with audio sampled at 8 kHz. The learned parameters are transferred to models for processing audio at 48 kHz. The separated audio sources are compared with the ones produced by the same model architectures trained with 48 kHz versions of the same training data. A listening test and computational measures show that there is no significant perceptual difference between the models trained with 8 kHz or with 48 kHz. This transferability of the learned parameters allows for a faster and computationally less costly training. It also enables using training datasets available at a lower sampling frequency than the one needed by the application at hand, or using data collections with multiple sampling frequencies.
abstract_zh: 在一些用于音频源分离的 DNN 中，相关模型参数与用于训练的音频的采样频率无关。考虑到对话分离的应用，这显示了两种 DNN 架构：U-Net 和全卷积模型。这些模型使用 8 kHz 采样的音频进行训练。学习到的参数被传输到用于处理 48 kHz 音频的模型。将分离的音频源与使用相同训练数据的 48 kHz 版本训练的相同模型架构生成的音频源进行比较。听力测试和计算测量表明，使用 8 kHz 或 48 kHz 训练的模型之间没有显着的感知差异。学习参数的这种可转移性允许更快且计算成本更低的训练。它还允许使用比当前应用程序所需的采样频率更低的训练数据集，或者使用具有多个采样频率的数据集合。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了在不同采样频率下训练的深度神经网络（DNN）模型参数对对话分离任务的可迁移性，并验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 解决实际应用中因采样频率不匹配导致的训练成本问题，同时利用现有低采样频率数据集提升模型训练效率。
AI.method: 采用U-Net和全卷积模型，在8kHz音频数据上训练后迁移参数至48kHz模型，通过听觉测试与计算指标对比结果。
AI.result: 8kHz与48kHz训练模型在感知质量上无显著差异，且迁移方法降低了训练计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 模型参数具有采样频率无关性，可实现跨频率训练迁移，为实际应用提供灵活高效的数据利用方案。

authors_text: Ao Wang,Wei Li,Xin Wu,Zhanchao Huang,Ran Tao
title: MPANet: Multi-Patch Attention For Infrared Small Target object Detection
title_zh: MPANet：用于红外小目标物体检测的多补丁注意力
abstract: Infrared small target detection (ISTD) has attracted widespread attention and been applied in various fields. Due to the small size of infrared targets and the noise interference from complex backgrounds, the performance of ISTD using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) is restricted. Moreover, the constriant that long-distance dependent features can not be encoded by the vanilla CNNs also impairs the robustness of capturing targets' shapes and locations in complex scenarios. To this end, a multi-patch attention network (MPANet) based on the axial-attention encoder and the multi-scale patch branch (MSPB) structure is proposed. Specially, an axial-attention-improved encoder architecture is designed to highlight the effective features of small targets and suppress background noises. Furthermore, the developed MSPB structure fuses the coarse-grained and fine-grained features from different semantic scales. Extensive experiments on the SIRST dataset show the superiority performance and effectiveness of the proposed MPANet compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Infrared small target detection (ISTD) has attracted widespread attention and been applied in various fields. Due to the small size of infrared targets and the noise interference from complex backgrounds, the performance of ISTD using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) is restricted. Moreover, the constriant that long-distance dependent features can not be encoded by the vanilla CNNs also impairs the robustness of capturing targets' shapes and locations in complex scenarios. To this end, a multi-patch attention network (MPANet) based on the axial-attention encoder and the multi-scale patch branch (MSPB) structure is proposed. Specially, an axial-attention-improved encoder architecture is designed to highlight the effective features of small targets and suppress background noises. Furthermore, the developed MSPB structure fuses the coarse-grained and fine-grained features from different semantic scales. Extensive experiments on the SIRST dataset show the superiority performance and effectiveness of the proposed MPANet compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 红外小目标检测（ISTD）引起了广泛的关注并在各个领域得到了应用。由于红外目标尺寸小以及复杂背景的噪声干扰，使用卷积神经网络（CNN）的ISTD的性能受到限制。此外，普通 CNN 无法编码长距离相关特征的限制也削弱了在复杂场景中捕获目标形状和位置的鲁棒性。为此，提出了一种基于轴向注意编码器和多尺度补丁分支（MSPB）结构的多补丁注意网络（MPANet）。特别是，轴向注意力改进的编码器架构旨在突出小目标的有效特征并抑制背景噪声。此外，所开发的 MSPB 结构融合了不同语义尺度的粗粒度和细粒度特征。对 SIRST 数据集的大量实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的 MPANet 具有优越的性能和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MPANet网络，通过多块注意力机制提升红外小目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 红外小目标检测受目标尺寸小、背景噪声干扰及传统CNN长距离依赖特征编码不足的限制，需改进特征提取与噪声抑制能力。
AI.method: 设计轴向注意力改进编码器以增强小目标特征并抑制噪声，结合多尺度块分支结构融合不同语义尺度的粗粒度与细粒度特征。
AI.result: 在SIRST数据集上实验表明，MPANet相较现有方法具有更优的检测性能与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: MPANet通过轴向注意力机制与多尺度特征融合有效解决了红外小目标检测中的关键挑战。

search_text: MPANet: Multi-Patch Attention For Infrared Small Target object Detection MPANet：用于红外小目标物体检测的多补丁注意力 Infrared small target detection (ISTD) has attracted widespread attention and been applied in various fields. Due to the small size of infrared targets and the noise interference from complex backgrounds, the performance of ISTD using convolutional neural networks (CNNs) is restricted. Moreover, the constriant that long-distance dependent features can not be encoded by the vanilla CNNs also impairs the robustness of capturing targets' shapes and locations in complex scenarios. To this end, a multi-patch attention network (MPANet) based on the axial-attention encoder and the multi-scale patch branch (MSPB) structure is proposed. Specially, an axial-attention-improved encoder architecture is designed to highlight the effective features of small targets and suppress background noises. Furthermore, the developed MSPB structure fuses the coarse-grained and fine-grained features from different semantic scales. Extensive experiments on the SIRST dataset show the superiority performance and effectiveness of the proposed MPANet compared to the state-of-the-art methods. 红外小目标检测（ISTD）引起了广泛的关注并在各个领域得到了应用。由于红外目标尺寸小以及复杂背景的噪声干扰，使用卷积神经网络（CNN）的ISTD的性能受到限制。此外，普通 CNN 无法编码长距离相关特征的限制也削弱了在复杂场景中捕获目标形状和位置的鲁棒性。为此，提出了一种基于轴向注意编码器和多尺度补丁分支（MSPB）结构的多补丁注意网络（MPANet）。特别是，轴向注意力改进的编码器架构旨在突出小目标的有效特征并抑制背景噪声。此外，所开发的 MSPB 结构融合了不同语义尺度的粗粒度和细粒度特征。对 SIRST 数据集的大量实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的 MPANet 具有优越的性能和有效性。 本文提出MPANet网络，通过多块注意力机制提升红外小目标检测性能。 Ao Wang,Wei Li,Xin Wu,Zhanchao Huang,Ran Tao cs.CV

authors_text: Ke Zhang,Xiahai Zhuang
title: ShapePU: A New PU Learning Framework Regularized by Global Consistency for Scribble Supervised Cardiac Segmentation
title_zh: ShapePU：一种新的 PU 学习框架，通过全球一致性规范，用于 Scribble 监督心脏分割
abstract: Cardiac segmentation is an essential step for the diagnosis of cardiovascular diseases. However, pixel-wise dense labeling is both costly and time-consuming. Scribble, as a form of sparse annotation, is more accessible than full annotations. However, it's particularly challenging to train a segmentation network with weak supervision from scribbles. To tackle this problem, we propose a new scribble-guided method for cardiac segmentation, based on the Positive-Unlabeled (PU) learning framework and global consistency regularization, and termed as ShapePU. To leverage unlabeled pixels via PU learning, we first present an Expectation-Maximization (EM) algorithm to estimate the proportion of each class in the unlabeled pixels. Given the estimated ratios, we then introduce the marginal probability maximization to identify the classes of unlabeled pixels. To exploit shape knowledge, we apply cutout operations to training images, and penalize the inconsistent segmentation results. Evaluated on two open datasets, i.e, ACDC and MSCMRseg, our scribble-supervised ShapePU surpassed the fully supervised approach respectively by 1.4% and 9.8% in average Dice, and outperformed the state-of-the-art weakly supervised and PU learning methods by large margins. Our code is available at https://github.com/BWGZK/ShapePU.
summary: Cardiac segmentation is an essential step for the diagnosis of cardiovascular diseases. However, pixel-wise dense labeling is both costly and time-consuming. Scribble, as a form of sparse annotation, is more accessible than full annotations. However, it's particularly challenging to train a segmentation network with weak supervision from scribbles. To tackle this problem, we propose a new scribble-guided method for cardiac segmentation, based on the Positive-Unlabeled (PU) learning framework and global consistency regularization, and termed as ShapePU. To leverage unlabeled pixels via PU learning, we first present an Expectation-Maximization (EM) algorithm to estimate the proportion of each class in the unlabeled pixels. Given the estimated ratios, we then introduce the marginal probability maximization to identify the classes of unlabeled pixels. To exploit shape knowledge, we apply cutout operations to training images, and penalize the inconsistent segmentation results. Evaluated on two open datasets, i.e, ACDC and MSCMRseg, our scribble-supervised ShapePU surpassed the fully supervised approach respectively by 1.4% and 9.8% in average Dice, and outperformed the state-of-the-art weakly supervised and PU learning methods by large margins. Our code is available at https://github.com/BWGZK/ShapePU.
abstract_zh: 心脏分割是心血管疾病诊断的重要步骤。然而，逐像素密集标记既昂贵又耗时。涂鸦作为稀疏注释的一种形式，比完整注释更容易访问。然而，训练一个由涂鸦弱监督的分割网络尤其具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的基于正向无标记（PU）学习框架和全局一致性正则化的涂鸦引导心脏分割方法，称为 ShapePU。为了通过 PU 学习利用未标记像素，我们首先提出一种期望最大化 (EM) 算法来估计未标记像素中每个类别的比例。给定估计的比率，然后我们引入边际概率最大化来识别未标记像素的类别。为了利用形状知识，我们将剪切操作应用于训练图像，并惩罚不一致的分割结果。在两个开放数据集（ACDC 和 MSCMRseg）上进行评估，我们的涂鸦监督 ShapePU 在平均 Dice 中分别超过了完全监督方法 1.4% 和 9.8%，并且大幅优于最先进的弱监督和 PU 学习方法。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/BWGZK/ShapePU 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ShapePU方法，基于PU学习框架和全局一致性正则化，实现草图监督下的心脏分割。
AI.motivation: 心脏分割需密集标注但成本高，草图标注更易获取但弱监督训练困难，需有效方法提升性能。
AI.method: 结合PU学习与全局一致性正则化，使用EM算法估计未标注像素类别比例，并通过边缘概率最大化识别类别，利用cutout操作与一致性惩罚优化形状知识。
AI.result: 在ACDC和MSCMRseg数据集上，ShapePU分别超越全监督方法1.4%和9.8%，显著优于现有弱监督及PU学习方法。
AI.conclusion: ShapePU通过草图监督与PU学习有效提升心脏分割性能，代码已开源供验证。

authors_text: Sukjun Hwang,Miran Heo,Seoung Wug Oh,Seon Joo Kim
title: Cannot See the Forest for the Trees: Aggregating Multiple Viewpoints to Better Classify Objects in Videos
title_zh: 只见树木不见森林：聚合多个视角以更好地对视频中的对象进行分类
abstract: Recently, both long-tailed recognition and object tracking have made great advances individually. TAO benchmark presented a mixture of the two, long-tailed object tracking, in order to further reflect the aspect of the real-world. To date, existing solutions have adopted detectors showing robustness in long-tailed distributions, which derive per-frame results. Then, they used tracking algorithms that combine the temporally independent detections to finalize tracklets. However, as the approaches did not take temporal changes in scenes into account, inconsistent classification results in videos led to low overall performance. In this paper, we present a set classifier that improves accuracy of classifying tracklets by aggregating information from multiple viewpoints contained in a tracklet. To cope with sparse annotations in videos, we further propose augmentation of tracklets that can maximize data efficiency. The set classifier is plug-and-playable to existing object trackers, and highly improves the performance of long-tailed object tracking. By simply attaching our method to QDTrack on top of ResNet-101, we achieve the new state-of-the-art, 19.9% and 15.7% TrackAP_50 on TAO validation and test sets, respectively.
summary: Recently, both long-tailed recognition and object tracking have made great advances individually. TAO benchmark presented a mixture of the two, long-tailed object tracking, in order to further reflect the aspect of the real-world. To date, existing solutions have adopted detectors showing robustness in long-tailed distributions, which derive per-frame results. Then, they used tracking algorithms that combine the temporally independent detections to finalize tracklets. However, as the approaches did not take temporal changes in scenes into account, inconsistent classification results in videos led to low overall performance. In this paper, we present a set classifier that improves accuracy of classifying tracklets by aggregating information from multiple viewpoints contained in a tracklet. To cope with sparse annotations in videos, we further propose augmentation of tracklets that can maximize data efficiency. The set classifier is plug-and-playable to existing object trackers, and highly improves the performance of long-tailed object tracking. By simply attaching our method to QDTrack on top of ResNet-101, we achieve the new state-of-the-art, 19.9% and 15.7% TrackAP_50 on TAO validation and test sets, respectively.
abstract_zh: 最近，长尾识别和目标跟踪都取得了巨大的进步。 TAO benchmark提出了两者的混合，长尾目标跟踪，以进一步反映现实世界的方面。迄今为止，现有的解决方案已经采用了在长尾分布中表现出鲁棒性的检测器，该检测器可以得出每帧结果。然后，他们使用跟踪算法结合时间独立的检测来最终确定轨迹。然而，由于这些方法没有考虑场景的时间变化，视频中的分类结果不一致导致整体性能较低。在本文中，我们提出了一种集合分类器，它通过聚合轨迹中包含的多个视点的信息来提高轨迹分类的准确性。为了应对视频中的稀疏注释，我们进一步提出了可以最大化数据效率的轨迹的增强。该集合分类器对于现有的目标跟踪器来说是可即插即用的，并且极大地提高了长尾目标跟踪的性能。通过简单地将我们的方法附加到 ResNet-101 之上的 QDTrack，我们在 TAO 验证集和测试集上分别实现了最先进的 19.9% 和 15.7% TrackAP_50。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过聚合多视角信息来提升视频中长尾目标跟踪分类准确率的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未充分考虑场景时序变化，导致视频中目标分类结果不一致，影响整体性能。
AI.method: 设计可插拔的集合分类器，聚合单个跟踪片段中的多视角信息，并通过数据增强提升稀疏标注下的数据效率。
AI.result: 在TAO数据集上，基于QDTrack+ResNet-101实现TrackAP_50验证集19.9%、测试集15.7%的SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 多视角信息聚合方法有效提升了长尾目标跟踪的分类性能，且具有良好的兼容性。
