To cope with sparse annotations in videos, we further propose augmentation of tracklets that can maximize data efficiency. The set classifier is plug-and-playable to existing object trackers, and highly improves the performance of long-tailed object tracking. By simply attaching our method to QDTrack on top of ResNet-101, we achieve the new state-of-the-art, 19.9% and 15.7% TrackAP_50 on TAO validation and test sets, respectively. 最近，长尾识别和目标跟踪都取得了巨大的进步。 TAO benchmark提出了两者的混合，长尾目标跟踪，以进一步反映现实世界的方面。迄今为止，现有的解决方案已经采用了在长尾分布中表现出鲁棒性的检测器，该检测器可以得出每帧结果。然后，他们使用跟踪算法结合时间独立的检测来最终确定轨迹。然而，由于这些方法没有考虑场景的时间变化，视频中的分类结果不一致导致整体性能较低。在本文中，我们提出了一种集合分类器，它通过聚合轨迹中包含的多个视点的信息来提高轨迹分类的准确性。为了应对视频中的稀疏注释，我们进一步提出了可以最大化数据效率的轨迹的增强。该集合分类器对于现有的目标跟踪器来说是可即插即用的，并且极大地提高了长尾目标跟踪的性能。通过简单地将我们的方法附加到 ResNet-101 之上的 QDTrack，我们在 TAO 验证集和测试集上分别实现了最先进的 19.9% 和 15.7% TrackAP_50。 本文提出一种通过聚合多视角信息来提升视频中长尾目标跟踪分类准确率的方法。 Sukjun Hwang,Miran Heo,Seoung Wug Oh,Seon Joo Kim cs.CV

authors_text: Carmina Pérez-Guerrero,Jorge Francisco Ciprián-Sánchez,Adriana Palacios,Gilberto Ochoa-Ruiz,Miguel Gonzalez-Mendoza,Vahid Foroughi,Elsa Pastor,Gerardo Rodriguez-Hernandez
title: Computer Vision-based Characterization of Large-scale Jet Flames using a Synthetic Infrared Image Generation Approach
title_zh: 使用合成红外图像生成方法对大规模射流火焰进行基于计算机视觉的表征
comment: Pre-print submitted to Engineering Science and Technology, an International Journal
comments: Pre-print submitted to Engineering Science and Technology, an International Journal
abstract: Among the different kinds of fire accidents that can occur during industrial activities that involve hazardous materials, jet fires are one of the lesser-known types. This is because they are often involved in a process that generates a sequence of other accidents of greater magnitude, known as domino effect. Flame impingement usually causes domino effects, and jet fires present specific features that can significantly increase the probability of this happening. These features become relevant from a risk analysis perspective, making their proper characterization a crucial task. Deep Learning approaches have become extensively used for tasks such as jet fire characterization; however, these methods are heavily dependent on the amount of data and the quality of the labels. Data acquisition of jet fires involve expensive experiments, especially so if infrared imagery is used. Therefore, this paper proposes the use of Generative Adversarial Networks to produce plausible infrared images from visible ones, making experiments less expensive and allowing for other potential applications. The results suggest that it is possible to realistically replicate the results for experiments carried out using both visible and infrared cameras. The obtained results are compared with some previous experiments, and it is shown that similar results were obtained.
summary: Among the different kinds of fire accidents that can occur during industrial activities that involve hazardous materials, jet fires are one of the lesser-known types. This is because they are often involved in a process that generates a sequence of other accidents of greater magnitude, known as domino effect. Flame impingement usually causes domino effects, and jet fires present specific features that can significantly increase the probability of this happening. These features become relevant from a risk analysis perspective, making their proper characterization a crucial task. Deep Learning approaches have become extensively used for tasks such as jet fire characterization; however, these methods are heavily dependent on the amount of data and the quality of the labels. Data acquisition of jet fires involve expensive experiments, especially so if infrared imagery is used. Therefore, this paper proposes the use of Generative Adversarial Networks to produce plausible infrared images from visible ones, making experiments less expensive and allowing for other potential applications. The results suggest that it is possible to realistically replicate the results for experiments carried out using both visible and infrared cameras. The obtained results are compared with some previous experiments, and it is shown that similar results were obtained.
abstract_zh: 在涉及危险材料的工业活动中可能发生的各种火灾事故中，喷射火灾是鲜为人知的类型之一。这是因为他们经常卷入一个产生一系列更严重的其他事故的过程，即所谓的多米诺骨牌效应。火焰撞击通常会引起多米诺骨牌效应，而喷射火具有特定的特征，可以显着增加发生这种情况的可能性。从风险分析的角度来看，这些特征变得相关，从而使它们的正确表征成为一项至关重要的任务。深度学习方法已广泛用于诸如喷射火表征等任务；然而，这些方法在很大程度上取决于数据量和标签的质量。喷射火的数据采集涉及昂贵的实验，特别是在使用红外图像的情况下。因此，本文提出使用生成对抗网络从可见光图像中生成可信的红外图像，从而降低实验成本并允许其他潜在应用。结果表明，可以真实地复制使用可见光和红外相机进行的实验的结果。将得到的结果与之前的一些实验进行比较，发现得到了相似的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用生成对抗网络（GAN）从可见光图像生成合成红外图像，以低成本表征大规模喷射火焰特征，辅助风险分析。
AI.motivation: 喷射火灾易引发连串事故（多米诺效应），但红外图像数据获取成本高昂，现有深度学习方法依赖大量标注数据，亟需经济高效的表征方案。
AI.method: 构建生成对抗网络模型，输入可见光火焰图像生成对应的红外图像，并通过与真实实验数据对比验证生成效果。
AI.result: 合成红外图像能有效复现真实实验中可见光与红外相机的观测结果，且与先前实验数据具有相似性。
AI.conclusion: GAN方法可经济生成高质量红外图像，为喷射火灾风险分析提供新手段，降低实验成本并拓展潜在应用。

authors_text: Christos Tzelepis,James Oldfield,Georgios Tzimiropoulos,Ioannis Patras
title: ContraCLIP: Interpretable GAN generation driven by pairs of contrasting sentences
title_zh: ContraCLIP：由对比句子对驱动的可解释的 GAN 生成
abstract: This work addresses the problem of discovering non-linear interpretable paths in the latent space of pre-trained GANs in a model-agnostic manner. In the proposed method, the discovery is driven by a set of pairs of natural language sentences with contrasting semantics, named semantic dipoles, that serve as the limits of the interpretation that we require by the trainable latent paths to encode. By using the pre-trained CLIP encoder, the sentences are projected into the vision-language space, where they serve as dipoles, and where RBF-based warping functions define a set of non-linear directional paths, one for each semantic dipole, allowing in this way traversals from one semantic pole to the other. By defining an objective that discovers paths in the latent space of GANs that generate changes along the desired paths in the vision-language embedding space, we provide an intuitive way of controlling the underlying generative factors and address some of the limitations of the state-of-the-art works, namely, that a) they are typically tailored to specific GAN architectures (i.e., StyleGAN), b) they disregard the relative position of the manipulated and the original image in the image embedding and the relative position of the image and the text embeddings, and c) they lead to abrupt image manipulations and quickly arrive at regions of low density and, thus, low image quality, providing limited control of the generative factors. We provide extensive qualitative and quantitative results that demonstrate our claims with two pre-trained GANs, and make the code and the pre-trained models publicly available at: https://github.com/chi0tzp/ContraCLIP
summary: This work addresses the problem of discovering non-linear interpretable paths in the latent space of pre-trained GANs in a model-agnostic manner. In the proposed method, the discovery is driven by a set of pairs of natural language sentences with contrasting semantics, named semantic dipoles, that serve as the limits of the interpretation that we require by the trainable latent paths to encode. By using the pre-trained CLIP encoder, the sentences are projected into the vision-language space, where they serve as dipoles, and where RBF-based warping functions define a set of non-linear directional paths, one for each semantic dipole, allowing in this way traversals from one semantic pole to the other. By defining an objective that discovers paths in the latent space of GANs that generate changes along the desired paths in the vision-language embedding space, we provide an intuitive way of controlling the underlying generative factors and address some of the limitations of the state-of-the-art works, namely, that a) they are typically tailored to specific GAN architectures (i.e., StyleGAN), b) they disregard the relative position of the manipulated and the original image in the image embedding and the relative position of the image and the text embeddings, and c) they lead to abrupt image manipulations and quickly arrive at regions of low density and, thus, low image quality, providing limited control of the generative factors. We provide extensive qualitative and quantitative results that demonstrate our claims with two pre-trained GANs, and make the code and the pre-trained models publicly available at: https://github.com/chi0tzp/ContraCLIP
abstract_zh: 这项工作解决了以与模型无关的方式在预训练 GAN 的潜在空间中发现非线性可解释路径的问题。在所提出的方法中，这一发现是由一组具有对比语义的自然语言句子对驱动的，称为语义偶极子，它们充当我们可训练的潜在路径编码所需的解释的限制。通过使用预先训练的 CLIP 编码器，句子被投影到视觉语言空间中，在那里它们充当偶极子，并且基于 RBF 的扭曲函数定义一组非线性方向路径，每个语义偶极子一个，从而允许从一个语义极到另一个语义极的遍历。通过定义一个目标，发现 GAN 潜在空间中的路径，这些路径沿着视觉语言嵌入空间中的所需路径生成变化，我们提供了一种直观的方法来控制底层生成因素，并解决了最先进作品的一些局限性，即：a）它们通常是针对特定的 GAN 架构（即 StyleGAN）定制的，b）它们忽略了图像嵌入中被操纵图像和原始图像的相对位置以及图像和文本嵌入的相对位置，c）它们导致突然的图像操作并快速到达低密度区域，因此图像质量低，对生成因素的控制有限。我们提供了广泛的定性和定量结果，通过两个预训练的 GAN 证明了我们的主张，并将代码和预训练模型公开在：https://github.com/chi0tzp/ContraCLIP

AI.tldr: 本文提出ContraCLIP方法，通过对比语句对在预训练GAN的潜在空间中发现非线性可解释路径，实现可控的图像生成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常针对特定GAN架构（如StyleGAN），忽略图像与文本嵌入的相对位置关系，且导致图像突变和低质量区域。
AI.method: 利用CLIP编码器将对比语句对（语义偶极子）投影到视觉-语言空间，通过RBF变形函数定义非线性路径，并优化潜在空间路径以匹配目标语义方向。
AI.result: 在两个预训练GAN上展示了定性和定量结果，验证了方法有效性，代码和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: ContraCLIP提供了直观的生成因素控制方式，解决了现有方法对特定架构依赖、嵌入位置忽略及图像突变等问题。

ai_content.result: 在两个预训练GAN上展示了定性和定量结果，验证了方法有效性，代码和模型已开源。

authors_text: Difeng Cai,Yuliang Ji,Huan He,Qiang Ye,Yuanzhe Xi
title: AUTM Flow: Atomic Unrestricted Time Machine for Monotonic Normalizing Flows
title_zh: AUTM Flow：用于单调归一化流的原子无限制时间机
abstract: Nonlinear monotone transformations are used extensively in normalizing flows to construct invertible triangular mappings from simple distributions to complex ones. In existing literature, monotonicity is usually enforced by restricting function classes or model parameters and the inverse transformation is often approximated by root-finding algorithms as a closed-form inverse is unavailable. In this paper, we introduce a new integral-based approach termed "Atomic Unrestricted Time Machine (AUTM)", equipped with unrestricted integrands and easy-to-compute explicit inverse. AUTM offers a versatile and efficient way to the design of normalizing flows with explicit inverse and unrestricted function classes or parameters. Theoretically, we present a constructive proof that AUTM is universal: all monotonic normalizing flows can be viewed as limits of AUTM flows. We provide a concrete example to show how to approximate any given monotonic normalizing flow using AUTM flows with guaranteed convergence. The result implies that AUTM can be used to transform an existing flow into a new one equipped with explicit inverse and unrestricted parameters. The performance of the new approach is evaluated on high dimensional density estimation, variational inference and image generation. Experiments demonstrate superior speed and memory efficiency of AUTM.
summary: Nonlinear monotone transformations are used extensively in normalizing flows to construct invertible triangular mappings from simple distributions to complex ones. In existing literature, monotonicity is usually enforced by restricting function classes or model parameters and the inverse transformation is often approximated by root-finding algorithms as a closed-form inverse is unavailable. In this paper, we introduce a new integral-based approach termed "Atomic Unrestricted Time Machine (AUTM)", equipped with unrestricted integrands and easy-to-compute explicit inverse. AUTM offers a versatile and efficient way to the design of normalizing flows with explicit inverse and unrestricted function classes or parameters. Theoretically, we present a constructive proof that AUTM is universal: all monotonic normalizing flows can be viewed as limits of AUTM flows. We provide a concrete example to show how to approximate any given monotonic normalizing flow using AUTM flows with guaranteed convergence. The result implies that AUTM can be used to transform an existing flow into a new one equipped with explicit inverse and unrestricted parameters. The performance of the new approach is evaluated on high dimensional density estimation, variational inference and image generation. Experiments demonstrate superior speed and memory efficiency of AUTM.
abstract_zh: 非线性单调变换广泛用于标准化流，以构造从简单分布到复杂分布的可逆三角映射。在现有文献中，单调性通常通过限制函数类或模型参数来强制执行，并且逆变换通常通过求根算法来近似，因为闭式逆变换不可用。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新的基于积分的方法，称为“原子无限制时间机（AUTM）”，配备无限制被积数和易于计算的显式逆。 AUTM 提供了一种通用且有效的方法来设计具有显式反函数和无限制函数类或参数的标准化流。从理论上讲，我们提出了一个建设性的证明，证明 AUTM 是通用的：所有单调归一化流都可以被视为 AUTM 流的限制。我们提供了一个具体的例子来展示如何使用 AUTM 流来近似任何给定的单调归一化流并保证收敛。结果表明，AUTM 可用于将现有流转换为配备显式逆参数和无限制参数的新流。新方法的性能在高维密度估计、变分推理和图像生成方面进行了评估。实验证明了 AUTM 卓越的速度和内存效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AUTM Flow的新方法，用于构建具有显式逆变换和无限制参数的单调归一化流模型。
AI.motivation: 现有归一化流方法通过限制函数类或参数来保证单调性，且逆变换需依赖数值方法近似，缺乏灵活性和效率。
AI.method: 基于积分的AUTM方法，通过无限制的被积函数构造显式逆变换，理论证明其可逼近所有单调归一化流。
AI.result: 实验表明AUTM在高维密度估计、变分推断和图像生成任务中具有更优的速度和内存效率。
AI.conclusion: AUTM为归一化流设计提供了通用且高效的解决方案，可将现有模型转化为具有显式逆变换的新模型。

authors_text: Yuenan Hou,Xinge Zhu,Yuexin Ma,Chen Change Loy,Yikang Li
title: Point-to-Voxel Knowledge Distillation for LiDAR Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于 LiDAR 语义分割的点到体素知识蒸馏
comment: CVPR 2022; Our model ranks 1st on Waymo and SemanticKITTI (single-scan) challenges, and ranks 3rd on SemanticKITTI (multi-scan) challenge; Code: https://github.com/cardwing/Codes-for-PVKD
comments: CVPR 2022; Our model ranks 1st on Waymo and SemanticKITTI (single-scan) challenges, and ranks 3rd on SemanticKITTI (multi-scan) challenge; Code: https://github.com/cardwing/Codes-for-PVKD
abstract: This article addresses the problem of distilling knowledge from a large teacher model to a slim student network for LiDAR semantic segmentation. Directly employing previous distillation approaches yields inferior results due to the intrinsic challenges of point cloud, i.e., sparsity, randomness and varying density. To tackle the aforementioned problems, we propose the Point-to-Voxel Knowledge Distillation (PVD), which transfers the hidden knowledge from both point level and voxel level. Specifically, we first leverage both the pointwise and voxelwise output distillation to complement the sparse supervision signals. Then, to better exploit the structural information, we divide the whole point cloud into several supervoxels and design a difficulty-aware sampling strategy to more frequently sample supervoxels containing less-frequent classes and faraway objects. On these supervoxels, we propose inter-point and inter-voxel affinity distillation, where the similarity information between points and voxels can help the student model better capture the structural information of the surrounding environment. We conduct extensive experiments on two popular LiDAR segmentation benchmarks, i.e., nuScenes and SemanticKITTI. On both benchmarks, our PVD consistently outperforms previous distillation approaches by a large margin on three representative backbones, i.e., Cylinder3D, SPVNAS and MinkowskiNet. Notably, on the challenging nuScenes and SemanticKITTI datasets, our method can achieve roughly 75% MACs reduction and 2x speedup on the competitive Cylinder3D model and rank 1st on the SemanticKITTI leaderboard among all published algorithms. Our code is available at https://github.com/cardwing/Codes-for-PVKD.
summary: This article addresses the problem of distilling knowledge from a large teacher model to a slim student network for LiDAR semantic segmentation. Directly employing previous distillation approaches yields inferior results due to the intrinsic challenges of point cloud, i.e., sparsity, randomness and varying density. To tackle the aforementioned problems, we propose the Point-to-Voxel Knowledge Distillation (PVD), which transfers the hidden knowledge from both point level and voxel level. Specifically, we first leverage both the pointwise and voxelwise output distillation to complement the sparse supervision signals. Then, to better exploit the structural information, we divide the whole point cloud into several supervoxels and design a difficulty-aware sampling strategy to more frequently sample supervoxels containing less-frequent classes and faraway objects. On these supervoxels, we propose inter-point and inter-voxel affinity distillation, where the similarity information between points and voxels can help the student model better capture the structural information of the surrounding environment. We conduct extensive experiments on two popular LiDAR segmentation benchmarks, i.e., nuScenes and SemanticKITTI. On both benchmarks, our PVD consistently outperforms previous distillation approaches by a large margin on three representative backbones, i.e., Cylinder3D, SPVNAS and MinkowskiNet. Notably, on the challenging nuScenes and SemanticKITTI datasets, our method can achieve roughly 75% MACs reduction and 2x speedup on the competitive Cylinder3D model and rank 1st on the SemanticKITTI leaderboard among all published algorithms. Our code is available at https://github.com/cardwing/Codes-for-PVKD.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了将知识从大型教师模型提取到小型学生网络以进行 LiDAR 语义分割的问题。由于点云的固有挑战，即稀疏性、随机性和密度变化，直接采用以前的蒸馏方法会产生较差的结果。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了点到体素知识蒸馏（PVD），它从点级别和体素级别转移隐藏知识。具体来说，我们首先利用逐点和体素输出蒸馏来补充稀疏监督信号。然后，为了更好地利用结构信息，我们将整个点云划分为几个超体素，并设计一种困难感知采样策略，以更频繁地采样包含不常见类和远处物体的超体素。在这些超级体素上，我们提出了点间和体素间亲和力蒸馏，其中点和体素之间的相似性信息可以帮助学生模型更好地捕获周围环境的结构信息。我们对两个流行的 LiDAR 分割基准（nuScenes 和 SemanticKITTI）进行了广泛的实验。在这两个基准测试中，我们的 PVD ​​在三个代表性骨干网（即 Cylinder3D、SPVNAS 和 MinkowskiNet）上始终大幅优于之前的蒸馏方法。值得注意的是，在具有挑战性的 nuScenes 和 SemanticKITTI 数据集上，我们的方法可以在竞争性的 Cylinder3D 模型上实现大约 75% 的 MAC 减少和 2 倍的加速，并在所有已发布算法的 SemanticKITTI 排行榜上排名第一。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/cardwing/Codes-for-PVKD 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种点到体素的知识蒸馏方法（PVD），用于改进LiDAR语义分割中的模型压缩效果。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏方法在LiDAR点云数据上效果不佳，因其稀疏性、随机性和密度变化等固有挑战，需设计更适应点云特性的蒸馏策略。
AI.method: 通过点级和体素级双重知识蒸馏，结合超体素划分与困难样本采样策略，设计点间和体素间亲和力蒸馏机制以捕捉结构信息。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和SemanticKITTI基准测试中，PVD在三种主流骨干网络上均显著优于现有方法，实现约75%的MACs减少和2倍加速，并在SemanticKITTI榜单排名第一。
AI.conclusion: PVD通过多尺度知识蒸馏有效解决了LiDAR语义分割中的模型压缩难题，为高效点云处理提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ankur Deka,Changliu Liu,Katia Sycara
title: ARC - Actor Residual Critic for Adversarial Imitation Learning
title_zh: ARC - 对抗性模仿学习的演员剩余批评家
abstract: Adversarial Imitation Learning (AIL) is a class of popular state-of-the-art Imitation Learning algorithms commonly used in robotics. In AIL, an artificial adversary's misclassification is used as a reward signal that is optimized by any standard Reinforcement Learning (RL) algorithm. Unlike most RL settings, the reward in AIL is $differentiable$ but current model-free RL algorithms do not make use of this property to train a policy. The reward is AIL is also shaped since it comes from an adversary. We leverage the differentiability property of the shaped AIL reward function and formulate a class of Actor Residual Critic (ARC) RL algorithms. ARC algorithms draw a parallel to the standard Actor-Critic (AC) algorithms in RL literature and uses a residual critic, $C$ function (instead of the standard $Q$ function) to approximate only the discounted future return (excluding the immediate reward). ARC algorithms have similar convergence properties as the standard AC algorithms with the additional advantage that the gradient through the immediate reward is exact. For the discrete (tabular) case with finite states, actions, and known dynamics, we prove that policy iteration with $C$ function converges to an optimal policy. In the continuous case with function approximation and unknown dynamics, we experimentally show that ARC aided AIL outperforms standard AIL in simulated continuous-control and real robotic manipulation tasks. ARC algorithms are simple to implement and can be incorporated into any existing AIL implementation with an AC algorithm. Video and link to code are available at: https://sites.google.com/view/actor-residual-critic.
summary: Adversarial Imitation Learning (AIL) is a class of popular state-of-the-art Imitation Learning algorithms commonly used in robotics. In AIL, an artificial adversary's misclassification is used as a reward signal that is optimized by any standard Reinforcement Learning (RL) algorithm. Unlike most RL settings, the reward in AIL is $differentiable$ but current model-free RL algorithms do not make use of this property to train a policy. The reward is AIL is also shaped since it comes from an adversary. We leverage the differentiability property of the shaped AIL reward function and formulate a class of Actor Residual Critic (ARC) RL algorithms. ARC algorithms draw a parallel to the standard Actor-Critic (AC) algorithms in RL literature and uses a residual critic, $C$ function (instead of the standard $Q$ function) to approximate only the discounted future return (excluding the immediate reward). ARC algorithms have similar convergence properties as the standard AC algorithms with the additional advantage that the gradient through the immediate reward is exact. For the discrete (tabular) case with finite states, actions, and known dynamics, we prove that policy iteration with $C$ function converges to an optimal policy. In the continuous case with function approximation and unknown dynamics, we experimentally show that ARC aided AIL outperforms standard AIL in simulated continuous-control and real robotic manipulation tasks. ARC algorithms are simple to implement and can be incorporated into any existing AIL implementation with an AC algorithm. Video and link to code are available at: https://sites.google.com/view/actor-residual-critic.
abstract_zh: 对抗性模仿学习（AIL）是机器人技术中常用的一类流行的最先进的模仿学习算法。在 AIL 中，人工对手的错误分类被用作奖励信号，并通过任何标准强化学习 (RL) 算法进行优化。与大多数 RL 设置不同，AIL 中的奖励是可微分的，但当前的无模型 RL 算法不利用此属性来训练策略。奖励是 AIL 也被塑造，因为它来自对手。我们利用成形 AIL 奖励函数的可微性属性，制定了一类 Actor Residual Critic (ARC) RL 算法。 ARC 算法与 RL 文献中的标准 Actor-Critic (AC) 算法相似，并使用残差批评家 $C$ 函数（而不是标准 $Q$ 函数）来仅近似贴现的未来回报（不包括立即奖励）。 ARC 算法具有与标准 AC 算法相似的收敛特性，并具有额外的优点，即通过即时奖励的梯度是精确的。对于具有有限状态、动作和已知动态的离散（表格）情况，我们证明使用 $C$ 函数的策略迭代收敛于最优策略。在函数逼近和未知动力学的连续情况下，我们通过实验表明，ARC 辅助 AIL 在模拟连续控制和真实机器人操作任务中优于标准 AIL。 ARC 算法实现起来很简单，并且可以通过 AC 算法合并到任何现有的 AIL 实现中。视频和代码链接位于：https://sites.google.com/view/actor-residual-critic。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Actor Residual Critic (ARC)的算法，用于改进对抗模仿学习（AIL），通过利用对抗奖励的可微性来优化策略。
AI.motivation: 在AIL中，对抗生成的奖励信号具有可微性但未被现有模型无关的强化学习算法充分利用，且奖励函数由对抗网络塑造，需改进其利用方式以提升学习效果。
AI.method: 设计ARC算法，采用残差批评者（C函数）代替传统Q函数，仅近似折扣未来回报（排除即时奖励），结合策略迭代证明离散场景收敛性，并通过函数逼近在连续控制任务中验证有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，ARC增强的AIL在连续控制模拟和实际机器人操作任务中优于标准AIL，且算法简单易实现，可无缝集成到现有AIL框架中。
AI.conclusion: ARC通过利用对抗奖励的可微性及残差批评结构，有效提升了AIL性能，为对抗模仿学习提供了新的优化方向。

search_text: ARC - Actor Residual Critic for Adversarial Imitation Learning ARC - 对抗性模仿学习的演员剩余批评家 Adversarial Imitation Learning (AIL) is a class of popular state-of-the-art Imitation Learning algorithms commonly used in robotics. In AIL, an artificial adversary's misclassification is used as a reward signal that is optimized by any standard Reinforcement Learning (RL) algorithm. Unlike most RL settings, the reward in AIL is $differentiable$ but current model-free RL algorithms do not make use of this property to train a policy. The reward is AIL is also shaped since it comes from an adversary. We leverage the differentiability property of the shaped AIL reward function and formulate a class of Actor Residual Critic (ARC) RL algorithms. ARC algorithms draw a parallel to the standard Actor-Critic (AC) algorithms in RL literature and uses a residual critic, $C$ function (instead of the standard $Q$ function) to approximate only the discounted future return (excluding the immediate reward). ARC algorithms have similar convergence properties as the standard AC algorithms with the additional advantage that the gradient through the immediate reward is exact. For the discrete (tabular) case with finite states, actions, and known dynamics, we prove that policy iteration with $C$ function converges to an optimal policy. In the continuous case with function approximation and unknown dynamics, we experimentally show that ARC aided AIL outperforms standard AIL in simulated continuous-control and real robotic manipulation tasks. ARC algorithms are simple to implement and can be incorporated into any existing AIL implementation with an AC algorithm. Video and link to code are available at: https://sites.google.com/view/actor-residual-critic. 对抗性模仿学习（AIL）是机器人技术中常用的一类流行的最先进的模仿学习算法。在 AIL 中，人工对手的错误分类被用作奖励信号，并通过任何标准强化学习 (RL) 算法进行优化。与大多数 RL 设置不同，AIL 中的奖励是可微分的，但当前的无模型 RL 算法不利用此属性来训练策略。奖励是 AIL 也被塑造，因为它来自对手。我们利用成形 AIL 奖励函数的可微性属性，制定了一类 Actor Residual Critic (ARC) RL 算法。 ARC 算法与 RL 文献中的标准 Actor-Critic (AC) 算法相似，并使用残差批评家 $C$ 函数（而不是标准 $Q$ 函数）来仅近似贴现的未来回报（不包括立即奖励）。 ARC 算法具有与标准 AC 算法相似的收敛特性，并具有额外的优点，即通过即时奖励的梯度是精确的。对于具有有限状态、动作和已知动态的离散（表格）情况，我们证明使用 $C$ 函数的策略迭代收敛于最优策略。在函数逼近和未知动力学的连续情况下，我们通过实验表明，ARC 辅助 AIL 在模拟连续控制和真实机器人操作任务中优于标准 AIL。 ARC 算法实现起来很简单，并且可以通过 AC 算法合并到任何现有的 AIL 实现中。视频和代码链接位于：https://sites.google.com/view/actor-residual-critic。 本文提出了一种名为Actor Residual Critic (ARC)的算法，用于改进对抗模仿学习（AIL），通过利用对抗奖励的可微性来优化策略。 Ankur Deka,Changliu Liu,Katia Sycara cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Jacob Morra,Mark Daley
title: Using Connectome Features to Constrain Echo State Networks
title_zh: 使用连接组特征来约束回波状态网络
abstract: We report an improvement to the conventional Echo State Network (ESN) across three benchmark chaotic time-series prediction tasks using fruit fly connectome data alone. We also investigate the impact of key connectome-derived structural features on prediction performance -- uniquely bridging neurobiological structure and machine learning function; and find that both increasing the global average clustering coefficient and modifying the position of weights -- by permuting their synapse-synapse partners -- can lead to increased model variance and (in some cases) degraded performance. In all we consider four topological point modifications to a connectome-derived ESN reservoir (null model): namely, we alter the network sparsity, re-draw nonzero weights from a uniform distribution, permute nonzero weight positions, and increase the network global average clustering coefficient. We compare the four resulting ESN model classes -- and the null model -- with a conventional ESN by conducting time-series prediction experiments on size-variants of the Mackey-Glass 17 (MG-17), Lorenz, and Rossler chaotic time series; denoting each model's performance and variance across train-validate trials.
summary: We report an improvement to the conventional Echo State Network (ESN) across three benchmark chaotic time-series prediction tasks using fruit fly connectome data alone. We also investigate the impact of key connectome-derived structural features on prediction performance -- uniquely bridging neurobiological structure and machine learning function; and find that both increasing the global average clustering coefficient and modifying the position of weights -- by permuting their synapse-synapse partners -- can lead to increased model variance and (in some cases) degraded performance. In all we consider four topological point modifications to a connectome-derived ESN reservoir (null model): namely, we alter the network sparsity, re-draw nonzero weights from a uniform distribution, permute nonzero weight positions, and increase the network global average clustering coefficient. We compare the four resulting ESN model classes -- and the null model -- with a conventional ESN by conducting time-series prediction experiments on size-variants of the Mackey-Glass 17 (MG-17), Lorenz, and Rossler chaotic time series; denoting each model's performance and variance across train-validate trials.
abstract_zh: 我们报告了仅使用果蝇连接组数据在三个基准混沌时间序列预测任务中对传统回声状态网络（ESN）的改进。我们还研究了连接组衍生的关键结构特征对预测性能的影响——独特地桥接神经生物学结构和机器学习功能；并发现增加全局平均聚类系数和修改权重位置（通过排列突触-突触伙伴）都可能导致模型方差增加和（在某些情况下）性能下降。总之，我们考虑对连接组派生的 ESN 库（空模型）进行四个拓扑点修改：即，我们改变网络稀疏性，从均匀分布中重新绘制非零权重，排列非零权重位置，并增加网络全局平均聚类系数。我们通过对 Mackey-Glass 17 (MG-17)、Lorenz 和 Rossler 混沌时间序列的大小变体进行时间序列预测实验，将所得的四个 ESN 模型类（以及零模型）与传统 ESN 进行比较；表示每个模型在训练验证试验中的性能和方差。

AI.tldr: 该论文利用果蝇连接组特征改进回声状态网络（ESN），在三个混沌时间序列预测任务中验证其效果，并分析连接组结构对模型性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 通过将神经生物学结构与机器学习功能结合，探索连接组特征对ESN性能的潜在提升作用，为生物启发的神经网络设计提供依据。
AI.method: 基于果蝇连接组数据构建ESN储层，通过调整网络稀疏性、权重分布、权重位置及聚类系数等四类拓扑参数，与传统ESN进行时间序列预测对比实验。
AI.result: 增加全局平均聚类系数和权重位置置换会提升模型方差并导致性能下降，而其他修改效果不一，传统ESN在部分任务中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 连接组特征可影响ESN性能，但需谨慎调整拓扑参数以避免负面影响，为生物连接组与机器学习的融合研究提供关键启示。

authors_text: Jinchuan Tian,Jianwei Yu,Chunlei Zhang,Chao Weng,Yuexian Zou,Dong Yu
title: LAE: Language-Aware Encoder for Monolingual and Multilingual ASR
title_zh: LAE：用于单语言和多语言 ASR 的语言感知编码器
abstract: Despite the rapid progress in automatic speech recognition (ASR) research, recognizing multilingual speech using a unified ASR system remains highly challenging. Previous works on multilingual speech recognition mainly focus on two directions: recognizing multiple monolingual speech or recognizing code-switched speech that uses different languages interchangeably within a single utterance. However, a pragmatic multilingual recognizer is expected to be compatible with both directions. In this work, a novel language-aware encoder (LAE) architecture is proposed to handle both situations by disentangling language-specific information and generating frame-level language-aware representations during encoding. In the LAE, the primary encoding is implemented by the shared block while the language-specific blocks are used to extract specific representations for each language. To learn language-specific information discriminatively, a language-aware training method is proposed to optimize the language-specific blocks in LAE. Experiments conducted on Mandarin-English code-switched speech suggest that the proposed LAE is capable of discriminating different languages in frame-level and shows superior performance on both monolingual and multilingual ASR tasks. With either a real-recorded or simulated code-switched dataset, the proposed LAE achieves statistically significant improvements on both CTC and neural transducer systems. Code is released

Previous works on multilingual speech recognition mainly focus on two directions: recognizing multiple monolingual speech or recognizing code-switched speech that uses different languages interchangeably within a single utterance. However, a pragmatic multilingual recognizer is expected to be compatible with both directions. In this work, a novel language-aware encoder (LAE) architecture is proposed to handle both situations by disentangling language-specific information and generating frame-level language-aware representations during encoding. In the LAE, the primary encoding is implemented by the shared block while the language-specific blocks are used to extract specific representations for each language. To learn language-specific information discriminatively, a language-aware training method is proposed to optimize the language-specific blocks in LAE. Experiments conducted on Mandarin-English code-switched speech suggest that the proposed LAE is capable of discriminating different languages in frame-level and shows superior performance on both monolingual and multilingual ASR tasks. With either a real-recorded or simulated code-switched dataset, the proposed LAE achieves statistically significant improvements on both CTC and neural transducer systems. Code is released
abstract_zh: 尽管自动语音识别 (ASR) 研究取得了快速进展，但使用统一的 ASR 系统识别多语言语音仍然极具挑战性。先前的多语言语音识别工作主要集中在两个方向：识别多个单语言语音或识别在单个话语中可互换使用不同语言的代码转换语音。然而，实用的多语言识别器预计与两个方向兼容。在这项工作中，提出了一种新颖的语言感知编码器（LAE）架构，通过在编码过程中解开特定于语言的信息并生成帧级语言感知表示来处理这两种情况。在 LAE 中，主要编码由共享块实现，而特定于语言的块用于提取每种语言的特定表示。为了有区别地学习特定于语言的信息，提出了一种语言感知训练方法来优化 LAE 中的特定于语言的块。对普通话-英语语码转换语音进行的实验表明，所提出的 LAE 能够在帧级别区分不同的语言，并且在单语和多语 ASR 任务上表现出优异的性能。通过真实记录或模拟的代码转换数据集，所提出的 LAE 在 CTC 和神经传感器系统上实现了统计上的显着改进。代码已发布

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种语言感知编码器（LAE），用于处理单语和多语种语音识别任务。
AI.motivation: 尽管自动语音识别（ASR）研究进展迅速，但使用统一的ASR系统识别多语种语音仍然具有挑战性。现有的多语种语音识别研究主要集中在识别多个单语语音或识别在单个语句中交替使用不同语言的代码切换语音，但一个实用的多语种识别器应兼容这两种情况。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新颖的语言感知编码器（LAE）架构，通过分离语言特定信息并在编码过程中生成帧级语言感知表示来处理这两种情况。在LAE中，主编码由共享块实现，而语言特定块则用于提取每种语言的特定表示。为了区分性地学习语言特定信息，提出了一种语言感知训练方法以优化LAE中的语言特定块。
AI.result: 在普通话-英语代码切换语音上的实验表明，所提出的LAE能够在帧级区分不同语言，并在单语和多语种ASR任务中表现出色。无论是真实录制的还是模拟的代码切换数据集，LAE在CTC和神经转换器系统上都取得了统计学上显著的改进。
AI.conclusion: LAE在单语和多语种语音识别任务中均表现出色，能够有效区分不同语言，并在多种系统中实现性能提升。

search_text: LAE: Language-Aware Encoder for Monolingual and Multilingual ASR LAE：用于单语言和多语言 ASR 的语言感知编码器 Despite the rapid progress in automatic speech recognition (ASR) research, recognizing multilingual speech using a unified ASR system remains highly challenging. Previous works on multilingual speech recognition mainly focus on two directions: recognizing multiple monolingual speech or recognizing code-switched speech that uses different languages interchangeably within a single utterance. However, a pragmatic multilingual recognizer is expected to be compatible with both directions. In this work, a novel language-aware encoder (LAE) architecture is proposed to handle both situations by disentangling language-specific information and generating frame-level language-aware representations during encoding. In the LAE, the primary encoding is implemented by the shared block while the language-specific blocks are used to extract specific representations for each language. To learn language-specific information discriminatively, a language-aware training method is proposed to optimize the language-specific blocks in LAE. Experiments conducted on Mandarin-English code-switched speech suggest that the proposed LAE is capable of discriminating different languages in frame-level and shows superior performance on both monolingual and multilingual ASR tasks. With either a real-recorded or simulated code-switched dataset, the proposed LAE achieves statistically significant improvements on both CTC and neural transducer systems. Code is released 尽管自动语音识别 (ASR) 研究取得了快速进展，但使用统一的 ASR 系统识别多语言语音仍然极具挑战性。先前的多语言语音识别工作主要集中在两个方向：识别多个单语言语音或识别在单个话语中可互换使用不同语言的代码转换语音。然而，实用的多语言识别器预计与两个方向兼容。在这项工作中，提出了一种新颖的语言感知编码器（LAE）架构，通过在编码过程中解开特定于语言的信息并生成帧级语言感知表示来处理这两种情况。在 LAE 中，主要编码由共享块实现，而特定于语言的块用于提取每种语言的特定表示。为了有区别地学习特定于语言的信息，提出了一种语言感知训练方法来优化 LAE 中的特定于语言的块。对普通话-英语语码转换语音进行的实验表明，所提出的 LAE 能够在帧级别区分不同的语言，并且在单语和多语 ASR 任务上表现出优异的性能。通过真实记录或模拟的代码转换数据集，所提出的 LAE 在 CTC 和神经传感器系统上实现了统计上的显着改进。代码已发布 本文提出了一种语言感知编码器（LAE），用于处理单语和多语种语音识别任务。 Jinchuan Tian,Jianwei Yu,Chunlei Zhang,Chao Weng,Yuexian Zou,Dong Yu cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhiwei Wang,Jinxin Lv,Yunqiao Yang,Yuanhuai Liang,Yi Lin,Qiang Li,Xin Li,Xin Yang
title: Accurate Scoliosis Vertebral Landmark Localization on X-ray Images via Shape-constrained Multi-stage Cascaded CNNs
title_zh: 通过形状约束的多级级联 CNN 在 X 射线图像上精确定位脊柱侧弯椎体标志
comment: 9 pages, submitted to IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics
comments: 9 pages, submitted to IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics
abstract: Vertebral landmark localization is a crucial step for variant spine-related clinical applications, which requires detecting the corner points of 17 vertebrae. However, the neighbor landmarks often disturb each other for the homogeneous appearance of vertebrae, which makes vertebral landmark localization extremely difficult. In this paper, we propose multi-stage cascaded convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to split the single task into two sequential steps, i.e., center point localization to roughly locate 17 center points of vertebrae, and corner point localization to find 4 corner points for each vertebra without distracted by others. Landmarks in each step are located gradually from a set of initialized points by regressing offsets via cascaded CNNs. Principal Component Analysis (PCA) is employed to preserve a shape constraint in offset regression to resist the mutual attraction of vertebrae. We evaluate our method on the AASCE dataset that consists of 609 tight spinal anterior-posterior X-ray images and each image contains 17 vertebrae composed of the thoracic and lumbar spine for spinal shape characterization. Experimental results demonstrate our superior performance of vertebral landmark localization over other state-of-the-arts with the relative error decreasing from 3.2e-3 to 7.2e-4.
summary: Vertebral landmark localization is a crucial step for variant spine-related clinical applications, which requires detecting the corner points of 17 vertebrae. However, the neighbor landmarks often disturb each other for the homogeneous appearance of vertebrae, which makes vertebral landmark localization extremely difficult. In this paper, we propose multi-stage cascaded convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to split the single task into two sequential steps, i.e., center point localization to roughly locate 17 center points of vertebrae, and corner point localization to find 4 corner points for each vertebra without distracted by others. Landmarks in each step are located gradually from a set of initialized points by regressing offsets via cascaded CNNs. Principal Component Analysis (PCA) is employed to preserve a shape constraint in offset regression to resist the mutual attraction of vertebrae. We evaluate our method on the AASCE dataset that consists of 609 tight spinal anterior-posterior X-ray images and each image contains 17 vertebrae composed of the thoracic and lumbar spine for spinal shape characterization. Experimental results demonstrate our superior performance of vertebral landmark localization over other state-of-the-arts with the relative error decreasing from 3.2e-3 to 7.2e-4.
abstract_zh: 椎骨标志定位是变异脊柱相关临床应用的关键步骤，需要检测 17 块椎骨的角点。然而，为了椎骨的均匀外观，相邻标志经常相互干扰，这使得椎骨标志定位极其困难。在本文中，我们提出了多级级联卷积神经网络（CNN），将单个任务分成两个连续的步骤，即中心点定位粗略定位椎骨的 17 个中心点，角点定位为每个椎骨找到 4 个角点，而不会受到其他步骤的干扰。每个步骤中的地标都是通过级联 CNN 回归偏移量从一组初始化点逐渐定位的。主成分分析（PCA）用于在偏移回归中保留形状约束，以抵抗椎骨的相互吸引。我们在 AASCE 数据集上评估我们的方法，该数据集由 609 个紧密的脊柱前后 X 射线图像组成，每个图像包含由胸椎和腰椎组成的 17 块椎骨，用于脊柱形状表征。实验结果表明，我们的椎体标志定位性能优于其他最先进的技术，相对误差从 3.2e-3 降至 7.2e-4。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于形状约束的多阶段级联卷积神经网络（CNN），用于提高脊柱侧弯X光图像中椎体关键点定位的准确性。
AI.motivation: 椎体关键点定位在脊柱相关临床应用中至关重要，但椎体外观相似导致相邻关键点相互干扰，传统方法难以精确检测。
AI.method: 将单任务拆分为两阶段：首先通过级联CNN粗略定位17个椎体中心点，再定位每个椎体的4个角点；结合主成分分析（PCA）保留形状约束，减少椎体间的相互干扰。
AI.result: 在包含609张X光图像的AASCE数据集上，相对误差从3.2e-3降至7.2e-4，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 多阶段级联CNN结合形状约束有效解决了椎体关键点定位难题，显著提升了脊柱形态分析的精度。

authors_text: Zeman Shao,Jiangpeng He,Ya-Yuan Yu,Luotao Lin,Alexandra Cowan,Heather Eicher-Miller,Fengqing Zhu
title: Towards the Creation of a Nutrition and Food Group Based Image Database
title_zh: 创建基于营养和食品组的图像数据库
abstract: Food classification is critical to the analysis of nutrients comprising foods reported in dietary assessment. Advances in mobile and wearable sensors, combined with new image based methods, particularly deep learning based approaches, have shown great promise to improve the accuracy of food classification to assess dietary intake. However, these approaches are data-hungry and their performances are heavily reliant on the quantity and quality of the available datasets for training the food classification model. Existing food image datasets are not suitable for fine-grained food classification and the following nutrition analysis as they lack fine-grained and transparently derived food group based identification which are often provided by trained dietitians with expert domain knowledge. In this paper, we propose a framework to create a nutrition and food group based image database that contains both visual and hierarchical food categorization information to enhance links to the nutrient profile of each food. We design a protocol for linking food group based food codes in the U.S. Department of Agriculture's (USDA) Food and Nutrient Database for Dietary Studies (FNDDS) to a food image dataset, and implement a web-based annotation tool for efficient deployment of this protocol.Our proposed method is used to build a nutrition and food group based image database including 16,114 food images representing the 74 most frequently consumed What We Eat in America (WWEIA) food sub-categories in the United States with 1,865 USDA food code matched to a nutrient database, the USDA FNDDS nutrient database.
summary: Food classification is critical to the analysis of nutrients comprising foods reported in dietary assessment. Advances in mobile and wearable sensors, combined with new image based methods, particularly deep learning based approaches, have shown great promise to improve the accuracy of food classification to assess dietary intake. However, these approaches are data-hungry and their performances are heavily reliant on the quantity and quality of the available datasets for training the food classification model. Existing food image datasets are not suitable for fine-grained food classification and the following nutrition analysis as they lack fine-grained and transparently derived food group based identification which are often provided by trained dietitians with expert domain knowledge. In this paper, we propose a framework to create a nutrition and food group based image database that contains both visual and hierarchical food categorization information to enhance links to the nutrient profile of each food. We design a protocol for linking food group based food codes in the U.S. Department of Agriculture's (USDA) Food and Nutrient Database for Dietary Studies (FNDDS) to a food image dataset, and implement a web-based annotation tool for efficient deployment of this protocol.Our proposed method is used to build a nutrition and food group based image database including 16,114 food images representing the 74 most frequently consumed What We Eat in America (WWEIA) food sub-categories in the United States with 1,865 USDA food code matched to a nutrient database, the USDA FNDDS nutrient database.
abstract_zh: 食品分类对于饮食评估中报告的食品营养成分分析至关重要。移动和可穿戴传感器的进步，与新的基于图像的方法，特别是基于深度学习的方法相结合，在提高食物分类以评估饮食摄入量的准确性方面显示出巨大的希望。然而，这些方法需要大量数据，并且它们的性能严重依赖于用于训练食品分类模型的可用数据集的数量和质量。现有的食物图像数据集不适合细粒度的食物分类和随后的营养分析，因为它们缺乏细粒度和透明的基于食物组的识别，而这些识别通常由具有专业领域知识的训练有素的营养师提供。在本文中，我们提出了一个框架来创建基于营养和食物组的图像数据库，其中包含视觉和分层食物分类信息，以增强与每种食物的营养成分的链接。我们设计了一个协议，用于将美国农业部 (USDA) 饮食研究食品和营养数据库 (FNDDS) 中基于食品组的食品代码链接到食品图像数据集，并实现一个基于网络的注释工具来有效部署该协议。我们提出的方法用于构建一个基于营养和食品组的图像数据库，其中包括 16,114 个食品图像，代表美国 74 个最常消费的美国饮食 (WWEIA) 食品子类别1,865 个 USDA 食品代码与营养数据库（USDA FNDDS 营养数据库）相匹配。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于营养和食品组的图像数据库构建框架，通过将美国农业部食品数据库与图像数据集关联，提升食品分类与营养分析的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有食品图像数据集缺乏细粒度和透明的食品组分类信息，难以支持精准的营养分析，需依赖专业饮食师的领域知识进行改进。
AI.method: 设计协议将USDA食品代码与图像数据集链接，并开发基于网络的标注工具，实现16,114张图像与1,865个USDA食品代码的匹配。
AI.result: 构建包含美国最常见74类食品子类别的图像数据库，覆盖16,114张图像和1,865个USDA营养数据库代码。
AI.conclusion: 该数据库通过视觉与层级分类信息的结合，为食品营养分析提供了更精确的数据支持，推动饮食评估技术的发展。

authors_text: Xudong Lin,Simran Tiwari,Shiyuan Huang,Manling Li,Mike Zheng Shou,Heng Ji,Shih-Fu Chang
title: Towards Fast Adaptation of Pretrained Contrastive Models for Multi-channel Video-Language Retrieval
title_zh: 面向多通道视频语言检索的预训练对比模型的快速适应
comment: To appear in CVPR 2023; The code will be released at https://github.com/XudongLinthu/upgradable-multimodal-intelligence
comments: To appear in CVPR 2023; The code will be released at https://github.com/XudongLinthu/upgradable-multimodal-intelligence
abstract: Multi-channel video-language retrieval require models to understand information from different channels (e.g. video$+$question, video$+$speech) to correctly link a video with a textual response or query. Fortunately, contrastive multimodal models are shown to be highly effective at aligning entities in images/videos and text, e.g., CLIP; text contrastive models are extensively studied recently for their strong ability of producing discriminative sentence embeddings, e.g., SimCSE. However, there is not a clear way to quickly adapt these two lines to multi-channel video-language retrieval with limited data and resources. In this paper, we identify a principled model design space with two axes: how to represent videos and how to fuse video and text information. Based on categorization of recent methods, we investigate the options of representing videos using continuous feature vectors or discrete text tokens; for the fusion method, we explore the use of a multimodal transformer or a pretrained contrastive text model. We extensively evaluate the four combinations on five video-language datasets. We surprisingly find that discrete text tokens coupled with a pretrained contrastive text model yields the best performance, which can even outperform state-of-the-art on the iVQA and How2QA datasets without additional training on millions of video-text data. Further analysis shows that this is because representing videos as text tokens captures the key visual information and text tokens are naturally aligned with text models that are strong retrievers after the contrastive pretraining process. All the empirical analysis establishes a solid foundation for future research on affordable and upgradable multimodal intelligence.
summary: Multi-channel video-language retrieval require models to understand information from different channels (e.g. video$+$question, video$+$speech) to correctly link a video with a textual response or query. Fortunately, contrastive multimodal models are shown to be highly effective at aligning entities in images/videos and text, e.g., CLIP; text contrastive models are extensively studied recently for their strong ability of producing discriminative sentence embeddings, e.g., SimCSE. However, there is not a clear way to quickly adapt these two lines to multi-channel video-language retrieval with limited data and resources. In this paper, we identify a principled model design space with two axes: how to represent videos and how to fuse video and text information. Based on categorization of recent methods, we investigate the options of representing videos using continuous feature vectors or discrete text tokens; for the fusion method, we explore the use of a multimodal transformer or a pretrained contrastive text model. We extensively evaluate the four combinations on five video-language datasets. We surprisingly find that discrete text tokens coupled with a pretrained contrastive text model yields the best performance, which can even outperform state-of-the-art on the iVQA and How2QA datasets without additional training on millions of video-text data. Further analysis shows that this is because representing videos as text tokens captures the key visual information and text tokens are naturally aligned with text models that are strong retrievers after the contrastive pretraining process. All the empirical analysis establishes a solid foundation for future research on affordable and upgradable multimodal intelligence.
abstract_zh: 多通道视频语言检索需要模型理解来自不同通道的信息（例如视频$+$问题、视频$+$语音），以正确地将视频与文本响应或查询链接起来。幸运的是，对比多模态模型在对齐图像/视频和文本中的实体方面非常有效，例如 CLIP；文本对比模型最近因其产生判别性句子嵌入的强大能力而受到广泛研究，例如 SimCSE。然而，在数据和资源有限的情况下，还没有一种明确的方法可以使这两条线快速适应多通道视频语言检索。在本文中，我们确定了一个具有两个轴的原则模型设计空间：如何表示视频以及如何融合视频和文本信息。基于最近方法的分类，我们研究了使用连续特征向量或离散文本标记来表示视频的选项；对于融合方法，我们探索使用多模态转换器或预训练的对比文本模型。我们在五个视频语言数据集上广泛评估了这四种组合。我们惊讶地发现，离散文本标记与预训练的对比文本模型相结合可产生最佳性能，甚至可以超越 iVQA 和 How2QA 数据集上的最新技术，而无需对数百万个视频文本数据进行额外训练。进一步的分析表明，这是因为将视频表示为文本标记可以捕获关键的视觉信息，并且文本标记自然地与经过对比预训练过程后作为强大检索器的文本模型对齐。所有的实证分析为未来可负担且可升级的多模态智能的研究奠定了坚实的基础。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何快速适应预训练对比模型以实现多通道视频-语言检索任务。
AI.motivation: 现有对比模型（如CLIP、SimCSE）在单一模态对齐任务中表现优异，但缺乏针对多通道视频-语言检索的高效适配方法，尤其在数据和资源有限的情况下。
AI.method: 通过构建视频表示方式（连续特征向量/离散文本标记）和信息融合方法（多模态Transformer/预训练对比文本模型）的二维设计空间，系统评估四种组合方案。
AI.result: 离散文本标记结合预训练对比文本模型的方案在iVQA和How2QA数据集上超越了现有最先进方法，且无需额外训练大规模视频-文本数据。
AI.conclusion: 将视频表示为文本标记能有效捕捉关键视觉信息，与经过对比预训练的文本模型天然对齐，为可负担的多模态智能研究奠定基础。

Further analysis shows that this is because representing videos as text tokens captures the key visual information and text tokens are naturally aligned with text models that are strong retrievers after the contrastive pretraining process. All the empirical analysis establishes a solid foundation for future research on affordable and upgradable multimodal intelligence. 多通道视频语言检索需要模型理解来自不同通道的信息（例如视频$+$问题、视频$+$语音），以正确地将视频与文本响应或查询链接起来。幸运的是，对比多模态模型在对齐图像/视频和文本中的实体方面非常有效，例如 CLIP；文本对比模型最近因其产生判别性句子嵌入的强大能力而受到广泛研究，例如 SimCSE。然而，在数据和资源有限的情况下，还没有一种明确的方法可以使这两条线快速适应多通道视频语言检索。在本文中，我们确定了一个具有两个轴的原则模型设计空间：如何表示视频以及如何融合视频和文本信息。基于最近方法的分类，我们研究了使用连续特征向量或离散文本标记来表示视频的选项；对于融合方法，我们探索使用多模态转换器或预训练的对比文本模型。我们在五个视频语言数据集上广泛评估了这四种组合。我们惊讶地发现，离散文本标记与预训练的对比文本模型相结合可产生最佳性能，甚至可以超越 iVQA 和 How2QA 数据集上的最新技术，而无需对数百万个视频文本数据进行额外训练。进一步的分析表明，这是因为将视频表示为文本标记可以捕获关键的视觉信息，并且文本标记自然地与经过对比预训练过程后作为强大检索器的文本模型对齐。所有的实证分析为未来可负担且可升级的多模态智能的研究奠定了坚实的基础。 本文研究如何快速适应预训练对比模型以实现多通道视频-语言检索任务。 Xudong Lin,Simran Tiwari,Shiyuan Huang,Manling Li,Mike Zheng Shou,Heng Ji,Shih-Fu Chang cs.CV

authors_text: Yunfan Lu,Yiqi Lin,Hao Wu,Yunhao Luo,Xu Zheng,Hui Xiong,Lin Wang
title: Priors in Deep Image Restoration and Enhancement: A Survey
title_zh: 深度图像恢复和增强的先验：一项调查
abstract: Image restoration and enhancement is a process of improving the image quality by removing degradations, such as noise, blur, and resolution degradation. Deep learning (DL) has recently been applied to image restoration and enhancement. Due to its ill-posed property, plenty of works have been explored priors to facilitate training deep neural networks (DNNs). However, the importance of priors has not been systematically studied and analyzed by far in the research community. Therefore, this paper serves as the first study that provides a comprehensive overview of recent advancements in priors for deep image restoration and enhancement. Our work covers five primary contents: (1) A theoretical analysis of priors for deep image restoration and enhancement; (2) A hierarchical and structural taxonomy of priors commonly used in the DL-based methods; (3) An insightful discussion on each prior regarding its principle, potential, and applications; (4) A summary of crucial problems by highlighting the potential future directions, especially adopting the large-scale foundation models as prior, to spark more research in the community; (5) An open-source repository that provides a taxonomy of all mentioned works and code links.
summary: Image restoration and enhancement is a process of improving the image quality by removing degradations, such as noise, blur, and resolution degradation. Deep learning (DL) has recently been applied to image restoration and enhancement. Due to its ill-posed property, plenty of works have been explored priors to facilitate training deep neural networks (DNNs). However, the importance of priors has not been systematically studied and analyzed by far in the research community. Therefore, this paper serves as the first study that provides a comprehensive overview of recent advancements in priors for deep image restoration and enhancement. Our work covers five primary contents: (1) A theoretical analysis of priors for deep image restoration and enhancement; (2) A hierarchical and structural taxonomy of priors commonly used in the DL-based methods; (3) An insightful discussion on each prior regarding its principle, potential, and applications; (4) A summary of crucial problems by highlighting the potential future directions, especially adopting the large-scale foundation models as prior, to spark more research in the community; (5) An open-source repository that provides a taxonomy of all mentioned works and code links.
abstract_zh: 图像恢复和增强是通过消除噪声、模糊和分辨率下降等劣化来提高图像质量的过程。深度学习（DL）最近已应用于图像恢复和增强。由于其不适定特性，之前已经探索了大量的工作来促进深度神经网络（DNN）的训练。然而，迄今为止，研究界尚未对先验的重要性进行系统的研究和分析。因此，本文是第一篇全面概述深度图像恢复和增强先验最新进展的研究。我们的工作涵盖五个主要内容：（1）深度图像恢复和增强先验的理论分析； (2) 基于深度学习的方法中常用的先验的层次结构分类法； (3) 对每个先验知识的原理、潜力和应用进行深入的讨论； （4）对关键问题进行总结，突出未来潜在的方向，特别是优先采用大规模基础模型，以激发社区更多的研究； (5) 一个开源存储库，提供所有提到的作品和代码链接的分类。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了深度图像修复与增强中的先验知识研究进展
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对先验知识系统性分析，需全面总结以推动领域发展
AI.method: 通过理论分析、分层分类、应用讨论及未来方向总结，并提供开源资源
AI.result: 建立先验知识分类体系，讨论各类先验原理与应用，提出大模型先验等未来方向
AI.conclusion: 先验知识对深度图像修复至关重要，未来应探索大模型等新型先验方法

authors_text: Hae Jin Song,Wael AbdAlmageed
title: Learning Robust Representations Of Generative Models Using Set-Based Artificial Fingerprints
title_zh: 使用基于集合的人工指纹学习生成模型的鲁棒表示
abstract: With recent progress in deep generative models, the problem of identifying synthetic data and comparing their underlying generative processes has become an imperative task for various reasons, including fighting visual misinformation and source attribution. Existing methods often approximate the distance between the models via their sample distributions. In this paper, we approach the problem of fingerprinting generative models by learning representations that encode the residual artifacts left by the generative models as unique signals that identify the source models. We consider these unique traces (a.k.a. "artificial fingerprints") as representations of generative models, and demonstrate their usefulness in both the discriminative task of source attribution and the unsupervised task of defining a similarity between the underlying models. We first extend the existing studies on fingerprints of GANs to four representative classes of generative models (VAEs, Flows, GANs and score-based models), and demonstrate their existence and attributability. We then improve the stability and attributability of the fingerprints by proposing a new learning method based on set-encoding and contrastive training. Our set-encoder, unlike existing methods that operate on individual images, learns fingerprints from a \textit{set} of images. We demonstrate improvements in the stability and attributability through comparisons to state-of-the-art fingerprint methods and ablation studies. Further, our method employs contrastive training to learn an implicit similarity between models. We discover latent families of generative models using this metric in a standard hierarchical clustering algorithm.
summary: With recent progress in deep generative models, the problem of identifying synthetic data and comparing their underlying generative processes has become an imperative task for various reasons, including fighting visual misinformation and source attribution. Existing methods often approximate the distance between the models via their sample distributions. In this paper, we approach the problem of fingerprinting generative models by learning representations that encode the residual artifacts left by the generative models as unique signals that identify the source models. We consider these unique traces (a.k.a. "artificial fingerprints") as representations of generative models, and demonstrate their usefulness in both the discriminative task of source attribution and the unsupervised task of defining a similarity between the underlying models. We first extend the existing studies on fingerprints of GANs to four representative classes of generative models (VAEs, Flows, GANs and score-based models), and demonstrate their existence and attributability. We then improve the stability and attributability of the fingerprints by proposing a new learning method based on set-encoding and contrastive training. Our set-encoder, unlike existing methods that operate on individual images, learns fingerprints from a \textit{set} of images. We demonstrate improvements in the stability and attributability through comparisons to state-of-the-art fingerprint methods and ablation studies. Further, our method employs contrastive training to learn an implicit similarity between models. We discover latent families of generative models using this metric in a standard hierarchical clustering algorithm.
abstract_zh: 随着深度生成模型的最新进展，识别合成数据并比较其潜在生成过程的问题已成为一项势在必行的任务，原因有多种，包括打击视觉错误信息和来源归因。现有方法通常通过样本分布来近似模型之间的距离。在本文中，我们通过学习将生成模型留下的残留伪影编码为识别源模型的独特信号的表示来解决指纹生成模型的问题。我们将这些独特的痕迹（又名“人工指纹”）视为生成模型的表示，并证明它们在源归因的判别任务和定义基础模型之间相似性的无监督任务中的有用性。我们首先将现有的 GAN 指纹研究扩展到四类代表性的生成模型（VAE、Flows、GAN 和基于分数的模型），并证明它们的存在和归因。然后，我们通过提出一种基于集合编码和对比训练的新学习方法来提高指纹的稳定性和归因性。与对单个图像进行操作的现有方法不同，我们的集合编码器从图像的 \textit{set} 中学习指纹。我们通过与最先进的指纹方法和消融研究进行比较，证明了稳定性和可归因性的改进。此外，我们的方法采用对比训练来学习模型之间的隐式相似性。我们在标准层次聚类算法中使用此度量来发现生成模型的潜在系列。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过学习生成模型的残差伪影作为唯一信号（人工指纹），以实现生成模型的源归属和模型相似性比较。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过样本分布近似模型距离存在局限，需更稳健的模型指纹技术以应对视觉虚假信息和源归属需求。
AI.method: 扩展GAN指纹研究至VAEs、Flows等四类生成模型，提出基于集合编码和对比训练的新学习方法，从图像集合而非单张图像学习指纹，并通过对比训练隐式学习模型相似性。
AI.result: 相比现有方法，指纹稳定性与可归属性显著提升；通过聚类算法发现生成模型的潜在家族结构。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为生成模型源归属和相似性分析提供有效工具，可应用于合成数据检测与模型比较场景。

authors_text: Jiacong Xu,Zixiang Xiong,Shankar P. Bhattacharyya
title: PIDNet: A Real-time Semantic Segmentation Network Inspired by PID Controllers
title_zh: PIDNet：受 PID 控制器启发的实时语义分割网络
comment: 11 pages, 9 figures; This paper will be published by CVPR2023 soon, please refer to the official version then
comments: 11 pages, 9 figures; This paper will be published by CVPR2023 soon, please refer to the official version then
abstract: Two-branch network architecture has shown its efficiency and effectiveness in real-time semantic segmentation tasks. However, direct fusion of high-resolution details and low-frequency context has the drawback of detailed features being easily overwhelmed by surrounding contextual information. This overshoot phenomenon limits the improvement of the segmentation accuracy of existing two-branch models. In this paper, we make a connection between Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) and Proportional-Integral-Derivative (PID) controllers and reveal that a two-branch network is equivalent to a Proportional-Integral (PI) controller, which inherently suffers from similar overshoot issues. To alleviate this problem, we propose a novel three-branch network architecture: PIDNet, which contains three branches to parse detailed, context and boundary information, respectively, and employs boundary attention to guide the fusion of detailed and context branches. Our family of PIDNets achieve the best trade-off between inference speed and accuracy and their accuracy surpasses all the existing models with similar inference speed on the Cityscapes and CamVid datasets. Specifically, PIDNet-S achieves 78.6% mIOU with inference speed of 93.2 FPS on Cityscapes and 80.1% mIOU with speed of 153.7 FPS on CamVid.
summary: Two-branch network architecture has shown its efficiency and effectiveness in real-time semantic segmentation tasks. However, direct fusion of high-resolution details and low-frequency context has the drawback of detailed features being easily overwhelmed by surrounding contextual information. This overshoot phenomenon limits the improvement of the segmentation accuracy of existing two-branch models. In this paper, we make a connection between Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) and Proportional-Integral-Derivative (PID) controllers and reveal that a two-branch network is equivalent to a Proportional-Integral (PI) controller, which inherently suffers from similar overshoot issues. To alleviate this problem, we propose a novel three-branch network architecture: PIDNet, which contains three branches to parse detailed, context and boundary information, respectively, and employs boundary attention to guide the fusion of detailed and context branches. Our family of PIDNets achieve the best trade-off between inference speed and accuracy and their accuracy surpasses all the existing models with similar inference speed on the Cityscapes and CamVid datasets. Specifically, PIDNet-S achieves 78.6% mIOU with inference speed of 93.2 FPS on Cityscapes and 80.1% mIOU with speed of 153.7 FPS on CamVid.
abstract_zh: 双分支网络架构在实时语义分割任务中展现了其效率和有效性。然而，高分辨率细节和低频上下文的直接融合存在细节特征很容易被周围上下文信息淹没的缺点。这种超调现象限制了现有二分支模型分割精度的提高。在本文中，我们将卷积神经网络（CNN）和比例积分微分（PID）控制器联系起来，揭示了两分支网络等效于比例积分（PI）控制器，其本质上也存在类似的超调问题。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的三分支网络架构：PIDNet，它包含三个分支，分别解析详细信息、上下文信息和边界信息，并采用边界注意力来指导详细分支和上下文分支的融合。我们的 PIDNet 系列在推理速度和准确性之间实现了最佳权衡，其准确性超过了在 Cityscapes 和 CamVid 数据集上具有类似推理速度的所有现有模型。具体而言，PIDNet-S 在 Cityscapes 上实现了 78.6% mIOU，推理速度为 93.2 FPS，在 CamVid 上实现了 80.1% mIOU，推理速度为 153.7 FPS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PIDNet，一种受PID控制器启发的实时语义分割网络，通过三分支架构解决现有两分支模型的精度限制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有两分支网络在融合高分辨率细节与低频上下文时存在细节特征被上下文信息压制的过冲现象，导致分割精度受限。
AI.method: 将CNN与PID控制器理论结合，设计包含细节、上下文和边界分支的三分支架构，并引入边界注意力机制引导细节与上下文分支融合。
AI.result: PIDNet在Cityscapes和CamVid数据集上以93.2 FPS和153.7 FPS的推理速度分别达到78.6%和80.1%的mIOU，优于同类模型。
AI.conclusion: PIDNet通过理论创新与架构优化，在实时语义分割任务中实现了推理速度与精度的最佳平衡。

search_text: PIDNet: A Real-time Semantic Segmentation Network Inspired by PID Controllers PIDNet：受 PID 控制器启发的实时语义分割网络 Two-branch network architecture has shown its efficiency and effectiveness in real-time semantic segmentation tasks. However, direct fusion of high-resolution details and low-frequency context has the drawback of detailed features being easily overwhelmed by surrounding contextual information. This overshoot phenomenon limits the improvement of the segmentation accuracy of existing two-branch models. In this paper, we make a connection between Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) and Proportional-Integral-Derivative (PID) controllers and reveal that a two-branch network is equivalent to a Proportional-Integral (PI) controller, which inherently suffers from similar overshoot issues. To alleviate this problem, we propose a novel three-branch network architecture: PIDNet, which contains three branches to parse detailed, context and boundary information, respectively, and employs boundary attention to guide the fusion of detailed and context branches. Our family of PIDNets achieve the best trade-off between inference speed and accuracy and their accuracy surpasses all the existing models with similar inference speed on the Cityscapes and CamVid datasets. Specifically, PIDNet-S achieves 78.6% mIOU with inference speed of 93.2 FPS on Cityscapes and 80.1% mIOU with speed of 153.7 FPS on CamVid. 双分支网络架构在实时语义分割任务中展现了其效率和有效性。然而，高分辨率细节和低频上下文的直接融合存在细节特征很容易被周围上下文信息淹没的缺点。这种超调现象限制了现有二分支模型分割精度的提高。在本文中，我们将卷积神经网络（CNN）和比例积分微分（PID）控制器联系起来，揭示了两分支网络等效于比例积分（PI）控制器，其本质上也存在类似的超调问题。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的三分支网络架构：PIDNet，它包含三个分支，分别解析详细信息、上下文信息和边界信息，并采用边界注意力来指导详细分支和上下文分支的融合。我们的 PIDNet 系列在推理速度和准确性之间实现了最佳权衡，其准确性超过了在 Cityscapes 和 CamVid 数据集上具有类似推理速度的所有现有模型。具体而言，PIDNet-S 在 Cityscapes 上实现了 78.6% mIOU，推理速度为 93.2 FPS，在 CamVid 上实现了 80.1% mIOU，推理速度为 153.7 FPS。 本文提出PIDNet，一种受PID控制器启发的实时语义分割网络，通过三分支架构解决现有两分支模型的精度限制问题。 Jiacong Xu,Zixiang Xiong,Shankar P. authors_text: Christian Toth,Lars Lorch,Christian Knoll,Andreas Krause,Franz Pernkopf,Robert Peharz,Julius von Kügelgen
title: Active Bayesian Causal Inference
title_zh: 主动贝叶斯因果推理
comment: NeurIPS 2022 camera-ready version. RP & JvK are shared last authors. 10 pages + Bibliography + Appendix (34 pages total)
comments: NeurIPS 2022 camera-ready version. RP & JvK are shared last authors. 10 pages + Bibliography + Appendix (34 pages total)
abstract: Causal discovery and causal reasoning are classically treated as separate and consecutive tasks: one first infers the causal graph, and then uses it to estimate causal effects of interventions. However, such a two-stage approach is uneconomical, especially in terms of actively collected interventional data, since the causal query of interest may not require a fully-specified causal model. From a Bayesian perspective, it is also unnatural, since a causal query (e.g., the causal graph or some causal effect) can be viewed as a latent quantity subject to posterior inference -- other unobserved quantities that are not of direct interest (e.g., the full causal model) ought to be marginalized out in this process and contribute to our epistemic uncertainty. In this work, we propose Active Bayesian Causal Inference (ABCI), a fully-Bayesian active learning framework for integrated causal discovery and reasoning, which jointly infers a posterior over causal models and queries of interest. In our approach to ABCI, we focus on the class of causally-sufficient, nonlinear additive noise models, which we model using Gaussian processes. We sequentially design experiments that are maximally informative about our target causal query, collect the corresponding interventional data, and update our beliefs to choose the next experiment. Through simulations, we demonstrate that our approach is more data-efficient than several baselines that only focus on learning the full causal graph. This allows us to accurately learn downstream causal queries from fewer samples while providing well-calibrated uncertainty estimates for the quantities of interest.
summary: Causal discovery and causal reasoning are classically treated as separate and consecutive tasks: one first infers the causal graph, and then uses it to estimate causal effects of interventions. However, such a two-stage approach is uneconomical, especially in terms of actively collected interventional data, since the causal query of interest may not require a fully-specified causal model. From a Bayesian perspective, it is also unnatural, since a causal query (e.g., the causal graph or some causal effect) can be viewed as a latent quantity subject to posterior inference -- other unobserved quantities that are not of direct interest (e.g., the full causal model) ought to be marginalized out in this process and contribute to our epistemic uncertainty. In this work, we propose Active Bayesian Causal Inference (ABCI), a fully-Bayesian active learning framework for integrated causal discovery and reasoning, which jointly infers a posterior over causal models and queries of interest. In our approach to ABCI, we focus on the class of causally-sufficient, nonlinear additive noise models, which we model using Gaussian processes. We sequentially design experiments that are maximally informative about our target causal query, collect the corresponding interventional data, and update our beliefs to choose the next experiment. Through simulations, we demonstrate that our approach is more data-efficient than several baselines that only focus on learning the full causal graph. This allows us to accurately learn downstream causal queries from fewer samples while providing well-calibrated uncertainty estimates for the quantities of interest.
abstract_zh: 因果发现和因果推理通常被视为独立且连续的任务：首先推断因果图，然后用它来估计干预措施的因果效应。然而，这种两阶段方法是不经济的，特别是在主动收集干预数据方面，因为感兴趣的因果查询可能不需要完全指定的因果模型。从贝叶斯的角度来看，这也是不自然的，因为因果查询（例如因果图或某种因果效应）可以被视为受后验推理影响的潜在量——其他不直接感兴趣的未观察到的量（例如完整的因果模型）应该在这个过程中被边缘化并导致我们的认知不确定性。在这项工作中，我们提出了主动贝叶斯因果推理（ABCI），这是一种用于集成因果发现和推理的完全贝叶斯主动学习框架，它联合推断因果模型和感兴趣的查询的后验。在我们的 ABCI 方法中，我们重点关注因果充分的非线性加性噪声模型，我们使用高斯过程对其进行建模。我们依次设计能够最大限度地提供有关目标因果查询信息的实验，收集相应的干预数据，并更新我们的信念以选择下一个实验。通过模拟，我们证明我们的方法比仅专注于学习完整因果图的几个基线更具数据效率。这使我们能够从较少的样本中准确地学习下游因果查询，同时为感兴趣的数量提供经过良好校准的不确定性估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Active Bayesian Causal Inference (ABCI)的贝叶斯主动学习框架，将因果发现与推理整合为统一任务，通过联合推断因果模型和目标查询的后验分布，提高数据效率。
AI.motivation: 传统因果发现与推理分阶段方法在干预数据收集上效率低下，且贝叶斯视角下应通过边缘化非目标变量来量化不确定性，而非依赖完整因果模型。
AI.method: 基于高斯过程建模非线性可加噪声模型，通过序列实验设计最大化目标因果查询的信息量，动态更新信念并选择下一次实验。
AI.result: 仿真表明，ABCI相比仅关注完整因果图的基线方法更具数据效率，能用更少样本准确学习下游因果查询，并提供校准良好的不确定性估计。
AI.conclusion: ABCI通过整合因果发现与推理，实现了高效的数据利用和不确定性量化，为无需完整模型的因果查询提供了更自然的贝叶斯解决方案。

authors_text: Sai Sukruth Bezugam,Ahmed Shaban,Manan Suri
title: Low Power Neuromorphic EMG Gesture Classification
title_zh: 低功率神经形态肌电图手势分类
abstract: EMG (Electromyograph) signal based gesture recognition can prove vital for applications such as smart wearables and bio-medical neuro-prosthetic control. Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are promising for low-power, real-time EMG gesture recognition, owing to their inherent spike/event driven spatio-temporal dynamics. In literature, there are limited demonstrations of neuromorphic hardware implementation (at full chip/board/system scale) for EMG gesture classification. Moreover, most literature attempts exploit primitive SNNs based on LIF (Leaky Integrate and Fire) neurons. In this work, we address the aforementioned gaps with following key contributions: (1) Low-power, high accuracy demonstration of EMG-signal based gesture recognition using neuromorphic Recurrent Spiking Neural Networks (RSNN). In particular, we propose a multi-time scale recurrent neuromorphic system based on special double-exponential adaptive threshold (DEXAT) neurons. Our network achieves state-of-the-art classification accuracy (90%) while using ~53% lesser neurons than best reported prior art on Roshambo EMG dataset. (2) A new multi-channel spike encoder scheme for efficient processing of real-valued EMG data on neuromorphic systems. (3) Unique multi-compartment methodology to implement complex adaptive neurons on Intel's dedicated neuromorphic Loihi chip is shown. (4) RSNN implementation on Loihi (Nahuku 32) achieves significant energy/latency benefits of ~983X/19X compared to GPU for batch size as 50.
summary: EMG (Electromyograph) signal based gesture recognition can prove vital for applications such as smart wearables and bio-medical neuro-prosthetic control. Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are promising for low-power, real-time EMG gesture recognition, owing to their inherent spike/event driven spatio-temporal dynamics. In literature, there are limited demonstrations of neuromorphic hardware implementation (at full chip/board/system scale) for EMG gesture classification. Moreover, most literature attempts exploit primitive SNNs based on LIF (Leaky Integrate and Fire) neurons. In this work, we address the aforementioned gaps with following key contributions: (1) Low-power, high accuracy demonstration of EMG-signal based gesture recognition using neuromorphic Recurrent Spiking Neural Networks (RSNN). In particular, we propose a multi-time scale recurrent neuromorphic system based on special double-exponential adaptive threshold (DEXAT) neurons. Our network achieves state-of-the-art classification accuracy (90%) while using ~53% lesser neurons than best reported prior art on Roshambo EMG dataset. (2) A new multi-channel spike encoder scheme for efficient processing of real-valued EMG data on neuromorphic systems. (3) Unique multi-compartment methodology to implement complex adaptive neurons on Intel's dedicated neuromorphic Loihi chip is shown. (4) RSNN implementation on Loihi (Nahuku 32) achieves significant energy/latency benefits of ~983X/19X compared to GPU for batch size as 50.
abstract_zh: 基于肌电图信号的手势识别对于智能可穿戴设备和生物医学神经假体控制等应用至关重要。尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 由于其固有的尖峰/事件驱动的时空动态，在低功耗、实时 EMG 手势识别方面很有前景。在文献中，针对 EMG 手势分类的神经形态硬件实现（在全芯片/板/系统规模）的演示有限。此外，大多数文献尝试利用基于 LIF（漏积分和火）神经元的原始 SNN。在这项工作中，我们通过以下关键贡献解决了上述差距：（1）使用神经形态循环尖峰神经网络（RSNN）对基于肌电图信号的手势识别进行低功耗、高精度演示。特别是，我们提出了一种基于特殊双指数自适应阈值（DEXAT）神经元的多时间尺度循环神经形态系统。我们的网络实现了最先进的分类精度 (90%)，同时使用的神经元比 Roshambo EMG 数据集上最佳报道的现有技术少约 53%。 (2) 一种新的多通道尖峰编码器方案，用于在神经形态系统上有效处理实值肌电图数据。 (3) 展示了在英特尔专用神经形态 Loihi 芯片上实现复杂自适应神经元的独特多室方法。 (4) 与批量大小为 50 的 GPU 相比，Loihi (Nahuku 32) 上的 RSNN 实现实现了约 983 倍/19 倍的显着能量/延迟优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经形态递归脉冲神经网络（RSNN）的低功耗EMG手势识别系统，采用双指数自适应阈值（DEXAT）神经元和多通道脉冲编码方案，并在Intel Loihi芯片上实现。
AI.motivation: 现有EMG手势识别方法在硬件实现规模和能效方面存在不足，且多依赖简单LIF神经元模型，难以兼顾高精度与低功耗。
AI.method: 设计多时间尺度递归神经形态系统，提出DEXAT神经元模型；开发多通道脉冲编码方案处理EMG信号；在Loihi芯片上实现复杂自适应神经元的多隔室架构。
AI.result: 在Roshambo数据集上达到90%分类精度，神经元数量比现有方法减少53%；Loihi实现的RSNN相比GPU在50批次下能耗降低983倍、延迟减少19倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过神经形态硬件与改进RSNN架构的结合，在保持高精度的同时显著提升了EMG手势识别的能效比，为可穿戴设备和神经假肢提供了可行方案。

search_text: Low Power Neuromorphic EMG Gesture Classification 低功率神经形态肌电图手势分类 EMG (Electromyograph) signal based gesture recognition can prove vital for applications such as smart wearables and bio-medical neuro-prosthetic control. Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are promising for low-power, real-time EMG gesture recognition, owing to their inherent spike/event driven spatio-temporal dynamics. In literature, there are limited demonstrations of neuromorphic hardware implementation (at full chip/board/system scale) for EMG gesture classification. Moreover, most literature attempts exploit primitive SNNs based on LIF (Leaky Integrate and Fire) neurons. In this work, we address the aforementioned gaps with following key contributions: (1) Low-power, high accuracy demonstration of EMG-signal based gesture recognition using neuromorphic Recurrent Spiking Neural Networks (RSNN). In particular, we propose a multi-time scale recurrent neuromorphic system based on special double-exponential adaptive threshold (DEXAT) neurons. Our network achieves state-of-the-art classification accuracy (90%) while using ~53% lesser neurons than best reported prior art on Roshambo EMG dataset. (2) A new multi-channel spike encoder scheme for efficient processing of real-valued EMG data on neuromorphic systems. (3) Unique multi-compartment methodology to implement complex adaptive neurons on Intel's dedicated neuromorphic Loihi chip is shown. (4) RSNN implementation on Loihi (Nahuku 32) achieves significant energy/latency benefits of ~983X/19X compared to GPU for batch size as 50. 基于肌电图信号的手势识别对于智能可穿戴设备和生物医学神经假体控制等应用至关重要。尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 由于其固有的尖峰/事件驱动的时空动态，在低功耗、实时 EMG 手势识别方面很有前景。在文献中，针对 EMG 手势分类的神经形态硬件实现（在全芯片/板/系统规模）的演示有限。此外，大多数文献尝试利用基于 LIF（漏积分和火）神经元的原始 SNN。在这项工作中，我们通过以下关键贡献解决了上述差距：（1）使用神经形态循环尖峰神经网络（RSNN）对基于肌电图信号的手势识别进行低功耗、高精度演示。特别是，我们提出了一种基于特殊双指数自适应阈值（DEXAT）神经元的多时间尺度循环神经形态系统。我们的网络实现了最先进的分类精度 (90%)，同时使用的神经元比 Roshambo EMG 数据集上最佳报道的现有技术少约 53%。 (2) 一种新的多通道尖峰编码器方案，用于在神经形态系统上有效处理实值肌电图数据。 (3) 展示了在英特尔专用神经形态 Loihi 芯片上实现复杂自适应神经元的独特多室方法。 (4) 与批量大小为 50 的 GPU 相比，Loihi (Nahuku 32) 上的 RSNN 实现实现了约 983 倍/19 倍的显着能量/延迟优势。 本文提出一种基于神经形态递归脉冲神经网络（RSNN）的低功耗EMG手势识别系统，采用双指数自适应阈值（DEXAT）神经元和多通道脉冲编码方案，并在Intel Loihi芯片上实现。 Sai Sukruth Bezugam,Ahmed Shaban,Manan Suri eess.SP,cs.AR,cs.CV,cs.HC,cs.NE

authors_text: Meng Liu,Haiyang Yu,Shuiwang Ji
title: Empowering GNNs via Edge-Aware Weisfeiler-Leman Algorithm
title_zh: 通过边缘感知 Weisfeiler-Leman 算法增强 GNN 的能力
comment: Accepted to Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR)
comments: Accepted to Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR)
abstract: Message passing graph neural networks (GNNs) are known to have their expressiveness upper-bounded by 1-dimensional Weisfeiler-Leman (1-WL) algorithm. To achieve more powerful GNNs, existing attempts either require ad hoc features, or involve operations that incur high time and space complexities. In this work, we propose a general and provably powerful GNN framework that preserves the scalability of the message passing scheme. In particular, we first propose to empower 1-WL for graph isomorphism test by considering edges among neighbors, giving rise to NC-1-WL. The expressiveness of NC-1-WL is shown to be strictly above 1-WL and below 3-WL theoretically. Further, we propose the NC-GNN framework as a differentiable neural version of NC-1-WL. Our simple implementation of NC-GNN is provably as powerful as NC-1-WL. Experiments demonstrate that our NC-GNN performs effectively and efficiently on various benchmarks.
summary: Message passing graph neural networks (GNNs) are known to have their expressiveness upper-bounded by 1-dimensional Weisfeiler-Leman (1-WL) algorithm. To achieve more powerful GNNs, existing attempts either require ad hoc features, or involve operations that incur high time and space complexities. In this work, we propose a general and provably powerful GNN framework that preserves the scalability of the message passing scheme. In particular, we first propose to empower 1-WL for graph isomorphism test by considering edges among neighbors, giving rise to NC-1-WL. The expressiveness of NC-1-WL is shown to be strictly above 1-WL and below 3-WL theoretically. Further, we propose the NC-GNN framework as a differentiable neural version of NC-1-WL. Our simple implementation of NC-GNN is provably as powerful as NC-1-WL. Experiments demonstrate that our NC-GNN performs effectively and efficiently on various benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，消息传递图神经网络 (GNN) 的表达能力上限受一维 Weisfeiler-Leman (1-WL) 算法的限制。为了实现更强大的 GNN，现有的尝试要么需要临时功能，要么涉及会产生高时间和空间复杂性的操作。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个通用且可证明功能强大的 GNN 框架，该框架保留了消息传递方案的可扩展性。特别是，我们首先提出通过考虑邻居之间的边来授权 1-WL 进行图同构测试，从而产生 NC-1-WL。理论上，NC-1-WL 的表现力严格高于 1-WL 且低于 3-WL。此外，我们提出 NC-GNN 框架作为 NC-1-WL 的可微神经版本。事实证明，我们对 NC-GNN 的简单实现与 NC-1-WL 一样强大。实验表明，我们的 NC-GNN 在各种基准上都表现得有效且高效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过边感知的Weisfeiler-Leman算法增强图神经网络（GNN）表达能力的框架。
AI.motivation: 现有GNN的表达能力受限于1维Weisfeiler-Leman（1-WL）算法，而提升其能力的传统方法要么依赖人工特征，要么导致高复杂度。
AI.method: 提出NC-1-WL算法通过考虑邻居间的边增强图同构测试，并设计可微分的NC-GNN框架作为其神经版本，理论证明其表达能力介于1-WL和3-WL之间。
AI.result: 实验表明NC-GNN在多个基准数据集上表现出高效且有效的性能。
AI.conclusion: NC-GNN框架在保持可扩展性的同时，提供了比传统方法更强的图神经网络表达能力。

authors_text: Sreejita Ghosh,Elizabeth S. Baranowski,Michael Biehl,Wiebke Arlt,Peter Tino,Kerstin Bunte
title: Interpretable Models Capable of Handling Systematic Missingness in Imbalanced Classes and Heterogeneous Datasets
title_zh: 能够处理不平衡类和异构数据集中系统缺失的可解释模型
abstract: Application of interpretable machine learning techniques on medical datasets facilitate early and fast diagnoses, along with getting deeper insight into the data. Furthermore, the transparency of these models increase trust among application domain experts. Medical datasets face common issues such as heterogeneous measurements, imbalanced classes with limited sample size, and missing data, which hinder the straightforward application of machine learning techniques. In this paper we present a family of prototype-based (PB) interpretable models which are capable of handling these issues. The models introduced in this contribution show comparable or superior performance to alternative techniques applicable in such situations. However, unlike ensemble based models, which have to compromise on easy interpretation, the PB models here do not. Moreover we propose a strategy of harnessing the power of ensembles while maintaining the intrinsic interpretability of the PB models, by averaging the model parameter manifolds. All the models were evaluated on a synthetic (publicly available dataset) in addition to detailed analyses of two real-world medical datasets (one publicly available). Results indicated that the models and strategies we introduced addressed the challenges of real-world medical data, while remaining computationally inexpensive and transparent, as well as similar or superior in performance compared to their alternatives.
summary: Application of interpretable machine learning techniques on medical datasets facilitate early and fast diagnoses, along with getting deeper insight into the data. Furthermore, the transparency of these models increase trust among application domain experts. Medical datasets face common issues such as heterogeneous measurements, imbalanced classes with limited sample size, and missing data, which hinder the straightforward application of machine learning techniques. In this paper we present a family of prototype-based (PB) interpretable models which are capable of handling these issues. The models introduced in this contribution show comparable or superior performance to alternative techniques applicable in such situations. However, unlike ensemble based models, which have to compromise on easy interpretation, the PB models here do not. Moreover we propose a strategy of harnessing the power of ensembles while maintaining the intrinsic interpretability of the PB models, by averaging the model parameter manifolds. All the models were evaluated on a synthetic (publicly available dataset) in addition to detailed analyses of two real-world medical datasets (one publicly available). Results indicated that the models and strategies we introduced addressed the challenges of real-world medical data, while remaining computationally inexpensive and transparent, as well as similar or superior in performance compared to their alternatives.
abstract_zh: 可解释的机器学习技术在医学数据集上的应用有助于早期和快速诊断，同时更深入地了解数据。此外，这些模型的透明度增加了应用领域专家之间的信任。医学数据集面临着异构测量、样本量有限的类别不平衡以及数据缺失等常见问题，这些问题阻碍了机器学习技术的直接应用。在本文中，我们提出了一系列基于原型（PB）的可解释模型，它们能够处理这些问题。本贡献中介绍的模型显示出与适用于此类情况的替代技术相当或更好的性能。然而，与基于集成的模型不同，基于集成的模型必须在简单解释上做出妥协，而这里的 PB 模型则不然。此外，我们提出了一种策略，通过对模型参数流形进行平均，利用集成的力量，同时保持 PB 模型的内在可解释性。除了对两个真实世界医学数据集（一个公开数据集）的详细分析之外，所有模型均在综合数据集（公开数据集）上进行评估。结果表明，我们引入的模型和策略解决了现实世界医疗数据的挑战，同时保持计算成本低廉和透明，并且与替代方案相比，性能相似或优越。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于原型的可解释模型，用于处理医疗数据集中的系统性缺失、类别不平衡和异构数据问题。
AI.motivation: 医疗数据集存在异构测量、类别不平衡和缺失数据等挑战，传统机器学习方法难以直接应用，且需在可解释性与性能间妥协。
AI.method: 设计基于原型的可解释模型，并通过平均模型参数流形的策略结合集成方法，保持模型可解释性的同时提升性能。
AI.result: 模型在合成数据集和两个真实医疗数据集上表现优异，性能与替代方法相当或更优，且计算成本低、透明度高。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模型及策略有效解决了现实医疗数据的挑战，在保持可解释性的同时实现了高效且可靠的诊断支持。
