search_text: Interpretable Models Capable of Handling Systematic Missingness in Imbalanced Classes and Heterogeneous Datasets 能够处理不平衡类和异构数据集中系统缺失的可解释模型 Application of interpretable machine learning techniques on medical datasets facilitate early and fast diagnoses, along with getting deeper insight into the data. Furthermore, the transparency of these models increase trust among application domain experts. Medical datasets face common issues such as heterogeneous measurements, imbalanced classes with limited sample size, and missing data, which hinder the straightforward application of machine learning techniques. In this paper we present a family of prototype-based (PB) interpretable models which are capable of handling these issues. The models introduced in this contribution show comparable or superior performance to alternative techniques applicable in such situations. However, unlike ensemble based models, which have to compromise on easy interpretation, the PB models here do not. Moreover we propose a strategy of harnessing the power of ensembles while maintaining the intrinsic interpretability of the PB models, by averaging the model parameter manifolds. All the models were evaluated on a synthetic (publicly available dataset) in addition to detailed analyses of two real-world medical datasets (one publicly available). Results indicated that the models and strategies we introduced addressed the challenges of real-world medical data, while remaining computationally inexpensive and transparent, as well as similar or superior in performance compared to their alternatives. 可解释的机器学习技术在医学数据集上的应用有助于早期和快速诊断，同时更深入地了解数据。此外，这些模型的透明度增加了应用领域专家之间的信任。医学数据集面临着异构测量、样本量有限的类别不平衡以及数据缺失等常见问题，这些问题阻碍了机器学习技术的直接应用。在本文中，我们提出了一系列基于原型（PB）的可解释模型，它们能够处理这些问题。本贡献中介绍的模型显示出与适用于此类情况的替代技术相当或更好的性能。然而，与基于集成的模型不同，基于集成的模型必须在简单解释上做出妥协，而这里的 PB 模型则不然。此外，我们提出了一种策略，通过对模型参数流形进行平均，利用集成的力量，同时保持 PB 模型的内在可解释性。除了对两个真实世界医学数据集（一个公开数据集）的详细分析之外，所有模型均在综合数据集（公开数据集）上进行评估。结果表明，我们引入的模型和策略解决了现实世界医疗数据的挑战，同时保持计算成本低廉和透明，并且与替代方案相比，性能相似或优越。 本文提出了一种基于原型的可解释模型，用于处理医疗数据集中的系统性缺失、类别不平衡和异构数据问题。 Sreejita Ghosh,Elizabeth S. Baranowski,Michael Biehl,Wiebke Arlt,Peter Tino,Kerstin Bunte cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Cristiana Bolchini,Luca Cassano,Antonio Miele,Alessandro Toschi
title: Fast and Accurate Error Simulation for CNNs against Soft Errors
title_zh: 针对软错误的 CNN 快速准确的错误模拟
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Computers
comments: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Computers
abstract: The great quest for adopting AI-based computation for safety-/mission-critical applications motivates the interest towards methods for assessing the robustness of the application w.r.t. not only its training/tuning but also errors due to faults, in particular soft errors, affecting the underlying hardware. Two strategies exist: architecture-level fault injection and application-level functional error simulation. We present a framework for the reliability analysis of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) via an error simulation engine that exploits a set of validated error models extracted from a detailed fault injection campaign. These error models are defined based on the corruption patterns of the output of the CNN operators induced by faults and bridge the gap between fault injection and error simulation, exploiting the advantages of both approaches. We compared our methodology against SASSIFI for the accuracy of functional error simulation w.r.t. fault injection, and against TensorFI in terms of speedup for the error simulation strategy. Experimental results show that our methodology achieves about 99\% accuracy of the fault effects w.r.t. SASSIFI, and a speedup ranging from 44x up to 63x w.r.t. TensorFI, that only implements a limited set of error models.
summary: The great quest for adopting AI-based computation for safety-/mission-critical applications motivates the interest towards methods for assessing the robustness of the application w.r.t. not only its training/tuning but also errors due to faults, in particular soft errors, affecting the underlying hardware. Two strategies exist: architecture-level fault injection and application-level functional error simulation. We present a framework for the reliability analysis of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) via an error simulation engine that exploits a set of validated error models extracted from a detailed fault injection campaign. These error models are defined based on the corruption patterns of the output of the CNN operators induced by faults and bridge the gap between fault injection and error simulation, exploiting the advantages of both approaches. We compared our methodology against SASSIFI for the accuracy of functional error simulation w.r.t. fault injection, and against TensorFI in terms of speedup for the error simulation strategy. Experimental results show that our methodology achieves about 99\% accuracy of the fault effects w.r.t. SASSIFI, and a speedup ranging from 44x up to 63x w.r.t. TensorFI, that only implements a limited set of error models.
abstract_zh: 对安全/关键任务应用采用基于人工智能的计算的巨大追求激发了人们对评估应用鲁棒性的方法的兴趣。不仅是其训练/调整，还包括由于故障而产生的错误，特别是影响底层硬件的软错误。存在两种策略：架构级故障注入和应用程序级功能错误模拟。我们提出了一个通过错误模拟引擎对卷积神经网络（CNN）进行可靠性分析的框架，该引擎利用了从详细的故障注入活动中提取的一组经过验证的错误模型。这些错误模型是根据由故障引起的 CNN 算子输出的损坏模式来定义的，并弥合了故障注入和错误模拟之间的差距，充分利用了两种方法的优点。我们将我们的方法与 SASSIFI 的功能误差模拟的准确性进行了比较。故障注入，并在错误模拟策略的加速方面与 TensorFI 相比。实验结果表明，我们的方法在故障影响方面的准确率约为 99%。 SASSIFI，加速比从 44 倍到 63 倍不等。 TensorFI，仅实现一组有限的错误模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合故障注入与错误模拟的框架，用于快速准确评估卷积神经网络（CNN）在软错误下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 随着AI计算在安全关键领域的应用，需评估CNN对硬件软错误的鲁棒性，但现有方法存在准确性或效率不足的问题。
AI.method: 构建错误模拟引擎，利用从故障注入实验中提取的验证错误模型，结合CNN操作输出的污染模式，融合故障注入与错误模拟的优势。
AI.result: 相比SASSIFI实现99%的故障效果准确性，相比TensorFI在错误模拟速度上提升44x至63x。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了准确性与效率，为CNN可靠性分析提供了高效工具，弥补了现有方法的不足。

authors_text: Munender Varshney,Ravindra Yadav,Vinay P. Namboodiri,Rajesh M Hegde
title: Learning Speaker-specific Lip-to-Speech Generation
title_zh: 学习特定于说话者的唇语生成
abstract: Understanding the lip movement and inferring the speech from it is notoriously difficult for the common person. The task of accurate lip-reading gets help from various cues of the speaker and its contextual or environmental setting. Every speaker has a different accent and speaking style, which can be inferred from their visual and speech features. This work aims to understand the correlation/mapping between speech and the sequence of lip movement of individual speakers in an unconstrained and large vocabulary. We model the frame sequence as a prior to the transformer in an auto-encoder setting and learned a joint embedding that exploits temporal properties of both audio and video. We learn temporal synchronization using deep metric learning, which guides the decoder to generate speech in sync with input lip movements. The predictive posterior thus gives us the generated speech in speaker speaking style. We have trained our model on the Grid and Lip2Wav Chemistry lecture dataset to evaluate single speaker natural speech generation tasks from lip movement in an unconstrained natural setting. Extensive evaluation using various qualitative and quantitative metrics with human evaluation also shows that our method outperforms the Lip2Wav Chemistry dataset(large vocabulary in an unconstrained setting) by a good margin across almost all evaluation metrics and marginally outperforms the state-of-the-art on GRID dataset.
summary: Understanding the lip movement and inferring the speech from it is notoriously difficult for the common person. The task of accurate lip-reading gets help from various cues of the speaker and its contextual or environmental setting. Every speaker has a different accent and speaking style, which can be inferred from their visual and speech features. This work aims to understand the correlation/mapping between speech and the sequence of lip movement of individual speakers in an unconstrained and large vocabulary. We model the frame sequence as a prior to the transformer in an auto-encoder setting and learned a joint embedding that exploits temporal properties of both audio and video. We learn temporal synchronization using deep metric learning, which guides the decoder to generate speech in sync with input lip movements. The predictive posterior thus gives us the generated speech in speaker speaking style. We have trained our model on the Grid and Lip2Wav Chemistry lecture dataset to evaluate single speaker natural speech generation tasks from lip movement in an unconstrained natural setting. Extensive evaluation using various qualitative and quantitative metrics with human evaluation also shows that our method outperforms the Lip2Wav Chemistry dataset(large vocabulary in an unconstrained setting) by a good margin across almost all evaluation metrics and marginally outperforms the state-of-the-art on GRID dataset.
abstract_zh: 对于普通人来说，理解嘴唇的运动并从中推断出言语是非常困难的。准确的唇读任务需要说话者的各种线索及其上下文或环境设置的帮助。每个说话者都有不同的口音和说话风格，这可以从他们的视觉和言语特征推断出来。这项工作的目的是了解在不受限制的大词汇量中各个说话者的语音和嘴唇运动序列之间的相关性/映射。我们在自动编码器设置中将帧序列建模为变压器之前的模型，并学习了利用音频和视频的时间属性的联合嵌入。我们使用深度度量学习来学习时间同步，它指导解码器生成与输入嘴唇运动同步的语音。因此，预测后验为我们提供了以说话者说话风格生成的语音。我们在 Grid 和 Lip2Wav Chemistry 讲座数据集上训练了我们的模型，以评估在不受约束的自然环境中通过嘴唇运动进行的单说话者自然语音生成任务。使用各种定性和定量指标以及人工评估进行的广泛评估还表明，我们的方法在几乎所有评估指标上都明显优于 Lip2Wav Chemistry 数据集（不受约束的环境中的大词汇量），并且略微优于 GRID 数据集上的最新技术。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于说话人特定特征的唇语到语音生成方法，旨在从无约束的唇部运动中生成自然语音。
AI.motivation: 唇语识别和语音生成在不同说话人之间存在显著差异，现有方法难以准确捕捉个体语音风格与唇部运动的关联，需解决大词汇量和无约束环境下的生成问题。
AI.method: 采用自编码器框架，将帧序列作为Transformer的先验信息，学习音频与视频的联合嵌入；通过深度度量学习实现时序同步，指导解码器生成与唇部运动同步的语音。
AI.result: 在Grid和Lip2Wav Chemistry数据集上验证，模型在多数评估指标上显著优于Lip2Wav Chemistry，且在GRID数据集上略优于现有最优方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效捕捉了说话人特定的时序特征和语音风格，实现了无约束环境下高质量的唇语到语音生成，达到或超越当前最优水平。

motivation: 唇语识别和语音生成在不同说话人之间存在显著差异，现有方法难以准确捕捉个体语音风格与唇部运动的关联，需解决大词汇量和无约束环境下的生成问题。
method: 采用自编码器框架，将帧序列作为Transformer的先验信息，学习音频与视频的联合嵌入；通过深度度量学习实现时序同步，指导解码器生成与唇部运动同步的语音。
result: 在Grid和Lip2Wav Chemistry数据集上验证，模型在多数评估指标上显著优于Lip2Wav Chemistry，且在GRID数据集上略优于现有最优方法。
conclusion: 该方法有效捕捉了说话人特定的时序特征和语音风格，实现了无约束环境下高质量的唇语到语音生成，达到或超越当前最优水平。
search_text: Learning Speaker-specific Lip-to-Speech Generation 学习特定于说话者的唇语生成 Understanding the lip movement and inferring the speech from it is notoriously difficult for the common person. The task of accurate lip-reading gets help from various cues of the speaker and its contextual or environmental setting. Every speaker has a different accent and speaking style, which can be inferred from their visual and speech features. This work aims to understand the correlation/mapping between speech and the sequence of lip movement of individual speakers in an unconstrained and large vocabulary. We model the frame sequence as a prior to the transformer in an auto-encoder setting and learned a joint embedding that exploits temporal properties of both audio and video. We learn temporal synchronization using deep metric learning, which guides the decoder to generate speech in sync with input lip movements. The predictive posterior thus gives us the generated speech in speaker speaking style. We have trained our model on the Grid and Lip2Wav Chemistry lecture dataset to evaluate single speaker natural speech generation tasks from lip movement in an unconstrained natural setting. Extensive evaluation using various qualitative and quantitative metrics with human evaluation also shows that our method outperforms the Lip2Wav Chemistry dataset(large vocabulary in an unconstrained setting) by a good margin across almost all evaluation metrics and marginally outperforms the state-of-the-art on GRID dataset. 对于普通人来说，理解嘴唇的运动并从中推断出言语是非常困难的。准确的唇读任务需要说话者的各种线索及其上下文或环境设置的帮助。每个说话者都有不同的口音和说话风格，这可以从他们的视觉和言语特征推断出来。这项工作的目的是了解在不受限制的大词汇量中各个说话者的语音和嘴唇运动序列之间的相关性/映射。我们在自动编码器设置中将帧序列建模为变压器之前的模型，并学习了利用音频和视频的时间属性的联合嵌入。我们使用深度度量学习来学习时间同步，它指导解码器生成与输入嘴唇运动同步的语音。因此，预测后验为我们提供了以说话者说话风格生成的语音。我们在 Grid 和 Lip2Wav Chemistry 讲座数据集上训练了我们的模型，以评估在不受约束的自然环境中通过嘴唇运动进行的单说话者自然语音生成任务。使用各种定性和定量指标以及人工评估进行的广泛评估还表明，我们的方法在几乎所有评估指标上都明显优于 Lip2Wav Chemistry 数据集（不受约束的环境中的大词汇量），并且略微优于 GRID 数据集上的最新技术。 该论文提出了一种基于说话人特定特征的唇语到语音生成方法，旨在从无约束的唇部运动中生成自然语音。 Munender Varshney,Ravindra Yadav,Vinay P. Namboodiri,Rajesh M Hegde cs.CV,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Christian Gumbsch,Maurits Adam,Birgit Elsner,Georg Martius,Martin V. Butz
title: Developing hierarchical anticipations via neural network-based event segmentation
title_zh: 通过基于神经网络的事件分割开发分层预测
abstract: Humans can make predictions on various time scales and hierarchical levels. Thereby, the learning of event encodings seems to play a crucial role. In this work we model the development of hierarchical predictions via autonomously learned latent event codes. We present a hierarchical recurrent neural network architecture, whose inductive learning biases foster the development of sparsely changing latent state that compress sensorimotor sequences. A higher level network learns to predict the situations in which the latent states tend to change. Using a simulated robotic manipulator, we demonstrate that the system (i) learns latent states that accurately reflect the event structure of the data, (ii) develops meaningful temporal abstract predictions on the higher level, and (iii) generates goal-anticipatory behavior similar to gaze behavior found in eye-tracking studies with infants. The architecture offers a step towards the autonomous learning of compressed hierarchical encodings of gathered experiences and the exploitation of these encodings to generate adaptive behavior.
summary: Humans can make predictions on various time scales and hierarchical levels. Thereby, the learning of event encodings seems to play a crucial role. In this work we model the development of hierarchical predictions via autonomously learned latent event codes. We present a hierarchical recurrent neural network architecture, whose inductive learning biases foster the development of sparsely changing latent state that compress sensorimotor sequences. A higher level network learns to predict the situations in which the latent states tend to change. Using a simulated robotic manipulator, we demonstrate that the system (i) learns latent states that accurately reflect the event structure of the data, (ii) develops meaningful temporal abstract predictions on the higher level, and (iii) generates goal-anticipatory behavior similar to gaze behavior found in eye-tracking studies with infants. The architecture offers a step towards the autonomous learning of compressed hierarchical encodings of gathered experiences and the exploitation of these encodings to generate adaptive behavior.
abstract_zh: 人类可以在不同的时间尺度和层次级别上做出预测。因此，事件编码的学习似乎起着至关重要的作用。在这项工作中，我们通过自主学习的潜在事件代码对分层预测的发展进行建模。我们提出了一种分层循环神经网络架构，其归纳学习偏差促进了压缩感觉运动序列的稀疏变化的潜在状态的发展。更高级别的网络学习预测潜在状态倾向于改变的情况。使用模拟机器人操纵器，我们证明系统（i）学习准确反映数据事件结构的潜在状态，（ii）在更高层次上开发有意义的时间抽象预测，以及（iii）生成类似于婴儿眼动追踪研究中发现的凝视行为的目标预期行为。该架构为自主学习所收集的经验的压缩分层编码以及利用这些编码生成自适应行为迈出了一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经网络的层次化事件分割方法，通过自主学习潜在事件编码来建模多层次预测机制。
AI.motivation: 人类能在不同时间尺度和层次上进行预测，事件编码的学习对理解这种能力至关重要，但现有模型难以实现层次化预测。
AI.method: 设计分层递归神经网络架构，通过归纳偏置学习稀疏变化的潜在状态，高层网络预测潜在状态变化的场景。
AI.result: 在模拟机械臂实验中，系统能准确反映数据事件结构，生成有意义的时序预测，并表现出类似婴儿眼动研究的前瞻性行为。
AI.conclusion: 该架构为自主学习压缩层次化经验编码及生成适应性行为提供了新途径，推动了类人预测能力的模型发展。

authors_text: Kin-Ho Lam,Delyar Tabatabai,Jed Irvine,Donald Bertucci,Anita Ruangrotsakun,Minsuk Kahng,Alan Fern
title: Beyond Value: CHECKLIST for Testing Inferences in Planning-Based RL
title_zh: 超越价值：基于规划的强化学习中测试推理的清单
comment: This work will appear in the Proceedings of the 32nd International Conference on Automated Planning and Scheduling (ICAPS2022) https://icaps22.icaps-conference.org/papers
comments: This work will appear in the Proceedings of the 32nd International Conference on Automated Planning and Scheduling (ICAPS2022) https://icaps22.icaps-conference.org/papers
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) agents are commonly evaluated via their expected value over a distribution of test scenarios. Unfortunately, this evaluation approach provides limited evidence for post-deployment generalization beyond the test distribution. In this paper, we address this limitation by extending the recent CheckList testing methodology from natural language processing to planning-based RL. Specifically, we consider testing RL agents that make decisions via online tree search using a learned transition model and value function. The key idea is to improve the assessment of future performance via a CheckList approach for exploring and assessing the agent's inferences during tree search. The approach provides the user with an interface and general query-rule mechanism for identifying potential inference flaws and validating expected inference invariances. We present a user study involving knowledgeable AI researchers using the approach to evaluate an agent trained to play a complex real-time strategy game. The results show the approach is effective in allowing users to identify previously-unknown flaws in the agent's reasoning. In addition, our analysis provides insight into how AI experts use this type of testing approach, which may help improve future instantiations.
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) agents are commonly evaluated via their expected value over a distribution of test scenarios. Unfortunately, this evaluation approach provides limited evidence for post-deployment generalization beyond the test distribution. In this paper, we address this limitation by extending the recent CheckList testing methodology from natural language processing to planning-based RL. Specifically, we consider testing RL agents that make decisions via online tree search using a learned transition model and value function. The key idea is to improve the assessment of future performance via a CheckList approach for exploring and assessing the agent's inferences during tree search. The approach provides the user with an interface and general query-rule mechanism for identifying potential inference flaws and validating expected inference invariances. We present a user study involving knowledgeable AI researchers using the approach to evaluate an agent trained to play a complex real-time strategy game. The results show the approach is effective in allowing users to identify previously-unknown flaws in the agent's reasoning. In addition, our analysis provides insight into how AI experts use this type of testing approach, which may help improve future instantiations.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）代理通常通过测试场景分布的预期值来评估。不幸的是，这种评估方法为测试分布之外的部署后泛化提供的证据有限。在本文中，我们通过将最新的 CheckList 测试方法从自然语言处理扩展到基于规划的强化学习来解决这一限制。具体来说，我们考虑测试 RL 代理，这些代理使用学习到的转换模型和价值函数通过在线树搜索做出决策。关键思想是通过检查列表方法来改进对未来性能的评估，以探索和评估代理在树搜索期间的推理。该方法为用户提供了一个界面和通用查询规则机制，用于识别潜在的推理缺陷并验证预期的推理不变性。我们提出了一项用户研究，涉及知识渊博的人工智能研究人员，使用该方法来评估经过训练以玩复杂的实时策略游戏的代理。结果表明，该方法可以有效地让用户识别智能体推理中先前未知的缺陷。此外，我们的分析还提供了有关人工智能专家如何使用此类测试方法的见解，这可能有助于改进未来的实例化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CHECKLIST的方法，用于评估基于规划的强化学习（RL）代理在树搜索过程中的推理能力，超越传统价值评估的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统RL评估方法仅基于测试场景的期望值，无法有效验证代理在部署后对分布外场景的泛化能力，需改进推理能力的评估方式。
AI.method: 将自然语言处理中的CheckList方法扩展至基于规划的RL，通过接口和通用查询规则，检测代理在树搜索中的推理缺陷并验证推理不变性。
AI.result: 用户研究显示，该方法能有效发现代理推理中的未知缺陷，并揭示AI专家如何利用此类测试方法进行评估。
AI.conclusion: CHECKLIST方法为基于规划的RL代理提供了更全面的推理评估框架，有助于未来改进测试策略和代理设计。

We present a user study involving knowledgeable AI researchers using the approach to evaluate an agent trained to play a complex real-time strategy game. The results show the approach is effective in allowing users to identify previously-unknown flaws in the agent's reasoning. In addition, our analysis provides insight into how AI experts use this type of testing approach, which may help improve future instantiations. 强化学习（RL）代理通常通过测试场景分布的预期值来评估。不幸的是，这种评估方法为测试分布之外的部署后泛化提供的证据有限。在本文中，我们通过将最新的 CheckList 测试方法从自然语言处理扩展到基于规划的强化学习来解决这一限制。具体来说，我们考虑测试 RL 代理，这些代理使用学习到的转换模型和价值函数通过在线树搜索做出决策。关键思想是通过检查列表方法来改进对未来性能的评估，以探索和评估代理在树搜索期间的推理。该方法为用户提供了一个界面和通用查询规则机制，用于识别潜在的推理缺陷并验证预期的推理不变性。我们提出了一项用户研究，涉及知识渊博的人工智能研究人员，使用该方法来评估经过训练以玩复杂的实时策略游戏的代理。结果表明，该方法可以有效地让用户识别智能体推理中先前未知的缺陷。此外，我们的分析还提供了有关人工智能专家如何使用此类测试方法的见解，这可能有助于改进未来的实例化。 本文提出一种名为CHECKLIST的方法，用于评估基于规划的强化学习（RL）代理在树搜索过程中的推理能力，超越传统价值评估的局限性。 Kin-Ho Lam,Delyar Tabatabai,Jed Irvine,Donald Bertucci,Anita Ruangrotsakun,Minsuk Kahng,Alan Fern cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Dustin Morrill,Esra'a Saleh,Michael Bowling,Amy Greenwald
title: Interpolating Between Softmax Policy Gradient and Neural Replicator Dynamics with Capped Implicit Exploration
title_zh: 使用上限隐式探索在 Softmax 策略梯度和神经复制器动态之间进行插值
comment: At Reinforcement Learning and Decision Making 2022, June 2022. 9 pages and 1 figure
comments: At Reinforcement Learning and Decision Making 2022, June 2022. 9 pages and 1 figure
abstract: Neural replicator dynamics (NeuRD) is an alternative to the foundational softmax policy gradient (SPG) algorithm motivated by online learning and evolutionary game theory. The NeuRD expected update is designed to be nearly identical to that of SPG, however, we show that the Monte Carlo updates differ in a substantial way: the importance correction accounting for a sampled action is nullified in the SPG update, but not in the NeuRD update. Naturally, this causes the NeuRD update to have higher variance than its SPG counterpart. Building on implicit exploration algorithms in the adversarial bandit setting, we introduce capped implicit exploration (CIX) estimates that allow us to construct NeuRD-CIX, which interpolates between this aspect of NeuRD and SPG. We show how CIX estimates can be used in a black-box reduction to construct bandit algorithms with regret bounds that hold with high probability and the benefits this entails for NeuRD-CIX in sequential decision-making settings. Our analysis reveals a bias--variance tradeoff between SPG and NeuRD, and shows how theory predicts that NeuRD-CIX will perform well more consistently than NeuRD while retaining NeuRD's advantages over SPG in non-stationary environments.
summary: Neural replicator dynamics (NeuRD) is an alternative to the foundational softmax policy gradient (SPG) algorithm motivated by online learning and evolutionary game theory. The NeuRD expected update is designed to be nearly identical to that of SPG, however, we show that the Monte Carlo updates differ in a substantial way: the importance correction accounting for a sampled action is nullified in the SPG update, but not in the NeuRD update. Naturally, this causes the NeuRD update to have higher variance than its SPG counterpart. Building on implicit exploration algorithms in the adversarial bandit setting, we introduce capped implicit exploration (CIX) estimates that allow us to construct NeuRD-CIX, which interpolates between this aspect of NeuRD and SPG. We show how CIX estimates can be used in a black-box reduction to construct bandit algorithms with regret bounds that hold with high probability and the benefits this entails for NeuRD-CIX in sequential decision-making settings. Our analysis reveals a bias--variance tradeoff between SPG and NeuRD, and shows how theory predicts that NeuRD-CIX will perform well more consistently than NeuRD while retaining NeuRD's advantages over SPG in non-stationary environments.
abstract_zh: 神经复制动力学 (NeuRD) 是受在线学习和进化博弈论启发的基础 softmax 策略梯度 (SPG) 算法的替代方案。 NeuRD 预期更新的设计与 SPG 几乎相同，但是，我们表明蒙特卡罗更新有很大不同：采样动作的重要性校正在 SPG 更新中无效，但在 NeuRD 更新中则不然。当然，这会导致 NeuRD 更新比 SPG 更新具有更高的方差。基于对抗性强盗设置中的隐式探索算法，我们引入了上限隐式探索（CIX）估计，使我们能够构建 NeuRD-CIX，它在 NeuRD 和 SPG 的这方面进行插值。我们展示了如何在黑盒约简中使用 CIX 估计来构建具有高概率的遗憾边界的老虎机算法，以及这在顺序决策设置中为 NeuRD-CIX 带来的好处。我们的分析揭示了 SPG 和 NeuRD 之间的偏差-方差权衡，并显示了理论如何预测 NeuRD-CIX 将比 NeuRD 表现得更一致，同时在非平稳环境中保留 NeuRD 相对于 SPG 的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合softmax策略梯度（SPG）和神经复制动态（NeuRD）的方法，通过引入截断隐式探索（CIX）来平衡两者在方差和偏差上的优劣。
AI.motivation: NeuRD在蒙特卡洛更新中存在较高方差，而SPG在非平稳环境中表现不足，需寻找两者的平衡点以提升算法稳定性与适应性。
AI.method: 基于对抗带宽中的隐式探索算法，设计CIX估计量，构建NeuRD-CIX框架，通过黑盒约简实现SPG与NeuRD的插值。
AI.result: 理论分析表明NeuRD-CIX在保持NeuRD非平稳环境优势的同时，比NeuRD更稳定，且具有高概率的遗憾界保证。
AI.conclusion: CIX有效解决了SPG与NeuRD的偏差-方差权衡问题，为序列决策提供了更鲁棒的算法选择。

authors_text: Jorge Gonzalez-Zapata,Ivan Reyes-Amezcua,Daniel Flores-Araiza,Mauricio Mendez-Ruiz,Gilberto Ochoa-Ruiz,Andres Mendez-Vazquez
title: Guided Deep Metric Learning
title_zh: 引导式深度度量学习
abstract: Deep Metric Learning (DML) methods have been proven relevant for visual similarity learning. However, they sometimes lack generalization properties because they are trained often using an inappropriate sample selection strategy or due to the difficulty of the dataset caused by a distributional shift in the data. These represent a significant drawback when attempting to learn the underlying data manifold. Therefore, there is a pressing need to develop better ways of obtaining generalization and representation of the underlying manifold. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to DML that we call Guided Deep Metric Learning, a novel architecture oriented to learning more compact clusters, improving generalization under distributional shifts in DML. This novel architecture consists of two independent models: A multi-branch master model, inspired from a Few-Shot Learning (FSL) perspective, generates a reduced hypothesis space based on prior knowledge from labeled data, which guides or regularizes the decision boundary of a student model during training under an offline knowledge distillation scheme. Experiments have shown that the proposed method is capable of a better manifold generalization and representation to up to 40% improvement (Recall@1, CIFAR10), using guidelines suggested by Musgrave et al. to perform a more fair and realistic comparison, which is currently absent in the literature
summary: Deep Metric Learning (DML) methods have been proven relevant for visual similarity learning. However, they sometimes lack generalization properties because they are trained often using an inappropriate sample selection strategy or due to the difficulty of the dataset caused by a distributional shift in the data. These represent a significant drawback when attempting to learn the underlying data manifold. Therefore, there is a pressing need to develop better ways of obtaining generalization and representation of the underlying manifold. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to DML that we call Guided Deep Metric Learning, a novel architecture oriented to learning more compact clusters, improving generalization under distributional shifts in DML. This novel architecture consists of two independent models: A multi-branch master model, inspired from a Few-Shot Learning (FSL) perspective, generates a reduced hypothesis space based on prior knowledge from labeled data, which guides or regularizes the decision boundary of a student model during training under an offline knowledge distillation scheme. Experiments have shown that the proposed method is capable of a better manifold generalization and representation to up to 40% improvement (Recall@1, CIFAR10), using guidelines suggested by Musgrave et al. to perform a more fair and realistic comparison, which is currently absent in the literature
abstract_zh: 深度度量学习 (DML) 方法已被证明与视觉相似性学习相关。然而，它们有时缺乏泛化属性，因为它们经常使用不适当的样本选择策略进行训练，或者由于数据分布变化引起的数据集困难。当尝试学习底层数据流形时，这些代表了一个显着的缺点。因此，迫切需要开发更好的方法来获得底层流形的泛化和表示。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的 DML 方法，称为引导深度度量学习，这是一种面向学习更紧凑集群的新颖架构，可提高 DML 分布变化下的泛化能力。这种新颖的架构由两个独立的模型组成：一个受少样本学习（FSL）视角启发的多分支主模型，根据标记数据的先验知识生成简化的假设空间，在离线知识蒸馏方案下的训练过程中指导或规范学生模型的决策边界。实验表明，使用 Musgrave 等人建议的指导方针，所提出的方法能够实现更好的流形泛化和表示，最高可提高 40%（Recall@1、CIFAR10）。进行更公平、更现实的比较，这是目前文献中所缺乏的

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型深度度量学习方法Guided Deep Metric Learning，通过引入多分支主模型与学生模型的协同训练机制，解决传统方法在分布偏移场景下的泛化能力不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度度量学习方法因样本选择策略不当或数据分布偏移，导致在复杂场景下难以有效学习数据流形结构，制约了模型的泛化能力。
AI.method: 构建包含多分支主模型（基于Few-Shot Learning框架）和学生模型的双模型架构，主模型通过离线知识蒸馏机制为学生模型提供先验知识引导，形成紧凑聚类的决策边界。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10数据集上实现Recall@1指标最高40%的提升，通过Musgrave等人提出的评估框架验证了方法在分布偏移场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过知识蒸馏与多模型协同机制显著提升了深度度量学习的流形泛化能力，为处理分布偏移问题提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Tin Vlašić,Hieu Nguyen,AmirEhsan Khorashadizadeh,Ivan Dokmanić
title: Implicit Neural Representation for Mesh-Free Inverse Obstacle Scattering
title_zh: 无网格逆障碍散射的隐式神经表示

abstract: Implicit representation of shapes as level sets of multilayer perceptrons has recently flourished in different shape analysis, compression, and reconstruction tasks. In this paper, we introduce an implicit neural representation-based framework for solving the inverse obstacle scattering problem in a mesh-free fashion. We express the obstacle shape as the zero-level set of a signed distance function which is implicitly determined by network parameters. To solve the direct scattering problem, we implement the implicit boundary integral method. It uses projections of the grid points in the tubular neighborhood onto the boundary to compute the PDE solution directly in the level-set framework. The proposed implicit representation conveniently handles the shape perturbation in the optimization process. To update the shape, we use PyTorch's automatic differentiation to backpropagate the loss function w.r.t. the network parameters, allowing us to avoid complex and error-prone manual derivation of the shape derivative. Additionally, we propose a deep generative model of implicit neural shape representations that can fit into the framework. The deep generative model effectively regularizes the inverse obstacle scattering problem, making it more tractable and robust, while yielding high-quality reconstruction results even in noise-corrupted setups.

The proposed implicit representation conveniently handles the shape perturbation in the optimization process. To update the shape, we use PyTorch's automatic differentiation to backpropagate the loss function w.r.t. the network parameters, allowing us to avoid complex and error-prone manual derivation of the shape derivative. Additionally, we propose a deep generative model of implicit neural shape representations that can fit into the framework. The deep generative model effectively regularizes the inverse obstacle scattering problem, making it more tractable and robust, while yielding high-quality reconstruction results even in noise-corrupted setups.
abstract_zh: 将形状隐式表示为多层感知器的水平集最近在不同的形状分析、压缩和重建任务中蓬勃发展。在本文中，我们引入了一种基于隐式神经表示的框架，用于以无网格方式解决逆障碍物散射问题。我们将障碍物形状表示为有符号距离函数的零级集，该函数由网络参数隐式确定。为了解决直接散射问题，我们实现了隐式边界积分方法。它使用管状邻域中的网格点到边界的投影来直接在水平集框架中计算 PDE 解。所提出的隐式表示可以方便地处理优化过程中的形状扰动。为了更新形状，我们使用 PyTorch 的自动微分来反向传播损失函数。网络参数，使我们能够避免复杂且容易出错的形状导数的手动推导。此外，我们提出了一种可以适合该框架的隐式神经形状表示的深层生成模型。深度生成模型有效地规范了逆障碍物散射问题，使其更加易于处理和鲁棒，同时即使在噪声破坏的设置中也能产生高质量的重建结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于隐式神经表示的无网格框架，用于求解逆障碍散射问题。
AI.motivation: 传统网格方法在处理逆障碍散射问题时存在复杂性和灵活性不足的问题，需发展更高效且鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过多层感知机的零水平集表示障碍物形状，结合隐式边界积分法与PyTorch自动微分优化参数，并引入深度生成模型进行正则化。
AI.result: 在噪声环境下仍能实现高质量的障碍物重建，验证了方法的鲁棒性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为无网格逆散射问题提供了高效、灵活的解决方案，具有广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Wangcheng Xu,Snejana Shegheva,Ashok Goel
title: Symmetry as a Representation of Intuitive Geometry?
title_zh: 对称性作为直观几何的表示？
abstract: Recognition of geometrical patterns seems to be an important aspect of human intelligence. Geometric pattern recognition is used in many intelligence tests, including Dehaene's odd-one-out test of Core Geometry (CG)) based on intuitive geometrical concepts (Dehaene et al., 2006). Earlier work has developed a symmetry-based cognitive model of Dehaene's test and demonstrated performance comparable to that of humans. In this work, we further investigate the role of symmetry in geometrical intuition and build a cognitive model for the 2-Alternative Forced Choice (2-AFC) variation of the CG test (Marupudi & Varma 2021). In contrast to Dehaene's test, 2-AFC leaves almost no space for cognitive models based on generalization over multiple examples. Our symmetry-based model achieves an accuracy comparable to the human average on the 2-AFC test and appears to capture an essential part of intuitive geometry.
summary: Recognition of geometrical patterns seems to be an important aspect of human intelligence. Geometric pattern recognition is used in many intelligence tests, including Dehaene's odd-one-out test of Core Geometry (CG)) based on intuitive geometrical concepts (Dehaene et al., 2006). Earlier work has developed a symmetry-based cognitive model of Dehaene's test and demonstrated performance comparable to that of humans. In this work, we further investigate the role of symmetry in geometrical intuition and build a cognitive model for the 2-Alternative Forced Choice (2-AFC) variation of the CG test (Marupudi & Varma 2021). In contrast to Dehaene's test, 2-AFC leaves almost no space for cognitive models based on generalization over multiple examples. Our symmetry-based model achieves an accuracy comparable to the human average on the 2-AFC test and appears to capture an essential part of intuitive geometry.
abstract_zh: 对几何图案的识别似乎是人类智力的一个重要方面。几何模式识别用于许多智力测试，包括 Dehaene 的基于直观几何概念的核心几何（CG）单数测试（Dehaene 等，2006）。早期的工作已经开发出一种基于对称性的 Dehaene 测试认知模型，并展示了与人类相当的性能。在这项工作中，我们进一步研究了对称性在几何直觉中的作用，并为 CG 测试的 2-Alternative Forced Choice (2-AFC) 变体构建了认知模型 (Marupudi & Varma 2021)。与 Dehaene 的测试相反，2-AFC 几乎没有为基于多个示例的泛化的认知模型留下空间。我们基于对称的模型在 2-AFC 测试中达到了与人类平均水平相当的精度，并且似乎捕捉到了直观几何的重要部分。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨对称性在直观几何中的作用，构建基于对称性的认知模型以解决2-选择强制选择（2-AFC）几何测试任务。
AI.motivation: 几何模式识别是人类智能的重要部分，但现有模型在2-AFC测试中难以通过多示例泛化实现有效认知建模，需探索对称性等核心机制。
AI.method: 开发基于对称性的认知模型，专门针对2-AFC版本的几何测试，通过分析对称性特征模拟人类几何直觉。
AI.result: 该模型在2-AFC测试中达到人类平均水平的准确率，验证了对称性在直观几何中的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 对称性可作为直观几何的核心表征，基于对称性的认知模型能有效模拟人类在受限条件下的几何判断能力。

authors_text: Zhan Xu,Matthew Fisher,Yang Zhou,Deepali Aneja,Rushikesh Dudhat,Li Yi,Evangelos Kalogerakis
title: APES: Articulated Part Extraction from Sprite Sheets
title_zh: APES：从 Sprite 表中提取铰接零件
abstract: Rigged puppets are one of the most prevalent representations to create 2D character animations. Creating these puppets requires partitioning characters into independently moving parts. In this work, we present a method to automatically identify such articulated parts from a small set of character poses shown in a sprite sheet, which is an illustration of the character that artists often draw before puppet creation. Our method is trained to infer articulated parts, e.g. head, torso and limbs, that can be re-assembled to best reconstruct the given poses. Our results demonstrate significantly better performance than alternatives qualitatively and quantitatively.Our project page https://zhan-xu.github.io/parts/ includes our code and data.
summary: Rigged puppets are one of the most prevalent representations to create 2D character animations. Creating these puppets requires partitioning characters into independently moving parts. In this work, we present a method to automatically identify such articulated parts from a small set of character poses shown in a sprite sheet, which is an illustration of the character that artists often draw before puppet creation. Our method is trained to infer articulated parts, e.g. head, torso and limbs, that can be re-assembled to best reconstruct the given poses. Our results demonstrate significantly better performance than alternatives qualitatively and quantitatively.Our project page https://zhan-xu.github.io/parts/ includes our code and data.
abstract_zh: 装备木偶是创建 2D 角色动画最流行的表现形式之一。创建这些木偶需要将角色划分为独立移动的部分。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种方法，可以从精灵表中显示的一小组角色姿势中自动识别此类铰接部件，这是艺术家在木偶创作之前经常绘制的角色插图。我们的方法经过训练可以推断铰接零件，例如头部、躯干和四肢，可以重新组装以最好地重建给定的姿势。我们的结果在质量和数量上都显示出比替代品明显更好的性能。我们的项目页面 https://zhan-xu.github.io/parts/ 包含我们的代码和数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从精灵图中自动提取2D角色动画关节部件的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统2D角色动画制作需手动分割角色为独立运动部件，耗时且依赖人工经验，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 训练模型从少量精灵图姿态中推断可重构角色姿态的关节部件（如头部、躯干、四肢）。
AI.result: 在定性和定量评估中均显著优于现有方法，项目页面提供代码和数据。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了从精灵图自动提取关节部件，为动画制作提供高效工具。

In this work, we present a method to automatically identify such articulated parts from a small set of character poses shown in a sprite sheet, which is an illustration of the character that artists often draw before puppet creation. Our method is trained to infer articulated parts, e.g. head, torso and limbs, that can be re-assembled to best reconstruct the given poses. Our results demonstrate significantly better performance than alternatives qualitatively and quantitatively.Our project page https://zhan-xu.github.io/parts/ includes our code and data. 装备木偶是创建 2D 角色动画最流行的表现形式之一。创建这些木偶需要将角色划分为独立移动的部分。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种方法，可以从精灵表中显示的一小组角色姿势中自动识别此类铰接部件，这是艺术家在木偶创作之前经常绘制的角色插图。我们的方法经过训练可以推断铰接零件，例如头部、躯干和四肢，可以重新组装以最好地重建给定的姿势。我们的结果在质量和数量上都显示出比替代品明显更好的性能。我们的项目页面 https://zhan-xu.github.io/parts/ 包含我们的代码和数据。 本文提出一种从精灵图中自动提取2D角色动画关节部件的方法。 Zhan Xu,Matthew Fisher,Yang Zhou,Deepali Aneja,Rushikesh Dudhat,Li Yi,Evangelos Kalogerakis cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Ronan Perry,Julius von Kügelgen,Bernhard Schölkopf
title: Causal Discovery in Heterogeneous Environments Under the Sparse Mechanism Shift Hypothesis
title_zh: 稀疏机制转移假说下异构环境中的因果发现
comment: NeurIPS 2022 camera-ready version. JvK and BS are shared last authors. 10 pages + Bibliography + Appendix (26 pages total)
comments: NeurIPS 2022 camera-ready version. JvK and BS are shared last authors. 10 pages + Bibliography + Appendix (26 pages total)
abstract: Machine learning approaches commonly rely on the assumption of independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.) data. In reality, however, this assumption is almost always violated due to distribution shifts between environments. Although valuable learning signals can be provided by heterogeneous data from changing distributions, it is also known that learning under arbitrary (adversarial) changes is impossible. Causality provides a useful framework for modeling distribution shifts, since causal models encode both observational and interventional distributions. In this work, we explore the sparse mechanism shift hypothesis, which posits that distribution shifts occur due to a small number of changing causal conditionals. Motivated by this idea, we apply it to learning causal structure from heterogeneous environments, where i.i.d. data only allows for learning an equivalence class of graphs without restrictive assumptions. We propose the Mechanism Shift Score (MSS), a score-based approach amenable to various empirical estimators, which provably identifies the entire causal structure with high probability if the sparse mechanism shift hypothesis holds. Empirically, we verify behavior predicted by the theory and compare multiple estimators and score functions to identify the best approaches in practice. Compared to other methods, we show how MSS bridges a gap by both being nonparametric as well as explicitly leveraging sparse changes.

In reality, however, this assumption is almost always violated due to distribution shifts between environments. Although valuable learning signals can be provided by heterogeneous data from changing distributions, it is also known that learning under arbitrary (adversarial) changes is impossible. Causality provides a useful framework for modeling distribution shifts, since causal models encode both observational and interventional distributions. In this work, we explore the sparse mechanism shift hypothesis, which posits that distribution shifts occur due to a small number of changing causal conditionals. Motivated by this idea, we apply it to learning causal structure from heterogeneous environments, where i.i.d. data only allows for learning an equivalence class of graphs without restrictive assumptions. We propose the Mechanism Shift Score (MSS), a score-based approach amenable to various empirical estimators, which provably identifies the entire causal structure with high probability if the sparse mechanism shift hypothesis holds. Empirically, we verify behavior predicted by the theory and compare multiple estimators and score functions to identify the best approaches in practice. Compared to other methods, we show how MSS bridges a gap by both being nonparametric as well as explicitly leveraging sparse changes.
abstract_zh: 机器学习方法通​​常依赖于独立同分布（i.i.d.）数据的假设。然而，实际上，由于环境之间的分布变化，这一假设几乎总是被违反。尽管来自变化分布的异构数据可以提供有价值的学习信号，但众所周知，在任意（对抗性）变化下学习是不可能的。因果关系为分布变化建模提供了一个有用的框架，因为因果模型同时编码观察分布和干预分布。在这项工作中，我们探索了稀疏机制转移假说，该假说假设分布转移是由于少量变化的因果条件而发生的。受这个想法的启发，我们将其应用于从异构环境中学习因果结构，其中独立同分布。数据仅允许学习图的等价类，而无需限制性假设。我们提出了机制转移评分（MSS），这是一种基于评分的方法，适用于各种经验估计量，如果稀疏机制转移假设成立，它可以以高概率证明整个因果结构。根据经验，我们验证理论预测的行为，并比较多个估计器和评分函数，以确定实践中的最佳方法。与其他方法相比，我们展示了 MSS 如何通过非参数以及明确利用稀疏变化来弥补差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于稀疏机制转移假设的因果结构学习方法，用于处理异质环境下的分布偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习依赖i.i.d.假设，但实际数据存在分布偏移。因果模型能处理分布变化，但现有方法难以有效利用稀疏机制变化特性。
AI.method: 提出Mechanism Shift Score（MSS）评分方法，通过稀疏机制转移假设识别因果结构，适用于多种经验估计器。
AI.result: 理论证明MSS在稀疏机制转移假设下可高概率识别完整因果结构，实验证明其在非参数方法中表现最优。
AI.conclusion: MSS通过结合非参数性与稀疏机制变化利用，有效填补了因果发现领域的研究空白。

authors_text: Sachin Mehta,Farzad Abdolhosseini,Mohammad Rastegari
title: CVNets: High Performance Library for Computer Vision
title_zh: CVNets：计算机视觉的高性能库
abstract: We introduce CVNets, a high-performance open-source library for training deep neural networks for visual recognition tasks, including classification, detection, and segmentation. CVNets supports image and video understanding tools, including data loading, data transformations, novel data sampling methods, and implementations of several standard networks with similar or better performance than previous studies. Our source code is available at: \url{https://github.com/apple/ml-cvnets}.
summary: We introduce CVNets, a high-performance open-source library for training deep neural networks for visual recognition tasks, including classification, detection, and segmentation. CVNets supports image and video understanding tools, including data loading, data transformations, novel data sampling methods, and implementations of several standard networks with similar or better performance than previous studies. Our source code is available at: \url{https://github.com/apple/ml-cvnets}.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍 CVNets，这是一个高性能开源库，用于训练深度神经网络以执行视觉识别任务，包括分类、检测和分割。 CVNets 支持图像和视频理解工具，包括数据加载、数据转换、新颖的数据采样方法以及与以前的研究具有相似或更好性能的几个标准网络的实现。我们的源代码位于：\url{https://github.com/apple/ml-cvnets}。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了CVNets，一个用于视觉识别任务的高性能开源深度学习库，支持分类、检测和分割等任务。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉任务工具在性能或灵活性上存在不足，需开发统一高效且支持多种任务的深度学习库以提升研究效率。
AI.method: 实现包含数据加载、变换、新型采样方法及多种标准网络结构，通过优化算法和工程实现提升性能。
AI.result: CVNets在多个基准任务中达到或超越现有方法性能，提供完整的工具链和开源代码加速视觉研究落地。
AI.conclusion: CVNets为计算机视觉领域提供了高效可靠的工具库，推动了深度学习模型的研究与实际应用。

authors_text: Yingbin Bai,Erkun Yang,Zhaoqing Wang,Yuxuan Du,Bo Han,Cheng Deng,Dadong Wang,Tongliang Liu
title: MSR: Making Self-supervised learning Robust to Aggressive Augmentations
title_zh: MSR：使自我监督学习对积极的增强具有鲁棒性
abstract: Most recent self-supervised learning methods learn visual representation by contrasting different augmented views of images. Compared with supervised learning, more aggressive augmentations have been introduced to further improve the diversity of training pairs. However, aggressive augmentations may distort images' structures leading to a severe semantic shift problem that augmented views of the same image may not share the same semantics, thus degrading the transfer performance. To address this problem, we propose a new SSL paradigm, which counteracts the impact of semantic shift by balancing the role of weak and aggressively augmented pairs. Specifically, semantically inconsistent pairs are of minority and we treat them as noisy pairs. Note that deep neural networks (DNNs) have a crucial memorization effect that DNNs tend to first memorize clean (majority) examples before overfitting to noisy (minority) examples. Therefore, we set a relatively large weight for aggressively augmented data pairs at the early learning stage. With the training going on, the model begins to overfit noisy pairs. Accordingly, we gradually reduce the weights of aggressively augmented pairs. In doing so, our method can better embrace the aggressive augmentations and neutralize the semantic shift problem. Experiments show that our model achieves 73.1% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K with ResNet-50 for 200 epochs, which is a 2.5% improvement over BYOL. Moreover, experiments also demonstrate that the learned representations can transfer well for various downstream tasks.
summary: Most recent self-supervised learning methods learn visual representation by contrasting different augmented views of images. Compared with supervised learning, more aggressive augmentations have been introduced to further improve the diversity of training pairs. However, aggressive augmentations may distort images' structures leading to a severe semantic shift problem that augmented views of the same image may not share the same semantics, thus degrading the transfer performance. To address this problem, we propose a new SSL paradigm, which counteracts the impact of semantic shift by balancing the role of weak and aggressively augmented pairs. Specifically, semantically inconsistent pairs are of minority and we treat them as noisy pairs. Note that deep neural networks (DNNs) have a crucial memorization effect that DNNs tend to first memorize clean (majority) examples before overfitting to noisy (minority) examples. Therefore, we set a relatively large weight for aggressively augmented data pairs at the early learning stage. With the training going on, the model begins to overfit noisy pairs. Accordingly, we gradually reduce the weights of aggressively augmented pairs. In doing so, our method can better embrace the aggressive augmentations and neutralize the semantic shift problem. Experiments show that our model achieves 73.1% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K with ResNet-50 for 200 epochs, which is a 2.5% improvement over BYOL. Moreover, experiments also demonstrate that the learned representations can transfer well for various downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 最近的自我监督学习方法通​​过对比不同的图像增强视图来学习视觉表示。与监督学习相比，引入了更积极的增强，以进一步提高训练对的多样性。然而，积极的增强可能会扭曲图像的结构，导致严重的语义转移问题，即同一图像的增强视图可能不共享相同的语义，从而降低传输性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的 SSL 范式，它通过平衡弱增强对和积极增强对的作用来抵消语义转换的影响。具体来说，语义不一致的对是少数，我们将它们视为噪声对。请注意，深度神经网络 (DNN) 具有至关重要的记忆效果，DNN 倾向于首先记住干净的（大多数）示例，然后再过度拟合噪声（少数）示例。因此，我们在早期学习阶段为积极增强的数据对设置了相对较大的权重。随着训练的进行，模型开始过度拟合噪声对。因此，我们逐渐减少积极增强的对的权重。这样做，我们的方法可以更好地接受积极的增强并消除语义转移问题。实验表明，我们的模型在使用 ResNet-50 的 ImageNet-1K 上经过 200 个 epoch 实现了 73.1% 的 top-1 准确率，比 BYOL 提高了 2.5%。此外，实验还表明，学习到的表示可以很好地迁移到各种下游任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的自监督学习框架MSR，通过平衡弱增强和强增强对的语义差异，提升模型在对抗性增强下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法使用强增强策略导致语义偏移问题，即增强后的图像对语义不一致，从而影响模型迁移性能。
AI.method: 通过区分语义一致与不一致的增强对，将少数语义不一致对视为噪声。利用神经网络记忆效应，在训练初期赋予强增强对较高权重，后期逐步降低以抑制噪声干扰。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K数据集上，使用ResNet-50训练200轮后达到73.1%的top-1准确率，较BYOL方法提升2.5%。
AI.conclusion: MSR方法有效缓解了强增强导致的语义偏移问题，提升了自监督学习的表示能力和下游任务迁移效果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种新的自监督学习框架MSR，通过平衡弱增强和强增强对的语义差异，提升模型在对抗性增强下的鲁棒性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法使用强增强策略导致语义偏移问题，即增强后的图像对语义不一致，从而影响模型迁移性能。
ai_content.method: 通过区分语义一致与不一致的增强对，将少数语义不一致对视为噪声。利用神经网络记忆效应，在训练初期赋予强增强对较高权重，后期逐步降低以抑制噪声干扰。
ai_content.result: 在ImageNet-1K数据集上，使用ResNet-50训练200轮后达到73.1%的top-1准确率，较BYOL方法提升2.5%。
ai_content.conclusion: MSR方法有效缓解了强增强导致的语义偏移问题，提升了自监督学习的表示能力和下游任务迁移效果。

search_text: MSR: Making Self-supervised learning Robust to Aggressive Augmentations MSR：使自我监督学习对积极的增强具有鲁棒性 Most recent self-supervised learning methods learn visual representation by contrasting different augmented views of images. Compared with supervised learning, more aggressive augmentations have been introduced to further improve the diversity of training pairs. However, aggressive augmentations may distort images' structures leading to a severe semantic shift problem that augmented views of the same image may not share the same semantics, thus degrading the transfer performance. To address this problem, we propose a new SSL paradigm, which counteracts the impact of semantic shift by balancing the role of weak and aggressively augmented pairs. Specifically, semantically inconsistent pairs are of minority and we treat them as noisy pairs. Note that deep neural networks (DNNs) have a crucial memorization effect that DNNs tend to first memorize clean (majority) examples before overfitting to noisy (minority) examples. Therefore, we set a relatively large weight for aggressively augmented data pairs at the early learning stage. With the training going on, the model begins to overfit noisy pairs. Accordingly, we gradually reduce the weights of aggressively augmented pairs. In doing so, our method can better embrace the aggressive augmentations and neutralize the semantic shift problem. Experiments show that our model achieves 73.1% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet-1K with ResNet-50 for 200 epochs, which is a 2.5% improvement over BYOL. Moreover, experiments also demonstrate that the learned representations can transfer well for various downstream tasks. 最近的自我监督学习方法通​​过对比不同的图像增强视图来学习视觉表示。与监督学习相比，引入了更积极的增强，以进一步提高训练对的多样性。然而，积极的增强可能会扭曲图像的结构，导致严重的语义转移问题，即同一图像的增强视图可能不共享相同的语义，从而降低传输性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的 SSL 范式，它通过平衡弱增强对和积极增强对的作用来抵消语义转换的影响。具体来说，语义不一致的对是少数，我们将它们视为噪声对。请注意，深度神经网络 (DNN) 具有至关重要的记忆效果，DNN 倾向于首先记住干净的（大多数）示例，然后再过度拟合噪声（少数）示例。因此，我们在早期学习阶段为积极增强的数据对设置了相对较大的权重。随着训练的进行，模型开始过度拟合噪声对。因此，我们逐渐减少积极增强的对的权重。这样做，我们的方法可以更好地接受积极的增强并消除语义转移问题。实验表明，我们的模型在使用 ResNet-50 的 ImageNet-1K 上经过 200 个 epoch 实现了 73.1% 的 top-1 准确率，比 BYOL 提高了 2.5%。此外，实验还表明，学习到的表示可以很好地迁移到各种下游任务。 本文提出一种新的自监督学习框架MSR，通过平衡弱增强和强增强对的语义差异，提升模型在对抗性增强下的鲁棒性。 Yingbin Bai,Erkun Yang,Zhaoqing Wang,Yuxuan Du,Bo Han,Cheng Deng,Dadong Wang,Tongliang Liu cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ruiqing Yan,Fan Zhang,Mengyuan Huang,Wu Liu,Dongyu Hu,Jinfeng Li,Qiang Liu,Jinrong Jiang,Qianjin Guo,Linghan Zheng
title: CAINNFlow: Convolutional block Attention modules and Invertible Neural Networks Flow for anomaly detection and localization tasks
title_zh: CAINNFlow：用于异常检测和定位任务的卷积块注意力模块和可逆神经网络流
abstract: Detection of object anomalies is crucial in industrial processes, but unsupervised anomaly detection and localization is particularly important due to the difficulty of obtaining a large number of defective samples and the unpredictable types of anomalies in real life. Among the existing unsupervised anomaly detection and localization methods, the NF-based scheme has achieved better results. However, the two subnets (complex functions) $s_{i}(u_{i})$ and $t_{i}(u_{i})$ in NF are usually multilayer perceptrons, which need to squeeze the input visual features from 2D flattening to 1D, destroying the spatial location relationship in the feature map and losing the spatial structure information. In order to retain and effectively extract spatial structure information, we design in this study a complex function model with alternating CBAM embedded in a stacked $3\times3$ full convolution, which is able to retain and effectively extract spatial structure information in the normalized flow model. Extensive experimental results on the MVTec AD dataset show that CAINNFlow achieves advanced levels of accuracy and inference efficiency based on CNN and Transformer backbone networks as feature extractors, and CAINNFlow achieves a pixel-level AUC of $98.64\%$ for anomaly detection in MVTec AD.
summary: Detection of object anomalies is crucial in industrial processes, but unsupervised anomaly detection and localization is particularly important due to the difficulty of obtaining a large number of defective samples and the unpredictable types of anomalies in real life. Among the existing unsupervised anomaly detection and localization methods, the NF-based scheme has achieved better results. However, the two subnets (complex functions) $s_{i}(u_{i})$ and $t_{i}(u_{i})$ in NF are usually multilayer perceptrons, which need to squeeze the input visual features from 2D flattening to 1D, destroying the spatial location relationship in the feature map and losing the spatial structure information. In order to retain and effectively extract spatial structure information, we design in this study a complex function model with alternating CBAM embedded in a stacked $3\times3$ full convolution, which is able to retain and effectively extract spatial structure information in the normalized flow model. Extensive experimental results on the MVTec AD dataset show that CAINNFlow achieves advanced levels of accuracy and inference efficiency based on CNN and Transformer backbone networks as feature extractors, and CAINNFlow achieves a pixel-level AUC of $98.64\%$ for anomaly detection in MVTec AD.
abstract_zh: 物体异常检测在工业过程中至关重要，但由于难以获得大量缺陷样本以及现实生活中异常类型的不可预测性，无监督异常检测和定位尤为重要。在现有的无监督异常检测和定位方法中，基于NF的方案取得了更好的效果。然而，NF中的两个子网（复函数）$s_{i}(u_{i})$和$t_{i}(u_{i})$通常是多层感知器，需要将输入视觉特征从2D扁平化挤压到1D，破坏了特征图中的空间位置关系，丢失了空间结构信息。为了保留并有效提取空间结构信息，我们在本研究中设计了一种在堆叠$3\times3$全卷积中嵌入交替CBAM的复杂函数模型，该模型能够保留并有效提取归一化流模型中的空间结构信息。 MVTec AD 数据集上的大量实验结果表明，CAINNFlow 基于 CNN 和 Transformer 主干网络作为特征提取器实现了先进水平的准确性和推理效率，并且 CAINNFlow 在 MVTec AD 中的异常检测方面实现了 98.64\%$ 的像素级 AUC。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CAINNFlow方法，结合卷积块注意力模块（CBAM）与可逆神经网络流（NF），用于工业场景中的无监督异常检测与定位任务。
AI.motivation: 现有基于NF的异常检测方法因使用多层感知机处理特征时需将2D特征压缩为1D，导致空间结构信息丢失，影响检测精度。
AI.method: 设计包含交替CBAM的堆叠3×3全卷积复杂函数模块，替代传统MLP结构，在归一化流模型中保留并有效提取空间结构信息。
AI.result: 在MVTec AD数据集上，基于CNN和Transformer的特征提取器实现98.64%像素级AUC，达到先进准确率与推理效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过空间结构信息保留机制，CAINNFlow在无监督异常检测任务中显著优于现有方法，为工业缺陷检测提供新思路。

authors_text: Mingjie Li,Wenjia Cai,Karin Verspoor,Shirui Pan,Xiaodan Liang,Xiaojun Chang
title: Cross-modal Clinical Graph Transformer for Ophthalmic Report Generation
title_zh: 用于生成眼科报告的跨模式临床图形转换器
abstract: Automatic generation of ophthalmic reports using data-driven neural networks has great potential in clinical practice. When writing a report, ophthalmologists make inferences with prior clinical knowledge. This knowledge has been neglected in prior medical report generation methods. To endow models with the capability of incorporating expert knowledge, we propose a Cross-modal clinical Graph Transformer (CGT) for ophthalmic report generation (ORG), in which clinical relation triples are injected into the visual features as prior knowledge to drive the decoding procedure. However, two major common Knowledge Noise (KN) issues may affect models' effectiveness. 1) Existing general biomedical knowledge bases such as the UMLS may not align meaningfully to the specific context and language of the report, limiting their utility for knowledge injection. 2) Incorporating too much knowledge may divert the visual features from their correct meaning. To overcome these limitations, we design an automatic information extraction scheme based on natural language processing to obtain clinical entities and relations directly from in-domain training reports. Given a set of ophthalmic images, our CGT first restores a sub-graph from the clinical graph and injects the restored triples into visual features. Then visible matrix is employed during the encoding procedure to limit the impact of knowledge. Finally, reports are predicted by the encoded cross-modal features via a Transformer decoder. Extensive experiments on the large-scale FFA-IR benchmark demonstrate that the proposed CGT is able to outperform previous benchmark methods and achieve state-of-the-art performances.
summary: Automatic generation of ophthalmic reports using data-driven neural networks has great potential in clinical practice. When writing a report, ophthalmologists make inferences with prior clinical knowledge. This knowledge has been neglected in prior medical report generation methods. To endow models with the capability of incorporating expert knowledge, we propose a Cross-modal clinical Graph Transformer (CGT) for ophthalmic report generation (ORG), in which clinical relation triples are injected into the visual features as prior knowledge to drive the decoding procedure. However, two major common Knowledge Noise (KN) issues may affect models' effectiveness. 1) Existing general biomedical knowledge bases such as the UMLS may not align meaningfully to the specific context and language of the report, limiting their utility for knowledge injection. 2) Incorporating too much knowledge may divert the visual features from their correct meaning. To overcome these limitations, we design an automatic information extraction scheme based on natural language processing to obtain clinical entities and relations directly from in-domain training reports. Given a set of ophthalmic images, our CGT first restores a sub-graph from the clinical graph and injects the restored triples into visual features. Then visible matrix is employed during the encoding procedure to limit the impact of knowledge. Finally, reports are predicted by the encoded cross-modal features via a Transformer decoder. Extensive experiments on the large-scale FFA-IR benchmark demonstrate that the proposed CGT is able to outperform previous benchmark methods and achieve state-of-the-art performances.
abstract_zh: 使用数据驱动的神经网络自动生成眼科报告在临床实践中具有巨大的潜力。在撰写报告时，眼科医生会根据先前的临床知识进行推断。在先前的医疗报告生成方法中，这一知识被忽略了。为了赋予模型整合专家知识的能力，我们提出了一种用于眼科报告生成（ORG）的跨模态临床图转换器（CGT），其中临床关系三元组作为先验知识注入到视觉特征中以驱动解码过程。然而，两个主要的常见知识噪声（KN）问题可能会影响模型的有效性。 1) 现有的通用生物医学知识库（例如 UMLS）可能与报告的特定背景和语言没有有意义的一致，从而限制了它们在知识注入方面的效用。 2) 融入过多的知识可能会偏离视觉特征的正确含义。为了克服这些限制，我们设计了一种基于自然语言处理的自动信息提取方案，以直接从域内培训报告中获取临床实体和关系。给定一组眼科图像，我们的 CGT 首先从临床图中恢复子图，并将恢复的三元组注入视觉特征。然后在编码过程中采用可见矩阵来限制知识的影响。最后，通过 Transformer 解码器通过编码的跨模态特征来预测报告。对大规模 FFA-IR 基准的大量实验表明，所提出的 CGT 能够超越以前的基准方法并实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨模态临床图Transformer（CGT），用于生成眼科报告，通过整合临床知识提升生成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有眼科报告生成方法未有效利用临床专家知识，导致生成质量受限，需解决知识注入中的噪声问题。
AI.method: 设计自动信息提取方案从训练报告中获取临床实体和关系，构建子图并注入视觉特征，利用可见矩阵控制知识影响，通过Transformer解码生成报告。
AI.result: 在FFA-IR基准测试中，CGT优于现有方法，达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: CGT通过有效整合临床知识并缓解噪声问题，显著提升了眼科报告生成的性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨模态临床图Transformer（CGT），用于生成眼科报告，通过整合临床知识提升生成效果。

motivation: 现有眼科报告生成方法未有效利用临床专家知识，导致生成质量受限，需解决知识注入中的噪声问题。

search_text: Cross-modal Clinical Graph Transformer for Ophthalmic Report Generation 用于生成眼科报告的跨模式临床图形转换器 Automatic generation of ophthalmic reports using data-driven neural networks has great potential in clinical practice. When writing a report, ophthalmologists make inferences with prior clinical knowledge. This knowledge has been neglected in prior medical report generation methods. To endow models with the capability of incorporating expert knowledge, we propose a Cross-modal clinical Graph Transformer (CGT) for ophthalmic report generation (ORG), in which clinical relation triples are injected into the visual features as prior knowledge to drive the decoding procedure. However, two major common Knowledge Noise (KN) issues may affect models' effectiveness. 1) Existing general biomedical knowledge bases such as the UMLS may not align meaningfully to the specific context and language of the report, limiting their utility for knowledge injection. 2) Incorporating too much knowledge may divert the visual features from their correct meaning. To overcome these limitations, we design an automatic information extraction scheme based on natural language processing to obtain clinical entities and relations directly from in-domain training reports. Given a set of ophthalmic images, our CGT first restores a sub-graph from the clinical graph and injects the restored triples into visual features. Then visible matrix is employed during the encoding procedure to limit the impact of knowledge. Finally, reports are predicted by the encoded cross-modal features via a Transformer decoder. Extensive experiments on the large-scale FFA-IR benchmark demonstrate that the proposed CGT is able to outperform previous benchmark methods and achieve state-of-the-art performances. 使用数据驱动的神经网络自动生成眼科报告在临床实践中具有巨大的潜力。在撰写报告时，眼科医生会根据先前的临床知识进行推断。在先前的医疗报告生成方法中，这一知识被忽略了。为了赋予模型整合专家知识的能力，我们提出了一种用于眼科报告生成（ORG）的跨模态临床图转换器（CGT），其中临床关系三元组作为先验知识注入到视觉特征中以驱动解码过程。然而，两个主要的常见知识噪声（KN）问题可能会影响模型的有效性。 1) 现有的通用生物医学知识库（例如 UMLS）可能与报告的特定背景和语言没有有意义的一致，从而限制了它们在知识注入方面的效用。 2) 融入过多的知识可能会偏离视觉特征的正确含义。为了克服这些限制，我们设计了一种基于自然语言处理的自动信息提取方案，以直接从域内培训报告中获取临床实体和关系。给定一组眼科图像，我们的 CGT 首先从临床图中恢复子图，并将恢复的三元组注入视觉特征。然后在编码过程中采用可见矩阵来限制知识的影响。最后，通过 Transformer 解码器通过编码的跨模态特征来预测报告。对大规模 FFA-IR 基准的大量实验表明，所提出的 CGT 能够超越以前的基准方法并实现最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种跨模态临床图Transformer（CGT），用于生成眼科报告，通过整合临床知识提升生成效果。 Mingjie Li,Wenjia Cai,Karin Verspoor,Shirui Pan,Xiaodan Liang,Xiaojun Chang cs.CV

authors_text: Shuhuai Ren,Lei Li,Xuancheng Ren,Guangxiang Zhao,Xu Sun
title: Delving into the Openness of CLIP
title_zh: 深入探讨 CLIP 的开放性
comment: Accepted by Findings of ACL 2023 (Long Paper). Code is available at https://github.com/lancopku/clip-openness
comments: Accepted by Findings of ACL 2023 (Long Paper). Code is available at https://github.com/lancopku/clip-openness
abstract: Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) formulates image classification as an image-to-text matching task, i.e., matching images to the corresponding natural language descriptions instead of discrete category IDs. This allows for open-vocabulary visual recognition, where the model can recognize images from an open class set (also known as an open vocabulary) in a zero-shot manner. However, evaluating the openness of CLIP-like models is challenging, as the models are open to arbitrary vocabulary in theory, but their accuracy varies in practice. To address this, we resort to an incremental perspective to assess the openness through vocabulary expansions, and define extensibility to measure a model's ability to handle novel classes. Our evaluation shows that CLIP-like models are not truly open, and their performance deteriorates as the vocabulary expands. We further dissect the feature space of CLIP from the perspectives of representation alignment and uniformity. Our investigation reveals that the overestimation of openness is due to confusion among competing text features, rather than a failure to capture the similarity between image features and text features of novel classes. We hope that our investigation and analysis will facilitate future research on the CLIP openness issue.
summary: Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) formulates image classification as an image-to-text matching task, i.e., matching images to the corresponding natural language descriptions instead of discrete category IDs. This allows for open-vocabulary visual recognition, where the model can recognize images from an open class set (also known as an open vocabulary) in a zero-shot manner. However, evaluating the openness of CLIP-like models is challenging, as the models are open to arbitrary vocabulary in theory, but their accuracy varies in practice. To address this, we resort to an incremental perspective to assess the openness through vocabulary expansions, and define extensibility to measure a model's ability to handle novel classes. Our evaluation shows that CLIP-like models are not truly open, and their performance deteriorates as the vocabulary expands. We further dissect the feature space of CLIP from the perspectives of representation alignment and uniformity. Our investigation reveals that the overestimation of openness is due to confusion among competing text features, rather than a failure to capture the similarity between image features and text features of novel classes. We hope that our investigation and analysis will facilitate future research on the CLIP openness issue.
abstract_zh: 对比语言-图像预训练（CLIP）将图像分类制定为图像到文本的匹配任务，即将图像与相应的自然语言描述而不是离散的类别 ID 进行匹配。这允许开放词汇视觉识别，其中模型可以以零样本的方式识别来自开放类集（也称为开放词汇）的图像。然而，评估类 CLIP 模型的开放性具有挑战性，因为这些模型在理论上对任意词汇开放，但在实践中其准确性有所不同。为了解决这个问题，我们采用增量视角来评估通过词汇扩展的开放性，并定义可扩展性来衡量模型处理新类的能力。我们的评估表明，类似 CLIP 的模型并不是真正开放的，它们的性能随着词汇量的扩大而恶化。我们从表示对齐和均匀性的角度进一步剖析 CLIP 的特征空间。我们的调查表明，对开放性的高估是由于相互竞争的文本特征之间的混淆，而不是未能捕获小说类的图像特征和文本特征之间的相似性。我们希望我们的调查和分析能够促进未来对 CLIP 开放性问题的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文通过词汇扩展评估CLIP类模型的开放性，揭示其性能随词汇量增加而下降的问题。
AI.motivation: CLIP等模型理论上支持任意词汇的开放识别，但实际性能存在差异，需量化评估其开放性。
AI.method: 采用增量词汇扩展方法，从表示对齐性和统一性角度分析CLIP的特征空间。
AI.result: CLIP类模型并非真正开放，扩展词汇后性能下降，主要因文本特征混淆而非图像-文本相似性不足。
AI.conclusion: 当前模型开放性存在局限，未来研究需关注文本特征区分度与开放性提升方法。

authors_text: D. Agiakatsikas,N. Foutris,A. Sari,V. Vlagkoulis,I. Souvatzoglou,M. Psarakis,M. Luján,M. Kastriotou,C. Cazzaniga
title: Evaluation of Xilinx Deep Learning Processing Unit under Neutron Irradiation
title_zh: Xilinx 深度学习处理单元在中子辐照下的评估
abstract: This paper studies the dependability of the Xilinx Deep-Learning Processing Unit (DPU) under neutron irradiation. It analyses the impact of Single Event Effects (SEEs) on the accuracy of the DPU running the resnet50 model on a Xilinx Ultrascale+ MPSoC.
summary: This paper studies the dependability of the Xilinx Deep-Learning Processing Unit (DPU) under neutron irradiation. It analyses the impact of Single Event Effects (SEEs) on the accuracy of the DPU running the resnet50 model on a Xilinx Ultrascale+ MPSoC.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了 Xilinx 深度学习处理单元 (DPU) 在中子辐照下的可靠性。它分析了单事件效应 (SEE) 对在 Xilinx Ultrascale+ MPSoC 上运行 resnet50 模型的 DPU 精度的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了Xilinx深度学习处理单元（DPU）在中子辐照下的可靠性，分析单粒子效应（SEEs）对运行ResNet50模型的DPU精度的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着深度学习加速器在关键领域的应用增加，需验证其在辐射环境（如航天或核设施）中的可靠性，确保单粒子效应不会导致模型精度显著下降。
AI.method: 通过中子辐照实验，测试Xilinx Ultrascale+ MPSoC上DPU运行ResNet50模型时的单粒子效应，分析辐照前后模型精度的变化及故障模式。
AI.result: 实验发现中子辐照导致DPU出现单粒子翻转等效应，ResNet50模型精度下降，具体误差率与辐照剂量及电路敏感区域相关。
AI.conclusion: Xilinx DPU在辐射环境下存在可靠性风险，需通过硬件冗余或算法校正等方法提升抗单粒子效应能力以保障关键任务系统安全。

authors: Caroline de Oliveira Costa Souza Rosa
authors_json: Caroline de Oliveira Costa Souza Rosa
authors_text: Caroline de Oliveira Costa Souza Rosa,Marcia Ito,Alex Borges Vieira,Antonio Tadeu Azevedo Gomes
title: Modelling and Mining of Patient Pathways: A Scoping Review
title_zh: 患者路径的建模和挖掘：范围界定审查
abstract: The sequence of visits and procedures performed by the patient in the health system, also known as the patient's pathway or trajectory, can reveal important information about the clinical treatment adopted and the health service provided. The rise of electronic health data availability made it possible to assess the pathways of a large number of patients. Nevertheless, some challenges also arose concerning how to synthesize these pathways and how to mine them from the data, fostering a new field of research. The objective of this review is to survey this new field of research, highlighting representation models, mining techniques, methods of analysis, and examples of case studies.
summary: The sequence of visits and procedures performed by the patient in the health system, also known as the patient's pathway or trajectory, can reveal important information about the clinical treatment adopted and the health service provided. The rise of electronic health data availability made it possible to assess the pathways of a large number of patients. Nevertheless, some challenges also arose concerning how to synthesize these pathways and how to mine them from the data, fostering a new field of research. The objective of this review is to survey this new field of research, highlighting representation models, mining techniques, methods of analysis, and examples of case studies.
abstract_zh: 患者在卫生系统中进行的就诊和程序的顺序（也称为患者的路径或轨迹）可以揭示有关所采用的临床治疗和所提供的卫生服务的重要信息。电子健康数据可用性的兴起使得评估大量患者的路径成为可能。然而，关于如何综合这些途径以及如何从数据中挖掘它们，也出现了一些挑战，从而培育了一个新的研究领域。本综述的目的是调查这一新的研究领域，重点介绍表示模型、挖掘技术、分析方法和案例研究示例。

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统综述方法，总结患者路径建模与挖掘领域的研究现状，涵盖表示模型、挖掘技术、分析方法及案例研究。
AI.motivation: 电子健康数据的普及使大规模分析患者路径成为可能，但如何有效合成与挖掘路径信息仍面临挑战，亟需系统梳理该领域研究进展。
AI.method: 采用系统综述方法，对现有文献中的患者路径表示模型、数据挖掘技术、分析方法及应用案例进行分类整理与总结。
AI.result: 归纳了主流的患者路径建模方法（如序列模型、图模型），挖掘技术（如聚类、异常检测），分析方法及典型应用场景，指出当前研究的局限性与未来方向。

search_text: Modelling and Mining of Patient Pathways: A Scoping Review 患者路径的建模和挖掘：范围界定审查 The sequence of visits and procedures performed by the patient in the health system, also known as the patient's pathway or trajectory, can reveal important information about the clinical treatment adopted and the health service provided. The rise of electronic health data availability made it possible to assess the pathways of a large number of patients. Nevertheless, some challenges also arose concerning how to synthesize these pathways and how to mine them from the data, fostering a new field of research. The objective of this review is to survey this new field of research, highlighting representation models, mining techniques, methods of analysis, and examples of case studies. 患者在卫生系统中进行的就诊和程序的顺序（也称为患者的路径或轨迹）可以揭示有关所采用的临床治疗和所提供的卫生服务的重要信息。电子健康数据可用性的兴起使得评估大量患者的路径成为可能。然而，关于如何综合这些途径以及如何从数据中挖掘它们，也出现了一些挑战，从而培育了一个新的研究领域。本综述的目的是调查这一新的研究领域，重点介绍表示模型、挖掘技术、分析方法和案例研究示例。 本文通过系统综述方法，总结患者路径建模与挖掘领域的研究现状，涵盖表示模型、挖掘技术、分析方法及案例研究。 Caroline de Oliveira Costa Souza Rosa,Marcia Ito,Alex Borges Vieira,Antonio Tadeu Azevedo Gomes cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.FL,cs.IR,cs.LG

authors_text: Rony Ginosar,Amit Zoran
title: Inbetween: Visual Selection in Parametric Design
title_zh: 中间：参数化设计中的视觉选择
abstract: The act of selection plays a leading role in the design process and in the definition of personal style. This work introduces visual selection catalogs into parametric design environments. A two-fold contribution is presented: (i) guidelines for construction of a minimal-bias visual selection catalog from a parametric space, and (ii) Inbetween, a catalog for a parametric typeface that adheres to the guidelines, allows for font selection from a continuous design space, and enables the investigation of personal style. A user study conducted among graphic designers, revealed self-coherent characteristics in selection patterns, and a high correlation in selection patterns within tasks. These findings suggest that such patterns reflect personal user styles, formalizing the style selection process as traversals of decision trees. Together, our guidelines and catalog aid in making visual selection a key building block in the digital creation process and validate selection processes as a measure of personal style.
summary: The act of selection plays a leading role in the design process and in the definition of personal style. This work introduces visual selection catalogs into parametric design environments. A two-fold contribution is presented: (i) guidelines for construction of a minimal-bias visual selection catalog from a parametric space, and (ii) Inbetween, a catalog for a parametric typeface that adheres to the guidelines, allows for font selection from a continuous design space, and enables the investigation of personal style. A user study conducted among graphic designers, revealed self-coherent characteristics in selection patterns, and a high correlation in selection patterns within tasks. These findings suggest that such patterns reflect personal user styles, formalizing the style selection process as traversals of decision trees. Together, our guidelines and catalog aid in making visual selection a key building block in the digital creation process and validate selection processes as a measure of personal style.
abstract_zh: 选择行为在设计过程和个人风格的定义中起着主导作用。这项工作将视觉选择目录引入参数化设计环境。提出了两方面的贡献：（i）从参数空间构建最小偏差视觉选择目录的指南，以及（ii）In Between，这是一个遵循指南的参数化字体目录，允许从连续的设计空间中选择字体，并能够调查个人风格。在图形设计师中进行的一项用户研究揭示了选择模式的自相干特征以及任务中选择模式的高度相关性。这些发现表明，此类模式反映了个人用户风格，将风格选择过程形式化为决策树的遍历。我们的指南和目录共同帮助视觉选择成为数字创作过程中的关键组成部分，并验证选择过程作为个人风格的衡量标准。

AI.tldr: 本文将视觉选择目录引入参数化设计环境，提出构建最小偏见目录的指南及参数化字体目录Inbetween，用于探索个人设计风格。
AI.motivation: 选择是设计过程的核心，但现有参数化设计缺乏系统化视觉选择方法，难以捕捉和量化个人风格特征。
AI.method: 通过构建最小偏见视觉选择目录指南，开发参数化字体目录Inbetween，并基于图形设计师用户研究分析选择模式与个人风格的关系。
AI.result: 用户研究显示选择模式具有自我一致性且任务内高度相关，验证了选择模式可反映个人风格并形式化为决策树遍历过程。
AI.conclusion: 所提指南与目录使视觉选择成为数字创作关键模块，为个人风格量化提供了有效测量方法。

authors_text: Jianing Bai,Tianhao Zhang,Guangming Xie
title: MACC: Cross-Layer Multi-Agent Congestion Control with Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: MACC：具有深度强化学习的跨层多代理拥塞控制
abstract: Congestion Control (CC), as the core networking task to efficiently utilize network capacity, received great attention and widely used in various Internet communication applications such as 5G, Internet-of-Things, UAN, and more. Various CC algorithms have been proposed both on network and transport layers such as Active Queue Management (AQM) algorithm and Transmission Control Protocol (TCP) congestion control mechanism. But it is hard to model dynamic AQM/TCP system and cooperate two algorithms to obtain excellent performance under different communication scenarios. In this paper, we explore the performance of multi-agent reinforcement learning-based cross-layer congestion control algorithms and present cooperation performance of two agents, known as MACC (Multi-agent Congestion Control). We implement MACC in NS3. The simulation results show that our scheme outperforms other congestion control combination in terms of throughput and delay, etc. Not only does it proves that networking protocols based on multi-agent deep reinforcement learning is efficient for communication managing, but also verifies that networking area can be used as new playground for machine learning algorithms.
summary: Congestion Control (CC), as the core networking task to efficiently utilize network capacity, received great attention and widely used in various Internet communication applications such as 5G, Internet-of-Things, UAN, and more. Various CC algorithms have been proposed both on network and transport layers such as Active Queue Management (AQM) algorithm and Transmission Control Protocol (TCP) congestion control mechanism. But it is hard to model dynamic AQM/TCP system and cooperate two algorithms to obtain excellent performance under different communication scenarios. In this paper, we explore the performance of multi-agent reinforcement learning-based cross-layer congestion control algorithms and present cooperation performance of two agents, known as MACC (Multi-agent Congestion Control). We implement MACC in NS3. The simulation results show that our scheme outperforms other congestion control combination in terms of throughput and delay, etc. Not only does it proves that networking protocols based on multi-agent deep reinforcement learning is efficient for communication managing, but also verifies that networking area can be used as new playground for machine learning algorithms.
abstract_zh: 拥塞控制（CC）作为高效利用网络容量的核心网络任务，受到高度关注并广泛应用于5G、物联网、UAN等各种互联网通信应用中。人们在网络层和传输层提出了各种CC算法，例如主动队列管理（AQM）算法和传输控制协议（TCP）拥塞控制机制。但很难对动态AQM/TCP系统进行建模并配合两种算法在不同通信场景下获得优异的性能。在本文中，我们探讨了基于多智能体强化学习的跨层拥塞控制算法的性能，并展示了两个智能体的合作性能，称为 MACC（多智能体拥塞控制）。我们在 NS3 中实现 MACC。仿真结果表明，我们的方案在吞吐量和延迟等方面优于其他拥塞控制组合。这不仅证明了基于多智能体深度强化学习的网络协议对于通信管理是有效的，而且验证了网络区域可以作为机器学习算法的新游乐场。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于多智能体深度强化学习的跨层拥塞控制算法MACC，以提升网络通信效率。
AI.motivation: 传统网络层（如AQM）与传输层（如TCP）算法难以动态建模且协作效果不佳，亟需新型智能协同方案。
AI.method: 设计多智能体强化学习框架MACC，通过NS3仿真实现跨层协同控制机制。
AI.result: 仿真表明MACC在吞吐量和延迟等指标上优于现有拥塞控制方案组合。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体深度强化学习为网络协议优化提供新思路，验证了机器学习在通信领域的应用潜力。

authors_text: B Rahimi,S Karimian,A Ghaznavi,M Jafari Heydarlou
title: Development and Evaluation of Dental Image Exchange and Management System: A User-Centered Perspective
title_zh: 牙科图像交换和管理系统的开发和评估：以用户为中心的视角
abstract: Introduction: Systems that exist in the hospital or clinic settings are capable of providing services in the physical environment. These systems (e.g., Picture Archiving and communication systems) provide remote service for patients. To design such systems, we need some unique methods such as software development life cycle and different methods such as prototyping. Clinical setting: This study designs an image exchange system in the private dental sector of Urmia city using user-centered methods and prototyping. Methods: Information was collected based on each stage's software development life cycle. Interviews and observations were used to gather user-needs data, such as object-oriented programming for developing a Prototype. Results: The users' needs were determined to consider at the beginning. Ease of use, security, and mobile apps were their most essential needs. Then, the prototype was designed and evaluated in the focus group session. These steps continued until users were satisfied in the focus group. Eventually, after the users' consent, the prototype became the final system. Discussion: Instant access to Information, volunteering, user interface design, and usefulness were the most critical variables users considered. The advantage of this system also includes less radiation to the patient due to not losing and missing the clips of the patient's images. Conclusion: The success of such a system requires the consideration of end-users needs and their application to the system. In addition to this system, having an electronic health record can improve the treatment process and improve the work of the medical staff.

These systems (e.g., Picture Archiving and communication systems) provide remote service for patients. To design such systems, we need some unique methods such as software development life cycle and different methods such as prototyping. Clinical setting: This study designs an image exchange system in the private dental sector of Urmia city using user-centered methods and prototyping. Methods: Information was collected based on each stage's software development life cycle. Interviews and observations were used to gather user-needs data, such as object-oriented programming for developing a Prototype. Results: The users' needs were determined to consider at the beginning. Ease of use, security, and mobile apps were their most essential needs. Then, the prototype was designed and evaluated in the focus group session. These steps continued until users were satisfied in the focus group. Conclusion: The success of such a system requires the consideration of end-users needs and their application to the system. In addition to this system, having an electronic health record can improve the treatment process and improve the work of the medical staff.
abstract_zh: 简介：医院或诊所环境中存在的系统能够在物理环境中提供服务。这些系统（例如图片存档和通信系统）为患者提供远程服务。为了设计这样的系统，我们需要一些独特的方法（例如软件开发生命周期）和不同的方法（例如原型设计）。临床环境：本研究采用以用户为中心的方法和原型设计，在乌尔米亚市的私人牙科部门设计了一个图像交换系统。方法：根据软件开发生命周期的每个阶段收集信息。通过访谈和观察来收集用户需求数据，例如用于开发原型的面向对象编程。结果：一开始就考虑确定了用户的需求。易用性、安全性和移动应用程序是他们最基本的需求。然后，在焦点小组会议上设计并评估了原型。这些步骤一直持续到用户对焦点小组感到满意为止。最终，经过用户的同意，原型成为了最终的系统。讨论：即时获取信息、志愿服务、用户界面设计和实用性是用户考虑的最关键变量。该系统的优点还包括由于不会丢失和丢失患者图像的剪辑，因此对患者的辐射更少。结论：此类系统的成功需要考虑最终用户的需求及其在系统中的应用。除了这个系统之外，拥有电子健康记录可以改善治疗过程并改善医务人员的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从用户为中心的角度开发和评估一个牙科图像交换与管理系统。
AI.motivation: 现有医院或诊所系统虽能提供远程服务，但未充分满足牙科私有领域的用户需求，需通过用户中心方法优化系统设计。
AI.method: 基于软件开发生命周期，通过访谈和观察收集用户需求，采用面向对象编程开发原型，并通过焦点小组迭代评估。
AI.result: 确定用户核心需求（易用性、安全性、移动应用），设计并通过用户反馈优化原型，最终系统减少患者辐射暴露风险。
AI.conclusion: 系统的成功依赖于用户需求的融入，结合电子健康记录可进一步提升诊疗效率与医疗人员工作质量。
