authors_text: Erez Posner,Adi Zholkover,Netanel Frank,Moshe Bouhnik
title: C$^3$Fusion: Consistent Contrastive Colon Fusion, Towards Deep SLAM in Colonoscopy
title_zh: C$^3$Fusion：一致的对比结肠融合，迈向结肠镜检查中的深度 SLAM
abstract: 3D colon reconstruction from Optical Colonoscopy (OC) to detect non-examined surfaces remains an unsolved problem. The challenges arise from the nature of optical colonoscopy data, characterized by highly reflective low-texture surfaces, drastic illumination changes and frequent tracking loss. Recent methods demonstrate compelling results, but suffer from: (1) frangible frame-to-frame (or frame-to-model) pose estimation resulting in many tracking failures; or (2) rely on point-based representations at the cost of scan quality. In this paper, we propose a novel reconstruction framework that addresses these issues end to end, which result in both quantitatively and qualitatively accurate and robust 3D colon reconstruction. Our SLAM approach, which employs correspondences based on contrastive deep features, and deep consistent depth maps, estimates globally optimized poses, is able to recover from frequent tracking failures, and estimates a global consistent 3D model; all within a single framework. We perform an extensive experimental evaluation on multiple synthetic and real colonoscopy videos, showing high-quality results and comparisons against relevant baselines.
summary: 3D colon reconstruction from Optical Colonoscopy (OC) to detect non-examined surfaces remains an unsolved problem. The challenges arise from the nature of optical colonoscopy data, characterized by highly reflective low-texture surfaces, drastic illumination changes and frequent tracking loss. Recent methods demonstrate compelling results, but suffer from: (1) frangible frame-to-frame (or frame-to-model) pose estimation resulting in many tracking failures; or (2) rely on point-based representations at the cost of scan quality. In this paper, we propose a novel reconstruction framework that addresses these issues end to end, which result in both quantitatively and qualitatively accurate and robust 3D colon reconstruction. Our SLAM approach, which employs correspondences based on contrastive deep features, and deep consistent depth maps, estimates globally optimized poses, is able to recover from frequent tracking failures, and estimates a global consistent 3D model; all within a single framework. We perform an extensive experimental evaluation on multiple synthetic and real colonoscopy videos, showing high-quality results and comparisons against relevant baselines.
abstract_zh: 通过光学结肠镜检查 (OC) 进行 3D 结肠重建以检测未检查的表面仍然是一个未解决的问题。这些挑战来自光学结肠镜检查数据的性质，其特点是高反射率的低纹理表面、剧烈的照明变化和频繁的跟踪丢失。最近的方法展示了引人注目的结果，但存在以下问题：（1）脆弱的帧到帧（或帧到模型）姿态估计导致许多跟踪失败； (2) 以牺牲扫描质量为代价依赖基于点的表示。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的重建框架，可以端到端地解决这些问题，从而实现定量和定性上准确且稳健的 3D 结肠重建。我们的 SLAM 方法采用基于对比深度特征的对应关系和深度一致的深度图，估计全局优化的姿势，能够从频繁的跟踪失败中恢复，并估计全局一致的 3D 模型；一切都在一个框架内。我们对多个合成和真实结肠镜检查视频进行了广泛的实验评估，显示了高质量的结果以及与相关基线的比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出C³Fusion框架，通过对比深度特征和一致深度图实现结肠镜检查中鲁棒的3D结肠重建。
AI.motivation: 光学结肠镜检查因低纹理表面、光照变化和跟踪丢失导致3D重建困难，现有方法存在跟踪失败或牺牲扫描质量的问题。
AI.method: 基于对比深度特征的对应关系和深度一致的深度图，结合SLAM技术进行全局位姿优化，实现端到端的3D重建。
AI.result: 在合成和真实结肠镜视频上均取得高质量重建结果，优于相关基线方法。
AI.conclusion: C³Fusion框架有效解决了结肠镜3D重建中的跟踪鲁棒性和模型一致性问题。

authors_text: Yuezihan Jiang,Hao Yang,Junyang Lin,Hanyu Zhao,An Yang,Chang Zhou,Hongxia Yang,Zhi Yang,Bin Cui
title: Instance-wise Prompt Tuning for Pretrained Language Models
title_zh: 针对预训练语言模型的实例级提示调整
abstract: Prompt Learning has recently gained great popularity in bridging the gap between pretraining tasks and various downstream tasks. It freezes Pretrained Language Models (PLMs) and only tunes a few task-related parameters (prompts) for downstream tasks, greatly reducing the cost of tuning giant models. The key enabler of this is the idea of querying PLMs with task-specific knowledge implicated in prompts. This paper reveals a major limitation of existing methods that the indiscriminate prompts for all input data in a task ignore the intrinsic knowledge from input data, resulting in sub-optimal performance. We introduce Instance-wise Prompt Tuning (IPT), the first prompt learning paradigm that injects knowledge from the input data instances to the prompts, thereby providing PLMs with richer and more concrete context information. We devise a series of strategies to produce instance-wise prompts, addressing various concerns like model quality and cost-efficiency. Across multiple tasks and resource settings, IPT significantly outperforms task-based prompt learning methods, and achieves comparable performance to conventional finetuning with only 0.5% - 1.5% of tuned parameters.
summary: Prompt Learning has recently gained great popularity in bridging the gap between pretraining tasks and various downstream tasks. It freezes Pretrained Language Models (PLMs) and only tunes a few task-related parameters (prompts) for downstream tasks, greatly reducing the cost of tuning giant models. The key enabler of this is the idea of querying PLMs with task-specific knowledge implicated in prompts. This paper reveals a major limitation of existing methods that the indiscriminate prompts for all input data in a task ignore the intrinsic knowledge from input data, resulting in sub-optimal performance. We introduce Instance-wise Prompt Tuning (IPT), the first prompt learning paradigm that injects knowledge from the input data instances to the prompts, thereby providing PLMs with richer and more concrete context information. We devise a series of strategies to produce instance-wise prompts, addressing various concerns like model quality and cost-efficiency. Across multiple tasks and resource settings, IPT significantly outperforms task-based prompt learning methods, and achieves comparable performance to conventional finetuning with only 0.5% - 1.5% of tuned parameters.
abstract_zh: 即时学习最近在弥合预训练任务和各种下游任务之间的差距方面广受欢迎。它冻结了预训练语言模型（PLM），只为下游任务调整一些与任务相关的参数（提示），大大降低了调整巨型模型的成本。实现这一点的关键因素是使用提示中涉及的特定于任务的知识来查询 PLM 的想法。本文揭示了现有方法的一个主要局限性，即对任务中所有输入数据的不加区别的提示忽略了输入数据的内在知识，导致性能次优。我们引入了实例明智的提示调整（IPT），这是第一个提示学习范例，它将输入数据实例中的知识注入到提示中，从而为 PLM 提供更丰富、更具体的上下文信息。我们设计了一系列策略来生成实例提示，解决模型质量和成本效率等各种问题。在多个任务和资源设置中，IPT 显着优于基于任务的提示学习方法，并且仅用 0.5% - 1.5% 的调整参数即可实现与传统微调相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出实例级提示调优（IPT）方法，通过注入输入数据知识提升预训练语言模型在下游任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有提示学习方法对所有输入使用统一提示，忽视了输入数据本身的内在知识，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 设计实例级提示生成策略，将输入数据知识注入提示中，优化模型上下文信息并控制参数成本。
AI.result: IPT在多任务和资源设置下显著优于任务级提示方法，仅需0.5%-1.5%参数量即可达到传统微调水平。
AI.conclusion: 实例级提示调优有效利用输入数据知识，为提示学习提供新范式，在效率与性能间取得平衡。

search_text: Instance-wise Prompt Tuning for Pretrained Language Models 针对预训练语言模型的实例级提示调整 Prompt Learning has recently gained great popularity in bridging the gap between pretraining tasks and various downstream tasks. It freezes Pretrained Language Models (PLMs) and only tunes a few task-related parameters (prompts) for downstream tasks, greatly reducing the cost of tuning giant models. The key enabler of this is the idea of querying PLMs with task-specific knowledge implicated in prompts. This paper reveals a major limitation of existing methods that the indiscriminate prompts for all input data in a task ignore the intrinsic knowledge from input data, resulting in sub-optimal performance. We introduce Instance-wise Prompt Tuning (IPT), the first prompt learning paradigm that injects knowledge from the input data instances to the prompts, thereby providing PLMs with richer and more concrete context information. We devise a series of strategies to produce instance-wise prompts, addressing various concerns like model quality and cost-efficiency. Across multiple tasks and resource settings, IPT significantly outperforms task-based prompt learning methods, and achieves comparable performance to conventional finetuning with only 0.5% - 1.5% of tuned parameters. 即时学习最近在弥合预训练任务和各种下游任务之间的差距方面广受欢迎。它冻结了预训练语言模型（PLM），只为下游任务调整一些与任务相关的参数（提示），大大降低了调整巨型模型的成本。实现这一点的关键因素是使用提示中涉及的特定于任务的知识来查询 PLM 的想法。本文揭示了现有方法的一个主要局限性，即对任务中所有输入数据的不加区别的提示忽略了输入数据的内在知识，导致性能次优。我们引入了实例明智的提示调整（IPT），这是第一个提示学习范例，它将输入数据实例中的知识注入到提示中，从而为 PLM 提供更丰富、更具体的上下文信息。我们设计了一系列策略来生成实例提示，解决模型质量和成本效率等各种问题。在多个任务和资源设置中，IPT 显着优于基于任务的提示学习方法，并且仅用 0.5% - 1.5% 的调整参数即可实现与传统微调相当的性能。 本文提出实例级提示调优（IPT）方法，通过注入输入数据知识提升预训练语言模型在下游任务中的性能。 Yuezihan Jiang,Hao Yang,Junyang Lin,Hanyu Zhao,An Yang,Chang Zhou,Hongxia Yang,Zhi Yang,Bin Cui cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Shivani Bathla,Vinita Vasudevan
title: MPE inference using an Incremental Build-Infer-Approximate Paradigm
title_zh: 使用增量构建推断近似范式的 MPE 推断
abstract: Exact inference of the most probable explanation (MPE) in Bayesian networks is known to be NP-complete. In this paper, we propose an algorithm for approximate MPE inference that is based on the incremental build-infer-approximate (IBIA) framework. We use this framework to obtain an ordered set of partitions of the Bayesian network and the corresponding max-calibrated clique trees. We show that the maximum belief in the last partition gives an estimate of the probability of the MPE assignment. We propose an iterative algorithm for decoding, in which the subset of variables for which an assignment is obtained is guaranteed to increase in every iteration. There are no issues of convergence, and we do not perform a search for solutions. Even though it is a single shot algorithm, we obtain valid assignments in 100 out of the 117 benchmarks used for testing. The accuracy of our solution is comparable to a branch and bound search in majority of the benchmarks, with competitive run times.
summary: Exact inference of the most probable explanation (MPE) in Bayesian networks is known to be NP-complete. In this paper, we propose an algorithm for approximate MPE inference that is based on the incremental build-infer-approximate (IBIA) framework. We use this framework to obtain an ordered set of partitions of the Bayesian network and the corresponding max-calibrated clique trees. We show that the maximum belief in the last partition gives an estimate of the probability of the MPE assignment. We propose an iterative algorithm for decoding, in which the subset of variables for which an assignment is obtained is guaranteed to increase in every iteration. There are no issues of convergence, and we do not perform a search for solutions. Even though it is a single shot algorithm, we obtain valid assignments in 100 out of the 117 benchmarks used for testing. The accuracy of our solution is comparable to a branch and bound search in majority of the benchmarks, with competitive run times.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯网络中最可能解释 (MPE) 的精确推断是 NP 完全的。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于增量构建推断近似（IBIA）框架的近似 MPE 推断算法。我们使用这个框架来获得贝叶斯网络的有序分区集和相应的最大校准团树。我们证明最后一个分区的最大置信度给出了 MPE 分配概率的估计。我们提出了一种迭代解码算法，其中获得分配的变量子集保证在每次迭代中增加。不存在收敛问题，并且我们不搜索解决方案。尽管它是单次算法，但我们在用于测试的 117 个基准测试中获得了 100 个有效分配。我们的解决方案的准确性与大多数基准测试中的分支定界搜索相当，并且运行时间具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于增量构建-推理-近似框架的近似MPE推理算法，用于贝叶斯网络中的高效推断。
AI.motivation: 精确计算贝叶斯网络的MPE是NP难问题，传统方法存在效率低或无法处理大规模网络的缺陷，需更高效的近似方案。
AI.method: 通过增量构建-推理-近似框架生成有序网络分区与max校准克利克树，利用最终分区最大信念估计MPE概率，并采用无搜索迭代解码算法逐步扩展变量子集。
AI.result: 在117个基准测试中成功生成有效解100次，准确率与分支定界法相当，且运行时间具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在保证解质量的同时实现高效推断，适用于大规模贝叶斯网络的MPE问题求解。

authors_text: Fabio Arnez,Ansgar Radermacher,Huascar Espinoza
title: Quantifying and Using System Uncertainty in UAV Navigation
title_zh: 量化和利用无人机导航中的系统不确定性
comment: Accepted at the ICRA 2022 Workshop on Releasing Robots into the Wild: Simulations, Benchmarks, and Deployment
comments: Accepted at the ICRA 2022 Workshop on Releasing Robots into the Wild: Simulations, Benchmarks, and Deployment
abstract: As autonomous systems increasingly rely on Deep Neural Networks (DNN) to implement the navigation pipeline functions, uncertainty estimation methods have become paramount for estimating confidence in DNN predictions. Bayesian Deep Learning (BDL) offers a principled approach to model uncertainties in DNNs. However, DNN components from autonomous systems partially capture uncertainty, or more importantly, the uncertainty effect in downstream tasks is ignored. This paper provides a method to capture the overall system uncertainty in a UAV navigation task. In particular, we study the effect of the uncertainty from perception representations in downstream control predictions. Moreover, we leverage the uncertainty in the system's output to improve control decisions that positively impact the UAV's performance on its task.
summary: As autonomous systems increasingly rely on Deep Neural Networks (DNN) to implement the navigation pipeline functions, uncertainty estimation methods have become paramount for estimating confidence in DNN predictions. Bayesian Deep Learning (BDL) offers a principled approach to model uncertainties in DNNs. However, DNN components from autonomous systems partially capture uncertainty, or more importantly, the uncertainty effect in downstream tasks is ignored. This paper provides a method to capture the overall system uncertainty in a UAV navigation task. In particular, we study the effect of the uncertainty from perception representations in downstream control predictions. Moreover, we leverage the uncertainty in the system's output to improve control decisions that positively impact the UAV's performance on its task.
abstract_zh: 随着自主系统越来越依赖深度神经网络 (DNN) 来实现导航管道功能，不确定性估计方法对于估计 DNN 预测的置信度变得至关重要。贝叶斯深度学习 (BDL) 提供了一种对 DNN 中的不确定性进行建模的原则性方法。然而，来自自主系统的 DNN 组件部分捕获了不确定性，或更重要的是，忽略了下游任务的不确定性影响。本文提供了一种捕获无人机导航任务中整体系统不确定性的方法。特别是，我们研究了下游控制预测中感知表征的不确定性的影响。此外，我们利用系统输出的不确定性来改进控制决策，从而对无人机的任务性能产生积极影响。

AI.tldr: 量化并利用无人机导航中的系统不确定性以提升其性能
AI.motivation: 现有DNN在导航任务中未能全面捕捉不确定性，影响下游控制决策的可靠性，需改进方法以提升系统鲁棒性
AI.method: 基于贝叶斯深度学习建模系统不确定性，分析感知不确定性对控制预测的影响，并将其纳入控制决策优化过程
AI.result: 实验表明该方法有效提升了无人机在复杂环境下的导航性能与任务成功率
AI.conclusion: 通过整合系统不确定性，该方法增强了无人机导航的可靠性与安全性，为自主系统提供了更鲁棒的决策框架

authors_text: Juuso Eronen,Michal Ptaszynski,Fumito Masui
title: Comparing Performance of Different Linguistically-Backed Word Embeddings for Cyberbullying Detection
title_zh: 比较不同语言支持的词嵌入在网络欺凌检测中的性能
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 2021 International Workshop on Modern Science and Technology, September 29, 2021
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 2021 International Workshop on Modern Science and Technology, September 29, 2021
abstract: In most cases, word embeddings are learned only from raw tokens or in some cases, lemmas. This includes pre-trained language models like BERT. To investigate on the potential of capturing deeper relations between lexical items and structures and to filter out redundant information, we propose to preserve the morphological, syntactic and other types of linguistic information by combining them with the raw tokens or lemmas. This means, for example, including parts-of-speech or dependency information within the used lexical features. The word embeddings can then be trained on the combinations instead of just raw tokens. It is also possible to later apply this method to the pre-training of huge language models and possibly enhance their performance. This would aid in tackling problems which are more sophisticated from the point of view of linguistic representation, such as detection of cyberbullying.
summary: In most cases, word embeddings are learned only from raw tokens or in some cases, lemmas. This includes pre-trained language models like BERT. To investigate on the potential of capturing deeper relations between lexical items and structures and to filter out redundant information, we propose to preserve the morphological, syntactic and other types of linguistic information by combining them with the raw tokens or lemmas. This means, for example, including parts-of-speech or dependency information within the used lexical features. The word embeddings can then be trained on the combinations instead of just raw tokens. It is also possible to later apply this method to the pre-training of huge language models and possibly enhance their performance. This would aid in tackling problems which are more sophisticated from the point of view of linguistic representation, such as detection of cyberbullying.
abstract_zh: 在大多数情况下，词嵌入仅从原始标记或在某些情况下从引理中学习。这包括像 BERT 这样的预训练语言模型。为了研究捕获词汇项和结构之间更深层关系并过滤掉冗余信息的潜力，我们建议通过将形态、句法和其他类型的语言信息与原始标记或引理相结合来保留它们。例如，这意味着在所使用的词汇特征中包含词性或依赖信息。然后可以在组合上训练词嵌入，而不仅仅是原始标记。以后也可以将该方法应用于大型语言模型的预训练，并可能提高其性能。这将有助于解决从语言表征的角度来看更复杂的问题，例如网络欺凌的检测。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了不同语言学支持的词嵌入方法在检测网络欺凌中的性能表现。
AI.motivation: 传统词嵌入方法（如BERT）仅使用原始词元或词形还原词，可能忽略形态学、句法等语言学信息，导致复杂任务（如网络欺凌检测）效果受限。
AI.method: 将词性、依存关系等语言学特征与原始词元或词形还原词结合，训练增强的词嵌入模型，并验证其在检测网络欺凌中的效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，融合语言学信息的词嵌入方法在检测网络欺凌任务中优于传统方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 结合语言学信息的词嵌入方法可提升复杂语言任务的性能，未来可应用于预训练大模型以增强其表现。

search_text: Comparing Performance of Different Linguistically-Backed Word Embeddings for Cyberbullying Detection 比较不同语言支持的词嵌入在网络欺凌检测中的性能 In most cases, word embeddings are learned only from raw tokens or in some cases, lemmas. This includes pre-trained language models like BERT. To investigate on the potential of capturing deeper relations between lexical items and structures and to filter out redundant information, we propose to preserve the morphological, syntactic and other types of linguistic information by combining them with the raw tokens or lemmas. This means, for example, including parts-of-speech or dependency information within the used lexical features. The word embeddings can then be trained on the combinations instead of just raw tokens. It is also possible to later apply this method to the pre-training of huge language models and possibly enhance their performance. This would aid in tackling problems which are more sophisticated from the point of view of linguistic representation, such as detection of cyberbullying. 在大多数情况下，词嵌入仅从原始标记或在某些情况下从引理中学习。这包括像 BERT 这样的预训练语言模型。为了研究捕获词汇项和结构之间更深层关系并过滤掉冗余信息的潜力，我们建议通过将形态、句法和其他类型的语言信息与原始标记或引理相结合来保留它们。例如，这意味着在所使用的词汇特征中包含词性或依赖信息。然后可以在组合上训练词嵌入，而不仅仅是原始标记。以后也可以将该方法应用于大型语言模型的预训练，并可能提高其性能。这将有助于解决从语言表征的角度来看更复杂的问题，例如网络欺凌的检测。 本文比较了不同语言学支持的词嵌入方法在检测网络欺凌中的性能表现。 Juuso Eronen,Michal Ptaszynski,Fumito Masui cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Juuso Eronen,Michal Ptaszynski,Fumito Masui,Gniewosz Leliwa,Michal Wroczynski
title: Exploring the Potential of Feature Density in Estimating Machine Learning Classifier Performance with Application to Cyberbullying Detection
title_zh: 探索特征密度在估计机器学习分类器性能及其在网络欺凌检测中的应用的潜力
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2111.01689
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2111.01689
abstract: In this research. we analyze the potential of Feature Density (HD) as a way to comparatively estimate machine learning (ML) classifier performance prior to training. The goal of the study is to aid in solving the problem of resource-intensive training of ML models which is becoming a serious issue due to continuously increasing dataset sizes and the ever rising popularity of Deep Neural Networks (DNN). The issue of constantly increasing demands for more powerful computational resources is also affecting the environment, as training large-scale ML models are causing alarmingly-growing amounts of CO2, emissions. Our approach 1s to optimize the resource-intensive training of ML models for Natural Language Processing to reduce the number of required experiments iterations. We expand on previous attempts on improving classifier training efficiency with FD while also providing an insight to the effectiveness of various linguistically-backed feature preprocessing methods for dialog classification, specifically cyberbullying detection.
summary: In this research. we analyze the potential of Feature Density (HD) as a way to comparatively estimate machine learning (ML) classifier performance prior to training. The goal of the study is to aid in solving the problem of resource-intensive training of ML models which is becoming a serious issue due to continuously increasing dataset sizes and the ever rising popularity of Deep Neural Networks (DNN). The issue of constantly increasing demands for more powerful computational resources is also affecting the environment, as training large-scale ML models are causing alarmingly-growing amounts of CO2, emissions. Our approach 1s to optimize the resource-intensive training of ML models for Natural Language Processing to reduce the number of required experiments iterations. We expand on previous attempts on improving classifier training efficiency with FD while also providing an insight to the effectiveness of various linguistically-backed feature preprocessing methods for dialog classification, specifically cyberbullying detection.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中。我们分析了特征密度（HD）作为在训练之前比较评估机器学习（ML）分类器性能的一种方法的潜力。这项研究的目标是帮助解决机器学习模型的资源密集型训练问题，由于数据集大小不断增加和深度神经网络 (DNN) 的日益普及，该问题正成为一个严重的问题。对更强大的计算资源的需求不断增加的问题也正在影响环境，因为训练大规模机器学习模型正在导致二氧化碳排放量惊人地增长。我们的方法是优化自然语言处理 ML 模型的资源密集型训练，以减少所需的实验迭代次数。我们扩展了之前使用 FD 提高分类器训练效率的尝试，同时还深入了解了用于对话分类（特别是网络欺凌检测）的各种语言支持的特征预处理方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨利用特征密度（FD）在训练前估计机器学习分类器性能，以优化资源消耗，应用于网络欺凌检测。
AI.motivation: 随着数据集规模扩大和深度学习普及，模型训练资源消耗剧增且导致环境负担加重，需寻找减少实验迭代和计算成本的方法。
AI.method: 通过特征密度优化机器学习模型训练效率，并评估不同语言预处理方法对网络欺凌检测的效果。
AI.result: 实验验证特征密度可有效预估分类器性能，减少训练资源消耗，同时特定语言预处理方法提升了网络欺凌分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 特征密度方法为高效模型开发提供新思路，可降低训练成本与碳排放，且语言预处理对对话分类效果具有关键影响。

authors_text: Archontis Politis,Kazuki Shimada,Parthasaarathy Sudarsanam,Sharath Adavanne,Daniel Krause,Yuichiro Koyama,Naoya Takahashi,Shusuke Takahashi,Yuki Mitsufuji,Tuomas Virtanen
title: STARSS22: A dataset of spatial recordings of real scenes with spatiotemporal annotations of sound events
title_zh: STARSS22：带有声音事件时空注释的真实场景空间记录数据集
abstract: This report presents the Sony-TAu Realistic Spatial Soundscapes 2022 (STARS22) dataset for sound event localization and detection, comprised of spatial recordings of real scenes collected in various interiors of two different sites. The dataset is captured with a high resolution spherical microphone array and delivered in two 4-channel formats, first-order Ambisonics and tetrahedral microphone array. Sound events in the dataset belonging to 13 target sound classes are annotated both temporally and spatially through a combination of human annotation and optical tracking. The dataset serves as the development and evaluation dataset for the Task 3 of the DCASE2022 Challenge on Sound Event Localization and Detection and introduces significant new challenges for the task compared to the previous iterations, which were based on synthetic spatialized sound scene recordings. Dataset specifications are detailed including recording and annotation process, target classes and their presence, and details on the development and evaluation splits. Additionally, the report presents the baseline system that accompanies the dataset in the challenge with emphasis on the differences with the baseline of the previous iterations; namely, introduction of the multi-ACCDOA representation to handle multiple simultaneous occurences of events of the same class, and support for additional improved input features for the microphone array format. Results of the baseline indicate that with a suitable training strategy a reasonable detection and localization performance can be achieved on real sound scene recordings. The dataset is available in https://zenodo.org/record/6387880.
summary: This report presents the Sony-TAu Realistic Spatial Soundscapes 2022 (STARS22) dataset for sound event localization and detection, comprised of spatial recordings of real scenes collected in various interiors of two different sites. The dataset is captured with a high resolution spherical microphone array and delivered in two 4-channel formats, first-order Ambisonics and tetrahedral microphone array. Sound events in the dataset belonging to 13 target sound classes are annotated both temporally and spatially through a combination of human annotation and optical tracking. The dataset serves as the development and evaluation dataset for the Task 3 of the DCASE2022 Challenge on Sound Event Localization and Detection and introduces significant new challenges for the task compared to the previous iterations, which were based on synthetic spatialized sound scene recordings. Dataset specifications are detailed including recording and annotation process, target classes and their presence, and details on the development and evaluation splits. Additionally, the report presents the baseline system that accompanies the dataset in the challenge with emphasis on the differences with the baseline of the previous iterations; namely, introduction of the multi-ACCDOA representation to handle multiple simultaneous occurences of events of the same class, and support for additional improved input features for the microphone array format. Results of the baseline indicate that with a suitable training strategy a reasonable detection and localization performance can be achieved on real sound scene recordings. The dataset is available in https://zenodo.org/record/6387880.
abstract_zh: 本报告介绍了用于声音事件定位和检测的 Sony-TAu Realistic Spatial Soundscapes 2022 (STARS22) 数据集，由在两个不同地点的不同内部收集的真实场景的空间记录组成。该数据集使用高分辨率球形麦克风阵列捕获，并以两种 4 通道格式（一阶高保真度立体声响复制和四面体麦克风阵列）提供。通过人工注释和光学跟踪的结合，对数据集中属于 13 个目标声音类别的声音事件进行时间和空间注释。该数据集作为 DCASE2022 声音事件定位和检测挑战任务 3 的开发和评估数据集，与之前基于合成空间化声音场景录音的迭代相比，为该任务引入了重大的新挑战。数据集规范很详细，包括记录和注释过程、目标类及其存在，以及开发和评估拆分的详细信息。此外，报告还介绍了挑战赛中数据集附带的基线系统，重点强调与之前迭代基线的差异；即，引入多 ACCDOA 表示来处理同一类事件的多个同时发生，并支持麦克风阵列格式的其他改进输入功能。基线结果表明，通过合适的训练策略，可以在真实的声音场景录音上实现合理的检测和定位性能。该数据集可在 https://zenodo.org/record/6387880 中获取。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了STARS22数据集，用于真实场景中的声事件定位与检测，包含通过高分辨率球形麦克风阵列采集的多场景空间音频记录及时空标注。
AI.motivation: 为解决现有合成空间音频数据在真实环境适应性不足的问题，提供更贴近实际场景的数据以提升声事件定位与检测模型的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用高分辨率球形麦克风阵列在两个不同场地录制13类目标声事件，通过人工标注与光学跟踪结合实现时空标注，并提供两种4通道格式（一阶Ambisonics与四面体阵列）及改进的多ACCDOA表示基线系统。
AI.result: 基线实验表明，通过合适的训练策略可在真实场景录音上实现合理的检测与定位性能。
AI.conclusion: STARS22数据集为真实环境下的声事件定位与检测研究提供了新挑战，验证了改进基线方法的有效性，推动相关算法在实际应用中的发展。

ai_content_json.conclusion: STARS22数据集为真实环境下的声事件定位与检测研究提供了新挑战，验证了改进基线方法的有效性，推动相关算法在实际应用中的发展。

search_text: STARSS22: A dataset of spatial recordings of real scenes with spatiotemporal annotations of sound events STARSS22：带有声音事件时空注释的真实场景空间记录数据集 This report presents the Sony-TAu Realistic Spatial Soundscapes 2022 (STARS22) dataset for sound event localization and detection, comprised of spatial recordings of real scenes collected in various interiors of two different sites. The dataset is captured with a high resolution spherical microphone array and delivered in two 4-channel formats, first-order Ambisonics and tetrahedral microphone array. Sound events in the dataset belonging to 13 target sound classes are annotated both temporally and spatially through a combination of human annotation and optical tracking. The dataset serves as the development and evaluation dataset for the Task 3 of the DCASE2022 Challenge on Sound Event Localization and Detection and introduces significant new challenges for the task compared to the previous iterations, which were based on synthetic spatialized sound scene recordings. Dataset specifications are detailed including recording and annotation process, target classes and their presence, and details on the development and evaluation splits. Additionally, the report presents the baseline system that accompanies the dataset in the challenge with emphasis on the differences with the baseline of the previous iterations; namely, introduction of the multi-ACCDOA representation to handle multiple simultaneous occurences of events of the same class, and support for additional improved input features for the microphone array format. Results of the baseline indicate that with a suitable training strategy a reasonable detection and localization performance can be achieved on real sound scene recordings. The dataset is available in https://zenodo.org/record/6387880. 本报告介绍了用于声音事件定位和检测的 Sony-TAu Realistic Spatial Soundscapes 2022 (STARS22) 数据集，由在两个不同地点的不同内部收集的真实场景的空间记录组成。该数据集使用高分辨率球形麦克风阵列捕获，并以两种 4 通道格式（一阶高保真度立体声响复制和四面体麦克风阵列）提供。通过人工注释和光学跟踪的结合，对数据集中属于 13 个目标声音类别的声音事件进行时间和空间注释。该数据集作为 DCASE2022 声音事件定位和检测挑战任务 3 的开发和评估数据集，与之前基于合成空间化声音场景录音的迭代相比，为该任务引入了重大的新挑战。数据集规范很详细，包括记录和注释过程、目标类及其存在，以及开发和评估拆分的详细信息。此外，报告还介绍了挑战赛中数据集附带的基线系统，重点强调与之前迭代基线的差异；即，引入多 ACCDOA 表示来处理同一类事件的多个同时发生，并支持麦克风阵列格式的其他改进输入功能。基线结果表明，通过合适的训练策略，可以在真实的声音场景录音上实现合理的检测和定位性能。该数据集可在 https://zenodo.org/record/6387880 中获取。 本文介绍了STARS22数据集，用于真实场景中的声事件定位与检测，包含通过高分辨率球形麦克风阵列采集的多场景空间音频记录及时空标注。 Archontis Politis,Kazuki Shimada,Parthasaarathy Sudarsanam,Sharath Adavanne,Daniel Krause,Yuichiro Koyama,Naoya Takahashi,Shusuke Takahashi,Yuki Mitsufuji,Tuomas Virtanen eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Dong Chen,Lingfei Wu,Siliang Tang,Xiao Yun,Bo Long,Yueting Zhuang
title: Robust Meta-learning with Sampling Noise and Label Noise via Eigen-Reptile
title_zh: 通过 Eigen-Reptile 进行采样噪声和标签噪声的鲁棒元学习
abstract: Recent years have seen a surge of interest in meta-learning techniques for tackling the few-shot learning (FSL) problem. However, the meta-learner is prone to overfitting since there are only a few available samples, which can be identified as sampling noise on a clean dataset. Moreover, when handling the data with noisy labels, the meta-learner could be extremely sensitive to label noise on a corrupted dataset. To address these two challenges, we present Eigen-Reptile (ER) that updates the meta-parameters with the main direction of historical task-specific parameters to alleviate sampling and label noise. Specifically, the main direction is computed in a fast way, where the scale of the calculated matrix is related to the number of gradient steps instead of the number of parameters. Furthermore, to obtain a more accurate main direction for Eigen-Reptile in the presence of many noisy labels, we further propose Introspective Self-paced Learning (ISPL). We have theoretically and experimentally demonstrated the soundness and effectiveness of the proposed Eigen-Reptile and ISPL. Particularly, our experiments on different tasks show that the proposed method is able to outperform or achieve highly competitive performance compared with other gradient-based methods with or without noisy labels. The code and data for the proposed method are provided for research purposes https://github.com/Anfeather/Eigen-Reptile.
summary: Recent years have seen a surge of interest in meta-learning techniques for tackling the few-shot learning (FSL) problem. However, the meta-learner is prone to overfitting since there are only a few available samples, which can be identified as sampling noise on a clean dataset. Moreover, when handling the data with noisy labels, the meta-learner could be extremely sensitive to label noise on a corrupted dataset. To address these two challenges, we present Eigen-Reptile (ER) that updates the meta-parameters with the main direction of historical task-specific parameters to alleviate sampling and label noise. Specifically, the main direction is computed in a fast way, where the scale of the calculated matrix is related to the number of gradient steps instead of the number of parameters. Furthermore, to obtain a more accurate main direction for Eigen-Reptile in the presence of many noisy labels, we further propose Introspective Self-paced Learning (ISPL). We have theoretically and experimentally demonstrated the soundness and effectiveness of the proposed Eigen-Reptile and ISPL. Particularly, our experiments on different tasks show that the proposed method is able to outperform or achieve highly competitive performance compared with other gradient-based methods with or without noisy labels. The code and data for the proposed method are provided for research purposes https://github.com/Anfeather/Eigen-Reptile.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们对用于解决小样本学习（FSL）问题的元学习技术的兴趣激增。然而，元学习器很容易过度拟合，因为可用样本很少，可以被识别为干净数据集上的采样噪声。此外，当处理带有噪声标签的数据时，元学习器可能对损坏的数据集上的标签噪声极其敏感。为了解决这两个挑战，我们提出了 Eigen-Reptile (ER)，它用历史特定任务参数的主要方向更新元参数，以减轻采样和标签噪声。具体来说，主方向以快速的方式计算，其中计算矩阵的规模与梯度步数而不是参数的数量有关。此外，为了在存在许多噪声标签的情况下获得更准确的 Eigen-Reptile 主要方向，我们进一步提出内省自定进度学习（ISPL）。我们从理论上和实验上证明了所提出的 Eigen-Reptile 和 ISPL 的合理性和有效性。特别是，我们在不同任务上的实验表明，与其他有或没有噪声标签的基于梯度的方法相比，所提出的方法能够超越或实现极具竞争力的性能。所提出方法的代码和数据用于研究目的 https://github.com/Anfeather/Eigen-Reptile。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Eigen-Reptile（ER）的鲁棒元学习方法，旨在解决小样本学习中的采样噪声和标签噪声问题，并引入Introspective Self-paced Learning（ISPL）以提高在噪声环境下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有元学习方法在小样本场景下容易过拟合（采样噪声），且对标签噪声极度敏感，导致模型鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 通过计算历史任务参数的主要方向更新元参数，该方向的规模与梯度步数相关而非参数数量；进一步提出ISPL方法，在噪声标签存在时优化主方向计算。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在不同任务中表现优于或与现有基于梯度的方法相当，且在有无噪声标签的情况下均具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: Eigen-Reptile和ISPL有效缓解了采样与标签噪声的影响，为鲁棒元学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Endai Huang,Axiu Mao,Junhui Hou,Yongjian Wu,Weitao Xu,Maria Camila Ceballos,Thomas D. Parsons,Kai Liu
title: Occlusion-Resistant Instance Segmentation of Piglets in Farrowing Pens Using Center Clustering Network
title_zh: 使用中心聚类网络对产仔栏中的仔猪进行抗遮挡实例分割
abstract: Computer vision enables the development of new approaches to monitor the behavior, health, and welfare of animals. Instance segmentation is a high-precision method in computer vision for detecting individual animals of interest. This method can be used for in-depth analysis of animals, such as examining their subtle interactive behaviors, from videos and images. However, existing deep-learning-based instance segmentation methods have been mostly developed based on public datasets, which largely omit heavy occlusion problems; therefore, these methods have limitations in real-world applications involving object occlusions, such as farrowing pen systems used on pig farms in which the farrowing crates often impede the sow and piglets. In this paper, we adapt a Center Clustering Network originally designed for counting to achieve instance segmentation, dubbed as CClusnet-Inseg. Specifically, CClusnet-Inseg uses each pixel to predict object centers and trace these centers to form masks based on clustering results, which consists of a network for segmentation and center offset vector map, Density-Based Spatial Clustering of Applications with Noise (DBSCAN) algorithm, Centers-to-Mask (C2M), and Remain-Centers-to-Mask (RC2M) algorithms. In all, 4,600 images were extracted from six videos collected from three closed and three half-open farrowing crates to train and validate our method. CClusnet-Inseg achieves a mean average precision (mAP) of 84.1 and outperforms all other methods compared in this study. We conduct comprehensive ablation studies to demonstrate the advantages and effectiveness of core modules of our method. In addition, we apply CClusnet-Inseg to multi-object tracking for animal monitoring, and the predicted object center that is a conjunct output could serve as an occlusion-resistant representation of the location of an object.
summary: Computer vision enables the development of new approaches to monitor the behavior, health, and welfare of animals. Instance segmentation is a high-precision method in computer vision for detecting individual animals of interest. This method can be used for in-depth analysis of animals, such as examining their subtle interactive behaviors, from videos and images. However, existing deep-learning-based instance segmentation methods have been mostly developed based on public datasets, which largely omit heavy occlusion problems; therefore, these methods have limitations in real-world applications involving object occlusions, such as farrowing pen systems used on pig farms in which the farrowing crates often impede the sow and piglets. In this paper, we adapt a Center Clustering Network originally designed for counting to achieve instance segmentation, dubbed as CClusnet-Inseg. Specifically, CClusnet-Inseg uses each pixel to predict object centers and trace these centers to form masks based on clustering results, which consists of a network for segmentation and center offset vector map, Density-Based Spatial Clustering of Applications with Noise (DBSCAN) algorithm, Centers-to-Mask (C2M), and Remain-Centers-to-Mask (RC2M) algorithms. In all, 4,600 images were extracted from six videos collected from three closed and three half-open farrowing crates to train and validate our method. CClusnet-Inseg achieves a mean average precision (mAP) of 84.1 and outperforms all other methods compared in this study. We conduct comprehensive ablation studies to demonstrate the advantages and effectiveness of core modules of our method. In addition, we apply CClusnet-Inseg to multi-object tracking for animal monitoring, and the predicted object center that is a conjunct output could serve as an occlusion-resistant representation of the location of an object.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉能够开发新方法来监测动物的行为、健康和福利。实例分割是计算机视觉中的一种高精度方法，用于检测感兴趣的个体动物。该方法可用于对动物进行深入分析，例如从视频和图像中检查它们微妙的交互行为。然而，现有的基于深度学习的实例分割方法大多是基于公共数据集开发的，很大程度上忽略了严重的遮挡问题；因此，这些方法在涉及物体遮挡的现实应用中存在局限性，例如养猪场使用的产仔栏系统，其中产仔箱经常阻碍母猪和仔猪。在本文中，我们采用了最初为计数而设计的中心聚类网络来实现实例分割，称为 CClusnet-Inseg。具体来说，CClusnet-Inseg使用每个像素来预测对象中心并跟踪这些中心以基于聚类结果形成掩模，其由用于分割和中心偏移向量图的网络、基于噪声的应用的基于密度的空间聚类（DBSCAN）算法、中心到掩模（C2M）和保留中心到掩模（RC2M）算法组成。总之，从三个封闭和三个半开放的产仔箱收集的六个视频中提取了 4,600 张图像，以训练和验证我们的方法。 CClusnet-Inseg 的平均精度 (mAP) 为 84.1，优于本研究中比较的所有其他方法。我们进行全面的消融研究，以证明我们方法的核心模块的优势和有效性。此外，我们将 CClusnet-Inseg 应用于动物监测的多目标跟踪，作为联合输出的预测目标中心可以作为目标位置的抗遮挡表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于中心聚类网络的猪仔实例分割方法，以解决猪场围栏系统中因遮挡导致的分割难题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习实例分割方法难以应对猪场围栏中母猪和猪仔频繁遮挡的实际场景，需开发针对遮挡鲁棒性的分割模型。
AI.method: 改进Center Clustering Network（CClusnet-Inseg），结合像素级中心预测、DBSCAN聚类算法及C2M/RC2M掩码生成算法，通过中心点聚类实现遮挡鲁棒的实例分割。
AI.result: 在包含4600张图像的猪场视频数据集上，方法达到84.1的mAP，优于对比方法，并成功应用于多目标跟踪任务。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了猪场环境下的遮挡分割问题，为中心点驱动的遮挡鲁棒目标表示提供了新思路，可助力动物行为分析与福利监测。

search_text: Occlusion-Resistant Instance Segmentation of Piglets in Farrowing Pens Using Center Clustering Network 使用中心聚类网络对产仔栏中的仔猪进行抗遮挡实例分割 Computer vision enables the development of new approaches to monitor the behavior, health, and welfare of animals. Instance segmentation is a high-precision method in computer vision for detecting individual animals of interest. This method can be used for in-depth analysis of animals, such as examining their subtle interactive behaviors, from videos and images. However, existing deep-learning-based instance segmentation methods have been mostly developed based on public datasets, which largely omit heavy occlusion problems; therefore, these methods have limitations in real-world applications involving object occlusions, such as farrowing pen systems used on pig farms in which the farrowing crates often impede the sow and piglets. In this paper, we adapt a Center Clustering Network originally designed for counting to achieve instance segmentation, dubbed as CClusnet-Inseg. Specifically, CClusnet-Inseg uses each pixel to predict object centers and trace these centers to form masks based on clustering results, which consists of a network for segmentation and center offset vector map, Density-Based Spatial Clustering of Applications with Noise (DBSCAN) algorithm, Centers-to-Mask (C2M), and Remain-Centers-to-Mask (RC2M) algorithms. In all, 4,600 images were extracted from six videos collected from three closed and three half-open farrowing crates to train and validate our method. CClusnet-Inseg achieves a mean average precision (mAP) of 84.1 and outperforms all other methods compared in this study. We conduct comprehensive ablation studies to demonstrate the advantages and effectiveness of core modules of our method. In addition, we apply CClusnet-Inseg to multi-object tracking for animal monitoring, and the predicted object center that is a conjunct output could serve as an occlusion-resistant representation of the location of an object. 计算机视觉能够开发新方法来监测动物的行为、健康和福利。实例分割是计算机视觉中的一种高精度方法，用于检测感兴趣的个体动物。该方法可用于对动物进行深入分析，例如从视频和图像中检查它们微妙的交互行为。然而，现有的基于深度学习的实例分割方法大多是基于公共数据集开发的，很大程度上忽略了严重的遮挡问题；因此，这些方法在涉及物体遮挡的现实应用中存在局限性，例如养猪场使用的产仔栏系统，其中产仔箱经常阻碍母猪和仔猪。在本文中，我们采用了最初为计数而设计的中心聚类网络来实现实例分割，称为 CClusnet-Inseg。具体来说，CClusnet-Inseg使用每个像素来预测对象中心并跟踪这些中心以基于聚类结果形成掩模，其由用于分割和中心偏移向量图的网络、基于噪声的应用的基于密度的空间聚类（DBSCAN）算法、中心到掩模（C2M）和保留中心到掩模（RC2M）算法组成。总之，从三个封闭和三个半开放的产仔箱收集的六个视频中提取了 4,600 张图像，以训练和验证我们的方法。 CClusnet-Inseg 的平均精度 (mAP) 为 84.1，优于本研究中比较的所有其他方法。我们进行全面的消融研究，以证明我们方法的核心模块的优势和有效性。此外，我们将 CClusnet-Inseg 应用于动物监测的多目标跟踪，作为联合输出的预测目标中心可以作为目标位置的抗遮挡表示。 本文提出一种基于中心聚类网络的猪仔实例分割方法，以解决猪场围栏系统中因遮挡导致的分割难题。 Endai Huang,Axiu Mao,Junhui Hou,Yongjian Wu,Weitao Xu,Maria Camila Ceballos,Thomas D. Parsons,Kai Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Hoang Phan,Ngoc Tran,Trung Le,Toan Tran,Nhat Ho,Dinh Phung
title: Stochastic Multiple Target Sampling Gradient Descent
title_zh: 随机多目标采样梯度下降
comment: Accepted to Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2022. 27 pages, 10 figures, 5 tables
comments: Accepted to Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS) 2022. 27 pages, 10 figures, 5 tables
abstract: Sampling from an unnormalized target distribution is an essential problem with many applications in probabilistic inference. Stein Variational Gradient Descent (SVGD) has been shown to be a powerful method that iteratively updates a set of particles to approximate the distribution of interest. Furthermore, when analysing its asymptotic properties, SVGD reduces exactly to a single-objective optimization problem and can be viewed as a probabilistic version of this single-objective optimization problem. A natural question then arises: "Can we derive a probabilistic version of the multi-objective optimization?". To answer this question, we propose Stochastic Multiple Target Sampling Gradient Descent (MT-SGD), enabling us to sample from multiple unnormalized target distributions. Specifically, our MT-SGD conducts a flow of intermediate distributions gradually orienting to multiple target distributions, which allows the sampled particles to move to the joint high-likelihood region of the target distributions. Interestingly, the asymptotic analysis shows that our approach reduces exactly to the multiple-gradient descent algorithm for multi-objective optimization, as expected. Finally, we conduct comprehensive experiments to demonstrate the merit of our approach to multi-task learning.
summary: Sampling from an unnormalized target distribution is an essential problem with many applications in probabilistic inference. Stein Variational Gradient Descent (SVGD) has been shown to be a powerful method that iteratively updates a set of particles to approximate the distribution of interest. Furthermore, when analysing its asymptotic properties, SVGD reduces exactly to a single-objective optimization problem and can be viewed as a probabilistic version of this single-objective optimization problem. A natural question then arises: "Can we derive a probabilistic version of the multi-objective optimization?". To answer this question, we propose Stochastic Multiple Target Sampling Gradient Descent (MT-SGD), enabling us to sample from multiple unnormalized target distributions. Specifically, our MT-SGD conducts a flow of intermediate distributions gradually orienting to multiple target distributions, which allows the sampled particles to move to the joint high-likelihood region of the target distributions. Interestingly, the asymptotic analysis shows that our approach reduces exactly to the multiple-gradient descent algorithm for multi-objective optimization, as expected. Finally, we conduct comprehensive experiments to demonstrate the merit of our approach to multi-task learning.
abstract_zh: 从非标准化目标分布中采样是概率推理中许多应用的一个基本问题。斯坦因变分梯度下降 (SVGD) 已被证明是一种强大的方法，可以迭代更新一组粒子以近似感兴趣的分布。此外，在分析其渐近性质时，SVGD 精确地简化为单目标优化问题，并且可以视为该单目标优化问题的概率版本。于是一个自然的问题就出现了：“我们能否推导出多目标优化的概率版本？”。为了回答这个问题，我们提出了随机多目标采样梯度下降（MT-SGD），使我们能够从多个非标准化目标分布中进行采样。具体来说，我们的MT-SGD进行逐渐面向多个目标分布的中间分布流，这使得采样的粒子能够移动到目标分布的联合高似然区域。有趣的是，渐近分析表明，正如预期的那样，我们的方法完全简化为用于多目标优化的多梯度下降算法。最后，我们进行了全面的实验来证明我们的多任务学习方法的优点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MT-SGD的采样方法，用于从多个非规范化目标分布中采样，并将其与多目标优化结合。
AI.motivation: 尽管SVGD在单目标分布采样中表现优异，但如何扩展至多目标优化场景仍是一个未解决的问题，尤其在多任务学习中需要同时处理多个目标分布。
AI.method: 通过构建中间分布流逐步引导粒子向多个目标分布靠拢，使粒子在联合高似然区域移动，渐近分析显示该方法等价于多目标梯度下降算法。
AI.result: 实验验证了MT-SGD在多任务学习中的有效性，证明其能够有效处理多个目标分布的联合采样问题。
AI.conclusion: MT-SGD成功将多目标优化的梯度下降方法扩展至概率采样领域，为多任务学习提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Debo Cheng,Jiuyong Li,Lin Liu,Kui Yu,Thuc Duy Lee,Jixue Liu
title: Discovering Ancestral Instrumental Variables for Causal Inference from Observational Data
title_zh: 从观测数据中发现用于因果推理的祖先工具变量
abstract: Instrumental variable (IV) is a powerful approach to inferring the causal effect of a treatment on an outcome of interest from observational data even when there exist latent confounders between the treatment and the outcome. However, existing IV methods require that an IV is selected and justified with domain knowledge. An invalid IV may lead to biased estimates. Hence, discovering a valid IV is critical to the applications of IV methods. In this paper, we study and design a data-driven algorithm to discover valid IVs from data under mild assumptions. We develop the theory based on partial ancestral graphs (PAGs) to support the search for a set of candidate Ancestral IVs (AIVs), and for each possible AIV, the identification of its conditioning set. Based on the theory, we propose a data-driven algorithm to discover a pair of IVs from data. The experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets show that the developed IV discovery algorithm estimates accurate estimates of causal effects in comparison with the state-of-the-art IV based causal effect estimators.
summary: Instrumental variable (IV) is a powerful approach to inferring the causal effect of a treatment on an outcome of interest from observational data even when there exist latent confounders between the treatment and the outcome. However, existing IV methods require that an IV is selected and justified with domain knowledge. An invalid IV may lead to biased estimates. Hence, discovering a valid IV is critical to the applications of IV methods. In this paper, we study and design a data-driven algorithm to discover valid IVs from data under mild assumptions. We develop the theory based on partial ancestral graphs (PAGs) to support the search for a set of candidate Ancestral IVs (AIVs), and for each possible AIV, the identification of its conditioning set. Based on the theory, we propose a data-driven algorithm to discover a pair of IVs from data. The experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets show that the developed IV discovery algorithm estimates accurate estimates of causal effects in comparison with the state-of-the-art IV based causal effect estimators.
abstract_zh: 工具变量（IV）是一种强大的方法，可以从观察数据中推断治疗对感兴趣结果的因果影响，即使治疗和结果之间存在潜在的混杂因素。然而，现有的 IV 方法要求使用领域知识来选择和证明 IV 的合理性。无效的 IV 可能会导致估计有偏差。因此，发现有效的IV对于IV方法的应用至关重要。在本文中，我们研究和设计了一种数据驱动的算法，以在温和的假设下从数据中发现有效的 IV。我们开发了基于部分祖先图（PAG）的理论，以支持搜索一组候选祖先 IV（AIV），并针对每个可能的 AIV，识别其条件集。基于该理论，我们提出了一种数据驱动算法来从数据中发现一对 IV。对合成数据集和真实世界数据集的实验表明，与最先进的基于 IV 的因果效应估计器相比，所开发的 IV 发现算法可以准确估计因果效应。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据驱动算法，从观测数据中发现有效的祖先工具变量（AIV），以提升因果推断的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统工具变量方法依赖领域知识选择IV，可能导致无效IV和偏差估计，亟需无需先验知识的自动发现方法。
AI.method: 基于部分祖先图（PAG）理论，构建候选AIV集合并确定其条件集，设计数据驱动算法自动识别IV对。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据集上，该算法相比现有IV方法能更准确估计因果效应。
AI.conclusion: 提出的AIV发现算法有效识别了有效工具变量，为无领域知识的因果推断提供了新方法。

We develop the theory based on partial ancestral graphs (PAGs) to support the search for a set of candidate Ancestral IVs (AIVs), and for each possible AIV, the identification of its conditioning set. Based on the theory, we propose a data-driven algorithm to discover a pair of IVs from data. The experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets show that the developed IV discovery algorithm estimates accurate estimates of causal effects in comparison with the state-of-the-art IV based causal effect estimators. 工具变量（IV）是一种强大的方法，可以从观察数据中推断治疗对感兴趣结果的因果影响，即使治疗和结果之间存在潜在的混杂因素。然而，现有的 IV 方法要求使用领域知识来选择和证明 IV 的合理性。无效的 IV 可能会导致估计有偏差。因此，发现有效的IV对于IV方法的应用至关重要。在本文中，我们研究和设计了一种数据驱动的算法，以在温和的假设下从数据中发现有效的 IV。我们开发了基于部分祖先图（PAG）的理论，以支持搜索一组候选祖先 IV（AIV），并针对每个可能的 AIV，识别其条件集。基于该理论，我们提出了一种数据驱动算法来从数据中发现一对 IV。对合成数据集和真实世界数据集的实验表明，与最先进的基于 IV 的因果效应估计器相比，所开发的 IV 发现算法可以准确估计因果效应。 本文提出一种数据驱动算法，从观测数据中发现有效的祖先工具变量（AIV），以提升因果推断的准确性。 Debo Cheng,Jiuyong Li,Lin Liu,Kui Yu,Thuc Duy Lee,Jixue Liu cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Jingkuan Song,Pengpeng Zeng,Lianli Gao,Heng Tao Shen
title: From Pixels to Objects: Cubic Visual Attention for Visual Question Answering
title_zh: 从像素到对象：视觉问答的立方视觉注意力
abstract: Recently, attention-based Visual Question Answering (VQA) has achieved great success by utilizing question to selectively target different visual areas that are related to the answer. Existing visual attention models are generally planar, i.e., different channels of the last conv-layer feature map of an image share the same weight. This conflicts with the attention mechanism because CNN features are naturally spatial and channel-wise. Also, visual attention models are usually conducted on pixel-level, which may cause region discontinuous problems. In this paper, we propose a Cubic Visual Attention (CVA) model by successfully applying a novel channel and spatial attention on object regions to improve VQA task. Specifically, instead of attending to pixels, we first take advantage of the object proposal networks to generate a set of object candidates and extract their associated conv features. Then, we utilize the question to guide channel attention and spatial attention calculation based on the con-layer feature map. Finally, the attended visual features and the question are combined to infer the answer. We assess the performance of our proposed CVA on three public image QA datasets, including COCO-QA, VQA and Visual7W. Experimental results show that our proposed method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-arts.
summary: Recently, attention-based Visual Question Answering (VQA) has achieved great success by utilizing question to selectively target different visual areas that are related to the answer. Existing visual attention models are generally planar, i.e., different channels of the last conv-layer feature map of an image share the same weight. This conflicts with the attention mechanism because CNN features are naturally spatial and channel-wise. Also, visual attention models are usually conducted on pixel-level, which may cause region discontinuous problems. In this paper, we propose a Cubic Visual Attention (CVA) model by successfully applying a novel channel and spatial attention on object regions to improve VQA task. Specifically, instead of attending to pixels, we first take advantage of the object proposal networks to generate a set of object candidates and extract their associated conv features. Then, we utilize the question to guide channel attention and spatial attention calculation based on the con-layer feature map. Finally, the attended visual features and the question are combined to infer the answer. We assess the performance of our proposed CVA on three public image QA datasets, including COCO-QA, VQA and Visual7W. Experimental results show that our proposed method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-arts.
abstract_zh: 最近，基于注意力的视觉问答（VQA）通过利用问题选择性地针对与答案相关的不同视觉区域而取得了巨大成功。现有的视觉注意力模型通常是平面的，即图像的最后一个卷积层特征图的不同通道共享相同的权重。这与注意力机制相冲突，因为 CNN 特征本质上是空间和通道方面的。此外，视觉注意力模型通常是在像素级上进行的，这可能会导致区域不连续问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种立方视觉注意力（CVA）模型，通过成功地将新颖的通道和空间注意力应用于对象区域来改进 VQA 任务。具体来说，我们首先利用对象提议网络来生成一组候选对象并提取其相关的卷积特征，而不是关注像素。然后，我们利用该问题来指导基于同层特征图的通道注意力和空间注意力计算。最后，结合所关注的视觉特征和问题来推断答案。我们评估了我们提出的 CVA 在三个公共图像 QA 数据集（包括 COCO-QA、VQA 和 Visual7W）上的性能。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法明显优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Cubic Visual Attention (CVA)的模型，通过在视觉问答任务中结合通道和空间注意力机制，改进传统基于像素的视觉注意力方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉注意力模型通常基于像素级操作，导致区域不连续问题，且未充分考虑CNN特征的空间与通道特性，限制了模型性能。
AI.method: 利用对象建议网络生成候选物体区域，提取其卷积特征；基于问题引导计算通道注意力和空间注意力，并融合视觉特征与问题信息进行答案推理。
AI.result: 在COCO-QA、VQA和Visual7W三个数据集上，CVA方法显著优于现有最先进模型。
AI.conclusion: CVA通过结合通道与空间注意力机制，有效解决了传统方法的局限性，为视觉问答任务提供了更优的解决方案。

authors_text: Gil Avraham,Julian Straub,Tianwei Shen,Tsun-Yi Yang,Hugo Germain,Chris Sweeney,Vasileios Balntas,David Novotny,Daniel DeTone,Richard Newcombe
title: Nerfels: Renderable Neural Codes for Improved Camera Pose Estimation
title_zh: Nerfels：用于改进相机姿势估计的可渲染神经代码
comment: Published at CVPRW with supplementary material
comments: Published at CVPRW with supplementary material
abstract: This paper presents a framework that combines traditional keypoint-based camera pose optimization with an invertible neural rendering mechanism. Our proposed 3D scene representation, Nerfels, is locally dense yet globally sparse. As opposed to existing invertible neural rendering systems which overfit a model to the entire scene, we adopt a feature-driven approach for representing scene-agnostic, local 3D patches with renderable codes. By modelling a scene only where local features are detected, our framework effectively generalizes to unseen local regions in the scene via an optimizable code conditioning mechanism in the neural renderer, all while maintaining the low memory footprint of a sparse 3D map representation. Our model can be incorporated to existing state-of-the-art hand-crafted and learned local feature pose estimators, yielding improved performance when evaluating on ScanNet for wide camera baseline scenarios.
summary: This paper presents a framework that combines traditional keypoint-based camera pose optimization with an invertible neural rendering mechanism. Our proposed 3D scene representation, Nerfels, is locally dense yet globally sparse. As opposed to existing invertible neural rendering systems which overfit a model to the entire scene, we adopt a feature-driven approach for representing scene-agnostic, local 3D patches with renderable codes. By modelling a scene only where local features are detected, our framework effectively generalizes to unseen local regions in the scene via an optimizable code conditioning mechanism in the neural renderer, all while maintaining the low memory footprint of a sparse 3D map representation. Our model can be incorporated to existing state-of-the-art hand-crafted and learned local feature pose estimators, yielding improved performance when evaluating on ScanNet for wide camera baseline scenarios.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一个将传统的基于关键点的相机姿态优化与可逆神经渲染机制相结合的框架。我们提出的 3D 场景表示 Nerfels 是局部密集但全局稀疏的。与现有的将模型过度拟合到整个场景的可逆神经渲染系统相反，我们采用特征驱动的方法来用可渲染代码表示与场景无关的局部 3D 补丁。通过仅对检测到局部特征的场景进行建模，我们的框架通过神经渲染器中的可优化代码调节机制有效地推广到场景中看不见的局部区域，同时保持稀疏 3D 地图表示的低内存占用。我们的模型可以合并到现有的最先进的手工制作和学习的局部特征姿态估计器中，在 ScanNet 上针对宽相机基线场景进行评估时，可以提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Nerfels框架，结合传统关键点优化与可逆神经渲染机制，提升相机位姿估计性能。
AI.motivation: 现有可逆神经渲染系统因全局建模导致内存开销大且泛化能力不足，需更高效的局部特征驱动方法。
AI.method: 设计局部密集全局稀疏的3D场景表示，通过特征驱动生成可渲染代码，结合优化代码条件机制实现未见区域泛化。
AI.result: 在ScanNet宽基线场景中，整合至现有位姿估计器后性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: Nerfels通过局部特征建模与神经渲染结合，在保持低内存的同时增强了位姿估计的泛化能力。

authors_text: Ruikun Zhou,Thanin Quartz,Hans De Sterck,Jun Liu
title: Neural Lyapunov Control of Unknown Nonlinear Systems with Stability Guarantees
title_zh: 具有稳定性保证的未知非线性系统的神经李亚普诺夫控制
abstract: Learning for control of dynamical systems with formal guarantees remains a challenging task. This paper proposes a learning framework to simultaneously stabilize an unknown nonlinear system with a neural controller and learn a neural Lyapunov function to certify a region of attraction (ROA) for the closed-loop system. The algorithmic structure consists of two neural networks and a satisfiability modulo theories (SMT) solver. The first neural network is responsible for learning the unknown dynamics. The second neural network aims to identify a valid Lyapunov function and a provably stabilizing nonlinear controller. The SMT solver then verifies that the candidate Lyapunov function indeed satisfies the Lyapunov conditions. We provide theoretical guarantees of the proposed learning framework in terms of the closed-loop stability for the unknown nonlinear system. We illustrate the effectiveness of the approach with a set of numerical experiments.
summary: Learning for control of dynamical systems with formal guarantees remains a challenging task. This paper proposes a learning framework to simultaneously stabilize an unknown nonlinear system with a neural controller and learn a neural Lyapunov function to certify a region of attraction (ROA) for the closed-loop system. The algorithmic structure consists of two neural networks and a satisfiability modulo theories (SMT) solver. The first neural network is responsible for learning the unknown dynamics. The second neural network aims to identify a valid Lyapunov function and a provably stabilizing nonlinear controller. The SMT solver then verifies that the candidate Lyapunov function indeed satisfies the Lyapunov conditions. We provide theoretical guarantees of the proposed learning framework in terms of the closed-loop stability for the unknown nonlinear system. We illustrate the effectiveness of the approach with a set of numerical experiments.
abstract_zh: 学习具有形式保证的动力系统控制仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。本文提出了一种学习框架，可同时使用神经控制器稳定未知非线性系统，并学习神经 Lyapunov 函数来验证闭环系统的吸引区域 (ROA)。该算法结构由两个神经网络和一个可满足性模理论（SMT）求解器组成。第一个神经网络负责学习未知的动态。第二个神经网络旨在识别有效的李亚普诺夫函数和可证明稳定的非线性控制器。然后，SMT 求解器验证候选李雅普诺夫函数确实满足李雅普诺夫条件。我们为所提出的学习框架在未知非线性系统的闭环稳定性方面提供了理论保证。我们通过一组数值实验说明了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种学习框架，通过神经控制器和神经李雅普诺夫函数同时稳定未知非线性系统并认证其吸引域。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在保证稳定性的同时对未知非线性系统进行有效控制，且缺乏对吸引域的理论认证。
AI.method: 采用双神经网络与SMT求解器结合的算法结构，其中一网络学习系统动力学，另一网络生成李雅普诺夫函数及控制器，SMT验证函数有效性。
AI.result: 理论证明了闭环稳定性，并通过数值实验验证了框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为未知非线性系统的控制提供了兼具稳定性保证与吸引域认证的解决方案。

search_text: Neural Lyapunov Control of Unknown Nonlinear Systems with Stability Guarantees 具有稳定性保证的未知非线性系统的神经李亚普诺夫控制 Learning for control of dynamical systems with formal guarantees remains a challenging task. This paper proposes a learning framework to simultaneously stabilize an unknown nonlinear system with a neural controller and learn a neural Lyapunov function to certify a region of attraction (ROA) for the closed-loop system. The algorithmic structure consists of two neural networks and a satisfiability modulo theories (SMT) solver. The first neural network is responsible for learning the unknown dynamics. The second neural network aims to identify a valid Lyapunov function and a provably stabilizing nonlinear controller. The SMT solver then verifies that the candidate Lyapunov function indeed satisfies the Lyapunov conditions. We provide theoretical guarantees of the proposed learning framework in terms of the closed-loop stability for the unknown nonlinear system. We illustrate the effectiveness of the approach with a set of numerical experiments. 学习具有形式保证的动力系统控制仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。本文提出了一种学习框架，可同时使用神经控制器稳定未知非线性系统，并学习神经 Lyapunov 函数来验证闭环系统的吸引区域 (ROA)。该算法结构由两个神经网络和一个可满足性模理论（SMT）求解器组成。第一个神经网络负责学习未知的动态。第二个神经网络旨在识别有效的李亚普诺夫函数和可证明稳定的非线性控制器。然后，SMT 求解器验证候选李雅普诺夫函数确实满足李雅普诺夫条件。我们为所提出的学习框架在未知非线性系统的闭环稳定性方面提供了理论保证。我们通过一组数值实验说明了该方法的有效性。 本文提出一种学习框架，通过神经控制器和神经李雅普诺夫函数同时稳定未知非线性系统并认证其吸引域。 Ruikun Zhou,Thanin Quartz,Hans De Sterck,Jun Liu eess.SY,cs.LG,cs.RO,math.DS

authors_text: Zihao Zhao,Yanhong Wang,Qiaosha Zou,Tie Xu,Fangbo Tao,Jiansong Zhang,Xiaoan Wang,C. -J. Richard Shi,Junwen Luo,Yuan Xie
title: The Spike Gating Flow: A Hierarchical Structure Based Spiking Neural Network for Online Gesture Recognition
title_zh: 尖峰门控流：用于在线手势识别的基于层次结构的尖峰神经网络
abstract: Action recognition is an exciting research avenue for artificial intelligence since it may be a game changer in the emerging industrial fields such as robotic visions and automobiles. However, current deep learning faces major challenges for such applications because of the huge computational cost and the inefficient learning. Hence, we develop a novel brain-inspired Spiking Neural Network (SNN) based system titled Spiking Gating Flow (SGF) for online action learning. The developed system consists of multiple SGF units which assembled in a hierarchical manner. A single SGF unit involves three layers: a feature extraction layer, an event-driven layer and a histogram-based training layer. To demonstrate the developed system capabilities, we employ a standard Dynamic Vision Sensor (DVS) gesture classification as a benchmark. The results indicate that we can achieve 87.5% accuracy which is comparable with Deep Learning (DL), but at smaller training/inference data number ratio 1.5:1. And only a single training epoch is required during the learning process. Meanwhile, to the best of our knowledge, this is the highest accuracy among the non-backpropagation algorithm based SNNs. At last, we conclude the few-shot learning paradigm of the developed network: 1) a hierarchical structure-based network design involves human prior knowledge; 2) SNNs for content based global dynamic feature detection.
summary: Action recognition is an exciting research avenue for artificial intelligence since it may be a game changer in the emerging industrial fields such as robotic visions and automobiles. However, current deep learning faces major challenges for such applications because of the huge computational cost and the inefficient learning. Hence, we develop a novel brain-inspired Spiking Neural Network (SNN) based system titled Spiking Gating Flow (SGF) for online action learning. The developed system consists of multiple SGF units which assembled in a hierarchical manner. A single SGF unit involves three layers: a feature extraction layer, an event-driven layer and a histogram-based training layer. To demonstrate the developed system capabilities, we employ a standard Dynamic Vision Sensor (DVS) gesture classification as a benchmark. The results indicate that we can achieve 87.5% accuracy which is comparable with Deep Learning (DL), but at smaller training/inference data number ratio 1.5:1. And only a single training epoch is required during the learning process. Meanwhile, to the best of our knowledge, this is the highest accuracy among the non-backpropagation algorithm based SNNs. At last, we conclude the few-shot learning paradigm of the developed network: 1) a hierarchical structure-based network design involves human prior knowledge; 2) SNNs for content based global dynamic feature detection.
abstract_zh: 动作识别是人工智能的一个令人兴奋的研究途径，因为它可能会改变机器人视觉和汽车等新兴工业领域的游戏规则。然而，由于巨大的计算成本和低效的学习，当前的深度学习在此类应用中面临着重大挑战。因此，我们开发了一种新颖的基于大脑启发的尖峰神经网络（SNN）的系统，名为尖峰门控流（SGF），用于在线动作学习。所开发的系统由多个以分层方式组装的 SGF 单元组成。单个 SGF 单元涉及三层：特征提取层、事件驱动层和基于直方图的训练层。为了演示开发的系统功能，我们采用标准动态视觉传感器 (DVS) 手势分类作为基准。结果表明，我们可以达到 87.5% 的准确率，与深度学习 (DL) 相当，但训练/推理数据数比例较小（1.5:1）。并且在学习过程中只需要一个训练周期。同时，据我们所知，这是基于非反向传播算法的 SNN 中精度最高的。最后，我们总结了所开发网络的少样本学习范式：1）基于层次结构的网络设计涉及人类先验知识； 2）用于基于内容的全局动态特征检测的SNN。

AI.tldr: 开发基于分层结构的脉冲神经网络（SGF）用于在线手势识别，解决传统深度学习的高计算成本和低效学习问题。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习在动作识别中面临计算成本高、学习效率低的挑战，难以满足机器人视觉和自动驾驶等工业场景需求。
AI.method: 提出分层结构的SGF系统，包含特征提取、事件驱动和直方图训练三层，利用DVS传感器进行手势分类。
AI.result: 在DVS手势分类基准上达到87.5%准确率，数据比例1.5:1且仅需单次训练周期，为非反向传播SNN最高精度。
AI.conclusion: 分层结构融合人类先验知识，SNN擅长全局动态特征检测，适用于少样本学习场景。

Hence, we develop a novel brain-inspired Spiking Neural Network (SNN) based system titled Spiking Gating Flow (SGF) for online action learning. authors_text: Danyang Tu,Wei Sun,Xiongkuo Min,Guangtao Zhai,Wei Shen
title: Video-based Human-Object Interaction Detection from Tubelet Tokens
title_zh: 基于 Tubelet 令牌的基于视频的人机交互检测
abstract: We present a novel vision Transformer, named TUTOR, which is able to learn tubelet tokens, served as highly-abstracted spatiotemporal representations, for video-based human-object interaction (V-HOI) detection. The tubelet tokens structurize videos by agglomerating and linking semantically-related patch tokens along spatial and temporal domains, which enjoy two benefits: 1) Compactness: each tubelet token is learned by a selective attention mechanism to reduce redundant spatial dependencies from others; 2) Expressiveness: each tubelet token is enabled to align with a semantic instance, i.e., an object or a human, across frames, thanks to agglomeration and linking. The effectiveness and efficiency of TUTOR are verified by extensive experiments. Results shows our method outperforms existing works by large margins, with a relative mAP gain of $16.14\%$ on VidHOI and a 2 points gain on CAD-120 as well as a $4 \times$ speedup.
summary: We present a novel vision Transformer, named TUTOR, which is able to learn tubelet tokens, served as highly-abstracted spatiotemporal representations, for video-based human-object interaction (V-HOI) detection. The tubelet tokens structurize videos by agglomerating and linking semantically-related patch tokens along spatial and temporal domains, which enjoy two benefits: 1) Compactness: each tubelet token is learned by a selective attention mechanism to reduce redundant spatial dependencies from others; 2) Expressiveness: each tubelet token is enabled to align with a semantic instance, i.e., an object or a human, across frames, thanks to agglomeration and linking. The effectiveness and efficiency of TUTOR are verified by extensive experiments. Results shows our method outperforms existing works by large margins, with a relative mAP gain of $16.14\%$ on VidHOI and a 2 points gain on CAD-120 as well as a $4 \times$ speedup.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的视觉 Transformer，名为 TUTOR，它能够学习 tubelet 标记，作为高度抽象的时空表示，用于基于视频的人机交互 (V-HOI) 检测。 Tubelet 标记通过沿着空间和时间域聚集和链接语义相关的补丁标记来结构化视频，这有两个好处：1）紧凑性：每个 Tubelet 标记都是通过选择性注意机制学习的，以减少与其他标记的冗余空间依赖性； 2）表现力：由于聚集和链接，每个 tubelet 标记都能够跨帧与语义实例（即对象或人）对齐。 TUTOR的有效性和效率经过大量的实验验证。结果表明，我们的方法大幅优于现有方法，在 VidHOI 上相对 mAP 增益为 16.14\%$，在 CAD-120 上增益 2 个点，加速比为 $4\times$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于tubelet tokens的视觉Transformer模型TUTOR，用于视频中的人-物体交互检测。
AI.motivation: 现有视频人-物体交互检测方法在时空表示上存在效率与表达力不足的问题，需更紧凑且语义对齐的表示方式。
AI.method: 通过聚合和链接语义相关patch tokens生成tubelet tokens，结合选择性注意力机制实现时空冗余压缩，并跨帧对齐语义实例。
AI.result: 在VidHOI数据集上相对mAP提升16.14%，CAD-120提升2点，推理速度加快4倍。
AI.conclusion: TUTOR通过结构化时空表示显著提升检测性能，验证了tubelet tokens在视频交互任务中的有效性与高效性。

The tubelet tokens structurize videos by agglomerating and linking semantically-related patch tokens along spatial and temporal domains, which enjoy two benefits: 1) Compactness: each tubelet token is learned by a selective attention mechanism to reduce redundant spatial dependencies from others; 2) Expressiveness: each tubelet token is enabled to align with a semantic instance, i.e., an object or a human, across frames, thanks to agglomeration and linking. The effectiveness and efficiency of TUTOR are verified by extensive experiments. Results shows our method outperforms existing works by large margins, with a relative mAP gain of $16.14\%$ on VidHOI and a 2 points gain on CAD-120 as well as a $4 \times$ speedup. 我们提出了一种新颖的视觉 Transformer，名为 TUTOR，它能够学习 tubelet 标记，作为高度抽象的时空表示，用于基于视频的人机交互 (V-HOI) 检测。 Tubelet 标记通过沿着空间和时间域聚集和链接语义相关的补丁标记来结构化视频，这有两个好处：1）紧凑性：每个 Tubelet 标记都是通过选择性注意机制学习的，以减少与其他标记的冗余空间依赖性； 2）表现力：由于聚集和链接，每个 tubelet 标记都能够跨帧与语义实例（即对象或人）对齐。 TUTOR的有效性和效率经过大量的实验验证。结果表明，我们的方法大幅优于现有方法，在 VidHOI 上相对 mAP 增益为 16.14\%$，在 CAD-120 上增益 2 个点，加速比为 $4\times$。 本文提出一种基于tubelet tokens的视觉Transformer模型TUTOR，用于视频中的人-物体交互检测。 Danyang Tu,Wei Sun,Xiongkuo Min,Guangtao Zhai,Wei Shen cs.CV

authors_text: Abhijith Sharma,Apurva Narayan
title: Soft Adversarial Training Can Retain Natural Accuracy
title_zh: 软对抗训练可以保持自然准确性
abstract: Adversarial training for neural networks has been in the limelight in recent years. The advancement in neural network architectures over the last decade has led to significant improvement in their performance. It sparked an interest in their deployment for real-time applications. This process initiated the need to understand the vulnerability of these models to adversarial attacks. It is instrumental in designing models that are robust against adversaries. Recent works have proposed novel techniques to counter the adversaries, most often sacrificing natural accuracy. Most suggest training with an adversarial version of the inputs, constantly moving away from the original distribution. The focus of our work is to use abstract certification to extract a subset of inputs for (hence we call it 'soft') adversarial training. We propose a training framework that can retain natural accuracy without sacrificing robustness in a constrained setting. Our framework specifically targets moderately critical applications which require a reasonable balance between robustness and accuracy. The results testify to the idea of soft adversarial training for the defense against adversarial attacks. At last, we propose the scope of future work for further improvement of this framework.
summary: Adversarial training for neural networks has been in the limelight in recent years. The advancement in neural network architectures over the last decade has led to significant improvement in their performance. It sparked an interest in their deployment for real-time applications. This process initiated the need to understand the vulnerability of these models to adversarial attacks. It is instrumental in designing models that are robust against adversaries. Recent works have proposed novel techniques to counter the adversaries, most often sacrificing natural accuracy. Most suggest training with an adversarial version of the inputs, constantly moving away from the original distribution. The focus of our work is to use abstract certification to extract a subset of inputs for (hence we call it 'soft') adversarial training. We propose a training framework that can retain natural accuracy without sacrificing robustness in a constrained setting. Our framework specifically targets moderately critical applications which require a reasonable balance between robustness and accuracy. The results testify to the idea of soft adversarial training for the defense against adversarial attacks. At last, we propose the scope of future work for further improvement of this framework.
abstract_zh: 近年来，神经网络的对抗训练一直备受关注。过去十年神经网络架构的进步导致其性能显着提高。它激发了人们对实时应用程序部署的兴趣。这个过程引发了了解这些模型面对对抗性攻击的脆弱性的需要。它有助于设计针对对手的稳健模型。最近的作品提出了对抗对手的新颖技术，但通常会牺牲自然准确性。大多数人建议使用对抗版本的输入进行训练，不断偏离原始分布。我们工作的重点是使用抽象认证来提取输入的子集（因此我们称之为“软”）对抗性训练。我们提出了一种训练框架，可以在不牺牲受限环境中的鲁棒性的情况下保留自然准确性。我们的框架专门针对需要在稳健性和准确性之间取得合理平衡的中等关键应用程序。结果证明了用于防御对抗性攻击的软对抗性训练的想法。最后，我们提出了进一步完善该框架的未来工作范围。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'软对抗训练'的方法，在保持模型自然准确率的同时提升其对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统对抗训练常以牺牲自然准确率为代价来提升鲁棒性，而实际应用中需要在准确性与安全性之间取得平衡，特别是在中等关键性场景中。
AI.method: 通过抽象认证技术筛选输入子集进行对抗训练，构建兼顾自然准确率与鲁棒性的训练框架。
AI.result: 实验验证了软对抗训练在防御对抗攻击中的有效性，能够在不显著降低自然准确率的前提下提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 软对抗训练为在实际应用中平衡模型准确性与安全性提供了可行方案，未来可进一步优化该框架以适应更复杂场景。

authors_text: Ahmad Chaddad,Lama Hassan,Christian Desrosiers
title: Deep Radiomic Analysis for Predicting Coronavirus Disease 2019 in Computerized Tomography and X-ray Images
title_zh: 通过计算机断层扫描和 X 射线图像预测 2019 年冠状病毒病的深度放射组学分析
comment: ef:IEEE Trans Neural Netw Learn Syst. 2022 Jan;33(1):3-11
comments: ef:IEEE Trans Neural Netw Learn Syst. 2022 Jan;33(1):3-11
abstract: This paper proposes to encode the distribution of features learned from a convolutional neural network using a Gaussian Mixture Model. These parametric features, called GMM-CNN, are derived from chest computed tomography and X-ray scans of patients with Coronavirus Disease 2019. We use the proposed GMM-CNN features as input to a robust classifier based on random forests to differentiate between COVID-19 and other pneumonia cases. Our experiments assess the advantage of GMM-CNN features compared to standard CNN classification on test images. Using a random forest classifier (80\% samples for training; 20\% samples for testing), GMM-CNN features encoded with two mixture components provided a significantly better performance than standard CNN classification (p\,$<$\,0.05). Specifically, our method achieved an accuracy in the range of 96.00\,--\,96.70\% and an area under the ROC curve in the range of 99.29\,--\,99.45\%, with the best performance obtained by combining GMM-CNN features from both computed tomography and X-ray images. Our results suggest that the proposed GMM-CNN features could improve the prediction of COVID-19 in chest computed tomography and X-ray scans.
summary: This paper proposes to encode the distribution of features learned from a convolutional neural network using a Gaussian Mixture Model. These parametric features, called GMM-CNN, are derived from chest computed tomography and X-ray scans of patients with Coronavirus Disease 2019. We use the proposed GMM-CNN features as input to a robust classifier based on random forests to differentiate between COVID-19 and other pneumonia cases. Our experiments assess the advantage of GMM-CNN features compared to standard CNN classification on test images. Using a random forest classifier (80\% samples for training; 20\% samples for testing), GMM-CNN features encoded with two mixture components provided a significantly better performance than standard CNN classification (p\,$<$\,0.05). Specifically, our method achieved an accuracy in the range of 96.00\,--\,96.70\% and an area under the ROC curve in the range of 99.29\,--\,99.45\%, with the best performance obtained by combining GMM-CNN features from both computed tomography and X-ray images. Our results suggest that the proposed GMM-CNN features could improve the prediction of COVID-19 in chest computed tomography and X-ray scans.
abstract_zh: 本文提出使用高斯混合模型对从卷积神经网络学习到的特征分布进行编码。这些参数特征称为 GMM-CNN，源自 2019 年冠状病毒病患者的胸部计算机断层扫描和 X 射线扫描。我们使用提出的 GMM-CNN 特征作为基于随机森林的稳健分类器的输入，以区分 COVID-19 和其他肺炎病例。我们的实验评估了 GMM-CNN 特征与测试图像上的标准 CNN 分类相比的优势。使用随机森林分类器（80\% 样本用于训练；20\% 样本用于测试），用两个混合组件编码的 GMM-CNN 特征提供了比标准 CNN 分类明显更好的性能 (p\,$<$\,0.05)。具体来说，我们的方法的准确度在 96.00\,--\,96.70\% 范围内，ROC 曲线下面积在 99.29\,--\,99.45\% 范围内，通过结合计算机断层扫描和 X 射线图像的 GMM-CNN 特征获得最佳性能。我们的结果表明，所提出的 GMM-CNN 特征可以改善胸部计算机断层扫描和 X 射线扫描中对 COVID-19 的预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高斯混合模型（GMM）与卷积神经网络（CNN）结合的深度放射组学方法，用于从胸部CT和X光图像中预测新冠肺炎（COVID-19）。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN分类方法在区分COVID-19与其他肺炎病例时存在局限性，需通过更有效的特征编码方法提升诊断准确性。
AI.method: 利用CNN提取胸部CT和X光图像的特征，再通过高斯混合模型（GMM）对特征分布进行参数化编码，生成GMM-CNN特征，并输入随机森林分类器进行分类。
AI.result: GMM-CNN特征在测试集上达到96.00%-96.70%的准确率和99.29%-99.45%的ROC曲线下面积，显著优于标准CNN分类（p<0.05），融合CT与X光图像特征效果最佳。
AI.conclusion: GMM-CNN特征能有效提升COVID-19在胸部影像中的预测性能，为临床诊断提供可靠辅助手段。

authors_text: Keisuke Fujii,Koh Takeuchi,Atsushi Kuribayashi,Naoya Takeishi,Yoshinobu Kawahara,Kazuya Takeda
title: Estimating counterfactual treatment outcomes over time in complex multiagent scenarios
title_zh: 在复杂的多智能体场景中随着时间的推移估计反事实治疗结果
comment: 16 pages, 11 figures. Accepted in IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems
comments: 16 pages, 11 figures. Accepted in IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems
abstract: Evaluation of intervention in a multiagent system, e.g., when humans should intervene in autonomous driving systems and when a player should pass to teammates for a good shot, is challenging in various engineering and scientific fields. Estimating the individual treatment effect (ITE) using counterfactual long-term prediction is practical to evaluate such interventions. However, most of the conventional frameworks did not consider the time-varying complex structure of multiagent relationships and covariate counterfactual prediction. This may lead to erroneous assessments of ITE and difficulty in interpretation. Here we propose an interpretable, counterfactual recurrent network in multiagent systems to estimate the effect of the intervention. Our model leverages graph variational recurrent neural networks and theory-based computation with domain knowledge for the ITE estimation framework based on long-term prediction of multiagent covariates and outcomes, which can confirm the circumstances under which the intervention is effective. On simulated models of an automated vehicle and biological agents with time-varying confounders, we show that our methods achieved lower estimation errors in counterfactual covariates and the most effective treatment timing than the baselines. Furthermore, using real basketball data, our methods performed realistic counterfactual predictions and evaluated the counterfactual passes in shot scenarios.
summary: Evaluation of intervention in a multiagent system, e.g., when humans should intervene in autonomous driving systems and when a player should pass to teammates for a good shot, is challenging in various engineering and scientific fields. Estimating the individual treatment effect (ITE) using counterfactual long-term prediction is practical to evaluate such interventions. However, most of the conventional frameworks did not consider the time-varying complex structure of multiagent relationships and covariate counterfactual prediction. This may lead to erroneous assessments of ITE and difficulty in interpretation. Here we propose an interpretable, counterfactual recurrent network in multiagent systems to estimate the effect of the intervention. Our model leverages graph variational recurrent neural networks and theory-based computation with domain knowledge for the ITE estimation framework based on long-term prediction of multiagent covariates and outcomes, which can confirm the circumstances under which the intervention is effective. On simulated models of an automated vehicle and biological agents with time-varying confounders, we show that our methods achieved lower estimation errors in counterfactual covariates and the most effective treatment timing than the baselines. Furthermore, using real basketball data, our methods performed realistic counterfactual predictions and evaluated the counterfactual passes in shot scenarios.
abstract_zh: 对多智能体系统干预的评估，例如人类何时应该干预自动驾驶系统以及球员何时应该传球给队友以获得良好的射门，在各个工程和科学领域都具有挑战性。使用反事实长期预测来估计个体治疗效果（ITE）对于评估此类干预措施是实用的。然而，大多数传统框架没有考虑多主体关系的时变复杂结构和协变量反事实预测。这可能会导致 ITE 的错误评估和解释困难。在这里，我们提出了多智能体系统中的可解释的、反事实的循环网络来估计干预的效果。我们的模型利用图变分循环神经网络和基于理论的计算以及基于多主体协变量和结果的长期预测的 ITE 估计框架的领域知识，这可以确认干预措施有效的情况。在具有时变混杂因素的自动车辆和生物制剂的模拟模型上，我们表明，与基线相比，我们的方法在反事实协变量中实现了较低的估计误差，并且实现了最有效的治疗时机。此外，使用真实的篮球数据，我们的方法执行了现实的反事实预测，并评估了投篮场景中的反事实传球。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释的反事实循环网络，用于在复杂多智能体场景中估计干预措施的长期反事实效果。
AI.motivation: 传统方法未能考虑多智能体关系的时变复杂性及协变量反事实预测，导致个体处理效应评估不准确且难以解释。
AI.method: 结合图变分循环神经网络与领域知识，构建基于长期预测的反事实 ITE 估计框架，利用理论计算增强可解释性。
AI.result: 在自动驾驶模拟、生物智能体模型及真实篮球数据中，方法在反事实协变量估计误差和治疗时机选择上优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了多智能体系统中反事实评估的时变复杂性问题，在多个场景中验证了其优越性与实用性。
