search_text: Estimating counterfactual treatment outcomes over time in complex multiagent scenarios 在复杂的多智能体场景中随着时间的推移估计反事实治疗结果 Evaluation of intervention in a multiagent system, e.g., when humans should intervene in autonomous driving systems and when a player should pass to teammates for a good shot, is challenging in various engineering and scientific fields. Estimating the individual treatment effect (ITE) using counterfactual long-term prediction is practical to evaluate such interventions. However, most of the conventional frameworks did not consider the time-varying complex structure of multiagent relationships and covariate counterfactual prediction. This may lead to erroneous assessments of ITE and difficulty in interpretation. Here we propose an interpretable, counterfactual recurrent network in multiagent systems to estimate the effect of the intervention. Our model leverages graph variational recurrent neural networks and theory-based computation with domain knowledge for the ITE estimation framework based on long-term prediction of multiagent covariates and outcomes, which can confirm the circumstances under which the intervention is effective. On simulated models of an automated vehicle and biological agents with time-varying confounders, we show that our methods achieved lower estimation errors in counterfactual covariates and the most effective treatment timing than the baselines. Furthermore, using real basketball data, our methods performed realistic counterfactual predictions and evaluated the counterfactual passes in shot scenarios. 对多智能体系统干预的评估，例如人类何时应该干预自动驾驶系统以及球员何时应该传球给队友以获得良好的射门，在各个工程和科学领域都具有挑战性。使用反事实长期预测来估计个体治疗效果（ITE）对于评估此类干预措施是实用的。然而，大多数传统框架没有考虑多主体关系的时变复杂结构和协变量反事实预测。这可能会导致 ITE 的错误评估和解释困难。在这里，我们提出了多智能体系统中的可解释的、反事实的循环网络来估计干预的效果。我们的模型利用图变分循环神经网络和基于理论的计算以及基于多主体协变量和结果的长期预测的 ITE 估计框架的领域知识，这可以确认干预措施有效的情况。在具有时变混杂因素的自动车辆和生物制剂的模拟模型上，我们表明，与基线相比，我们的方法在反事实协变量中实现了较低的估计误差，并且实现了最有效的治疗时机。此外，使用真实的篮球数据，我们的方法执行了现实的反事实预测，并评估了投篮场景中的反事实传球。 本文提出一种可解释的反事实循环网络，用于在复杂多智能体场景中估计干预措施的长期反事实效果。 Keisuke Fujii,Koh Takeuchi,Atsushi Kuribayashi,Naoya Takeishi,Yoshinobu Kawahara,Kazuya Takeda cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MA,stat.ME,stat.ML

authors_text: Masakiyo Teranishi,Kazushi Tsutsui,Kazuya Takeda,Keisuke Fujii
title: Evaluation of creating scoring opportunities for teammates in soccer via trajectory prediction
title_zh: 通过轨迹预测评估足球比赛中为队友创造得分机会的情况
comment: 22 pages, 8 figures, accepted in 9th Workshop on Machine Learning and Data Mining for Sports Analytics 2022 (MLSA'22) co-located with ECML-PKDD'22
comments: 22 pages, 8 figures, accepted in 9th Workshop on Machine Learning and Data Mining for Sports Analytics 2022 (MLSA'22) co-located with ECML-PKDD'22
abstract: Evaluating the individual movements for teammates in soccer players is crucial for assessing teamwork, scouting, and fan engagement. It has been said that players in a 90-min game do not have the ball for about 87 minutes on average. However, it has remained difficult to evaluate an attacking player without receiving the ball, and to reveal how movement contributes to the creation of scoring opportunities for teammates. In this paper, we evaluate players who create off-ball scoring opportunities by comparing actual movements with the reference movements generated via trajectory prediction. First, we predict the trajectories of players using a graph variational recurrent neural network that can accurately model the relationship between players and predict the long-term trajectory. Next, based on the difference in the modified off-ball evaluation index between the actual and the predicted trajectory as a reference, we evaluate how the actual movement contributes to scoring opportunity compared to the predicted movement. For verification, we examined the relationship with the annual salary, the goals, and the rating in the game by experts for all games of a team in a professional soccer league in a year. The results show that the annual salary and the proposed indicator correlated significantly, which could not be explained by the existing indicators and goals. Our results suggest the effectiveness of the proposed method as an indicator for a player without the ball to create a scoring chance for teammates.
summary: Evaluating the individual movements for teammates in soccer players is crucial for assessing teamwork, scouting, and fan engagement. It has been said that players in a 90-min game do not have the ball for about 87 minutes on average. However, it has remained difficult to evaluate an attacking player without receiving the ball, and to reveal how movement contributes to the creation of scoring opportunities for teammates. In this paper, we evaluate players who create off-ball scoring opportunities by comparing actual movements with the reference movements generated via trajectory prediction. First, we predict the trajectories of players using a graph variational recurrent neural network that can accurately model the relationship between players and predict the long-term trajectory. Next, based on the difference in the modified off-ball evaluation index between the actual and the predicted trajectory as a reference, we evaluate how the actual movement contributes to scoring opportunity compared to the predicted movement. For verification, we examined the relationship with the annual salary, the goals, and the rating in the game by experts for all games of a team in a professional soccer league in a year. The results show that the annual salary and the proposed indicator correlated significantly, which could not be explained by the existing indicators and goals. Our results suggest the effectiveness of the proposed method as an indicator for a player without the ball to create a scoring chance for teammates.
abstract_zh: 评估足球运动员队友的个人动作对于评估团队合作、球探和球迷参与度至关重要。据说一场90分钟的比赛中，球员平均没有球权的时间约为87分钟。然而，在没有接球的情况下评估进攻球员并揭示移动如何有助于为队友创造得分机会仍然很困难。在本文中，我们通过将实际动作与通过轨迹预测生成的参考动作进行比较来评估创造无球得分机会的球员。首先，我们使用图变分循环神经网络来预测玩家的轨迹，该网络可以准确地建模玩家之间的关系并预测长期轨迹。接下来，基于实际轨迹和预测轨迹之间修改后的无球评估指数的差异作为参考，我们评估实际运动与预测运动相比对得分机会的贡献。为了验证这一点，我们考察了某支球队一年内参加职业足球联赛的所有比赛的年薪、进球数以及专家在比赛中的评分之间的关​​系。结果表明，年薪与拟定指标显着相关，无法用现有指标和目标来解释。我们的结果表明，所提出的方法作为无球球员为队友创造得分机会的指标是有效的。

AI.tldr: 通过轨迹预测评估足球比赛中无球球员为队友创造得分机会的能力。
AI.motivation: 传统指标难以量化无球球员的贡献，而球员在比赛中大部分时间无球，需新方法评估其团队作用。
AI.method: 采用图变分循环神经网络预测球员轨迹，对比实际与预测轨迹的差异，构建无球贡献评估指标。
AI.result: 新指标与球员年薪、专家评分显著相关，且优于现有指标与进球数的解释力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效捕捉无球球员的战术价值，为球员评估提供新视角。

authors_text: Zeyu Dai,Shengcai Liu,Ke Tang,Qing Li
title: Saliency Attack: Towards Imperceptible Black-box Adversarial Attack
title_zh: 显着性攻击：面向难以察觉的黑盒对抗性攻击
abstract: Deep neural networks are vulnerable to adversarial examples, even in the black-box setting where the attacker is only accessible to the model output. Recent studies have devised effective black-box attacks with high query efficiency. However, such performance is often accompanied by compromises in attack imperceptibility, hindering the practical use of these approaches. In this paper, we propose to restrict the perturbations to a small salient region to generate adversarial examples that can hardly be perceived. This approach is readily compatible with many existing black-box attacks and can significantly improve their imperceptibility with little degradation in attack success rate. Further, we propose the Saliency Attack, a new black-box attack aiming to refine the perturbations in the salient region to achieve even better imperceptibility. Extensive experiments show that compared to the state-of-the-art black-box attacks, our approach achieves much better imperceptibility scores, including most apparent distortion (MAD), $L_0$ and $L_2$ distances, and also obtains significantly higher success rates judged by a human-like threshold on MAD. Importantly, the perturbations generated by our approach are interpretable to some extent. Finally, it is also demonstrated to be robust to different detection-based defenses.
summary: Deep neural networks are vulnerable to adversarial examples, even in the black-box setting where the attacker is only accessible to the model output. Recent studies have devised effective black-box attacks with high query efficiency. However, such performance is often accompanied by compromises in attack imperceptibility, hindering the practical use of these approaches. In this paper, we propose to restrict the perturbations to a small salient region to generate adversarial examples that can hardly be perceived. This approach is readily compatible with many existing black-box attacks and can significantly improve their imperceptibility with little degradation in attack success rate. Further, we propose the Saliency Attack, a new black-box attack aiming to refine the perturbations in the salient region to achieve even better imperceptibility. Extensive experiments show that compared to the state-of-the-art black-box attacks, our approach achieves much better imperceptibility scores, including most apparent distortion (MAD), $L_0$ and $L_2$ distances, and also obtains significantly higher success rates judged by a human-like threshold on MAD. Importantly, the perturbations generated by our approach are interpretable to some extent. Finally, it is also demonstrated to be robust to different detection-based defenses.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络很容易受到对抗性示例的影响，即使在攻击者只能访问模型输出的黑盒设置中也是如此。最近的研究设计了具有高查询效率的有效黑盒攻击。然而，这种性能往往伴随着攻击不可察觉性的妥协，阻碍了这些方法的实际使用。在本文中，我们建议将扰动限制在一个小的显着区域，以生成难以察觉的对抗性示例。这种方法很容易与许多现有的黑盒攻击兼容，并且可以显着提高其隐蔽性，同时攻击成功率几乎没有下降。此外，我们提出了显着性攻击，这是一种新的黑盒攻击，旨在细化显着区域的扰动，以实现更好的不可察觉性。大量实验表明，与最先进的黑盒攻击相比，我们的方法实现了更好的不可察觉性分数，包括最明显失真（MAD）、$L_0$ 和 $L_2$ 距离，并且通过 MAD 上的类人阈值判断，还获得了显着更高的成功率。重要的是，我们的方法产生的扰动在某种程度上是可以解释的。最后，它还被证明对不同的基于检测的防御具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种称为Saliency Attack的黑盒对抗攻击方法，通过限制扰动区域到显著区域以生成更难以察觉的对抗样本。
AI.motivation: 现有黑盒攻击方法在查询效率上表现优异，但牺牲了攻击不可感知性，限制了实际应用。本文旨在提升攻击的不可感知性，同时保持较高的成功率。
AI.method: 通过将扰动限制在显著区域改进现有黑盒攻击，并提出Saliency Attack方法进一步优化显著区域的扰动，结合MAD、L0/L2距离等指标评估不可感知性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在不可感知性指标上优于现有方法，人类阈值下的成功率显著提高，且扰动具有可解释性，对检测防御具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: Saliency Attack通过聚焦显著区域有效提升了黑盒攻击的不可感知性，在保持成功率的同时增强了实用性和鲁棒性。

search_text: Saliency Attack: Towards Imperceptible Black-box Adversarial Attack 显着性攻击：面向难以察觉的黑盒对抗性攻击 Deep neural networks are vulnerable to adversarial examples, even in the black-box setting where the attacker is only accessible to the model output. Recent studies have devised effective black-box attacks with high query efficiency. However, such performance is often accompanied by compromises in attack imperceptibility, hindering the practical use of these approaches. In this paper, we propose to restrict the perturbations to a small salient region to generate adversarial examples that can hardly be perceived. This approach is readily compatible with many existing black-box attacks and can significantly improve their imperceptibility with little degradation in attack success rate. Further, we propose the Saliency Attack, a new black-box attack aiming to refine the perturbations in the salient region to achieve even better imperceptibility. Extensive experiments show that compared to the state-of-the-art black-box attacks, our approach achieves much better imperceptibility scores, including most apparent distortion (MAD), $L_0$ and $L_2$ distances, and also obtains significantly higher success rates judged by a human-like threshold on MAD. Importantly, the perturbations generated by our approach are interpretable to some extent. Finally, it is also demonstrated to be robust to different detection-based defenses. 深度神经网络很容易受到对抗性示例的影响，即使在攻击者只能访问模型输出的黑盒设置中也是如此。最近的研究设计了具有高查询效率的有效黑盒攻击。然而，这种性能往往伴随着攻击不可察觉性的妥协，阻碍了这些方法的实际使用。在本文中，我们建议将扰动限制在一个小的显着区域，以生成难以察觉的对抗性示例。这种方法很容易与许多现有的黑盒攻击兼容，并且可以显着提高其隐蔽性，同时攻击成功率几乎没有下降。此外，我们提出了显着性攻击，这是一种新的黑盒攻击，旨在细化显着区域的扰动，以实现更好的不可察觉性。大量实验表明，与最先进的黑盒攻击相比，我们的方法实现了更好的不可察觉性分数，包括最明显失真（MAD）、$L_0$ 和 $L_2$ 距离，并且通过 MAD 上的类人阈值判断，还获得了显着更高的成功率。重要的是，我们的方法产生的扰动在某种程度上是可以解释的。最后，它还被证明对不同的基于检测的防御具有鲁棒性。 本文提出一种称为Saliency Attack的黑盒对抗攻击方法，通过限制扰动区域到显著区域以生成更难以察觉的对抗样本。 Zeyu Dai,Shengcai Liu,Ke Tang,Qing Li cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Ahmad Chaddad,Mingli Zhang,Lama Hassan,Tamim Niazi
title: Modeling of Textures to Predict Immune Cell Status and Survival of Brain Tumour Patients
title_zh: 通过纹理建模来预测脑肿瘤患者的免疫细胞状态和生存率
abstract: Radiomics has shown a capability for different types of cancers such as glioma to predict the clinical outcome. It can have a non-invasive means of evaluating the immunotherapy response prior to treatment. However, the use of deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs)-based radiomics requires large training image sets. To avoid this problem, we investigate a new imaging features that model distribution with a Gaussian mixture model (GMM) of learned 3D CNN features. Using these deep radiomic features (DRFs), we aim to predict the immune marker status (low versus high) and overall survival for glioma patients. We extract the DRFs by aggregating the activation maps of a pre-trained 3D-CNN within labeled tumor regions of MRI scans that corresponded immune markers of 151 patients. Our experiments are performed to assess the relationship between the proposed DRFs, three immune cell markers (Macrophage M1, Neutrophils and T Cells Follicular Helper), and measure their association with overall survival. Using the random forest (RF) model, DRFs was able to predict the immune marker status with area under the ROC curve (AUC) of 78.67, 83.93 and 75.67\% for Macrophage M1, Neutrophils and T Cells Follicular Helper, respectively. Combined the immune markers with DRFs and clinical variables, Kaplan-Meier estimator and Log-rank test achieved the most significant difference between predicted groups of patients (short-term versus long-term survival) with p\,=\,4.31$\times$10$^{-7}$ compared to p\,=\,0.03 for Immune cell markers, p\,=\,0.07 for clinical variables , and p\,=\,1.45$\times$10$^{-5}$ for DRFs. Our findings indicate that the proposed features (DRFs) used in RF models may significantly consider prognosticating patients with brain tumour prior to surgery through regularly acquired imaging data.

Our experiments are performed to assess the relationship between the proposed DRFs, three immune cell markers (Macrophage M1, Neutrophils and T Cells Follicular Helper), and measure their association with overall survival. Using the random forest (RF) model, DRFs was able to predict the immune marker status with area under the ROC curve (AUC) of 78.67, 83.93 and 75.67\% for Macrophage M1, Neutrophils and T Cells Follicular Helper, respectively. Combined the immune markers with DRFs and clinical variables, Kaplan-Meier estimator and Log-rank test achieved the most significant difference between predicted groups of patients (short-term versus long-term survival) with p\,=\,4.31$\times$10$^{-7}$ compared to p\,=\,0.03 for Immune cell markers, p\,=\,0.07 for clinical variables , and p\,=\,1.45$\times$10$^{-5}$ for DRFs. Our findings indicate that the proposed features (DRFs) used in RF models may significantly consider prognosticating patients with brain tumour prior to surgery through regularly acquired imaging data.
abstract_zh: 放射组学已显示出对神经胶质瘤等不同类型癌症预测临床结果的能力。它可以有一种在治疗前评估免疫治疗反应的非侵入性方法。然而，使用基于深度卷积神经网络（CNN）的放射组学需要大量的训练图像集。为了避免这个问题，我们研究了一种新的成像特征，该特征使用学习的 3D CNN 特征的高斯混合模型 (GMM) 来建模分布。利用这些深层放射组学特征 (DRF)，我们的目标是预测神经胶质瘤患者的免疫标记物状态（低与高）和总体生存率。我们通过聚合 MRI 扫描的标记肿瘤区域内预先训练的 3D-CNN 的激活图来提取 DRF，这些区域与 151 名患者的免疫标记相对应。我们的实验旨在评估所提出的 DRF、三种免疫细胞标记物（巨噬细胞 M1、中性粒细胞和滤泡辅助 T 细胞）之间的关系，并测量它们与总体生存率的关联。使用随机森林 (RF) 模型，DRF 能够预测巨噬细胞 M1、中性粒细胞和滤泡辅助 T 细胞的免疫标记物状态，ROC 曲线下面积 (AUC) 分别为 78.67、83.93 和 75.67%。将免疫标记物与 DRF 和临床变量相结合，Kaplan-Meier 估计量和对数秩检验实现了预测患者组（短期与长期生存）之间的最显着差异，其中 p\,=\,4.31$\times$10$^{-7}$ 与免疫细胞标记物 p\,=\,0.03 相比，临床变量 p\,=\,0.07 ，以及p\,=\,1.45$\times$10$^{-5}$ 对于 DRF。我们的研究结果表明，RF 模型中使用的拟议特征 (DRF) 可以在手术前通过定期采集的成像数据显着考虑对脑肿瘤患者进行预测。

AI.tldr: 通过建模纹理特征预测脑肿瘤患者的免疫细胞状态及生存期
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习方法依赖大量训练数据，而新方法通过GMM建模减少数据需求，提升预测效率
AI.method: 利用3D CNN提取特征并结合GMM建模生成DRFs，再通过随机森林模型预测免疫标志物状态，并结合临床变量进行生存分析
AI.result: DRFs预测免疫标志物AUC达78.67%-83.93%，结合临床变量后生存分析p值达4.31×10⁻⁷，显著优于单独使用免疫标志物或临床变量
AI.conclusion: DRFs可有效用于术前通过常规影像数据预测脑肿瘤患者预后，为个体化治疗提供依据

authors_text: Indrajeet Yadav,Micheal Sebok,Herbert G Tanner
title: Receding Horizon Navigation and Target Tracking for Aerial Detection of Transient Radioactivity
title_zh: 用于瞬变放射性空中探测的后退地平线导航和目标跟踪
abstract: The paper presents a receding horizon planning and control strategy for quadrotor-type \ac{mav}s to navigate reactively and intercept a moving target in a cluttered unknown and dynamic environment. Leveraging a lightweight short-range sensor that generates a point-cloud within a relatively narrow and short \ac{fov}, and an \acs{ssd}-MobileNet based Deep neural network running on board the \ac{mav}, the proposed motion planning and control strategy produces safe and dynamically feasible \ac{mav} trajectories within the sensor \acs{fov}, which the vehicle uses to autonomously navigate, pursue, and intercept its moving target. This task is completed without reliance on a global planner or prior information about the environment or the moving target. The effectiveness of the reported planner is demonstrated numerically and experimentally in cluttered indoor and outdoor environments featuring maximum speeds of up to 4.5-5~m/s.
summary: The paper presents a receding horizon planning and control strategy for quadrotor-type \ac{mav}s to navigate reactively and intercept a moving target in a cluttered unknown and dynamic environment. Leveraging a lightweight short-range sensor that generates a point-cloud within a relatively narrow and short \ac{fov}, and an \acs{ssd}-MobileNet based Deep neural network running on board the \ac{mav}, the proposed motion planning and control strategy produces safe and dynamically feasible \ac{mav} trajectories within the sensor \acs{fov}, which the vehicle uses to autonomously navigate, pursue, and intercept its moving target. This task is completed without reliance on a global planner or prior information about the environment or the moving target. The effectiveness of the reported planner is demonstrated numerically and experimentally in cluttered indoor and outdoor environments featuring maximum speeds of up to 4.5-5~m/s.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种四旋翼型 \ac{mav} 的后退地平线规划和控制策略，以在杂乱的未知动态环境中进行反应性导航并拦截移动目标。利用在相对狭窄和短的 \ac{fov} 内生成点云的轻量级短程传感器，以及在 \ac{mav} 上运行的基于 \acs{ssd}-MobileNet 的深度神经网络，所提出的运动规划和控制策略在传感器 \acs{fov} 内产生安全且动态可行的 \ac{mav} 轨迹，车辆使用该轨迹自动导航、追踪和拦截其移动目标。此任务的完成无需依赖全局规划器或有关环境或移动目标的先验信息。所报告的规划器的有效性在杂乱的室内和室外环境中通过数值和实验得到证明，最大速度高达 4.5-5~m/s。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于滚动时域规划与控制策略的四旋翼飞行器导航与目标追踪方法，用于在复杂动态环境中自主检测移动目标。
AI.motivation: 在未知且动态的复杂环境中，需要飞行器自主导航并拦截移动目标，尤其在无先验环境信息或全局规划的情况下，这对放射性物质检测等安全任务至关重要。
AI.method: 结合轻量级短距传感器生成点云数据与SSD-MobileNet深度神经网络，通过滚动时域规划生成安全且动态可行的飞行轨迹，实现实时目标追踪与拦截。
AI.result: 在室内和户外复杂环境中，飞行器最大速度达到4.5-5 m/s，成功验证了该方法在无全局规划和先验信息下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为动态环境中的自主目标拦截提供了高效解决方案，适用于需要实时反应的空中检测任务。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于滚动时域规划与控制策略的四旋翼飞行器导航与目标追踪方法，用于在复杂动态环境中自主检测移动目标。

search_text: Receding Horizon Navigation and Target Tracking for Aerial Detection of Transient Radioactivity 用于瞬变放射性空中探测的后退地平线导航和目标跟踪 The paper presents a receding horizon planning and control strategy for quadrotor-type \ac{mav}s to navigate reactively and intercept a moving target in a cluttered unknown and dynamic environment. Leveraging a lightweight short-range sensor that generates a point-cloud within a relatively narrow and short \ac{fov}, and an \acs{ssd}-MobileNet based Deep neural network running on board the \ac{mav}, the proposed motion planning and control strategy produces safe and dynamically feasible \ac{mav} trajectories within the sensor \acs{fov}, which the vehicle uses to autonomously navigate, pursue, and intercept its moving target. This task is completed without reliance on a global planner or prior information about the environment or the moving target. The effectiveness of the reported planner is demonstrated numerically and experimentally in cluttered indoor and outdoor environments featuring maximum speeds of up to 4.5-5~m/s. 本文提出了一种四旋翼型 \ac{mav} 的后退地平线规划和控制策略，以在杂乱的未知动态环境中进行反应性导航并拦截移动目标。利用在相对狭窄和短的 \ac{fov} 内生成点云的轻量级短程传感器，以及在 \ac{mav} 上运行的基于 \acs{ssd}-MobileNet 的深度神经网络，所提出的运动规划和控制策略在传感器 \acs{fov} 内产生安全且动态可行的 \ac{mav} 轨迹，车辆使用该轨迹自动导航、追踪和拦截其移动目标。此任务的完成无需依赖全局规划器或有关环境或移动目标的先验信息。所报告的规划器的有效性在杂乱的室内和室外环境中通过数值和实验得到证明，最大速度高达 4.5-5~m/s。 本文提出了一种基于滚动时域规划与控制策略的四旋翼飞行器导航与目标追踪方法，用于在复杂动态环境中自主检测移动目标。 Indrajeet Yadav,Micheal Sebok,Herbert G Tanner cs.RO

authors_text: Juuso Eronen,Michal Ptaszynski,Fumito Masui,Gniewosz Leliwa,Michal Wroczynski,Mateusz Piech,Aleksander Smywinski-Pohl
title: Initial Study into Application of Feature Density and Linguistically-backed Embedding to Improve Machine Learning-based Cyberbullying Detection
title_zh: 应用特征密度和语言支持的嵌入改进基于机器学习的网络欺凌检测的初步研究
comment: ef:Proceedings of The 6th Linguistic and Cognitive Approaches to Dialog Agents (LaCATODA 2020) IJCAI 2020 Workshop, Yokohama, Japan, January 2020
comments: ef:Proceedings of The 6th Linguistic and Cognitive Approaches to Dialog Agents (LaCATODA 2020) IJCAI 2020 Workshop, Yokohama, Japan, January 2020
abstract: In this research, we study the change in the performance of machine learning (ML) classifiers when various linguistic preprocessing methods of a dataset were used, with the specific focus on linguistically-backed embeddings in Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN). Moreover, we study the concept of Feature Density and confirm its potential to comparatively predict the performance of ML classifiers, including CNN. The research was conducted on a Formspring dataset provided in a Kaggle competition on automatic cyberbullying detection. The dataset was re-annotated by objective experts (psychologists), as the importance of professional annotation in cyberbullying research has been indicated multiple times. The study confirmed the effectiveness of Neural Networks in cyberbullying detection and the correlation between classifier performance and Feature Density while also proposing a new approach of training various linguistically-backed embeddings for Convolutional Neural Networks.
summary: In this research, we study the change in the performance of machine learning (ML) classifiers when various linguistic preprocessing methods of a dataset were used, with the specific focus on linguistically-backed embeddings in Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN). Moreover, we study the concept of Feature Density and confirm its potential to comparatively predict the performance of ML classifiers, including CNN. The research was conducted on a Formspring dataset provided in a Kaggle competition on automatic cyberbullying detection. The dataset was re-annotated by objective experts (psychologists), as the importance of professional annotation in cyberbullying research has been indicated multiple times. The study confirmed the effectiveness of Neural Networks in cyberbullying detection and the correlation between classifier performance and Feature Density while also proposing a new approach of training various linguistically-backed embeddings for Convolutional Neural Networks.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们研究了使用数据集的各种语言预处理方法时机器学习（ML）分类器性能的变化，特别关注卷积神经网络（CNN）中语言支持的嵌入。此外，我们研究了特征密度的概念，并证实了它在比较预测 ML 分类器（包括 CNN）性能方面的潜力。这项研究是在 Kaggle 自动网络欺凌检测竞赛中提供的 Formspring 数据集上进行的。该数据集由客观专家（心理学家）重新注释，因为专业注释在网络欺凌研究中的重要性已被多次指出。该研究证实了神经网络在网络欺凌检测中的有效性以及分类器性能与特征密度之间的相关性，同时还提出了一种为卷积神经网络训练各种语言支持嵌入的新方法。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了特征密度与语言支持嵌入在改进基于机器学习的网络欺凌检测中的应用效果。
AI.motivation: 为提高网络欺凌检测准确率，研究结合专业标注数据与特征密度分析，探索更有效的模型优化方法。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络（CNN）结合语言支持嵌入，分析不同语言预处理方法对分类性能的影响，并通过特征密度评估模型表现。
AI.result: 验证了神经网络在检测中的有效性，发现分类器性能与特征密度存在相关性，并提出新的嵌入训练方法。
AI.conclusion: 语言支持嵌入与特征密度分析可提升模型性能，为网络欺凌检测提供新思路与技术路径。

authors_text: Young Wu,Jeremy McMahan,Xiaojin Zhu,Qiaomin Xie
title: Reward Poisoning Attacks on Offline Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 离线多智能体强化学习的奖励投毒攻击
abstract: In offline multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), agents estimate policies from a given dataset. We study reward-poisoning attacks in this setting where an exogenous attacker modifies the rewards in the dataset before the agents see the dataset. The attacker wants to guide each agent into a nefarious target policy while minimizing the $L^p$ norm of the reward modification. Unlike attacks on single-agent RL, we show that the attacker can install the target policy as a Markov Perfect Dominant Strategy Equilibrium (MPDSE), which rational agents are guaranteed to follow. This attack can be significantly cheaper than separate single-agent attacks. We show that the attack works on various MARL agents including uncertainty-aware learners, and we exhibit linear programs to efficiently solve the attack problem. We also study the relationship between the structure of the datasets and the minimal attack cost. Our work paves the way for studying defense in offline MARL.
summary: In offline multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), agents estimate policies from a given dataset. We study reward-poisoning attacks in this setting where an exogenous attacker modifies the rewards in the dataset before the agents see the dataset. The attacker wants to guide each agent into a nefarious target policy while minimizing the $L^p$ norm of the reward modification. Unlike attacks on single-agent RL, we show that the attacker can install the target policy as a Markov Perfect Dominant Strategy Equilibrium (MPDSE), which rational agents are guaranteed to follow. This attack can be significantly cheaper than separate single-agent attacks. We show that the attack works on various MARL agents including uncertainty-aware learners, and we exhibit linear programs to efficiently solve the attack problem. We also study the relationship between the structure of the datasets and the minimal attack cost. Our work paves the way for studying defense in offline MARL.
abstract_zh: 在离线多智能体强化学习（MARL）中，智能体根据给定的数据集估计策略。我们在这种情况下研究奖励中毒攻击，其中外源攻击者在代理看到数据集之前修改数据集中的奖励。攻击者希望引导每个代理执行邪恶的目标策略，同时最小化奖励修改的 $L^p$ 范数。与对单智能体强化学习的攻击不同，我们证明攻击者可以将目标策略安装为马尔可夫完美支配策略均衡（MPDSE），理性智能体保证遵循该策略。这种攻击比单独的单代理攻击要便宜得多。我们展示了该攻击适用于各种 MARL 代理，包括不确定性感知学习器，并且我们展示了线性程序来有效解决攻击问题。我们还研究了数据集结构与最小攻击成本之间的关系。我们的工作为离线 MARL 中的防御研究铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文研究离线多智能体强化学习中奖励中毒攻击的问题，攻击者通过修改数据集奖励引导智能体执行目标策略并最小化修改成本。
AI.motivation: 离线多智能体强化学习依赖历史数据集，存在数据被篡改的安全风险。现有攻击研究多针对单智能体，而多智能体场景下攻击机制与成本尚不明确，需探索更高效的攻击方法。
AI.method: 攻击者通过线性规划求解最小化L^p范数的奖励修改方案，将目标策略植入马尔可夫完美支配策略均衡（MPDSE），适用于不确定性感知等各类MARL智能体。
AI.result: 攻击方法在多种MARL智能体上有效，成本显著低于单智能体攻击；揭示了数据集结构与攻击成本的关联性，为防御研究提供理论基础。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出针对离线MARL的奖励中毒攻击框架，证明其有效性与经济性，为后续防御机制设计提供了关键分析视角。

We show that the attack works on various MARL agents including uncertainty-aware learners, and we exhibit linear programs to efficiently solve the attack problem. We also study the relationship between the structure of the datasets and the minimal attack cost. Our work paves the way for studying defense in offline MARL. 在离线多智能体强化学习（MARL）中，智能体根据给定的数据集估计策略。我们在这种情况下研究奖励中毒攻击，其中外源攻击者在代理看到数据集之前修改数据集中的奖励。攻击者希望引导每个代理执行邪恶的目标策略，同时最小化奖励修改的 $L^p$ 范数。与对单智能体强化学习的攻击不同，我们证明攻击者可以将目标策略安装为马尔可夫完美支配策略均衡（MPDSE），理性智能体保证遵循该策略。这种攻击比单独的单代理攻击要便宜得多。我们展示了该攻击适用于各种 MARL 代理，包括不确定性感知学习器，并且我们展示了线性程序来有效解决攻击问题。我们还研究了数据集结构与最小攻击成本之间的关系。我们的工作为离线 MARL 中的防御研究铺平了道路。 本文研究离线多智能体强化学习中奖励中毒攻击的问题，攻击者通过修改数据集奖励引导智能体执行目标策略并最小化修改成本。 Young Wu,Jeremy McMahan,Xiaojin Zhu,Qiaomin Xie cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR,cs.GT

authors_text: Ruiling Xiao,Jiayang Niu
title: A Superimposed Divide-and-Conquer Image Recognition Method for SEM Images of Nanoparticles on The Surface of Monocrystalline silicon with High Aggregation Degree
title_zh: 高聚集度单晶硅表面纳米颗粒SEM图像的叠加分治图像识别方法
abstract: The nanoparticle size and distribution information in the SEM images of silicon crystals are generally counted by manual methods. The realization of automatic machine recognition is significant in materials science. This paper proposed a superposition partitioning image recognition method to realize automatic recognition and information statistics of silicon crystal nanoparticle SEM images. Especially for the complex and highly aggregated characteristics of silicon crystal particle size, an accurate recognition step and contour statistics method based on morphological processing are given. This method has technical reference value for the recognition of Monocrystalline silicon surface nanoparticle images under different SEM shooting conditions. Besides, it outperforms other methods in terms of recognition accuracy and algorithm efficiency.
summary: The nanoparticle size and distribution information in the SEM images of silicon crystals are generally counted by manual methods. The realization of automatic machine recognition is significant in materials science. This paper proposed a superposition partitioning image recognition method to realize automatic recognition and information statistics of silicon crystal nanoparticle SEM images. Especially for the complex and highly aggregated characteristics of silicon crystal particle size, an accurate recognition step and contour statistics method based on morphological processing are given. This method has technical reference value for the recognition of Monocrystalline silicon surface nanoparticle images under different SEM shooting conditions. Besides, it outperforms other methods in terms of recognition accuracy and algorithm efficiency.
abstract_zh: 硅晶体SEM图像中的纳米颗粒尺寸和分布信息通常通过手动方法进行计数。自动机器识别的实现对于材料科学具有重要意义。提出一种叠加分割图像识别方法，实现硅晶体纳米粒子SEM图像的自动识别和信息统计。特别是针对硅晶粒度复杂、高度聚集的特点，给出了基于形态处理的精确识别步骤和轮廓统计方法。该方法对于不同SEM拍摄条件下单晶硅表面纳米粒子图像的识别具有技术参考价值。此外，它在识别精度和算法效率方面优于其他方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种叠加分治图像识别方法，用于自动识别和统计单晶硅表面高聚集度纳米颗粒的SEM图像信息。
AI.motivation: 传统人工统计单晶硅纳米颗粒SEM图像效率低，而自动识别技术对材料科学研究具有重要意义。
AI.method: 基于形态学处理的叠加分治图像分割方法，结合精确识别步骤与轮廓统计技术。
AI.result: 该方法在识别准确率和算法效率上优于现有技术，适用于不同SEM拍摄条件下的图像识别。
AI.conclusion: 提出的叠加分治方法为单晶硅表面纳米颗粒图像识别提供了有效的技术参考。

authors_text: Haiyu Wu,Vítor Albiero,K. S. Krishnapriya,Michael C. King,Kevin W. Bowyer
title: Face Recognition Accuracy Across Demographics: Shining a Light Into the Problem
title_zh: 跨人口统计特征的人脸识别准确性：解决问题
abstract: We explore varying face recognition accuracy across demographic groups as a phenomenon partly caused by differences in face illumination. We observe that for a common operational scenario with controlled image acquisition, there is a large difference in face region brightness between African-American and Caucasian, and also a smaller difference between male and female. We show that impostor image pairs with both faces under-exposed, or both overexposed, have an increased false match rate (FMR). Conversely, image pairs with strongly different face brightness have a decreased similarity measure. We propose a brightness information metric to measure variation in brightness in the face and show that face brightness that is too low or too high has reduced information in the face region, providing a cause for the lower accuracy. Based on this, for operational scenarios with controlled image acquisition, illumination should be adjusted for each individual to obtain appropriate face image brightness. This is the first work that we are aware of to explore how the level of brightness of the skin region in a pair of face images (rather than a single image) impacts face recognition accuracy, and to evaluate this as a systematic factor causing unequal accuracy across demographics. The code is at https://github.com/HaiyuWu/FaceBrightness.
summary: We explore varying face recognition accuracy across demographic groups as a phenomenon partly caused by differences in face illumination. We observe that for a common operational scenario with controlled image acquisition, there is a large difference in face region brightness between African-American and Caucasian, and also a smaller difference between male and female. We show that impostor image pairs with both faces under-exposed, or both overexposed, have an increased false match rate (FMR). Conversely, image pairs with strongly different face brightness have a decreased similarity measure. We propose a brightness information metric to measure variation in brightness in the face and show that face brightness that is too low or too high has reduced information in the face region, providing a cause for the lower accuracy. Based on this, for operational scenarios with controlled image acquisition, illumination should be adjusted for each individual to obtain appropriate face image brightness. This is the first work that we are aware of to explore how the level of brightness of the skin region in a pair of face images (rather than a single image) impacts face recognition accuracy, and to evaluate this as a systematic factor causing unequal accuracy across demographics. The code is at https://github.com/HaiyuWu/FaceBrightness.
abstract_zh: 我们探讨了不同人口群体的人脸识别准确度差异，这是一种部分由人脸照明差异引起的现象。我们观察到，对于受控图像采集的常见操作场景，非洲裔美国人和白种人之间的面部区域亮度存在较大差异，而男性和女性之间的差异较小。我们发现，两张脸都曝光不足或都曝光过度的冒名顶替者图像对的错误匹配率（FMR）会增加。相反，面部亮度差异很大的图像对的相似性度量会降低。我们提出了一种亮度信息度量来测量面部亮度的变化，并表明面部亮度太低或太高会减少面部区域的信息，从而导致准确性降低。基于此，对于受控图像采集的操作场景，应针对每个个体调整照明以获得合适的人脸图像亮度。这是我们所知的第一项研究，探索一对人脸图像（而不是单个图像）中皮肤区域的亮度水平如何影响人脸识别的准确性，并将其评估为导致不同人口统计准确度不平等的系统因素。代码位于 https://github.com/HaiyuWu/FaceBrightness。

AI.tldr: 本文研究光照差异导致的人脸识别准确率在不同人种间的差异问题，提出亮度信息指标并验证其对识别准确率的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有系统在不同人种（如非洲裔与白人）间存在识别准确率差异，可能与光照条件导致的面部亮度差异有关，但该因素尚未被系统研究。
AI.method: 通过分析受控场景下人脸亮度差异，提出亮度信息指标，量化面部亮度对相似度计算的影响，并评估其对错误匹配率（FMR）的作用。
AI.result: 发现同为过曝或欠曝的 impostor 图像对FMR显著升高，而亮度差异大的图像对相似度降低；亮度过低或过高的面部区域信息量减少导致识别准确率下降。
AI.conclusion: 在受控采集场景中，需根据个体调整光照以获得合适的面部亮度，这是首个从图像对亮度差异角度解释跨人种识别准确率差异的系统性研究。

authors_text: Hiroshi Nakahara,Kazuya Takeda,Keisuke Fujii
title: Estimating the Effect of Team Hitting Strategies Using Counterfactual Virtual Simulation in Baseball
title_zh: 使用棒球中的反事实虚拟模拟来评估球队击球策略的效果
abstract: In baseball, every play on the field is quantitatively evaluated and has an effect on individual and team strategies. The weighted on base average (wOBA) is well known as a measure of an batter's hitting contribution. However, this measure ignores the game situation, such as the runners on base, which coaches and batters are known to consider when employing multiple hitting strategies, yet, the effectiveness of these strategies is unknown. This is probably because (1) we cannot obtain the batter's strategy and (2) it is difficult to estimate the effect of the strategies. Here, we propose a new method for estimating the effect using counterfactual batting simulation. To this end, we propose a deep learning model that transforms batting ability when batting strategy is changed. This method can estimate the effects of various strategies, which has been traditionally difficult with actual game data. We found that, when the switching cost of batting strategies can be ignored, the use of different strategies increased runs. When the switching cost is considered, the conditions for increasing runs were limited. Our validation results suggest that our simulation could clarify the effect of using multiple batting strategies.
summary: In baseball, every play on the field is quantitatively evaluated and has an effect on individual and team strategies. The weighted on base average (wOBA) is well known as a measure of an batter's hitting contribution. However, this measure ignores the game situation, such as the runners on base, which coaches and batters are known to consider when employing multiple hitting strategies, yet, the effectiveness of these strategies is unknown. This is probably because (1) we cannot obtain the batter's strategy and (2) it is difficult to estimate the effect of the strategies. Here, we propose a new method for estimating the effect using counterfactual batting simulation. To this end, we propose a deep learning model that transforms batting ability when batting strategy is changed. This method can estimate the effects of various strategies, which has been traditionally difficult with actual game data. We found that, when the switching cost of batting strategies can be ignored, the use of different strategies increased runs. When the switching cost is considered, the conditions for increasing runs were limited. Our validation results suggest that our simulation could clarify the effect of using multiple batting strategies.
abstract_zh: 在棒球比赛中，场上的每一次比赛都会受到定量评估，并对个人和球队的策略产生影响。众所周知，加权垒均值（wOBA）是衡量击球手击球贡献的指标。然而，这种衡量方法忽略了比赛情况，例如上垒的跑动者，众所周知，教练和击球手在采用多种击球策略时会考虑这些情况，但这些策略的有效性尚不清楚。这可能是因为（1）我们无法获得击球手的策略；（2）很难估计策略的效果。在这里，我们提出了一种使用反事实击球模拟来估计效果的新方法。为此，我们提出了一种深度学习模型，可以在改变击球策略时改变击球能力。该方法可以估计各种策略的效果，而这在传统上很难用实际游戏数据来实现。我们发现，当击球策略的转换成本可以忽略时，不同策略的使用会增加跑动。当考虑转换成本时，增加运行的条件是有限的。我们的验证结果表明，我们的模拟可以阐明使用多种击球策略的效果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于反事实虚拟模拟的方法，用于评估棒球比赛中团队击球策略的效果。
AI.motivation: 传统的击球贡献度量（如wOBA）未考虑比赛情境（如垒上有人），而教练和击球手在选择击球策略时会考虑这些情境。然而，这些策略的效果难以评估。
AI.method: 作者提出了一种深度学习模型，用于模拟击球策略变化时的击球能力，从而估计不同策略的效果。
AI.result: 当忽略击球策略切换成本时，使用不同策略能提高得分；而考虑切换成本时，得分提升的条件受到限制。
AI.conclusion: 该模拟方法有助于澄清多种击球策略的使用效果，为棒球团队策略制定提供了新的分析工具。

search_text: Estimating the Effect of Team Hitting Strategies Using Counterfactual Virtual Simulation in Baseball 使用棒球中的反事实虚拟模拟来评估球队击球策略的效果 In baseball, every play on the field is quantitatively evaluated and has an effect on individual and team strategies. The weighted on base average (wOBA) is well known as a measure of an batter's hitting contribution. However, this measure ignores the game situation, such as the runners on base, which coaches and batters are known to consider when employing multiple hitting strategies, yet, the effectiveness of these strategies is unknown. This is probably because (1) we cannot obtain the batter's strategy and (2) it is difficult to estimate the effect of the strategies. Here, we propose a new method for estimating the effect using counterfactual batting simulation. To this end, we propose a deep learning model that transforms batting ability when batting strategy is changed. This method can estimate the effects of various strategies, which has been traditionally difficult with actual game data. We found that, when the switching cost of batting strategies can be ignored, the use of different strategies increased runs. When the switching cost is considered, the conditions for increasing runs were limited. Our validation results suggest that our simulation could clarify the effect of using multiple batting strategies. 在棒球比赛中，场上的每一次比赛都会受到定量评估，并对个人和球队的策略产生影响。众所周知，加权垒均值（wOBA）是衡量击球手击球贡献的指标。然而，这种衡量方法忽略了比赛情况，例如上垒的跑动者，众所周知，教练和击球手在采用多种击球策略时会考虑这些情况，但这些策略的有效性尚不清楚。这可能是因为（1）我们无法获得击球手的策略；（2）很难估计策略的效果。在这里，我们提出了一种使用反事实击球模拟来估计效果的新方法。为此，我们提出了一种深度学习模型，可以在改变击球策略时改变击球能力。该方法可以估计各种策略的效果，而这在传统上很难用实际游戏数据来实现。我们发现，当击球策略的转换成本可以忽略时，不同策略的使用会增加跑动。当考虑转换成本时，增加运行的条件是有限的。我们的验证结果表明，我们的模拟可以阐明使用多种击球策略的效果。 本文提出了一种基于反事实虚拟模拟的方法，用于评估棒球比赛中团队击球策略的效果。 Hiroshi Nakahara,Kazuya Takeda,Keisuke Fujii cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zihan Wang,Ruimin Chen,Mengxuan Liu,Guanfang Dong,Anup Basu
title: SPGNet: Spatial Projection Guided 3D Human Pose Estimation in Low Dimensional Space
title_zh: SPGNet：低维空间中的空间投影引导 3D 人体姿势估计
abstract: We propose a method SPGNet for 3D human pose estimation that mixes multi-dimensional re-projection into supervised learning. In this method, the 2D-to-3D-lifting network predicts the global position and coordinates of the 3D human pose. Then, we re-project the estimated 3D pose back to the 2D key points along with spatial adjustments. The loss functions compare the estimated 3D pose with the 3D pose ground truth, and re-projected 2D pose with the input 2D pose. In addition, we propose a kinematic constraint to restrict the predicted target with constant human bone length. Based on the estimation results for the dataset Human3.6M, our approach outperforms many state-of-the-art methods both qualitatively and quantitatively.
summary: We propose a method SPGNet for 3D human pose estimation that mixes multi-dimensional re-projection into supervised learning. In this method, the 2D-to-3D-lifting network predicts the global position and coordinates of the 3D human pose. Then, we re-project the estimated 3D pose back to the 2D key points along with spatial adjustments. The loss functions compare the estimated 3D pose with the 3D pose ground truth, and re-projected 2D pose with the input 2D pose. In addition, we propose a kinematic constraint to restrict the predicted target with constant human bone length. Based on the estimation results for the dataset Human3.6M, our approach outperforms many state-of-the-art methods both qualitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于 3D 人体姿态估计的 SPGNet 方法，它将多维重投影混合到监督学习中。在此方法中，2D 到 3D 提升网络预测 3D 人体姿势的全局位置和坐标。然后，我们将估计的 3D 姿势重新投影回 2D 关键点以及空间调整。损失函数将估计的 3D 姿态与 3D 姿态地面实况进行比较，并将重新投影的 2D 姿态与输入 2D 姿态进行比较。此外，我们提出了一个运动学约束来限制具有恒定人体骨骼长度的预测目标。根据数据集 Human3.6M 的估计结果，我们的方法在定性和定量上都优于许多最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SPGNet方法，通过多维重投影与监督学习结合，在低维空间中实现更精准的三维人体姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 传统三维姿态估计方法在低维空间中难以有效融合二维与三维信息，且易忽略人体骨骼长度的物理约束，导致估计精度不足。
AI.method: 构建2D到3D的提升网络预测三维坐标，通过重投影机制将估计结果映射回二维空间并与输入对比，设计结合三维真实值与二维重投影的损失函数，并引入骨骼长度约束的运动学规则。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M数据集上，SPGNet在定性和定量指标上均优于多个现有先进方法，证明了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过空间投影引导与骨骼约束的联合优化，SPGNet提升了三维姿态估计的准确性与鲁棒性，为低维空间姿态估计提供了新思路。

search_text: SPGNet: Spatial Projection Guided 3D Human Pose Estimation in Low Dimensional Space SPGNet：低维空间中的空间投影引导 3D 人体姿势估计 We propose a method SPGNet for 3D human pose estimation that mixes multi-dimensional re-projection into supervised learning. In this method, the 2D-to-3D-lifting network predicts the global position and coordinates of the 3D human pose. Then, we re-project the estimated 3D pose back to the 2D key points along with spatial adjustments. The loss functions compare the estimated 3D pose with the 3D pose ground truth, and re-projected 2D pose with the input 2D pose. In addition, we propose a kinematic constraint to restrict the predicted target with constant human bone length. Based on the estimation results for the dataset Human3.6M, our approach outperforms many state-of-the-art methods both qualitatively and quantitatively. 我们提出了一种用于 3D 人体姿态估计的 SPGNet 方法，它将多维重投影混合到监督学习中。在此方法中，2D 到 3D 提升网络预测 3D 人体姿势的全局位置和坐标。然后，我们将估计的 3D 姿势重新投影回 2D 关键点以及空间调整。损失函数将估计的 3D 姿态与 3D 姿态地面实况进行比较，并将重新投影的 2D 姿态与输入 2D 姿态进行比较。此外，我们提出了一个运动学约束来限制具有恒定人体骨骼长度的预测目标。根据数据集 Human3.6M 的估计结果，我们的方法在定性和定量上都优于许多最先进的方法。 本文提出SPGNet方法，通过多维重投影与监督学习结合，在低维空间中实现更精准的三维人体姿态估计。 Zihan Wang,Ruimin Chen,Mengxuan Liu,Guanfang Dong,Anup Basu cs.CV

authors_text: Jian-Qing Zheng,Ziyang Wang,Baoru Huang,Ngee Han Lim,Tonia Vincent,Bartlomiej W. Papiez
title: Recursive Deformable Image Registration Network with Mutual Attention
title_zh: 相互关注的递归可变形图像配准网络
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.04290
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.04290
abstract: Deformable image registration, estimating the spatial transformation between different images, is an important task in medical imaging. Many previous studies have used learning-based methods for multi-stage registration to perform 3D image registration to improve performance. The performance of the multi-stage approach, however, is limited by the size of the receptive field where complex motion does not occur at a single spatial scale. We propose a new registration network combining recursive network architecture and mutual attention mechanism to overcome these limitations. Compared with the state-of-the-art deep learning methods, our network based on the recursive structure achieves the highest accuracy in lung Computed Tomography (CT) data set (Dice score of 92\% and average surface distance of 3.8mm for lungs) and one of the most accurate results in abdominal CT data set with 9 organs of various sizes (Dice score of 55\% and average surface distance of 7.8mm). We also showed that adding 3 recursive networks is sufficient to achieve the state-of-the-art results without a significant increase in the inference time.
summary: Deformable image registration, estimating the spatial transformation between different images, is an important task in medical imaging. Many previous studies have used learning-based methods for multi-stage registration to perform 3D image registration to improve performance. The performance of the multi-stage approach, however, is limited by the size of the receptive field where complex motion does not occur at a single spatial scale. We propose a new registration network combining recursive network architecture and mutual attention mechanism to overcome these limitations. Compared with the state-of-the-art deep learning methods, our network based on the recursive structure achieves the highest accuracy in lung Computed Tomography (CT) data set (Dice score of 92\% and average surface distance of 3.8mm for lungs) and one of the most accurate results in abdominal CT data set with 9 organs of various sizes (Dice score of 55\% and average surface distance of 7.8mm). We also showed that adding 3 recursive networks is sufficient to achieve the state-of-the-art results without a significant increase in the inference time.
abstract_zh: 可变形图像配准，估计不同图像之间的空间变换，是医学成像中的一项重要任务。之前的许多研究都使用基于学习的多阶段配准方法来执行 3D 图像配准以提高性能。然而，多阶段方法的性能受到感受野大小的限制，其中复杂的运动不会在单个空间尺度上发生。我们提出了一种结合递归网络架构和相互关注机制的新注册网络来克服这些限制。与最先进的深度学习方法相比，我们基于递归结构的网络在肺部计算机断层扫描（CT）数据集上实现了最高精度（Dice得分为92％，肺部平均表面距离为3.8毫米），并且在具有9个不同大小器官的腹部CT数据集中实现了最准确的结果之一（Dice得分为55％，平均表面距离为7.8毫米）。我们还表明，添加 3 个递归网络足以实现最先进的结果，而无需显着增加推理时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合递归网络架构和互注意机制的新注册网络，用于改进医学图像中的可变形图像注册任务。
AI.motivation: 传统的多阶段注册方法在处理复杂运动时受限于感受野的大小，无法在单一空间尺度上有效处理。因此，需要一种新的方法来克服这些限制，提高图像注册的准确性。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种结合递归网络架构和互注意机制的新注册网络，通过递归结构增强模型对复杂运动的建模能力，同时利用互注意机制优化图像间的空间对应关系。
AI.result: 该网络在肺部CT数据集上取得了92%的Dice分数和3.8mm的平均表面距离，在腹部CT数据集上取得了55%的Dice分数和7.8mm的平均表面距离，且仅添加3个递归网络即可达到最先进的结果，推理时间没有显著增加。
AI.conclusion: 结合递归网络和互注意机制的注册网络能够有效提升医学图像注册的准确性，且在保持推理效率的同时达到最先进的性能。

ai_content_json.result: 该网络在肺部CT数据集上取得了92%的Dice分数和3.8mm的平均表面距离，在腹部CT数据集上取得了55%的Dice分数和7.8mm的平均表面距离，且仅添加3个递归网络即可达到最先进的结果，推理时间没有显著增加。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 结合递归网络和互注意机制的注册网络能够有效提升医学图像注册的准确性，且在保持推理效率的同时达到最先进的性能。

tldr: 本文提出了一种结合递归网络架构和互注意机制的新注册网络，用于改进医学图像中的可变形图像注册任务。
motivation: 传统的多阶段注册方法在处理复杂运动时受限于感受野的大小，无法在单一空间尺度上有效处理。因此，需要一种新的方法来克服这些限制，提高图像注册的准确性。
method: 本文提出了一种结合递归网络架构和互注意机制的新注册网络，通过递归结构增强模型对复杂运动的建模能力，同时利用互注意机制优化图像间的空间对应关系。
result: 该网络在肺部CT数据集上取得了92%的Dice分数和3.8mm的平均表面距离，在腹部CT数据集上取得了55%的Dice分数和7.8mm的平均表面距离，且仅添加3个递归网络即可达到最先进的结果，推理时间没有显著增加。
conclusion: 结合递归网络和互注意机制的注册网络能够有效提升医学图像注册的准确性，且在保持推理效率的同时达到最先进的性能。
search_text: Recursive Deformable Image Registration Network with Mutual Attention 相互关注的递归可变形图像配准网络 Deformable image registration, estimating the spatial transformation between different images, is an important task in medical imaging. Many previous studies have used learning-based methods for multi-stage registration to perform 3D image registration to improve performance. The performance of the multi-stage approach, however, is limited by the size of the receptive field where complex motion does not occur at a single spatial scale. We propose a new registration network combining recursive network architecture and mutual attention mechanism to overcome these limitations. Compared with the state-of-the-art deep learning methods, our network based on the recursive structure achieves the highest accuracy in lung Computed Tomography (CT) data set (Dice score of 92\% and average surface distance of 3.8mm for lungs) and one of the most accurate results in abdominal CT data set with 9 organs of various sizes (Dice score of 55\% and average surface distance of 7.8mm). We also showed that adding 3 recursive networks is sufficient to achieve the state-of-the-art results without a significant increase in the inference time. 可变形图像配准，估计不同图像之间的空间变换，是医学成像中的一项重要任务。之前的许多研究都使用基于学习的多阶段配准方法来执行 3D 图像配准以提高性能。然而，多阶段方法的性能受到感受野大小的限制，其中复杂的运动不会在单个空间尺度上发生。我们提出了一种结合递归网络架构和相互关注机制的新注册网络来克服这些限制。与最先进的深度学习方法相比，我们基于递归结构的网络在肺部计算机断层扫描（CT）数据集上实现了最高精度（Dice得分为92％，肺部平均表面距离为3.8毫米），并且在具有9个不同大小器官的腹部CT数据集中实现了最准确的结果之一（Dice得分为55％，平均表面距离为7.8毫米）。我们还表明，添加 3 个递归网络足以实现最先进的结果，而无需显着增加推理时间。 本文提出了一种结合递归网络架构和互注意机制的新注册网络，用于改进医学图像中的可变形图像注册任务。 Jian-Qing Zheng,Ziyang Wang,Baoru Huang,Ngee Han Lim,Tonia Vincent,Bartlomiej W. Papiez cs.CV

authors_text: Md Manjurul Ahsan,Muhammad Ramiz Uddin,Mithila Farjana,Ahmed Nazmus Sakib,Khondhaker Al Momin,Shahana Akter Luna
title: Image Data collection and implementation of deep learning-based model in detecting Monkeypox disease using modified VGG16
title_zh: 使用改进的 VGG16 检测猴痘疾病的基于深度学习的模型的图像数据收集和实现
abstract: While the world is still attempting to recover from the damage caused by the broad spread of COVID-19, the Monkeypox virus poses a new threat of becoming a global pandemic. Although the Monkeypox virus itself is not deadly and contagious as COVID-19, still every day, new patients case has been reported from many nations. Therefore, it will be no surprise if the world ever faces another global pandemic due to the lack of proper precautious steps. Recently, Machine learning (ML) has demonstrated huge potential in image-based diagnoses such as cancer detection, tumor cell identification, and COVID-19 patient detection. Therefore, a similar application can be adopted to diagnose the Monkeypox-related disease as it infected the human skin, which image can be acquired and further used in diagnosing the disease. Considering this opportunity, in this work, we introduce a newly developed "Monkeypox2022" dataset that is publicly available to use and can be obtained from our shared GitHub repository. The dataset is created by collecting images from multiple open-source and online portals that do not impose any restrictions on use, even for commercial purposes, hence giving a safer path to use and disseminate such data when constructing and deploying any type of ML model. Further, we propose and evaluate a modified VGG16 model, which includes two distinct studies: Study One and Two. Our exploratory computational results indicate that our suggested model can identify Monkeypox patients with an accuracy of $97\pm1.8\%$ (AUC=97.2) and $88\pm0.8\%$ (AUC=0.867) for Study One and Two, respectively. Additionally, we explain our model's prediction and feature extraction utilizing Local Interpretable Model-Agnostic Explanations (LIME) help to a deeper insight into specific features that characterize the onset of the Monkeypox virus.

Although the Monkeypox virus itself is not deadly and contagious as COVID-19, still every day, new patients case has been reported from many nations. Therefore, it will be no surprise if the world ever faces another global pandemic due to the lack of proper precautious steps. Recently, Machine learning (ML) has demonstrated huge potential in image-based diagnoses such as cancer detection, tumor cell identification, and COVID-19 patient detection. Therefore, a similar application can be adopted to diagnose the Monkeypox-related disease as it infected the human skin, which image can be acquired and further used in diagnosing the disease. Considering this opportunity, in this work, we introduce a newly developed "Monkeypox2022" dataset that is publicly available to use and can be obtained from our shared GitHub repository. The dataset is created by collecting images from multiple open-source and online portals that do not impose any restrictions on use, even for commercial purposes, hence giving a safer path to use and disseminate such data when constructing and deploying any type of ML model. Further, we propose and evaluate a modified VGG16 model, which includes two distinct studies: Study One and Two. Our exploratory computational results indicate that our suggested model can identify Monkeypox patients with an accuracy of $97\pm1.8\%$ (AUC=97.2) and $88\pm0.8\%$ (AUC=0.867) for Study One and Two, respectively. Additionally, we explain our model's prediction and feature extraction utilizing Local Interpretable Model-Agnostic Explanations (LIME) help to a deeper insight into specific features that characterize the onset of the Monkeypox virus.
abstract_zh: 尽管世界仍在努力从 COVID-19 广泛传播造成的损害中恢复，但猴痘病毒构成了成为全球流行病的新威胁。尽管猴痘病毒本身并不像COVID-19那样致命和具有传染性，但每天仍有许多国家报告新的患者病例。因此，如果世界因缺乏适当的预防措施而面临另一场全球大流行，也就不足为奇了。最近，机器学习 (ML) 在基于图像的诊断（例如癌症检测、肿瘤细胞识别和 COVID-19 患者检测）方面展现出了巨大的潜力。因此，可以采用类似的应用来诊断与猴痘相关的疾病，因为它感染了人类皮肤，可以获取该图像并进一步用于诊断该疾病。考虑到这个机会，在这项工作中，我们引入了一个新开发的“Monkeypox2022”数据集，该数据集可供公开使用，并且可以从我们的共享 GitHub 存储库中获取。该数据集是通过从多个开源和在线门户收集图像而创建的，这些门户不会对使用施加任何限制，即使是出于商业目的，因此在构建和部署任何类型的机器学习模型时提供了更安全的使用和传播此类数据的途径。此外，我们提出并评估了修改后的 VGG16 模型，其中包括两项不同的研究：研究一和研究二。我们的探索性计算结果表明，我们建议的模型可以识别猴痘患者，研究一和研究二的准确度分别为 $97\pm1.8\%$ (AUC=97.2) 和 $88\pm0.8\%$ (AUC=0.867)。此外，我们利用本地可解释的模型不可知解释（LIME）来解释我们的模型的预测和特征提取，有助于更深入地了解表征猴痘病毒发作的特定特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于改进VGG16模型的深度学习方法，用于检测猴痘病毒，并构建了公开数据集'Monkeypox2022'支持模型训练与验证。
AI.motivation: 猴痘病毒可能演变为全球性疫情，而图像诊断技术在疾病检测中展现潜力，需开发高效且公开的数据集与模型以应对公共卫生挑战。
AI.method: 收集多源公开图像构建数据集，改进VGG16网络结构，通过两组实验验证模型性能，并采用LIME方法解释模型特征提取过程。
AI.result: 实验一准确率97±1.8%（AUC=97.2），实验二准确率88±0.8%（AUC=0.867），模型能有效识别猴痘皮损特征。
AI.conclusion: 改进的VGG16模型在猴痘检测中表现优异，公开数据集为后续研究提供基础，结合可解释性分析增强了诊断可信度。

authors_text: Warley Almeida Silva,Federico Bobbio,Flore Caye,Defeng Liu,Justine Pepin,Carl Perreault-Lafleur,William St-Arnaud
title: Design and Implementation of an Heuristic-Enhanced Branch-and-Bound Solver for MILP
title_zh: MILP 启发式增强分支定界求解器的设计与实现
abstract: We present a solver for Mixed Integer Programs (MIP) developed for the MIP competition 2022. Given the 10 minutes bound on the computational time established by the rules of the competition, our method focuses on finding a feasible solution and improves it through a Branch-and-Bound algorithm. Another rule of the competition allows the use of up to 8 threads. Each thread is given a different primal heuristic, which has been tuned by hyper-parameters, to find a feasible solution. In every thread, once a feasible solution is found, we stop and we use a Branch-and-Bound method, embedded with local search heuristics, to ameliorate the incumbent solution. The three variants of the Diving heuristic that we implemented manage to find a feasible solution for 10 instances of the training data set. These heuristics are the best performing among the heuristics that we implemented. Our Branch-and-Bound algorithm is effective on a small portion of the training data set, and it manages to find an incumbent feasible solution for an instance that we could not solve with the Diving heuristics. Overall, our combined methods, when implemented with extensive computational power, can solve 11 of the 19 problems of the training data set within the time limit. Our submission to the MIP competition was awarded the "Outstanding Student Submission" honorable mention.
summary: We present a solver for Mixed Integer Programs (MIP) developed for the MIP competition 2022. Given the 10 minutes bound on the computational time established by the rules of the competition, our method focuses on finding a feasible solution and improves it through a Branch-and-Bound algorithm. Another rule of the competition allows the use of up to 8 threads. Each thread is given a different primal heuristic, which has been tuned by hyper-parameters, to find a feasible solution. In every thread, once a feasible solution is found, we stop and we use a Branch-and-Bound method, embedded with local search heuristics, to ameliorate the incumbent solution. The three variants of the Diving heuristic that we implemented manage to find a feasible solution for 10 instances of the training data set. These heuristics are the best performing among the heuristics that we implemented. Our Branch-and-Bound algorithm is effective on a small portion of the training data set, and it manages to find an incumbent feasible solution for an instance that we could not solve with the Diving heuristics. Overall, our combined methods, when implemented with extensive computational power, can solve 11 of the 19 problems of the training data set within the time limit. Our submission to the MIP competition was awarded the "Outstanding Student Submission" honorable mention.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了为 2022 年 MIP 竞赛开发的混合整数程序 (MIP) 求解器。鉴于竞赛规则规定的计算时间为 10 分钟，我们的方法侧重于寻找可行的解决方案，并通过分支定界算法对其进行改进。竞赛的另一规则允许最多使用 8 个线程。每个线程都被赋予不同的原始启发式，该启发式已通过超参数进行调整，以找到可行的解决方案。在每个线程中，一旦找到可行的解决方案，我们就会停止并使用嵌入本地搜索启发式的分支定界方法来改进现有的解决方案。我们实施的 Diving 启发式的三个变体设法为训练数据集的 10 个实例找到可行的解决方案。这些启发式方法是我们实施的启发式方法中表现最好的。我们的分支定界算法对训练数据集的一小部分有效，并且它设法为我们无法使用 Diving 启发式解决的实例找到现有的可行解决方案。总的来说，我们的组合方法在具有强大的计算能力的情况下，可以在时限内解决训练数据集的 19 个问题中的 11 个问题。我们向 MIP 竞赛提交的作品被授予“优秀学生提交作品”荣誉奖。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并实现了一个结合启发式算法的分支定界求解器，用于解决混合整数规划问题（MILP），并应用于2022年MIP竞赛。
AI.motivation: 竞赛规则限制计算时间为10分钟，需快速找到可行解并优化。允许使用多线程和启发式算法以提高效率。
AI.method: 采用多线程并行运行不同调参后的启发式算法（如Diving启发式），找到可行解后结合分支定界法与局部搜索优化解。
AI.result: 在训练数据集上解决11个问题，其中Diving启发式解决10个，分支定界法补充解决1个，获竞赛学生优秀提交奖。
AI.conclusion: 启发式与分支定界结合的方法在时间限制下有效，但需更多计算资源进一步提升性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文设计并实现了一个结合启发式算法的分支定界求解器，用于解决混合整数规划问题（MILP），并应用于2022年MIP竞赛。

search_text: Design and Implementation of an Heuristic-Enhanced Branch-and-Bound Solver for MILP MILP 启发式增强分支定界求解器的设计与实现 We present a solver for Mixed Integer Programs (MIP) developed for the MIP competition 2022. Given the 10 minutes bound on the computational time established by the rules of the competition, our method focuses on finding a feasible solution and improves it through a Branch-and-Bound algorithm. Another rule of the competition allows the use of up to 8 threads. Each thread is given a different primal heuristic, which has been tuned by hyper-parameters, to find a feasible solution. In every thread, once a feasible solution is found, we stop and we use a Branch-and-Bound method, embedded with local search heuristics, to ameliorate the incumbent solution. The three variants of the Diving heuristic that we implemented manage to find a feasible solution for 10 instances of the training data set. These heuristics are the best performing among the heuristics that we implemented. Our Branch-and-Bound algorithm is effective on a small portion of the training data set, and it manages to find an incumbent feasible solution for an instance that we could not solve with the Diving heuristics. Overall, our combined methods, when implemented with extensive computational power, can solve 11 of the 19 problems of the training data set within the time limit. Our submission to the MIP competition was awarded the "Outstanding Student Submission" honorable mention. 我们提出了为 2022 年 MIP 竞赛开发的混合整数程序 (MIP) 求解器。鉴于竞赛规则规定的计算时间为 10 分钟，我们的方法侧重于寻找可行的解决方案，并通过分支定界算法对其进行改进。竞赛的另一规则允许最多使用 8 个线程。每个线程都被赋予不同的原始启发式，该启发式已通过超参数进行调整，以找到可行的解决方案。在每个线程中，一旦找到可行的解决方案，我们就会停止并使用嵌入本地搜索启发式的分支定界方法来改进现有的解决方案。我们实施的 Diving 启发式的三个变体设法为训练数据集的 10 个实例找到可行的解决方案。这些启发式方法是我们实施的启发式方法中表现最好的。我们的分支定界算法对训练数据集的一小部分有效，并且它设法为我们无法使用 Diving 启发式解决的实例找到现有的可行解决方案。总的来说，我们的组合方法在具有强大的计算能力的情况下，可以在时限内解决训练数据集的 19 个问题中的 11 个问题。我们向 MIP 竞赛提交的作品被授予“优秀学生提交作品”荣誉奖。 本文设计并实现了一个结合启发式算法的分支定界求解器，用于解决混合整数规划问题（MILP），并应用于2022年MIP竞赛。 Warley Almeida Silva,Federico Bobbio,Flore Caye,Defeng Liu,Justine Pepin,Carl Perreault-Lafleur,William St-Arnaud cs.AI,cs.DC,math.OC

authors_text: Calvin-Khang Ta,Abhishek Aich,Akash Gupta,Amit K. Roy-Chowdhury
title: Poisson2Sparse: Self-Supervised Poisson Denoising From a Single Image
title_zh: Poisson2Sparse：从单个图像进行自监督泊松去噪
abstract: Image enhancement approaches often assume that the noise is signal independent, and approximate the degradation model as zero-mean additive Gaussian. However, this assumption does not hold for biomedical imaging systems where sensor-based sources of noise are proportional to signal strengths, and the noise is better represented as a Poisson process. In this work, we explore a sparsity and dictionary learning-based approach and present a novel self-supervised learning method for single-image denoising where the noise is approximated as a Poisson process, requiring no clean ground-truth data. Specifically, we approximate traditional iterative optimization algorithms for image denoising with a recurrent neural network that enforces sparsity with respect to the weights of the network. Since the sparse representations are based on the underlying image, it is able to suppress the spurious components (noise) in the image patches, thereby introducing implicit regularization for denoising tasks through the network structure. Experiments on two bio-imaging datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches in terms of PSNR and SSIM. Our qualitative results demonstrate that, in addition to higher performance on standard quantitative metrics, we are able to recover much more subtle details than other compared approaches. Our code is made publicly available at https://github.com/tacalvin/Poisson2Sparse
summary: Image enhancement approaches often assume that the noise is signal independent, and approximate the degradation model as zero-mean additive Gaussian. However, this assumption does not hold for biomedical imaging systems where sensor-based sources of noise are proportional to signal strengths, and the noise is better represented as a Poisson process. In this work, we explore a sparsity and dictionary learning-based approach and present a novel self-supervised learning method for single-image denoising where the noise is approximated as a Poisson process, requiring no clean ground-truth data. Specifically, we approximate traditional iterative optimization algorithms for image denoising with a recurrent neural network that enforces sparsity with respect to the weights of the network. Since the sparse representations are based on the underlying image, it is able to suppress the spurious components (noise) in the image patches, thereby introducing implicit regularization for denoising tasks through the network structure. Experiments on two bio-imaging datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches in terms of PSNR and SSIM. Our qualitative results demonstrate that, in addition to higher performance on standard quantitative metrics, we are able to recover much more subtle details than other compared approaches. Our code is made publicly available at https://github.com/tacalvin/Poisson2Sparse
abstract_zh: 图像增强方法通常假设噪声与信号无关，并将退化模型近似为零均值加性高斯模型。然而，这种假设不适用于生物医学成像系统，在生物医学成像系统中，基于传感器的噪声源与信号强度成正比，并且噪声最好用泊松过程表示。在这项工作中，我们探索了一种基于稀疏性和字典学习的方法，并提出了一种用于单图像去噪的新颖的自监督学习方法，其中噪声近似为泊松过程，不需要干净的地面实况数据。具体来说，我们使用循环神经网络来近似传统的图像去噪迭代优化算法，该网络强制执行网络权重的稀疏性。由于稀疏表示基于底层图像，因此能够抑制图像块中的虚假成分（噪声），从而通过网络结构为去噪任务引入隐式正则化。对两个生物成像数据集的实验表明，我们的方法在 PSNR 和 SSIM 方面优于最先进的方法。我们的定性结果表明，除了在标准定量指标上具有更高的性能之外，我们还能够比其他比较方法恢复更多微妙的细节。我们的代码已公开发布于 https://github.com/tacalvin/Poisson2Sparse

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需干净数据的自监督学习方法，用于从单张图像中去除泊松噪声。
AI.motivation: 传统图像去噪方法假设噪声与信号无关，但生物医学成像中的噪声与信号强度成正比，需用泊松过程建模，现有方法难以有效处理此类噪声。
AI.method: 基于稀疏性和字典学习，设计递归神经网络替代传统迭代优化算法，通过网络权重强制稀疏性，利用图像结构抑制噪声。
AI.result: 在两个生物成像数据集上，该方法在PSNR和SSIM指标上优于现有方法，并能恢复更多细微细节。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为生物医学图像的泊松噪声去除提供了有效解决方案，验证了自监督学习在无监督场景下的潜力。

authors_text: Yujia Xie,Luowei Zhou,Xiyang Dai,Lu Yuan,Nguyen Bach,Ce Liu,Michael Zeng
title: Visual Clues: Bridging Vision and Language Foundations for Image Paragraph Captioning
title_zh: 视觉线索：为图像段落字幕架起视觉和语言基础的桥梁
abstract: People say, "A picture is worth a thousand words". Then how can we get the rich information out of the image? We argue that by using visual clues to bridge large pretrained vision foundation models and language models, we can do so without any extra cross-modal training. Thanks to the strong zero-shot capability of foundation models, we start by constructing a rich semantic representation of the image (e.g., image tags, object attributes / locations, captions) as a structured textual prompt, called visual clues, using a vision foundation model. Based on visual clues, we use large language model to produce a series of comprehensive descriptions for the visual content, which is then verified by the vision model again to select the candidate that aligns best with the image. We evaluate the quality of generated descriptions by quantitative and qualitative measurement. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of such a structured semantic representation.
summary: People say, "A picture is worth a thousand words". Then how can we get the rich information out of the image? We argue that by using visual clues to bridge large pretrained vision foundation models and language models, we can do so without any extra cross-modal training. Thanks to the strong zero-shot capability of foundation models, we start by constructing a rich semantic representation of the image (e.g., image tags, object attributes / locations, captions) as a structured textual prompt, called visual clues, using a vision foundation model. Based on visual clues, we use large language model to produce a series of comprehensive descriptions for the visual content, which is then verified by the vision model again to select the candidate that aligns best with the image. We evaluate the quality of generated descriptions by quantitative and qualitative measurement. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of such a structured semantic representation.
abstract_zh: 人们说：“一图胜千言”。那么如何才能从图像中获取丰富的信息呢？我们认为，通过使用视觉线索来桥接大型预训练视觉基础模型和语言模型，我们可以在不需要任何额外的跨模式训练的情况下做到这一点。由于基础模型强大的零样本能力，我们首先使用视觉基础模型构建图像的丰富语义表示（例如图像标签、对象属性/位置、标题）作为结构化文本提示，称为视觉线索。基于视觉线索，我们使用大型语言模型对视觉内容产生一系列全面的描述，然后由视觉模型再次验证，以选择与图像最匹配的候选者。我们通过定量和定性测量来评估生成的描述的质量。结果证明了这种结构化语义表示的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过视觉线索连接视觉和语言基础模型，无需额外跨模态训练即可生成图像段落描述。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖复杂跨模态训练，而基础模型的零样本能力可避免此问题，通过结构化语义表示更高效地提取图像信息。
AI.method: 使用视觉基础模型生成图像的结构化文本提示（视觉线索），再通过大语言模型生成多轮描述，并由视觉模型验证选择最佳候选。
AI.result: 定量与定性评估表明，生成的描述质量优异，验证了结构化语义表示的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 结构化视觉线索有效桥接视觉与语言模型，无需额外训练即可实现高质量图像描述生成。

authors_text: Sakdipat Ontoum,Thitaree Khemanantakul,Pornphat Sroison,Tuul Triyason,Bunthit Watanapa
title: Coffee Roast Intelligence
title_zh: 咖啡烘焙智能
comment: 6 pages, 13 figures, 3 tables, this work was presented at the CSC498 COMPUTER SCIENCE CAPSTONE PROJECT I and CSC499 COMPUTER SCIENCE CAPSTONE PROJECT II courses
comments: 6 pages, 13 figures, 3 tables, this work was presented at the CSC498 COMPUTER SCIENCE CAPSTONE PROJECT I and CSC499 COMPUTER SCIENCE CAPSTONE PROJECT II courses
abstract: As the coffee industry has grown, there would be more demand for roasted coffee beans, as well as increased rivalry for selling coffee and attracting customers. As the flavor of each variety of coffee is dependent on the degree of roasting of the coffee beans, it is vital to maintain a consistent quality related to the degree of roasting. Each barista has their own method for determining the degree of roasting. However, extrinsic circumstances such as light, fatigue, and other factors may alter their judgment. As a result, the quality of the coffee cannot be controlled. The Coffee Roast Intelligence application is a machine learning-based study of roasted coffee bean degrees classification produced as an Android application platform that identifies the color of coffee beans by photographing or uploading them while roasting. This application displays the text showing at what level the coffee beans have been roasted, as well as informs the percent chance of class prediction to the consumers. Users may also keep track of the result of the predictions related to the roasting level of coffee beans.
summary: As the coffee industry has grown, there would be more demand for roasted coffee beans, as well as increased rivalry for selling coffee and attracting customers. As the flavor of each variety of coffee is dependent on the degree of roasting of the coffee beans, it is vital to maintain a consistent quality related to the degree of roasting. Each barista has their own method for determining the degree of roasting. However, extrinsic circumstances such as light, fatigue, and other factors may alter their judgment. As a result, the quality of the coffee cannot be controlled. The Coffee Roast Intelligence application is a machine learning-based study of roasted coffee bean degrees classification produced as an Android application platform that identifies the color of coffee beans by photographing or uploading them while roasting. This application displays the text showing at what level the coffee beans have been roasted, as well as informs the percent chance of class prediction to the consumers. Users may also keep track of the result of the predictions related to the roasting level of coffee beans.
abstract_zh: 随着咖啡行业的发展，对烘焙咖啡豆的需求将会增加，销售咖啡和吸引顾客的竞争也会加剧。由于每种咖啡的风味取决于咖啡豆的烘焙程度，因此保持与烘焙程度相关的一致质量至关重要。每个咖啡师都有自己的确定烘焙程度的方法。然而，诸如光线、疲劳和其他因素等外部环境可能会改变他们的判断。结果，咖啡的质量无法控制。咖啡烘焙智能应用程序是一项基于机器学习的烘焙咖啡豆等级分类研究，作为 Android 应用程序平台制作，可通过在烘焙时拍照或上传咖啡豆来识别咖啡豆的颜色。该应用程序显示文本，显示咖啡豆的烘焙程度，并向消费者告知类别预测的百分比机会。用户还可以跟踪与咖啡豆烘焙水平相关的预测结果。

AI.tldr: 开发基于机器学习的Android应用，通过分析咖啡豆颜色分类判断烘焙程度。
AI.motivation: 咖啡行业竞争加剧，人工判断烘焙程度易受环境因素影响，导致质量不稳定，需客观工具辅助控制。
AI.method: 利用图像识别技术拍摄或上传咖啡豆图片，通过机器学习模型分类烘焙等级并显示预测概率。
AI.result: 实现可识别咖啡豆烘焙程度的应用程序，提供分级结果及预测置信度，帮助用户追踪烘焙数据。
AI.conclusion: 该应用通过自动化图像分析提升咖啡烘焙质量控制，减少人为误差，满足行业对标准化生产的需求。

authors_text: Michael Enqi Cao,Jonas Warnke,Yunhai Han,Xinpei Ni,Ye Zhao,Samuel Coogan
title: Leveraging Heterogeneous Capabilities in Multi-Agent Systems for Environmental Conflict Resolution
title_zh: 利用多智能体系统中的异构功能解决环境冲突
comment: Submitted to The International Symposium on Safety, Security, and Rescue Robotics (SSRR) 2022
comments: Submitted to The International Symposium on Safety, Security, and Rescue Robotics (SSRR) 2022
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a high-level controller synthesis framework that enables teams of heterogeneous agents to assist each other in resolving environmental conflicts that appear at runtime. This conflict resolution method is built upon temporal-logic-based reactive synthesis to guarantee safety and task completion under specific environment assumptions. In heterogeneous multi-agent systems, every agent is expected to complete its own tasks in service of a global team objective. However, at runtime, an agent may encounter un-modeled obstacles (e.g., doors or walls) that prevent it from achieving its own task. To address this problem, we employ the capabilities of other heterogeneous agents to resolve the obstacle. A controller framework is proposed to redirect agents with the capability of resolving the appropriate obstacles to the required target when such a situation is detected. Three case studies involving a bipedal robot Digit and a quadcopter are used to evaluate the controller performance in action. Additionally, we implement the proposed framework on a physical multi-agent robotic system to demonstrate its viability for real world applications.
summary: In this paper, we introduce a high-level controller synthesis framework that enables teams of heterogeneous agents to assist each other in resolving environmental conflicts that appear at runtime. This conflict resolution method is built upon temporal-logic-based reactive synthesis to guarantee safety and task completion under specific environment assumptions. In heterogeneous multi-agent systems, every agent is expected to complete its own tasks in service of a global team objective. However, at runtime, an agent may encounter un-modeled obstacles (e.g., doors or walls) that prevent it from achieving its own task. To address this problem, we employ the capabilities of other heterogeneous agents to resolve the obstacle. A controller framework is proposed to redirect agents with the capability of resolving the appropriate obstacles to the required target when such a situation is detected. Three case studies involving a bipedal robot Digit and a quadcopter are used to evaluate the controller performance in action. Additionally, we implement the proposed framework on a physical multi-agent robotic system to demonstrate its viability for real world applications.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种高级控制器综合框架，该框架使异构代理团队能够互相协助解决运行时出现的环境冲突。这种冲突解决方法建立在基于时间逻辑的反应合成之上，以保证特定环境假设下的安全性和任务完成。在异构多智能体系统中，每个智能体都应该完成自己的任务，以服务于全局团队目标。然而，在运行时，代理可能会遇到未建模的障碍（例如门或墙），从而阻止其完成自己的任务。为了解决这个问题，我们利用其他异构代理的能力来解决这个障碍。提出了一种控制器框架，用于在检测到这种情况时重定向代理，使其能够解决所需目标的适当障碍。使用涉及双足机器人 Digit 和四轴飞行器的三个案例研究来评估控制器的实际性能。此外，我们在物理多智能体机器人系统上实现了所提出的框架，以证明其在现实世界应用中的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时序逻辑的反应式合成框架，用于异构多智能体系统中的环境冲突解决，通过协调不同智能体的能力实现全局任务目标。
AI.motivation: 异构多智能体系统中，单个智能体可能因未建模障碍物无法完成任务，需利用其他智能体的异构能力动态解决冲突以保证任务完成。
AI.method: 基于时序逻辑反应式合成设计控制器框架，实时检测障碍物并调度具备相应能力的智能体进行干预，通过三个案例（双足机器人与四旋翼无人机）验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 框架在仿真案例与物理多智能体系统中均成功解决环境冲突，证明其在实际应用中的可行性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过异构智能体能力协同有效解决运行时环境冲突，为复杂动态场景下的多智能体协作提供了可落地的解决方案。

authors_text: Jianhan Mei,Xudong Jiang,Henghui Ding
title: Spatial Feature Mapping for 6DoF Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: 用于 6DoF 物体姿态估计的空间特征映射
abstract: This work aims to estimate 6Dof (6D) object pose in background clutter. Considering the strong occlusion and background noise, we propose to utilize the spatial structure for better tackling this challenging task. Observing that the 3D mesh can be naturally abstracted by a graph, we build the graph using 3D points as vertices and mesh connections as edges. We construct the corresponding mapping from 2D image features to 3D points for filling the graph and fusion of the 2D and 3D features. Afterward, a Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) is applied to help the feature exchange among objects' points in 3D space. To address the problem of rotation symmetry ambiguity for objects, a spherical convolution is utilized and the spherical features are combined with the convolutional features that are mapped to the graph. Predefined 3D keypoints are voted and the 6DoF pose is obtained via the fitting optimization. Two scenarios of inference, one with the depth information and the other without it are discussed. Tested on the datasets of YCB-Video and LINEMOD, the experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: This work aims to estimate 6Dof (6D) object pose in background clutter. Considering the strong occlusion and background noise, we propose to utilize the spatial structure for better tackling this challenging task. Observing that the 3D mesh can be naturally abstracted by a graph, we build the graph using 3D points as vertices and mesh connections as edges. We construct the corresponding mapping from 2D image features to 3D points for filling the graph and fusion of the 2D and 3D features. Afterward, a Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) is applied to help the feature exchange among objects' points in 3D space. To address the problem of rotation symmetry ambiguity for objects, a spherical convolution is utilized and the spherical features are combined with the convolutional features that are mapped to the graph. Predefined 3D keypoints are voted and the 6DoF pose is obtained via the fitting optimization. Two scenarios of inference, one with the depth information and the other without it are discussed. Tested on the datasets of YCB-Video and LINEMOD, the experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 这项工作旨在估计背景杂波中的 6Dof (6D) 物体姿态。考虑到强烈的遮挡和背景噪声，我们建议利用空间结构来更好地解决这一具有挑战性的任务。观察到 3D 网格可以通过图自然地抽象出来，我们使用 3D 点作为顶点，网格连接作为边来构建图。我们构建了从 2D 图像特征到 3D 点的相应映射，以填充图形以及 2D 和 3D 特征的融合。然后，应用图卷积网络（GCN）来帮助3D空间中对象点之间的特征交换。为了解决对象的旋转对称模糊问题，利用球面卷积，并将球面特征与映射到图的卷积特征相结合。对预定义的 3D 关键点进行投票，并通过拟合优化获得 6DoF 姿态。讨论了两种推理场景，一种具有深度信息，另一种不具有深度信息。在 YCB-Video 和 LINEMOD 数据集上进行测试，实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过利用空间结构解决复杂背景下6自由度（6DoF）物体姿态估计问题。
AI.motivation: 在强遮挡和背景噪声环境下，传统方法难以准确估计物体姿态，需通过空间结构信息提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将3D网格抽象为图结构，构建2D图像特征到3D点的映射，结合图卷积网络（GCN）融合特征，并利用球面卷积处理旋转对称性问题，最终通过关键点投票优化获得6DoF姿态。
AI.result: 在YCB-Video和LINEMOD数据集上的实验验证了方法有效性，尤其在无深度信息场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过空间特征映射与图神经网络的结合，有效解决了复杂场景下的6DoF姿态估计难题。
