search_text: Spatial Feature Mapping for 6DoF Object Pose Estimation 用于 6DoF 物体姿态估计的空间特征映射 This work aims to estimate 6Dof (6D) object pose in background clutter. Considering the strong occlusion and background noise, we propose to utilize the spatial structure for better tackling this challenging task. Observing that the 3D mesh can be naturally abstracted by a graph, we build the graph using 3D points as vertices and mesh connections as edges. We construct the corresponding mapping from 2D image features to 3D points for filling the graph and fusion of the 2D and 3D features. Afterward, a Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) is applied to help the feature exchange among objects' points in 3D space. To address the problem of rotation symmetry ambiguity for objects, a spherical convolution is utilized and the spherical features are combined with the convolutional features that are mapped to the graph. Predefined 3D keypoints are voted and the 6DoF pose is obtained via the fitting optimization. Two scenarios of inference, one with the depth information and the other without it are discussed. Tested on the datasets of YCB-Video and LINEMOD, the experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method. 这项工作旨在估计背景杂波中的 6Dof (6D) 物体姿态。考虑到强烈的遮挡和背景噪声，我们建议利用空间结构来更好地解决这一具有挑战性的任务。观察到 3D 网格可以通过图自然地抽象出来，我们使用 3D 点作为顶点，网格连接作为边来构建图。我们构建了从 2D 图像特征到 3D 点的相应映射，以填充图形以及 2D 和 3D 特征的融合。然后，应用图卷积网络（GCN）来帮助3D空间中对象点之间的特征交换。为了解决对象的旋转对称模糊问题，利用球面卷积，并将球面特征与映射到图的卷积特征相结合。对预定义的 3D 关键点进行投票，并通过拟合优化获得 6DoF 姿态。讨论了两种推理场景，一种具有深度信息，另一种不具有深度信息。在 YCB-Video 和 LINEMOD 数据集上进行测试，实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。 本文旨在通过利用空间结构解决复杂背景下6自由度（6DoF）物体姿态估计问题。 Jianhan Mei,Xudong Jiang,Henghui Ding cs.CV

authors_text: Yichao Liang,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,Tuan Anh Le,N. Siddharth
title: Drawing out of Distribution with Neuro-Symbolic Generative Models
title_zh: 用神经符号生成模型绘制分布
abstract: Learning general-purpose representations from perceptual inputs is a hallmark of human intelligence. For example, people can write out numbers or characters, or even draw doodles, by characterizing these tasks as different instantiations of the same generic underlying process -- compositional arrangements of different forms of pen strokes. Crucially, learning to do one task, say writing, implies reasonable competence at another, say drawing, on account of this shared process. We present Drawing out of Distribution (DooD), a neuro-symbolic generative model of stroke-based drawing that can learn such general-purpose representations. In contrast to prior work, DooD operates directly on images, requires no supervision or expensive test-time inference, and performs unsupervised amortised inference with a symbolic stroke model that better enables both interpretability and generalization. We evaluate DooD on its ability to generalise across both data and tasks. We first perform zero-shot transfer from one dataset (e.g. MNIST) to another (e.g. Quickdraw), across five different datasets, and show that DooD clearly outperforms different baselines. An analysis of the learnt representations further highlights the benefits of adopting a symbolic stroke model. We then adopt a subset of the Omniglot challenge tasks, and evaluate its ability to generate new exemplars (both unconditionally and conditionally), and perform one-shot classification, showing that DooD matches the state of the art. Taken together, we demonstrate that DooD does indeed capture general-purpose representations across both data and task, and takes a further step towards building general and robust concept-learning systems.
summary: Learning general-purpose representations from perceptual inputs is a hallmark of human intelligence. For example, people can write out numbers or characters, or even draw doodles, by characterizing these tasks as different instantiations of the same generic underlying process -- compositional arrangements of different forms of pen strokes. Crucially, learning to do one task, say writing, implies reasonable competence at another, say drawing, on account of this shared process. We present Drawing out of Distribution (DooD), a neuro-symbolic generative model of stroke-based drawing that can learn such general-purpose representations. In contrast to prior work, DooD operates directly on images, requires no supervision or expensive test-time inference, and performs unsupervised amortised inference with a symbolic stroke model that better enables both interpretability and generalization. We evaluate DooD on its ability to generalise across both data and tasks. We first perform zero-shot transfer from one dataset (e.g. MNIST) to another (e.g. Quickdraw), across five different datasets, and show that DooD clearly outperforms different baselines. An analysis of the learnt representations further highlights the benefits of adopting a symbolic stroke model. We then adopt a subset of the Omniglot challenge tasks, and evaluate its ability to generate new exemplars (both unconditionally and conditionally), and perform one-shot classification, showing that DooD matches the state of the art. Taken together, we demonstrate that DooD does indeed capture general-purpose representations across both data and task, and takes a further step towards building general and robust concept-learning systems.
abstract_zh: 从感知输入中学习通用表示是人类智能的标志。例如，人们可以写出数字或字符，甚至画出涂鸦，通过将这些任务描述为同一通用底层过程的不同实例——不同形式的笔画的组合排列。至关重要的是，学习完成一项任务（例如写作）意味着在另一项任务（例如绘画）中具有合理的能力，因为这个共享过程。我们提出了分布式绘图（DooD），这是一种基于笔划的绘图的神经符号生成模型，可以学习这种通用表示。与之前的工作相比，DooD 直接对图像进行操作，不需要监督或昂贵的测试时推理，并使用符号笔划模型执行无监督摊销推理，从而更好地实现可解释性和泛化。我们评估 DooD 的泛化数据和任务的能力。我们首先在五个不同的数据集上执行从一个数据集（例如 MNIST）到另一个数据集（例如 Quickdraw）的零样本传输，并表明 DooD 明显优于不同的基线。对学习到的表示的分析进一步强调了采用符号笔画模型的好处。然后，我们采用 Omniglot 挑战任务的一个子集，并评估其生成新样本（无条件和有条件）的能力，并执行一次性分类，表明 DooD 符合现有技术水平。总而言之，我们证明 DooD 确实捕获了跨数据和任务的通用表示，并在构建通用且强大的概念学习系统方面迈出了进一步的一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DooD的神经符号生成模型，能够通过笔画组合学习通用表示，实现跨数据集和任务的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 人类能通过共享的笔画组合过程完成不同任务（如写字与绘画），而现有模型常依赖监督或昂贵推理，难以实现跨任务泛化。
AI.method: DooD直接处理图像，采用无监督 amortized 推理与符号笔画模型，无需监督且支持跨任务零样本迁移，并在Omniglot数据集上测试生成与分类能力。
AI.result: DooD在五组数据集间零样本迁移任务中优于基线模型，且在Omniglot的一-shot分类任务中达到SOTA水平，验证了符号模型的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DooD通过符号笔画建模实现了跨数据与任务的通用表示学习，为构建鲁棒概念学习系统提供了新方向。

authors_text: G. M. Cordeiro,R. J. Cintra,L. C. Rêgo,A. D. C. Nascimento
title: The Gamma Generalized Normal Distribution: A Descriptor of SAR Imagery
title_zh: 伽玛广义正态分布：SAR 图像的描述子
abstract: We propose a new four-parameter distribution for modeling synthetic aperture radar (SAR) imagery named the gamma generalized normal (GGN) by combining the gamma and generalized normal distributions. A mathematical characterization of the new distribution is provided by identifying the limit behavior and by calculating the density and moment expansions. The GGN model performance is evaluated on both synthetic and actual data and, for that, maximum likelihood estimation and random number generation are discussed. The proposed distribution is compared with the beta generalized normal distribution (BGN), which has already shown to appropriately represent SAR imagery. The performance of these two distributions are measured by means of statistics which provide evidence that the GGN can outperform the BGN distribution in some contexts.
summary: We propose a new four-parameter distribution for modeling synthetic aperture radar (SAR) imagery named the gamma generalized normal (GGN) by combining the gamma and generalized normal distributions. A mathematical characterization of the new distribution is provided by identifying the limit behavior and by calculating the density and moment expansions. The GGN model performance is evaluated on both synthetic and actual data and, for that, maximum likelihood estimation and random number generation are discussed. The proposed distribution is compared with the beta generalized normal distribution (BGN), which has already shown to appropriately represent SAR imagery. The performance of these two distributions are measured by means of statistics which provide evidence that the GGN can outperform the BGN distribution in some contexts.
abstract_zh: 我们通过结合伽马分布和广义正态分布，提出了一种新的四参数分布，用于对合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像进行建模，称为伽马广义正态分布（GGN）。通过识别极限行为并计算密度和矩展开来提供新分布的数学特征。 GGN 模型性能在合成数据和实际数据上进行评估，并为此讨论了最大似然估计和随机数生成。将所提出的分布与 beta 广义正态分布 (BGN) 进行比较，后者已被证明可以适当地表示 SAR 图像。这两个分布的性能是通过统计数据来衡量的，这些统计数据提供了 GGN 在某些情况下可以优于 BGN 分布的证据。

AI.tldr: 提出并验证一种新的四参数伽马广义正态分布模型，用于更准确地描述合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像数据。
AI.motivation: 现有分布模型在描述SAR图像时存在局限性，需更灵活的分布以提高建模精度。
AI.method: 通过数学分析构建新分布，利用最大似然估计和随机数生成技术进行参数估计，并通过统计指标与BGN分布对比验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，GGN在合成和实际SAR数据上的拟合效果优于BGN，尤其在特定统计指标下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 伽马广义正态分布能更有效地描述SAR图像，为相关应用提供更精确的统计模型。

ai_content.motivation: 现有分布模型在描述SAR图像时存在局限性，需更灵活的分布以提高建模精度。
ai_content.method: 通过数学分析构建新分布，利用最大似然估计和随机数生成技术进行参数估计，并通过统计指标与BGN分布对比验证。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，GGN在合成和实际SAR数据上的拟合效果优于BGN，尤其在特定统计指标下表现更优。
ai_content.conclusion: 伽马广义正态分布能更有效地描述SAR图像，为相关应用提供更精确的统计模型。

search_text: The Gamma Generalized Normal Distribution: A Descriptor of SAR Imagery 伽玛广义正态分布：SAR 图像的描述子 We propose a new four-parameter distribution for modeling synthetic aperture radar (SAR) imagery named the gamma generalized normal (GGN) by combining the gamma and generalized normal distributions. A mathematical characterization of the new distribution is provided by identifying the limit behavior and by calculating the density and moment expansions. The GGN model performance is evaluated on both synthetic and actual data and, for that, maximum likelihood estimation and random number generation are discussed. The proposed distribution is compared with the beta generalized normal distribution (BGN), which has already shown to appropriately represent SAR imagery. The performance of these two distributions are measured by means of statistics which provide evidence that the GGN can outperform the BGN distribution in some contexts. 我们通过结合伽马分布和广义正态分布，提出了一种新的四参数分布，用于对合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像进行建模，称为伽马广义正态分布（GGN）。通过识别极限行为并计算密度和矩展开来提供新分布的数学特征。 GGN 模型性能在合成数据和实际数据上进行评估，并为此讨论了最大似然估计和随机数生成。将所提出的分布与 beta 广义正态分布 (BGN) 进行比较，后者已被证明可以适当地表示 SAR 图像。这两个分布的性能是通过统计数据来衡量的，这些统计数据提供了 GGN 在某些情况下可以优于 BGN 分布的证据。 提出并验证一种新的四参数伽马广义正态分布模型，用于更准确地描述合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像数据。 G. M. Cordeiro,R. J. Cintra,L. C. Rêgo,A. D. C. Nascimento stat.ME,cs.CV,eess.IV,math.ST,physics.data-an

authors_text: D. Pellier,H. Fiorino,M. Grand,A. Albore,R. Bailon-Ruiz
title: HDDL 2.1: Towards Defining an HTN Formalism with Time
title_zh: HDDL 2.1：随着时间的推移定义 HTN 形式主义
abstract: Real world applications of planning, like in industry and robotics, require modelling rich and diverse scenarios. Their resolution usually requires coordinated and concurrent action executions. In several cases, such planning problems are naturally decomposed in a hierarchical way and expressed by a Hierarchical Task Network (HTN) formalism. The PDDL language used to specify planning domains has evolved to cover the different planning paradigms. However, formulating real and complex scenarios where numerical and temporal constraints concur in defining a solution is still a challenge. Our proposition aims at filling the gap between existing planning languages and operational needs. To do so, we propose to extend HDDL taking inspiration from PDDL 2.1 and ANML to express temporal and numerical expressions. This paper opens discussions on the semantics and the syntax needed to extend HDDL, and illustrate these needs with the modelling of an Earth Observing Satellite planning problem.
summary: Real world applications of planning, like in industry and robotics, require modelling rich and diverse scenarios. Their resolution usually requires coordinated and concurrent action executions. In several cases, such planning problems are naturally decomposed in a hierarchical way and expressed by a Hierarchical Task Network (HTN) formalism. The PDDL language used to specify planning domains has evolved to cover the different planning paradigms. However, formulating real and complex scenarios where numerical and temporal constraints concur in defining a solution is still a challenge. Our proposition aims at filling the gap between existing planning languages and operational needs. To do so, we propose to extend HDDL taking inspiration from PDDL 2.1 and ANML to express temporal and numerical expressions. This paper opens discussions on the semantics and the syntax needed to extend HDDL, and illustrate these needs with the modelling of an Earth Observing Satellite planning problem.
abstract_zh: 规划的现实应用（例如在工业和机器人技术中）需要对丰富多样的场景进行建模。他们的解决通常需要协调和并发的行动执行。在某些情况下，此类规划问题会自然地以分层方式分解，并通过分层任务网络（HTN）形式来表达。用于指定规划领域的 PDDL 语言已经发展到涵盖不同的规划范例。然而，在定义解决方案时制定数字和时间约束同时存在的真实且复杂的场景仍然是一个挑战。我们的提议旨在填补现有规划语言和运营需求之间的差距。为此，我们建议从 PDDL 2.1 和 ANML 中汲取灵感来扩展 HDDL 以表达时间和数值表达式。本文开启了对扩展 HDDL 所需的语义和语法的讨论，并通过地球观测卫星规划问题的建模来说明这些需求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出扩展HDDL语言以支持时间约束的分层任务网络（HTN）形式化，解决复杂场景建模需求。
AI.motivation: 现有规划语言在处理工业和机器人等实际场景中并发动作及时间数值约束时存在表达不足，需更强大的形式化工具。
AI.method: 借鉴PDDL 2.1与ANML特性，扩展HDDL语法与语义，通过地球观测卫星规划案例验证需求。
AI.result: 明确了扩展HDDL所需的时间与数值表达机制，并展示了其在复杂任务建模中的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该扩展为HTN规划语言与实际应用需求间的鸿沟提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Runqing Zhang,Tianshu Zhu
title: EAANet: Efficient Attention Augmented Convolutional Networks
title_zh: EAANet：高效注意力增强卷积网络
abstract: Humans can effectively find salient regions in complex scenes. Self-attention mechanisms were introduced into Computer Vision (CV) to achieve this. Attention Augmented Convolutional Network (AANet) is a mixture of convolution and self-attention, which increases the accuracy of a typical ResNet. However, The complexity of self-attention is O(n2) in terms of computation and memory usage with respect to the number of input tokens. In this project, we propose EAANet: Efficient Attention Augmented Convolutional Networks, which incorporates efficient self-attention mechanisms in a convolution and self-attention hybrid architecture to reduce the model's memory footprint. Our best model show performance improvement over AA-Net and ResNet18. We also explore different methods to augment Convolutional Network with self-attention mechanisms and show the difficulty of training those methods compared to ResNet. Finally, we show that augmenting efficient self-attention mechanisms with ResNet scales better with input size than normal self-attention mechanisms. Therefore, our EAANet is more capable of working with high-resolution images.
summary: Humans can effectively find salient regions in complex scenes. Self-attention mechanisms were introduced into Computer Vision (CV) to achieve this. Attention Augmented Convolutional Network (AANet) is a mixture of convolution and self-attention, which increases the accuracy of a typical ResNet. However, The complexity of self-attention is O(n2) in terms of computation and memory usage with respect to the number of input tokens. In this project, we propose EAANet: Efficient Attention Augmented Convolutional Networks, which incorporates efficient self-attention mechanisms in a convolution and self-attention hybrid architecture to reduce the model's memory footprint. Our best model show performance improvement over AA-Net and ResNet18. We also explore different methods to augment Convolutional Network with self-attention mechanisms and show the difficulty of training those methods compared to ResNet. Finally, we show that augmenting efficient self-attention mechanisms with ResNet scales better with input size than normal self-attention mechanisms. Therefore, our EAANet is more capable of working with high-resolution images.
abstract_zh: 人类可以有效地发现复杂场景中的显着区域。计算机视觉（CV）中引入了自注意力机制来实现这一目标。注意力增强卷积网络（AANet）是卷积和自注意力的混合，它提高了典型 ResNet 的准确性。然而，就输入标记数量而言，自注意力的计算和内存使用复杂度为 O(n2)。在这个项目中，我们提出了 EAANet：高效注意力增强卷积网络，它将高效的自注意力机制融入到卷积和自注意力混合架构中，以减少模型的内存占用。我们最好的模型显示出相对 AA-Net 和 ResNet18 的性能改进。我们还探索了利用自注意力机制增强卷积网络的不同方法，并展示了与 ResNet 相比训练这些方法的难度。最后，我们表明，与普通的自注意力机制相比，使用 ResNet 增强有效的自注意力机制可以更好地适应输入大小。因此，我们的 EAANet 更能够处理高分辨率图像。

AI.tldr: 提出EAANet，结合高效自注意力机制与卷积网络，减少内存消耗并提升性能
AI.motivation: 传统自注意力机制计算复杂度高（O(n²)），AANet虽有效但内存消耗大，需更高效方案处理高分辨率图像
AI.method: 设计高效自注意力模块嵌入卷积网络，优化计算复杂度，探索多种注意力增强方式并对比训练难度
AI.result: 最佳模型优于AA-Net和ResNet18，在输入尺寸增大时表现更优，验证高效注意力机制扩展性优势
AI.conclusion: EAANet通过优化自注意力机制，在保持性能的同时降低内存占用，更适合处理高分辨率图像任务

authors_text: Timothy Zee,Alexander G. Ororbia,Ankur Mali,Ifeoma Nwogu
title: A Robust Backpropagation-Free Framework for Images
title_zh: 鲁棒的无反向传播图像框架
abstract: While current deep learning algorithms have been successful for a wide variety of artificial intelligence (AI) tasks, including those involving structured image data, they present deep neurophysiological conceptual issues due to their reliance on the gradients that are computed by backpropagation of errors (backprop). Gradients are required to obtain synaptic weight adjustments but require knowledge of feed-forward activities in order to conduct backward propagation, a biologically implausible process. This is known as the "weight transport problem". Therefore, in this work, we present a more biologically plausible approach towards solving the weight transport problem for image data. This approach, which we name the error kernel driven activation alignment (EKDAA) algorithm, accomplishes through the introduction of locally derived error transmission kernels and error maps. Like standard deep learning networks, EKDAA performs the standard forward process via weights and activation functions; however, its backward error computation involves adaptive error kernels that propagate local error signals through the network. The efficacy of EKDAA is demonstrated by performing visual-recognition tasks on the Fashion MNIST, CIFAR-10 and SVHN benchmarks, along with demonstrating its ability to extract visual features from natural color images. Furthermore, in order to demonstrate its non-reliance on gradient computations, results are presented for an EKDAA trained CNN that employs a non-differentiable activation function.
summary: While current deep learning algorithms have been successful for a wide variety of artificial intelligence (AI) tasks, including those involving structured image data, they present deep neurophysiological conceptual issues due to their reliance on the gradients that are computed by backpropagation of errors (backprop). Gradients are required to obtain synaptic weight adjustments but require knowledge of feed-forward activities in order to conduct backward propagation, a biologically implausible process. This is known as the "weight transport problem". Therefore, in this work, we present a more biologically plausible approach towards solving the weight transport problem for image data. This approach, which we name the error kernel driven activation alignment (EKDAA) algorithm, accomplishes through the introduction of locally derived error transmission kernels and error maps. Like standard deep learning networks, EKDAA performs the standard forward process via weights and activation functions; however, its backward error computation involves adaptive error kernels that propagate local error signals through the network. The efficacy of EKDAA is demonstrated by performing visual-recognition tasks on the Fashion MNIST, CIFAR-10 and SVHN benchmarks, along with demonstrating its ability to extract visual features from natural color images. Furthermore, in order to demonstrate its non-reliance on gradient computations, results are presented for an EKDAA trained CNN that employs a non-differentiable activation function.
abstract_zh: 虽然当前的深度学习算法已经成功地应用于各种人工智能 (AI) 任务，包括涉及结构化图像数据的任务，但由于它们依赖于通过误差反向传播（反向传播）计算的梯度，因此存在深层神经生理学概念问题。需要梯度来获得突触权重调整，但需要了解前馈活动才能进行反向传播，这是一个生物学上难以置信的过程。这被称为“重量运输问题”。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种在生物学上更合理的方法来解决图像数据的重量传输问题。这种方法，我们将其命名为错误内核驱动激活对齐（EKDAA）算法，通过引入本地导出的错误传输内核和错误图来实现。与标准深度学习网络一样，EKDAA 通过权重和激活函数执行标准前向过程；然而，它的后向误差计算涉及通过网络传播局部误差信号的自适应误差内核。通过在 Fashion MNIST、CIFAR-10 和 SVHN 基准上执行视觉识别任务，以及展示其从自然彩色图像中提取视觉特征的能力，证明了 EKDAA 的功效。此外，为了证明其不依赖梯度计算，给出了采用不可微激活函数的 EKDAA 训练的 CNN 的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需反向传播的图像处理框架，解决深度学习中的权重传输问题。
AI.motivation: 当前深度学习依赖反向传播计算梯度，但其生物合理性存疑，尤其权重传输问题与神经生理学矛盾。
AI.method: 提出误差核驱动激活对齐（EKDAA）算法，通过局部误差核和误差图实现前向传播，避免梯度计算。
AI.result: 在Fashion MNIST、CIFAR-10和SVHN数据集上验证有效性，并展示其处理自然彩色图像特征提取能力。
AI.conclusion: EKDAA为图像任务提供了无需梯度计算的生物合理性替代方案，具有实际应用潜力。

search_text: A Robust Backpropagation-Free Framework for Images 鲁棒的无反向传播图像框架 While current deep learning algorithms have been successful for a wide variety of artificial intelligence (AI) tasks, including those involving structured image data, they present deep neurophysiological conceptual issues due to their reliance on the gradients that are computed by backpropagation of errors (backprop). Gradients are required to obtain synaptic weight adjustments but require knowledge of feed-forward activities in order to conduct backward propagation, a biologically implausible process. This is known as the "weight transport problem". Therefore, in this work, we present a more biologically plausible approach towards solving the weight transport problem for image data. This approach, which we name the error kernel driven activation alignment (EKDAA) algorithm, accomplishes through the introduction of locally derived error transmission kernels and error maps. Like standard deep learning networks, EKDAA performs the standard forward process via weights and activation functions; however, its backward error computation involves adaptive error kernels that propagate local error signals through the network. The efficacy of EKDAA is demonstrated by performing visual-recognition tasks on the Fashion MNIST, CIFAR-10 and SVHN benchmarks, along with demonstrating its ability to extract visual features from natural color images. Furthermore, in order to demonstrate its non-reliance on gradient computations, results are presented for an EKDAA trained CNN that employs a non-differentiable activation function. 虽然当前的深度学习算法已经成功地应用于各种人工智能 (AI) 任务，包括涉及结构化图像数据的任务，但由于它们依赖于通过误差反向传播（反向传播）计算的梯度，因此存在深层神经生理学概念问题。需要梯度来获得突触权重调整，但需要了解前馈活动才能进行反向传播，这是一个生物学上难以置信的过程。这被称为“重量运输问题”。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种在生物学上更合理的方法来解决图像数据的重量传输问题。这种方法，我们将其命名为错误内核驱动激活对齐（EKDAA）算法，通过引入本地导出的错误传输内核和错误图来实现。与标准深度学习网络一样，EKDAA 通过权重和激活函数执行标准前向过程；然而，它的后向误差计算涉及通过网络传播局部误差信号的自适应误差内核。通过在 Fashion MNIST、CIFAR-10 和 SVHN 基准上执行视觉识别任务，以及展示其从自然彩色图像中提取视觉特征的能力，证明了 EKDAA 的功效。此外，为了证明其不依赖梯度计算，给出了采用不可微激活函数的 EKDAA 训练的 CNN 的结果。 本文提出一种无需反向传播的图像处理框架，解决深度学习中的权重传输问题。 Timothy Zee,Alexander G. Ororbia,Ankur Mali,Ifeoma Nwogu cs.NE,cs.LG

authors_text: Ruijie Wang,Luca Rossetto,Michael Cochez,Abraham Bernstein
title: QAGCN: Answering Multi-Relation Questions via Single-Step Implicit Reasoning over Knowledge Graphs
title_zh: QAGCN：通过知识图单步隐式推理回答多关系问题
abstract: Multi-relation question answering (QA) is a challenging task, where given questions usually require long reasoning chains in KGs that consist of multiple relations. Recently, methods with explicit multi-step reasoning over KGs have been prominently used in this task and have demonstrated promising performance. Examples include methods that perform stepwise label propagation through KG triples and methods that navigate over KG triples based on reinforcement learning. A main weakness of these methods is that their reasoning mechanisms are usually complex and difficult to implement or train. In this paper, we argue that multi-relation QA can be achieved via end-to-end single-step implicit reasoning, which is simpler, more efficient, and easier to adopt. We propose QAGCN -- a Question-Aware Graph Convolutional Network (GCN)-based method that includes a novel GCN architecture with controlled question-dependent message propagation for the implicit reasoning. Extensive experiments have been conducted, where QAGCN achieved competitive and even superior performance compared to state-of-the-art explicit-reasoning methods. Our code and pre-trained models are available in the repository: https://github.com/ruijie-wang-uzh/QAGCN
summary: Multi-relation question answering (QA) is a challenging task, where given questions usually require long reasoning chains in KGs that consist of multiple relations. Recently, methods with explicit multi-step reasoning over KGs have been prominently used in this task and have demonstrated promising performance. Examples include methods that perform stepwise label propagation through KG triples and methods that navigate over KG triples based on reinforcement learning. A main weakness of these methods is that their reasoning mechanisms are usually complex and difficult to implement or train. In this paper, we argue that multi-relation QA can be achieved via end-to-end single-step implicit reasoning, which is simpler, more efficient, and easier to adopt. We propose QAGCN -- a Question-Aware Graph Convolutional Network (GCN)-based method that includes a novel GCN architecture with controlled question-dependent message propagation for the implicit reasoning. Extensive experiments have been conducted, where QAGCN achieved competitive and even superior performance compared to state-of-the-art explicit-reasoning methods. Our code and pre-trained models are available in the repository: https://github.com/ruijie-wang-uzh/QAGCN
abstract_zh: 多关系问答（QA）是一项具有挑战性的任务，其中给定的问题通常需要由多个关系组成的知识图谱中的长推理链。最近，对 KG 进行显式多步推理的方法已在该任务中得到广泛使用，并表现出了良好的性能。示例包括通过 KG 三元组执行逐步标签传播的方法以及基于强化学习在 KG 三元组上导航的方法。这些方法的一个主要弱点是它们的推理机制通常很复杂并且难以实现或训练。在本文中，我们认为多关系 QA 可以通过端到端的单步隐式推理来实现，这更简单、更高效、更容易采用。我们提出了 QAGCN——一种基于问题感知图卷积网络（GCN）的方法，其中包括一种新颖的 GCN 架构，该架构具有受控的问题相关消息传播，用于隐式推理。已经进行了大量的实验，与最先进的显式推理方法相比，QAGCN 取得了有竞争力甚至更优越的性能。我们的代码和预训练模型可在存储库中找到：https://github.com/ruijie-wang-uzh/QAGCN

AI.tldr: 本文提出QAGCN方法，通过知识图谱上的单步隐式推理解决多关系问答问题。
AI.motivation: 现有显式多步推理方法复杂且难以实现，本文主张采用更简单高效的单步隐式推理机制。
AI.method: 设计基于问题感知的图卷积网络（QAGCN），通过可控的问题依赖消息传播实现隐式推理。
AI.result: 实验表明QAGCN在性能上优于或匹敌最先进的显式推理方法。
AI.conclusion: 单步隐式推理方法在多关系问答任务中具有更高的效率和可行性。

authors_text: Sebastian Damrich,Jan Niklas Böhm,Fred A. Hamprecht,Dmitry Kobak
title: From $t$-SNE to UMAP with contrastive learning
title_zh: 通过对比学习从 $t$-SNE 到 UMAP
comment: ICLR 2023. 44 pages, 19 figures. Code at https://github.com/hci-unihd/cl-tsne-umap and https://github.com/berenslab/contrastive-ne
comments: ICLR 2023. 44 pages, 19 figures. Code at https://github.com/hci-unihd/cl-tsne-umap and https://github.com/berenslab/contrastive-ne
abstract: Neighbor embedding methods $t$-SNE and UMAP are the de facto standard for visualizing high-dimensional datasets. Motivated from entirely different viewpoints, their loss functions appear to be unrelated. In practice, they yield strongly differing embeddings and can suggest conflicting interpretations of the same data. The fundamental reasons for this and, more generally, the exact relationship between $t$-SNE and UMAP have remained unclear. In this work, we uncover their conceptual connection via a new insight into contrastive learning methods. Noise-contrastive estimation can be used to optimize $t$-SNE, while UMAP relies on negative sampling, another contrastive method. We find the precise relationship between these two contrastive methods and provide a mathematical characterization of the distortion introduced by negative sampling. Visually, this distortion results in UMAP generating more compact embeddings with tighter clusters compared to $t$-SNE. We exploit this new conceptual connection to propose and implement a generalization of negative sampling, allowing us to interpolate between (and even extrapolate beyond) $t$-SNE and UMAP and their respective embeddings. Moving along this spectrum of embeddings leads to a trade-off between discrete / local and continuous / global structures, mitigating the risk of over-interpreting ostensible features of any single embedding. We provide a PyTorch implementation.
summary: Neighbor embedding methods $t$-SNE and UMAP are the de facto standard for visualizing high-dimensional datasets. Motivated from entirely different viewpoints, their loss functions appear to be unrelated. In practice, they yield strongly differing embeddings and can suggest conflicting interpretations of the same data. The fundamental reasons for this and, more generally, the exact relationship between $t$-SNE and UMAP have remained unclear. In this work, we uncover their conceptual connection via a new insight into contrastive learning methods. Noise-contrastive estimation can be used to optimize $t$-SNE, while UMAP relies on negative sampling, another contrastive method. We find the precise relationship between these two contrastive methods and provide a mathematical characterization of the distortion introduced by negative sampling. Visually, this distortion results in UMAP generating more compact embeddings with tighter clusters compared to $t$-SNE. We exploit this new conceptual connection to propose and implement a generalization of negative sampling, allowing us to interpolate between (and even extrapolate beyond) $t$-SNE and UMAP and their respective embeddings. Moving along this spectrum of embeddings leads to a trade-off between discrete / local and continuous / global structures, mitigating the risk of over-interpreting ostensible features of any single embedding. We provide a PyTorch implementation.
abstract_zh: 邻域嵌入方法 $t$-SNE 和 UMAP 是可视化高维数据集的事实上的标准。出于完全不同的观点，它们的损失函数似乎是不相关的。在实践中，它们产生截然不同的嵌入，并且可能对相同数据提出相互矛盾的解释。其根本原因以及更普遍的 $t$-SNE 和 UMAP 之间的确切关系仍不清楚。在这项工作中，我们通过对对比学习方法的新见解揭示了它们的概念联系。噪声对比估计可用于优化 $t$-SNE，而 UMAP 依赖于负采样，这是另一种对比方法。我们找到了这两种对比方法之间的精确关系，并提供了负采样引入的失真的数学特征。从视觉上看，与 $t$-SNE 相比，这种扭曲导致 UMAP 生成更紧凑的嵌入和更紧密的簇。我们利用这种新的概念联系来提出并实现负采样的泛化，使我们能够在 $t$-SNE 和 UMAP 及其各自的嵌入之间进行插值（甚至外推）。沿着这种嵌入范围移动会导致离散/局部和连续/全局结构之间的权衡，从而减轻过度解释任何单个嵌入的表面特征的风险。我们提供了 PyTorch 实现。

AI.tldr: 本文通过对比学习方法揭示t-SNE与UMAP的内在联系，并提出一种插值方法以结合两者的优势。
AI.motivation: t-SNE和UMAP作为高维数据可视化工具，其损失函数和嵌入结果存在显著差异，但其根本联系尚未明确，限制了方法的统一与优化。
AI.method: 通过对比学习视角，将t-SNE的噪声对比估计与UMAP的负采样方法关联，分析负采样引入的数学失真，并提出负采样泛化方法实现两者嵌入的插值与外推。
AI.result: 数学上量化了负采样导致的紧凑嵌入特性，实验表明新方法可在局部结构与全局结构间实现平衡，减少单嵌入的过拟合风险。
AI.conclusion: 该工作建立了t-SNE与UMAP的理论联系，提供了统一的可视化框架，并通过PyTorch实现验证了方法的有效性与实用性。

ai_content_json.result: 数学上量化了负采样导致的紧凑嵌入特性，实验表明新方法可在局部结构与全局结构间实现平衡，减少单嵌入的过拟合风险。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该工作建立了t-SNE与UMAP的理论联系，提供了统一的可视化框架，并通过PyTorch实现验证了方法的有效性与实用性。

search_text: From $t$-SNE to UMAP with contrastive learning 通过对比学习从 $t$-SNE 到 UMAP Neighbor embedding methods $t$-SNE and UMAP are the de facto standard for visualizing high-dimensional datasets. Motivated from entirely different viewpoints, their loss functions appear to be unrelated. In practice, they yield strongly differing embeddings and can suggest conflicting interpretations of the same data. The fundamental reasons for this and, more generally, the exact relationship between $t$-SNE and UMAP have remained unclear. In this work, we uncover their conceptual connection via a new insight into contrastive learning methods. Noise-contrastive estimation can be used to optimize $t$-SNE, while UMAP relies on negative sampling, another contrastive method. We find the precise relationship between these two contrastive methods and provide a mathematical characterization of the distortion introduced by negative sampling. Visually, this distortion results in UMAP generating more compact embeddings with tighter clusters compared to $t$-SNE. We exploit this new conceptual connection to propose and implement a generalization of negative sampling, allowing us to interpolate between (and even extrapolate beyond) $t$-SNE and UMAP and their respective embeddings. Moving along this spectrum of embeddings leads to a trade-off between discrete / local and continuous / global structures, mitigating the risk of over-interpreting ostensible features of any single embedding. We provide a PyTorch implementation. 邻域嵌入方法 $t$-SNE 和 UMAP 是可视化高维数据集的事实上的标准。出于完全不同的观点，它们的损失函数似乎是不相关的。在实践中，它们产生截然不同的嵌入，并且可能对相同数据提出相互矛盾的解释。其根本原因以及更普遍的 $t$-SNE 和 UMAP 之间的确切关系仍不清楚。在这项工作中，我们通过对对比学习方法的新见解揭示了它们的概念联系。噪声对比估计可用于优化 $t$-SNE，而 UMAP 依赖于负采样，这是另一种对比方法。我们找到了这两种对比方法之间的精确关系，并提供了负采样引入的失真的数学特征。从视觉上看，与 $t$-SNE 相比，这种扭曲导致 UMAP 生成更紧凑的嵌入和更紧密的簇。我们利用这种新的概念联系来提出并实现负采样的泛化，使我们能够在 $t$-SNE 和 UMAP 及其各自的嵌入之间进行插值（甚至外推）。沿着这种嵌入范围移动会导致离散/局部和连续/全局结构之间的权衡，从而减轻过度解释任何单个嵌入的表面特征的风险。我们提供了 PyTorch 实现。 本文通过对比学习方法揭示t-SNE与UMAP的内在联系，并提出一种插值方法以结合两者的优势。 Sebastian Damrich,Jan Niklas Böhm,Fred A. Hamprecht,Dmitry Kobak cs.LG,cs.HC

authors_text: Gabriele Sartor,Davide Zollo,Marta Cialdea Mayer,Angelo Oddi,Riccardo Rasconi,Vieri Giuliano Santucci
title: Option Discovery for Autonomous Generation of Symbolic Knowledge
title_zh: 自主生成符号知识的选项发现
abstract: In this work we present an empirical study where we demonstrate the possibility of developing an artificial agent that is capable to autonomously explore an experimental scenario. During the exploration, the agent is able to discover and learn interesting options allowing to interact with the environment without any pre-assigned goal, then abstract and re-use the acquired knowledge to solve possible tasks assigned ex-post. We test the system in the so-called Treasure Game domain described in the recent literature and we empirically demonstrate that the discovered options can be abstracted in an probabilistic symbolic planning model (using the PPDDL language), which allowed the agent to generate symbolic plans to achieve extrinsic goals.
summary: In this work we present an empirical study where we demonstrate the possibility of developing an artificial agent that is capable to autonomously explore an experimental scenario. During the exploration, the agent is able to discover and learn interesting options allowing to interact with the environment without any pre-assigned goal, then abstract and re-use the acquired knowledge to solve possible tasks assigned ex-post. We test the system in the so-called Treasure Game domain described in the recent literature and we empirically demonstrate that the discovered options can be abstracted in an probabilistic symbolic planning model (using the PPDDL language), which allowed the agent to generate symbolic plans to achieve extrinsic goals.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一项实证研究，证明了开发能够自主探索实验场景的人工智能体的可能性。在探索过程中，代理能够发现和学习有趣的选项，允许在没有任何预先分配的目标的情况下与环境进行交互，然后抽象并重新使用所获得的知识来解决事后分配的可能任务。我们在最近文献中描述的所谓宝藏游戏领域中测试了该系统，并凭经验证明发现的选项可以在概率符号规划模型（使用 PPDDL 语言）中进行抽象，该模型允许代理生成符号计划以实现外在目标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自主探索环境并生成符号知识的智能体方法，通过发现可复用选项解决后续任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常依赖预设目标，缺乏自主探索与知识复用能力，限制了智能体在未知环境中的适应性。
AI.method: 在Treasure Game领域中，智能体通过自主探索发现选项，并将其抽象为概率符号规划模型（PPDDL语言）以生成任务计划。
AI.result: 实验验证了智能体能有效发现选项并转化为符号规划模型，成功生成计划以达成外部指定目标。
AI.conclusion: 该方法展示了自主生成符号知识的可行性，为智能体在复杂环境中的任务解决提供了新思路。

authors_text: Seonghyeon Nam,Abhijith Punnappurath,Marcus A. Brubaker,Michael S. Brown
title: Learning sRGB-to-Raw-RGB De-rendering with Content-Aware Metadata
title_zh: 使用内容感知元数据学习 sRGB 到 Raw RGB 去渲染
abstract: Most camera images are rendered and saved in the standard RGB (sRGB) format by the camera's hardware. Due to the in-camera photo-finishing routines, nonlinear sRGB images are undesirable for computer vision tasks that assume a direct relationship between pixel values and scene radiance. For such applications, linear raw-RGB sensor images are preferred. Saving images in their raw-RGB format is still uncommon due to the large storage requirement and lack of support by many imaging applications. Several "raw reconstruction" methods have been proposed that utilize specialized metadata sampled from the raw-RGB image at capture time and embedded in the sRGB image. This metadata is used to parameterize a mapping function to de-render the sRGB image back to its original raw-RGB format when needed. Existing raw reconstruction methods rely on simple sampling strategies and global mapping to perform the de-rendering. This paper shows how to improve the de-rendering results by jointly learning sampling and reconstruction. Our experiments show that our learned sampling can adapt to the image content to produce better raw reconstructions than existing methods. We also describe an online fine-tuning strategy for the reconstruction network to improve results further.
summary: Most camera images are rendered and saved in the standard RGB (sRGB) format by the camera's hardware. Due to the in-camera photo-finishing routines, nonlinear sRGB images are undesirable for computer vision tasks that assume a direct relationship between pixel values and scene radiance. For such applications, linear raw-RGB sensor images are preferred. Saving images in their raw-RGB format is still uncommon due to the large storage requirement and lack of support by many imaging applications. Several "raw reconstruction" methods have been proposed that utilize specialized metadata sampled from the raw-RGB image at capture time and embedded in the sRGB image. This metadata is used to parameterize a mapping function to de-render the sRGB image back to its original raw-RGB format when needed. Existing raw reconstruction methods rely on simple sampling strategies and global mapping to perform the de-rendering. This paper shows how to improve the de-rendering results by jointly learning sampling and reconstruction. Our experiments show that our learned sampling can adapt to the image content to produce better raw reconstructions than existing methods. We also describe an online fine-tuning strategy for the reconstruction network to improve results further.
abstract_zh: 大多数相机图像由相机硬件以标准 RGB (sRGB) 格式渲染和保存。由于相机内的照片冲印程序，非线性 sRGB 图像对于假设像素值和场景辐射率之间存在直接关系的计算机视觉任务来说是不理想的。对于此类应用，首选线性原始 RGB 传感器图像。由于存储需求大且许多成像应用程序缺乏支持，以原始 RGB 格式保存图像仍然不常见。已经提出了几种“原始重建”方法，这些方法利用在捕获时从原始 RGB 图像采样并嵌入到 sRGB 图像中的专用元数据。此元数据用于参数化映射函数，以便在需要时将 sRGB 图像解渲染回其原始原始 RGB 格式。现有的原始重建方法依赖于简单的采样策略和全局映射来执行去渲染。本文展示了如何通过联合学习采样和重建来改善去渲染结果。我们的实验表明，我们学习的采样可以适应图像内容，从而产生比现有方法更好的原始重建。我们还描述了重建网络的在线微调策略，以进一步改善结果。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究如何从sRGB图像中学习并重建原始的线性raw-RGB图像。
AI.motivation: 由于相机硬件在拍摄时会对图像进行非线性处理并保存为sRGB格式，这使得计算机视觉任务中难以直接使用像素值与场景辐射之间的关系。而线性raw-RGB图像更适合这些任务，但因其存储需求大和应用支持不足，较少使用。因此，需要一种有效的方法从sRGB图像中重建原始的raw-RGB图像。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种联合学习采样与重建的方法，利用图像内容自适应地进行采样，并通过在线微调策略优化重建网络。
AI.result: 实验表明，本文提出的方法在图像内容自适应采样方面优于现有方法，能够生成更高质量的raw-RGB重建结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合学习采样与重建，结合在线微调策略，本文提出的方法能够有效提升从sRGB图像到raw-RGB图像的重建效果。

authors_text: Andrew C. Li,Pashootan Vaezipoor,Rodrigo Toro Icarte,Sheila A. McIlraith
title: Challenges to Solving Combinatorially Hard Long-Horizon Deep RL Tasks
title_zh: 解决组合困难的长期深度强化学习任务的挑战
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning has shown promise in discrete domains requiring complex reasoning, including games such as Chess, Go, and Hanabi. However, this type of reasoning is less often observed in long-horizon, continuous domains with high-dimensional observations, where instead RL research has predominantly focused on problems with simple high-level structure (e.g. opening a drawer or moving a robot as fast as possible). Inspired by combinatorially hard optimization problems, we propose a set of robotics tasks which admit many distinct solutions at the high-level, but require reasoning about states and rewards thousands of steps into the future for the best performance. Critically, while RL has traditionally suffered on complex, long-horizon tasks due to sparse rewards, our tasks are carefully designed to be solvable without specialized exploration. Nevertheless, our investigation finds that standard RL methods often neglect long-term effects due to discounting, while general-purpose hierarchical RL approaches struggle unless additional abstract domain knowledge can be exploited.
summary: Deep reinforcement learning has shown promise in discrete domains requiring complex reasoning, including games such as Chess, Go, and Hanabi. However, this type of reasoning is less often observed in long-horizon, continuous domains with high-dimensional observations, where instead RL research has predominantly focused on problems with simple high-level structure (e.g. opening a drawer or moving a robot as fast as possible). Inspired by combinatorially hard optimization problems, we propose a set of robotics tasks which admit many distinct solutions at the high-level, but require reasoning about states and rewards thousands of steps into the future for the best performance. Critically, while RL has traditionally suffered on complex, long-horizon tasks due to sparse rewards, our tasks are carefully designed to be solvable without specialized exploration. Nevertheless, our investigation finds that standard RL methods often neglect long-term effects due to discounting, while general-purpose hierarchical RL approaches struggle unless additional abstract domain knowledge can be exploited.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习在需要复杂推理的离散领域（包括国际象棋、围棋和花火等游戏）显示出前景。然而，这种类型的推理很少在具有高维观察的长视野、连续域中观察到，相反，强化学习研究主要集中在具有简单高级结构的问题（例如打开抽屉或尽可能快地移动机器人）。受组合硬优化问题的启发，我们提出了一组机器人任务，这些任务在高层允许许多不同的解决方案，但需要对状态进行推理，并奖励未来数千步以获得最佳性能。至关重要的是，虽然强化学习传统上由于奖励稀疏而在复杂、长期的任务上遇到困难，但我们的任务经过精心设计，无需专门的探索即可解决。然而，我们的调查发现，标准强化学习方法经常由于折扣而忽略长期影响，而通用的分层强化学习方法则难以发挥作用，除非可以利用额外的抽象领域知识。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一组需要长期推理的机器人任务，以解决深度强化学习在长时域复杂问题中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统深度强化学习在长时域连续领域表现不佳，因稀疏奖励和折扣因子导致长期影响被忽视，而现有任务缺乏对复杂组合优化问题的模拟。
AI.method: 设计具有多种高层解决方案的机器人任务，要求智能体预测数千步后的状态与奖励，同时避免稀疏奖励问题。
AI.result: 标准RL方法因折扣机制忽略长期影响，分层RL方法需依赖额外领域知识才能有效解决任务。
AI.conclusion: 现有RL框架难以处理需要长期规划的复杂任务，需改进算法设计或引入更高效的层次化结构与领域知识。

search_text: Challenges to Solving Combinatorially Hard Long-Horizon Deep RL Tasks 解决组合困难的长期深度强化学习任务的挑战 Deep reinforcement learning has shown promise in discrete domains requiring complex reasoning, including games such as Chess, Go, and Hanabi. However, this type of reasoning is less often observed in long-horizon, continuous domains with high-dimensional observations, where instead RL research has predominantly focused on problems with simple high-level structure (e.g. opening a drawer or moving a robot as fast as possible). Inspired by combinatorially hard optimization problems, we propose a set of robotics tasks which admit many distinct solutions at the high-level, but require reasoning about states and rewards thousands of steps into the future for the best performance. Critically, while RL has traditionally suffered on complex, long-horizon tasks due to sparse rewards, our tasks are carefully designed to be solvable without specialized exploration. Nevertheless, our investigation finds that standard RL methods often neglect long-term effects due to discounting, while general-purpose hierarchical RL approaches struggle unless additional abstract domain knowledge can be exploited. 深度强化学习在需要复杂推理的离散领域（包括国际象棋、围棋和花火等游戏）显示出前景。然而，这种类型的推理很少在具有高维观察的长视野、连续域中观察到，相反，强化学习研究主要集中在具有简单高级结构的问题（例如打开抽屉或尽可能快地移动机器人）。受组合硬优化问题的启发，我们提出了一组机器人任务，这些任务在高层允许许多不同的解决方案，但需要对状态进行推理，并奖励未来数千步以获得最佳性能。至关重要的是，虽然强化学习传统上由于奖励稀疏而在复杂、长期的任务上遇到困难，但我们的任务经过精心设计，无需专门的探索即可解决。然而，我们的调查发现，标准强化学习方法经常由于折扣而忽略长期影响，而通用的分层强化学习方法则难以发挥作用，除非可以利用额外的抽象领域知识。 本文提出了一组需要长期推理的机器人任务，以解决深度强化学习在长时域复杂问题中的挑战。 Andrew C. Li,Pashootan Vaezipoor,Rodrigo Toro Icarte,Sheila A. McIlraith cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Jiageng Zhu,Hanchen Xie,Wael AbdAlmageed
title: Do-Operation Guided Causal Representation Learning with Reduced Supervision Strength
title_zh: 减少监督强度的 Do-Operation 引导因果表示学习
comment: NeurIPS 2022 Workshop CML4Impact Workshop Camera Ready
comments: NeurIPS 2022 Workshop CML4Impact Workshop Camera Ready
abstract: Causal representation learning has been proposed to encode relationships between factors presented in the high dimensional data. However, existing methods suffer from merely using a large amount of labeled data and ignore the fact that samples generated by the same causal mechanism follow the same causal relationships. In this paper, we seek to explore such information by leveraging do-operation to reduce supervision strength. We propose a framework that implements do-operation by swapping latent cause and effect factors encoded from a pair of inputs. Moreover, we also identify the inadequacy of existing causal representation metrics empirically and theoretically and introduce new metrics for better evaluation. Experiments conducted on both synthetic and real datasets demonstrate the superiorities of our method compared with state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Causal representation learning has been proposed to encode relationships between factors presented in the high dimensional data. However, existing methods suffer from merely using a large amount of labeled data and ignore the fact that samples generated by the same causal mechanism follow the same causal relationships. In this paper, we seek to explore such information by leveraging do-operation to reduce supervision strength. We propose a framework that implements do-operation by swapping latent cause and effect factors encoded from a pair of inputs. Moreover, we also identify the inadequacy of existing causal representation metrics empirically and theoretically and introduce new metrics for better evaluation. Experiments conducted on both synthetic and real datasets demonstrate the superiorities of our method compared with state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 因果表示学习已被提出来编码高维数据中呈现的因素之间的关系。然而，现有方法仅使用大量标记数据，而忽略了由相同因果机制生成的样本遵循相同因果关系的事实。在本文中，我们试图通过利用实际操作来探索这些信息，以减少监管强度。我们提出了一个框架，通过交换从一对输入编码的潜在因果因素来实现 do-操作。此外，我们还从经验和理论上识别了现有因果表示指标的不足，并引入新的指标以进行更好的评估。在合成数据集和真实数据集上进行的实验证明了我们的方法与最先进的方法相比的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用do操作的因果表示学习框架，在减少监督强度的情况下提升因果关系学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有因果表示学习方法依赖大量标注数据，未充分挖掘同一因果机制下样本共享的因果关系特性，导致监督强度过高。
AI.method: 通过交换输入对中的潜在因果因素实现do操作，构建因果关系约束，并设计新的因果表示评估指标。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和真实数据集上均优于现有先进方法，验证了框架有效性及新评估指标的合理性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过do操作有效利用因果机制的共性，降低监督需求的同时提升因果表示质量，新指标能更准确评估因果学习效果。

authors_text: Syed Ashar Javed,Dinkar Juyal,Harshith Padigela,Amaro Taylor-Weiner,Limin Yu,Aaditya Prakash
title: Additive MIL: Intrinsically Interpretable Multiple Instance Learning for Pathology
title_zh: Additive MIL：本质上可解释的病理学多实例学习
abstract: Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) has been widely applied in pathology towards solving critical problems such as automating cancer diagnosis and grading, predicting patient prognosis, and therapy response. Deploying these models in a clinical setting requires careful inspection of these black boxes during development and deployment to identify failures and maintain physician trust. In this work, we propose a simple formulation of MIL models, which enables interpretability while maintaining similar predictive performance. Our Additive MIL models enable spatial credit assignment such that the contribution of each region in the image can be exactly computed and visualized. We show that our spatial credit assignment coincides with regions used by pathologists during diagnosis and improves upon classical attention heatmaps from attention MIL models. We show that any existing MIL model can be made additive with a simple change in function composition. We also show how these models can debug model failures, identify spurious features, and highlight class-wise regions of interest, enabling their use in high-stakes environments such as clinical decision-making.
summary: Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) has been widely applied in pathology towards solving critical problems such as automating cancer diagnosis and grading, predicting patient prognosis, and therapy response. Deploying these models in a clinical setting requires careful inspection of these black boxes during development and deployment to identify failures and maintain physician trust. In this work, we propose a simple formulation of MIL models, which enables interpretability while maintaining similar predictive performance. Our Additive MIL models enable spatial credit assignment such that the contribution of each region in the image can be exactly computed and visualized. We show that our spatial credit assignment coincides with regions used by pathologists during diagnosis and improves upon classical attention heatmaps from attention MIL models. We show that any existing MIL model can be made additive with a simple change in function composition. We also show how these models can debug model failures, identify spurious features, and highlight class-wise regions of interest, enabling their use in high-stakes environments such as clinical decision-making.
abstract_zh: 多实例学习 (MIL) 已广泛应用于病理学领域，旨在解决自动化癌症诊断和分级、预测患者预后和治疗反应等关键问题。在临床环境中部署这些模型需要在开发和部署过程中仔细检查这些黑匣子，以识别故障并维持医生的信任。在这项工作中，我们提出了 MIL 模型的简单表述，该模型在保持类似预测性能的同时实现了可解释性。我们的 Additive MIL 模型支持空间信用分配，以便可以精确计算和可视化图像中每个区域的贡献。我们表明，我们的空间信用分配与病理学家在诊断过程中使用的区域一致，并且改进了来自注意力 MIL 模型的经典注意力热图。我们证明，任何现有的 MIL 模型都可以通过简单改变功能组成来进行添加。我们还展示了这些模型如何调试模型故障、识别虚假特征并突出显示感兴趣的类别区域，从而使其能够在临床决策等高风险环境中使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释的多重实例学习模型（Additive MIL），用于病理学分析，可在保持预测性能的同时实现空间贡献分配。
AI.motivation: 传统MIL模型作为黑箱难以满足临床需求，需提高可解释性以确保医生信任并识别模型缺陷。
AI.method: 通过函数组合的简单修改，构建加法MIL模型，实现精确的空间贡献计算与可视化，与病理学家诊断区域一致。
AI.result: 空间贡献分配优于传统注意力热图，可调试模型故障、识别虚假特征，适用于临床决策等高风险场景。
AI.conclusion: Additive MIL在保持性能的同时提升可解释性，为病理学中的高风险应用提供可靠工具。

We also show how these models can debug model failures, identify spurious features, and highlight class-wise regions of interest, enabling their use in high-stakes environments such as clinical decision-making. 多实例学习 (MIL) 已广泛应用于病理学领域，旨在解决自动化癌症诊断和分级、预测患者预后和治疗反应等关键问题。在临床环境中部署这些模型需要在开发和部署过程中仔细检查这些黑匣子，以识别故障并维持医生的信任。在这项工作中，我们提出了 MIL 模型的简单表述，该模型在保持类似预测性能的同时实现了可解释性。我们的 Additive MIL 模型支持空间信用分配，以便可以精确计算和可视化图像中每个区域的贡献。我们表明，我们的空间信用分配与病理学家在诊断过程中使用的区域一致，并且改进了来自注意力 MIL 模型的经典注意力热图。我们证明，任何现有的 MIL 模型都可以通过简单改变功能组成来进行添加。我们还展示了这些模型如何调试模型故障、识别虚假特征并突出显示感兴趣的类别区域，从而使其能够在临床决策等高风险环境中使用。 本文提出一种可解释的多重实例学习模型（Additive MIL），用于病理学分析，可在保持预测性能的同时实现空间贡献分配。 Syed Ashar Javed,Dinkar Juyal,Harshith Padigela,Amaro Taylor-Weiner,Limin Yu,Aaditya Prakash cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Mehreen Mubashar,Hazrat Ali,Christer Gronlund,Shoaib Azmat
title: R2U++: A Multiscale Recurrent Residual U-Net with Dense Skip Connections for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: R2U++：用于医学图像分割的具有密集跳跃连接的多尺度循环残差 U-Net
comment: Paper accepted in Neural Computing and Applications (2022). Please cite the final version available from Springer website https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s00521-022-07419-7
comments: Paper accepted in Neural Computing and Applications (2022). Please cite the final version available from Springer website https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s00521-022-07419-7
abstract: U-Net is a widely adopted neural network in the domain of medical image segmentation. Despite its quick embracement by the medical imaging community, its performance suffers on complicated datasets. The problem can be ascribed to its simple feature extracting blocks: encoder/decoder, and the semantic gap between encoder and decoder. Variants of U-Net (such as R2U-Net) have been proposed to address the problem of simple feature extracting blocks by making the network deeper, but it does not deal with the semantic gap problem. On the other hand, another variant UNET++ deals with the semantic gap problem by introducing dense skip connections but has simple feature extraction blocks. To overcome these issues, we propose a new U-Net based medical image segmentation architecture R2U++. In the proposed architecture, the adapted changes from vanilla U-Net are: (1) the plain convolutional backbone is replaced by a deeper recurrent residual convolution block. The increased field of view with these blocks aids in extracting crucial features for segmentation which is proven by improvement in the overall performance of the network. (2) The semantic gap between encoder and decoder is reduced by dense skip pathways. These pathways accumulate features coming from multiple scales and apply concatenation accordingly. The modified architecture has embedded multi-depth models, and an ensemble of outputs taken from varying depths improves the performance on foreground objects appearing at various scales in the images. The performance of R2U++ is evaluated on four distinct medical imaging modalities: electron microscopy (EM), X-rays, fundus, and computed tomography (CT). The average gain achieved in IoU score is 1.5+-0.37% and in dice score is 0.9+-0.33% over UNET++, whereas, 4.21+-2.72 in IoU and 3.47+-1.89 in dice score over R2U-Net across different medical imaging segmentation datasets.

On the other hand, another variant UNET++ deals with the semantic gap problem by introducing dense skip connections but has simple feature extraction blocks. To overcome these issues, we propose a new U-Net based medical image segmentation architecture R2U++. In the proposed architecture, the adapted changes from vanilla U-Net are: (1) the plain convolutional backbone is replaced by a deeper recurrent residual convolution block. The increased field of view with these blocks aids in extracting crucial features for segmentation which is proven by improvement in the overall performance of the network. (2) The semantic gap between encoder and decoder is reduced by dense skip pathways. These pathways accumulate features coming from multiple scales and apply concatenation accordingly. The modified architecture has embedded multi-depth models, and an ensemble of outputs taken from varying depths improves the performance on foreground objects appearing at various scales in the images. The performance of R2U++ is evaluated on four distinct medical imaging modalities: electron microscopy (EM), X-rays, fundus, and computed tomography (CT). The average gain achieved in IoU score is 1.5+-0.37% and in dice score is 0.9+-0.33% over UNET++, whereas, 4.21+-2.72 in IoU and 3.47+-1.89 in dice score over R2U-Net across different medical imaging segmentation datasets.
abstract_zh: U-Net 是医学图像分割领域广泛采用的神经网络。尽管它很快受到医学成像界的欢迎，但它的性能在复杂的数据集上受到影响。该问题可以归因于其简单的特征提取块：编码器/解码器，以及编码器和解码器之间的语义差距。人们提出了 U-Net 的变体（例如 R2U-Net），通过使网络更深来解决简单特征提取块的问题，但它没有处理语义差距问题。另一方面，另一个变体 UNET++ 通过引入密集的跳跃连接来处理语义间隙问题，但具有简单的特征提取块。为了克服这些问题，我们提出了一种新的基于 U-Net 的医学图像分割架构 R2U++。在所提出的架构中，对普通 U-Net 的修改是：（1）普通卷积主干被更深的循环残差卷积块取代。这些块增加的视野有助于提取分割的关键特征，网络整体性能的提高证明了这一点。 (2)通过密集的跳跃路径减少编码器和解码器之间的语义差距。这些路径积累来自多个尺度的特征并相应地应用串联。修改后的架构嵌入了多深度模型，并且从不同深度获取的输出集合提高了图像中以不同比例出现的前景对象的性能。 R2U++ 的性能通过四种不同的医学成像方式进行评估：电子显微镜 (EM)、X 射线、眼底和计算机断层扫描 (CT)。与 UNET++ 相比，IoU 得分平均增益为 1.5+-0.37%，dice 得分为 0.9+-0.33%，而在不同的医学成像分割数据集中，与 R2U-Net 相比，IoU 得分为 4.21+-2.72，dice 得分为 3.47+-1.89。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的U-Net架构R2U++，通过多尺度递归残差块和密集跳跃连接提升医学图像分割性能。
AI.motivation: 传统U-Net在复杂数据集上表现不足，现有变体（如R2U-Net和UNET++）分别存在特征提取简单或语义差距未解决的问题，需综合改进。
AI.method: 采用深度递归残差卷积块替代普通卷积以增强特征提取，并通过密集跳跃路径缩小编码器-解码器语义差距，结合多深度输出集成优化多尺度目标分割。
AI.result: 在EM、X光、眼底和CT四类医学影像数据集上，R2U++较UNET++平均提升IoU 1.5±0.37%、Dice 0.9±0.33%，较R2U-Net提升IoU 4.21±2.72%、Dice 3.47±1.89%。
AI.conclusion: R2U++通过融合深度递归结构与密集跳跃连接，有效解决了医学图像分割中的特征提取与语义差距问题，显著提升分割精度。

authors_text: Andy Adinets,Duane Merrill
title: Onesweep: A Faster Least Significant Digit Radix Sort for GPUs
title_zh: Onesweep：用于 GPU 的更快的最低有效数字基数排序
abstract: We present Onesweep, a least-significant digit (LSD) radix sorting algorithm for large GPU sorting problems residing in global memory. Our parallel algorithm employs a method of single-pass prefix sum that only requires ~2n global read/write operations for each digit-binning iteration. This exhibits a significant reduction in last-level memory traffic versus contemporary GPU radix sorting implementations, where each iteration of digit binning requires two passes through the dataset totaling ~3n global memory operations. On the NVIDIA A100 GPU, our approach achieves 29.4 GKey/s when sorting 256M random 32-bit keys. Compared to CUB, the current state-of-the-art GPU LSD radix sort, our approach provides a speedup of ~1.5x. For 32-bit keys with varied distributions, our approach provides more consistent performance compared to HRS, the current state-of-the-art GPU MSD radix sort, and outperforms it in almost all cases.
summary: We present Onesweep, a least-significant digit (LSD) radix sorting algorithm for large GPU sorting problems residing in global memory. Our parallel algorithm employs a method of single-pass prefix sum that only requires ~2n global read/write operations for each digit-binning iteration. This exhibits a significant reduction in last-level memory traffic versus contemporary GPU radix sorting implementations, where each iteration of digit binning requires two passes through the dataset totaling ~3n global memory operations. On the NVIDIA A100 GPU, our approach achieves 29.4 GKey/s when sorting 256M random 32-bit keys. Compared to CUB, the current state-of-the-art GPU LSD radix sort, our approach provides a speedup of ~1.5x. For 32-bit keys with varied distributions, our approach provides more consistent performance compared to HRS, the current state-of-the-art GPU MSD radix sort, and outperforms it in almost all cases.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Onesweep，这是一种最低有效数字 (LSD) 基数排序算法，用于解决驻留在全局内存中的大型 GPU 排序问题。我们的并行算法采用单遍前缀和的方法，每次数字合并迭代只需要~2n 全局读/写操作。与当代 GPU 基数排序实现相比，这显示出最后一级内存流量的显着减少，其中数字合并的每次迭代都需要两次遍历数据集，总计约 3n 个全局内存操作。在 NVIDIA A100 GPU 上，我们的方法在对 256M 随机 32 位密钥进行排序时达到了 29.4 GKey/s。与当前最先进的 GPU LSD 基数排序 CUB 相比，我们的方法提供了约 1.5 倍的加速。对于具有不同分布的 32 位密钥，与 HRS（当前最先进的 GPU MSD 基数排序）相比，我们的方法提供了更一致的性能，并且在几乎所有情况下都优于它。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种优化的最低有效位（LSD）基数排序算法Onesweep，通过减少GPU全局内存访问次数提升大规模数据排序性能。
AI.motivation: 现有GPU基数排序算法在每次数字分箱迭代中需要多次遍历数据集，导致较高的内存流量和性能瓶颈，亟需更高效的内存访问方案。
AI.method: 采用单次前缀和计算方法，每个数字分箱迭代仅需约2n次全局读写操作，相较传统方法减少内存访问次数。
AI.result: 在NVIDIA A100 GPU上实现29.4 GKey/s的排序速度，较CUB算法提升1.5倍，且在不同数据分布下性能更稳定。
AI.conclusion: Onesweep通过优化内存访问模式显著提升GPU排序效率，成为当前LSD基数排序的更优解决方案。

On the NVIDIA A100 GPU, our approach achieves 29.4 GKey/s when sorting 256M random 32-bit keys. Compared to CUB, the current state-of-the-art GPU LSD radix sort, our approach provides a speedup of ~1.5x. For 32-bit keys with varied distributions, our approach provides more consistent performance compared to HRS, the current state-of-the-art GPU MSD radix sort, and outperforms it in almost all cases. 我们提出了 Onesweep，这是一种最低有效数字 (LSD) 基数排序算法，用于解决驻留在全局内存中的大型 GPU 排序问题。我们的并行算法采用单遍前缀和的方法，每次数字合并迭代只需要~2n 全局读/写操作。与当代 GPU 基数排序实现相比，这显示出最后一级内存流量的显着减少，其中数字合并的每次迭代都需要两次遍历数据集，总计约 3n 个全局内存操作。在 NVIDIA A100 GPU 上，我们的方法在对 256M 随机 32 位密钥进行排序时达到了 29.4 GKey/s。与当前最先进的 GPU LSD 基数排序 CUB 相比，我们的方法提供了约 1.5 倍的加速。对于具有不同分布的 32 位密钥，与 HRS（当前最先进的 GPU MSD 基数排序）相比，我们的方法提供了更一致的性能，并且在几乎所有情况下都优于它。 本文提出一种优化的最低有效位（LSD）基数排序算法Onesweep，通过减少GPU全局内存访问次数提升大规模数据排序性能。 Andy Adinets,Duane Merrill cs.DC,cs.DS

authors_text: Jaskaran Grover,Changliu Liu,Katia Sycara
title: The Before, During, and After of Multi-Robot Deadlock
title_zh: 多机器人死锁的前、中、后
comment: Accepted to International Journal of Robotics Research 2022, WAFR 2020 Special Issue
comments: Accepted to International Journal of Robotics Research 2022, WAFR 2020 Special Issue
abstract: Collision avoidance for multirobot systems is a well-studied problem. Recently, control barrier functions (CBFs) have been proposed for synthesizing controllers that guarantee collision avoidance and goal stabilization for multiple robots. However, it has been noted that reactive control synthesis methods (such as CBFs) are prone to \textit{deadlock}, an equilibrium of system dynamics that causes the robots to stall before reaching their goals. In this paper, we analyze the closed-loop dynamics of robots using CBFs, to characterize controller parameters, initial conditions, and goal locations that invariably lead the system to deadlock. Using tools from duality theory, we derive geometric properties of robot configurations of an $N$ robot system once it is in deadlock and we justify them using the mechanics interpretation of KKT conditions. Our key deductions are that 1) system deadlock is characterized by a force-equilibrium on robots and 2) deadlock occurs to ensure safety when safety is on the brink of being violated. These deductions allow us to interpret deadlock as a subset of the state space, and we show that this set is non-empty and located on the boundary of the safe set. By exploiting these properties, we analyze the number of admissible robot configurations in deadlock and develop a provably-correct decentralized algorithm for deadlock resolution to safely deliver the robots to their goals. This algorithm is validated in simulations as well as experimentally on Khepera-IV robots.

Recently, control barrier functions (CBFs) have been proposed for synthesizing controllers that guarantee collision avoidance and goal stabilization for multiple robots. However, it has been noted that reactive control synthesis methods (such as CBFs) are prone to \textit{deadlock}, an equilibrium of system dynamics that causes the robots to stall before reaching their goals. In this paper, we analyze the closed-loop dynamics of robots using CBFs, to characterize controller parameters, initial conditions, and goal locations that invariably lead the system to deadlock. Using tools from duality theory, we derive geometric properties of robot configurations of an $N$ robot system once it is in deadlock and we justify them using the mechanics interpretation of KKT conditions. Our key deductions are that 1) system deadlock is characterized by a force-equilibrium on robots and 2) deadlock occurs to ensure safety when safety is on the brink of being violated. These deductions allow us to interpret deadlock as a subset of the state space, and we show that this set is non-empty and located on the boundary of the safe set. By exploiting these properties, we analyze the number of admissible robot configurations in deadlock and develop a provably-correct decentralized algorithm for deadlock resolution to safely deliver the robots to their goals. This algorithm is validated in simulations as well as experimentally on Khepera-IV robots.
abstract_zh: 多机器人系统的碰撞避免是一个经过充分研究的问题。最近，控制屏障函数（CBF）被提出用于合成控制器，以保证多个机器人的避免碰撞和目标稳定。然而，人们注意到，反应控制综合方法（例如 CBF）很容易出现 \textit{死锁}，这是一种系统动态平衡，导致机器人在达到目标之前失速。在本文中，我们使用 CBF 分析机器人的闭环动力学，以表征总是导致系统陷入死锁的控制器参数、初始条件和目标位置。使用对偶理论的工具，一旦 $N$ 机器人系统陷入僵局，我们就可以推导出其机器人配置的几何特性，并使用 KKT 条件的力学解释来证明它们的合理性。我们的关键推论是：1）系统死锁的特点是机器人上的力平衡；2）当安全性处于被侵犯的边缘时，死锁的发生是为了确保安全。这些推论使我们能够将死锁解释为状态空间的子集，并且我们表明该集合是非空的并且位于安全集的边界上。通过利用这些属性，我们分析了死锁中可接受的机器人配置的数量，并开发了一种可证明正确的去中心化算法来解决死锁，以安全地将机器人送达其目标。该算法在 Khepera-IV 机器人上进行了模拟和实验验证。

AI.tldr: 本文分析多机器人系统中基于控制屏障函数（CBFs）的死锁现象，并提出一种去中心化算法以解决死锁问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管控制屏障函数（CBFs）在多机器人避障中广泛应用，但其反应式控制方法易导致死锁，使机器人无法到达目标。
AI.method: 通过闭环动力学分析与对偶理论工具，结合KKT条件的力学解释，推导死锁的几何特性，并设计去中心化死锁解决算法。
AI.result: 验证了死锁是安全集边界上的非空子集，并开发出可证明正确的算法，在仿真与Khepera-IV机器人实验中有效解决死锁。
AI.conclusion: 死锁源于安全约束的临界状态，通过几何特性分析与算法设计可实现多机器人系统的安全目标达成。

Recently, control barrier functions (CBFs) have been proposed for synthesizing controllers that guarantee collision avoidance and goal stabilization for multiple robots. However, it has been noted that reactive control synthesis methods (such as CBFs) are prone to \textit{deadlock}, an equilibrium of system dynamics that causes the robots to stall before reaching their goals. In this paper, we analyze the closed-loop dynamics of robots using CBFs, to characterize controller parameters, initial conditions, and goal locations that invariably lead the system to deadlock. Our key deductions are that 1) system deadlock is characterized by a force-equilibrium on robots and 2) deadlock occurs to ensure safety when safety is on the brink of being violated. These deductions allow us to interpret deadlock as a subset of the state space, and we show that this set is non-empty and located on the boundary of the safe set. By exploiting these properties, we analyze the number of admissible robot configurations in deadlock and develop a provably-correct decentralized algorithm for deadlock resolution to safely deliver the robots to their goals. This algorithm is validated in simulations as well as experimentally on Khepera-IV robots. 多机器人系统的碰撞避免是一个经过充分研究的问题。最近，控制屏障函数（CBF）被提出用于合成控制器，以保证多个机器人的避免碰撞和目标稳定。然而，人们注意到，反应控制综合方法（例如 CBF）很容易出现 \textit{死锁}，这是一种系统动态平衡，导致机器人在达到目标之前失速。在本文中，我们使用 CBF 分析机器人的闭环动力学，以表征总是导致系统陷入死锁的控制器参数、初始条件和目标位置。使用对偶理论的工具，一旦 $N$ 机器人系统陷入僵局，我们就可以推导出其机器人配置的几何特性，并使用 KKT 条件的力学解释来证明它们的合理性。我们的关键推论是：1）系统死锁的特点是机器人上的力平衡；2）当安全性处于被侵犯的边缘时，死锁的发生是为了确保安全。这些推论使我们能够将死锁解释为状态空间的子集，并且我们表明该集合是非空的并且位于安全集的边界上。通过利用这些属性，我们分析了死锁中可接受的机器人配置的数量，并开发了一种可证明正确的去中心化算法来解决死锁，以安全地将机器人送达其目标。该算法在 Khepera-IV 机器人上进行了模拟和实验验证。 本文分析多机器人系统中基于控制屏障函数（CBFs）的死锁现象，并提出一种去中心化算法以解决死锁问题。 Jaskaran Grover,Changliu Liu,Katia Sycara cs.RO,cs.MA,math.OC

authors_text: Jie Cai,Zibo Meng,Jiaming Ding,Chiu Man Ho
title: Real-Time Super-Resolution for Real-World Images on Mobile Devices
title_zh: 移动设备上真实世界图像的实时超分辨率
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2004.13674
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2004.13674
abstract: Image Super-Resolution (ISR), which aims at recovering High-Resolution (HR) images from the corresponding Low-Resolution (LR) counterparts. Although recent progress in ISR has been remarkable. However, they are way too computationally intensive to be deployed on edge devices, since most of the recent approaches are deep learning-based. Besides, these methods always fail in real-world scenes, since most of them adopt a simple fixed "ideal" bicubic downsampling kernel from high-quality images to construct LR/HR training pairs which may lose track of frequency-related details. In this work, an approach for real-time ISR on mobile devices is presented, which is able to deal with a wide range of degradations in real-world scenarios. Extensive experiments on traditional super-resolution datasets (Set5, Set14, BSD100, Urban100, Manga109, DIV2K) and real-world images with a variety of degradations demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-art methods, resulting in higher PSNR and SSIM, lower noise and better visual quality. Most importantly, our method achieves real-time performance on mobile or edge devices.
summary: Image Super-Resolution (ISR), which aims at recovering High-Resolution (HR) images from the corresponding Low-Resolution (LR) counterparts. Although recent progress in ISR has been remarkable. However, they are way too computationally intensive to be deployed on edge devices, since most of the recent approaches are deep learning-based. Besides, these methods always fail in real-world scenes, since most of them adopt a simple fixed "ideal" bicubic downsampling kernel from high-quality images to construct LR/HR training pairs which may lose track of frequency-related details. In this work, an approach for real-time ISR on mobile devices is presented, which is able to deal with a wide range of degradations in real-world scenarios. Extensive experiments on traditional super-resolution datasets (Set5, Set14, BSD100, Urban100, Manga109, DIV2K) and real-world images with a variety of degradations demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-art methods, resulting in higher PSNR and SSIM, lower noise and better visual quality. Most importantly, our method achieves real-time performance on mobile or edge devices.
abstract_zh: 图像超分辨率 (ISR)，旨在从相应的低分辨率 (LR) 图像中恢复高分辨率 (HR) 图像。尽管最近 ISR 方面的进展非常显着。然而，它们的计算量太大，无法部署在边缘设备上，因为最近的大多数方法都是基于深度学习的。此外，这些方法在现实场景中总是失败，因为它们大多数采用来自高质量图像的简单固定“理想”双三次下采样内核来构建 LR/HR 训练对，这可能会丢失与频率相关的细节。在这项工作中，提出了一种移动设备上的实时 ISR 方法，该方法能够处理现实场景中的各种性能下降。对传统超分辨率数据集（Set5、Set14、BSD100、Urban100、Manga109、DIV2K）和具有各种退化的真实世界图像的大量实验表明，我们的方法优于最先进的方法，从而获得更高的 PSNR 和 SSIM、更低的噪声和更好的视觉质量。最重要的是，我们的方法在移动或边缘设备上实现了实时性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于移动设备的实时图像超分辨率方法，能够处理真实场景中的多种退化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率方法计算量大难以部署在边缘设备，且因使用理想化下采样核导致真实场景效果不佳。
AI.method: 设计轻量化网络结构并采用真实退化模型生成训练数据，提升移动设备上的实时处理能力与真实场景适应性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集和真实图像上取得更高PSNR/SSIM指标，视觉质量更优且实现移动设备实时运行。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了移动设备端实时超分辨率难题，在保持计算效率的同时提升了真实场景下的重建质量。

authors_text: Zhe Huang,Ye-Ji Mun,Xiang Li,Yiqing Xie,Ninghan Zhong,Weihang Liang,Junyi Geng,Tan Chen,Katherine Driggs-Campbell
title: Seamless Interaction Design with Coexistence and Cooperation Modes for Robust Human-Robot Collaboration
title_zh: 具有共存和合作模式的无缝交互设计，实现强大的人机协作
comment: Accepted by CASE 2022 Special Session on Adaptive and Resilient Cyber-Physical Manufacturing Networks
comments: Accepted by CASE 2022 Special Session on Adaptive and Resilient Cyber-Physical Manufacturing Networks
abstract: A robot needs multiple interaction modes to robustly collaborate with a human in complicated industrial tasks. We develop a Coexistence-and-Cooperation (CoCo) human-robot collaboration system. Coexistence mode enables the robot to work with the human on different sub-tasks independently in a shared space. Cooperation mode enables the robot to follow human guidance and recover failures. A human intention tracking algorithm takes in both human and robot motion measurements as input and provides a switch on the interaction modes. We demonstrate the effectiveness of CoCo system in a use case analogous to a real world multi-step assembly task.
summary: A robot needs multiple interaction modes to robustly collaborate with a human in complicated industrial tasks. We develop a Coexistence-and-Cooperation (CoCo) human-robot collaboration system. Coexistence mode enables the robot to work with the human on different sub-tasks independently in a shared space. Cooperation mode enables the robot to follow human guidance and recover failures. A human intention tracking algorithm takes in both human and robot motion measurements as input and provides a switch on the interaction modes. We demonstrate the effectiveness of CoCo system in a use case analogous to a real world multi-step assembly task.
abstract_zh: 机器人需要多种交互模式才能与人类在复杂的工业任务中稳健协作。我们开发了共存与合作（CoCo）人机协作系统。共存模式使机器人能够在共享空间中与人类独立地执行不同的子任务。协作模式使机器人能够遵循人类的指导并恢复故障。人类意图跟踪算法将人类和机器人的运动测量结果作为输入，并提供交互模式的切换。我们在类似于现实世界多步骤组装任务的用例中展示了 CoCo 系统的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种具备共存与协作模式的人机协作系统CoCo，以提升复杂工业任务中人机交互的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有系统难以在复杂工业场景中灵活适应人类与机器人的动态交互需求，需通过多模式协作提升任务可靠性与效率。
AI.method: 开发包含共存模式（独立执行子任务）与协作模式（跟随人类指令恢复故障）的CoCo系统，并设计基于人类与机器人运动数据的意图跟踪算法实现模式切换。
AI.result: 在模拟真实多步骤装配任务的实验中验证了CoCo系统在复杂场景下的有效性与模式切换的准确性。
AI.conclusion: CoCo系统通过动态模式切换机制显著增强了人机协作的适应性与鲁棒性，为工业场景提供了新的交互设计思路。

search_text: Seamless Interaction Design with Coexistence and Cooperation Modes for Robust Human-Robot Collaboration 具有共存和合作模式的无缝交互设计，实现强大的人机协作 A robot needs multiple interaction modes to robustly collaborate with a human in complicated industrial tasks. We develop a Coexistence-and-Cooperation (CoCo) human-robot collaboration system. Coexistence mode enables the robot to work with the human on different sub-tasks independently in a shared space. Cooperation mode enables the robot to follow human guidance and recover failures. A human intention tracking algorithm takes in both human and robot motion measurements as input and provides a switch on the interaction modes. We demonstrate the effectiveness of CoCo system in a use case analogous to a real world multi-step assembly task. 机器人需要多种交互模式才能与人类在复杂的工业任务中稳健协作。我们开发了共存与合作（CoCo）人机协作系统。共存模式使机器人能够在共享空间中与人类独立地执行不同的子任务。协作模式使机器人能够遵循人类的指导并恢复故障。人类意图跟踪算法将人类和机器人的运动测量结果作为输入，并提供交互模式的切换。我们在类似于现实世界多步骤组装任务的用例中展示了 CoCo 系统的有效性。 本文设计了一种具备共存与协作模式的人机协作系统CoCo，以提升复杂工业任务中人机交互的鲁棒性。 Zhe Huang,Ye-Ji Mun,Xiang Li,Yiqing Xie,Ninghan Zhong,Weihang Liang,Junyi Geng,Tan Chen,Katherine Driggs-Campbell cs.RO

authors_text: Md Manjurul Ahsan,Muhammad Ramiz Uddin,Shahana Akter Luna
title: Monkeypox Image Data collection
title_zh: 猴痘图像数据采集
comment: This is the attempt of creating monkeypox image dataset collected from various sources and it will continue to update by collectiong samples from journals and other public access domains
comments: This is the attempt of creating monkeypox image dataset collected from various sources and it will continue to update by collectiong samples from journals and other public access domains
abstract: This paper explains the initial Monkeypox Open image data collection procedure. It was created by assembling images collected from websites, newspapers, and online portals and currently contains around 1905 images after data augmentation.
summary: This paper explains the initial Monkeypox Open image data collection procedure. It was created by assembling images collected from websites, newspapers, and online portals and currently contains around 1905 images after data augmentation.
abstract_zh: 本文解释了最初的 Monkeypox Open 图像数据收集程序。它是通过组装从网站、报纸和在线门户网站收集的图像而创建的，目前包含数据增强后的约 1905 张图像。

AI.tldr: 本文的主要任务是构建一个公开的猴痘图像数据集，用于支持相关研究和分析。
AI.motivation: 为猴痘检测和研究提供标准化的图像数据资源，促进疾病识别算法的开发与验证。
AI.method: 通过爬取网站、新闻媒体和在线平台的图像，并应用数据增强技术扩充数据集规模。
AI.result: 最终数据集包含约1905张经过标注和增强的猴痘相关图像。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为猴痘图像分析领域提供了基础资源，可推动自动化检测技术的研究进展。

authors_text: Hemant Kumawat,Saibal Mukhopadhyay
title: Radar Guided Dynamic Visual Attention for Resource-Efficient RGB Object Detection
title_zh: 雷达引导动态视觉注意，实现资源高效的 RGB 物体检测
comment: Accepted in International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) 2022
comments: Accepted in International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN) 2022
abstract: An autonomous system's perception engine must provide an accurate understanding of the environment for it to make decisions. Deep learning based object detection networks experience degradation in the performance and robustness for small and far away objects due to a reduction in object's feature map as we move to higher layers of the network. In this work, we propose a novel radar-guided spatial attention for RGB images to improve the perception quality of autonomous vehicles operating in a dynamic environment. In particular, our method improves the perception of small and long range objects, which are often not detected by the object detectors in RGB mode. The proposed method consists of two RGB object detectors, namely the Primary detector and a lightweight Secondary detector. The primary detector takes a full RGB image and generates primary detections. Next, the radar proposal framework creates regions of interest (ROIs) for object proposals by projecting the radar point cloud onto the 2D RGB image. These ROIs are cropped and fed to the secondary detector to generate secondary detections which are then fused with the primary detections via non-maximum suppression. This method helps in recovering the small objects by preserving the object's spatial features through an increase in their receptive field. We evaluate our fusion method on the challenging nuScenes dataset and show that our fusion method with SSD-lite as primary and secondary detector improves the baseline primary yolov3 detector's recall by 14% while requiring three times fewer computational resources.
summary: An autonomous system's perception engine must provide an accurate understanding of the environment for it to make decisions. Deep learning based object detection networks experience degradation in the performance and robustness for small and far away objects due to a reduction in object's feature map as we move to higher layers of the network. In this work, we propose a novel radar-guided spatial attention for RGB images to improve the perception quality of autonomous vehicles operating in a dynamic environment. In particular, our method improves the perception of small and long range objects, which are often not detected by the object detectors in RGB mode. The proposed method consists of two RGB object detectors, namely the Primary detector and a lightweight Secondary detector. The primary detector takes a full RGB image and generates primary detections. Next, the radar proposal framework creates regions of interest (ROIs) for object proposals by projecting the radar point cloud onto the 2D RGB image. These ROIs are cropped and fed to the secondary detector to generate secondary detections which are then fused with the primary detections via non-maximum suppression. This method helps in recovering the small objects by preserving the object's spatial features through an increase in their receptive field. We evaluate our fusion method on the challenging nuScenes dataset and show that our fusion method with SSD-lite as primary and secondary detector improves the baseline primary yolov3 detector's recall by 14% while requiring three times fewer computational resources.
abstract_zh: 自主系统的感知引擎必须提供对环境的准确理解，以便做出决策。当我们移动到网络的更高层时，由于对象特征图的减少，基于深度学习的对象检测网络对于小而远的对象的性能和鲁棒性会下降。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的雷达引导的 RGB 图像空间注意力，以提高在动态环境中运行的自动驾驶车辆的感知质量。特别是，我们的方法提高了对小距离和远距离物体的感知，这些物体通常无法被 RGB 模式下的物体检测器检测到。所提出的方法由两个 RGB 对象检测器组成，即主检测器和轻量级辅助检测器。主检测器获取完整的 RGB 图像并生成主检测。接下来，雷达提案框架通过将雷达点云投影到 2D RGB 图像上，为对象提案创建感兴趣区域 (ROI)。这些 ROI 被裁剪并馈送到辅助检测器以生成辅助检测，然后通过非极大值抑制与主要检测融合。该方法通过增加物体的感受野来保留物体的空间特征，从而有助于恢复小物体。我们在具有挑战性的 nuScenes 数据集上评估了我们的融合方法，并表明我们使用 SSD-lite 作为主要和辅助检测器的融合方法将基线主要 yolov3 检测器的召回率提高了 14%，同时需要的计算资源减少了三倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种雷达引导的动态视觉注意力机制，通过融合雷达点云与RGB图像，提升资源受限环境下自主系统对小目标和远距离目标的检测能力。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习目标检测网络在处理小目标和远距离目标时存在性能退化，且计算资源消耗大，亟需更高效的感知方案。
AI.method: 设计双检测器架构（主检测器+轻量级次检测器），利用雷达点云生成感兴趣区域（ROI），通过非极大值抑制融合主次检测结果，扩大感受野以增强小目标感知。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，采用SSD-lite作为主次检测器时，相较基线YOLOv3检测器召回率提升14%，计算资源消耗降低至原来的1/3。
AI.conclusion: 雷达引导的视觉注意力机制有效提升了小目标检测性能并降低了计算成本，为动态环境下的自动驾驶感知系统提供了高效解决方案。

We evaluate our fusion method on the challenging nuScenes dataset and show that our fusion method with SSD-lite as primary and secondary detector improves the baseline primary yolov3 detector's recall by 14% while requiring three times fewer computational resources. 自主系统的感知引擎必须提供对环境的准确理解，以便做出决策。当我们移动到网络的更高层时，由于对象特征图的减少，基于深度学习的对象检测网络对于小而远的对象的性能和鲁棒性会下降。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的雷达引导的 RGB 图像空间注意力，以提高在动态环境中运行的自动驾驶车辆的感知质量。特别是，我们的方法提高了对小距离和远距离物体的感知，这些物体通常无法被 RGB 模式下的物体检测器检测到。所提出的方法由两个 RGB 对象检测器组成，即主检测器和轻量级辅助检测器。主检测器获取完整的 RGB 图像并生成主检测。接下来，雷达提案框架通过将雷达点云投影到 2D RGB 图像上，为对象提案创建感兴趣区域 (ROI)。这些 ROI 被裁剪并馈送到辅助检测器以生成辅助检测，然后通过非极大值抑制与主要检测融合。该方法通过增加物体的感受野来保留物体的空间特征，从而有助于恢复小物体。我们在具有挑战性的 nuScenes 数据集上评估了我们的融合方法，并表明我们使用 SSD-lite 作为主要和辅助检测器的融合方法将基线主要 yolov3 检测器的召回率提高了 14%，同时需要的计算资源减少了三倍。 本文提出一种雷达引导的动态视觉注意力机制，通过融合雷达点云与RGB图像，提升资源受限环境下自主系统对小目标和远距离目标的检测能力。 Hemant Kumawat,Saibal Mukhopadhyay cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Jille van der Togt,Lea Tiyavorabun,Matteo Rosati,Giulio Starace
title: [Re] Badder Seeds: Reproducing the Evaluation of Lexical Methods for Bias Measurement
title_zh: [Re] Badder Seeds：再现偏差测量词汇方法的评估
abstract: Combating bias in NLP requires bias measurement. Bias measurement is almost always achieved by using lexicons of seed terms, i.e. sets of words specifying stereotypes or dimensions of interest. This reproducibility study focuses on the original authors' main claim that the rationale for the construction of these lexicons needs thorough checking before usage, as the seeds used for bias measurement can themselves exhibit biases. The study aims to evaluate the reproducibility of the quantitative and qualitative results presented in the paper and the conclusions drawn thereof. We reproduce most of the results supporting the original authors' general claim: seed sets often suffer from biases that affect their performance as a baseline for bias metrics. Generally, our results mirror the original paper's. They are slightly different on select occasions, but not in ways that undermine the paper's general intent to show the fragility of seed sets.
summary: Combating bias in NLP requires bias measurement. Bias measurement is almost always achieved by using lexicons of seed terms, i.e. sets of words specifying stereotypes or dimensions of interest. This reproducibility study focuses on the original authors' main claim that the rationale for the construction of these lexicons needs thorough checking before usage, as the seeds used for bias measurement can themselves exhibit biases. The study aims to evaluate the reproducibility of the quantitative and qualitative results presented in the paper and the conclusions drawn thereof. We reproduce most of the results supporting the original authors' general claim: seed sets often suffer from biases that affect their performance as a baseline for bias metrics. Generally, our results mirror the original paper's. They are slightly different on select occasions, but not in ways that undermine the paper's general intent to show the fragility of seed sets.
abstract_zh: 对抗 NLP 中的偏差需要偏差测量。偏差测量几乎总是通过使用种子术语词典来实现，即指定刻板印象或感兴趣维度的单词集。这项可重复性研究的重点是原作者的主要主张，即构建这些词典的基本原理需要在使用前进行彻底检查，因为用于偏差测量的种子本身可能会表现出偏差。该研究旨在评估论文中提出的定量和定性结果及其得出的结论的可重复性。我们重现了支持原作者一般主张的大部分结果：种子集经常遭受偏差，影响其作为偏差指标基线的性能。一般来说，我们的结果反映了原始论文的结果。它们在某些情况下略有不同，但不会破坏本文展示种子组脆弱性的总体意图。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过重现原研究的方法，评估用于偏见测量的词典方法的可重复性，验证种子词集本身的偏见问题。
AI.motivation: 自然语言处理中偏见测量依赖种子词集，但这些词集本身可能包含偏见，需验证其可靠性以确保偏见指标的有效性。
AI.method: 重现原论文的定量与定性分析，检查种子词集构建逻辑并评估其偏见对基线性能的影响。
AI.result: 大部分结果与原论文一致，种子词集确实存在影响性能的偏见，个别差异未动摇核心结论。
AI.conclusion: 种子词集的构建需严格审查，因其自身偏见可能导致偏见测量指标不可靠。
