authors_text: Chengliang Zhong,Peixing You,Xiaoxue Chen,Hao Zhao,Fuchun Sun,Guyue Zhou,Xiaodong Mu,Chuang Gan,Wenbing Huang
title: SNAKE: Shape-aware Neural 3D Keypoint Field
title_zh: SNAKE：形状感知神经 3D 关键点场
comment: Accepted by NeurIPS 2022. Codes are available at https://github.com/zhongcl-thu/SNAKE
comments: Accepted by NeurIPS 2022. Codes are available at https://github.com/zhongcl-thu/SNAKE
abstract: Detecting 3D keypoints from point clouds is important for shape reconstruction, while this work investigates the dual question: can shape reconstruction benefit 3D keypoint detection? Existing methods either seek salient features according to statistics of different orders or learn to predict keypoints that are invariant to transformation. Nevertheless, the idea of incorporating shape reconstruction into 3D keypoint detection is under-explored. We argue that this is restricted by former problem formulations. To this end, a novel unsupervised paradigm named SNAKE is proposed, which is short for shape-aware neural 3D keypoint field. Similar to recent coordinate-based radiance or distance field, our network takes 3D coordinates as inputs and predicts implicit shape indicators and keypoint saliency simultaneously, thus naturally entangling 3D keypoint detection and shape reconstruction. We achieve superior performance on various public benchmarks, including standalone object datasets ModelNet40, KeypointNet, SMPL meshes and scene-level datasets 3DMatch and Redwood. Intrinsic shape awareness brings several advantages as follows. (1) SNAKE generates 3D keypoints consistent with human semantic annotation, even without such supervision. (2) SNAKE outperforms counterparts in terms of repeatability, especially when the input point clouds are down-sampled. (3) the generated keypoints allow accurate geometric registration, notably in a zero-shot setting. Codes are available at https://github.com/zhongcl-thu/SNAKE

We achieve superior performance on various public benchmarks, including standalone object datasets ModelNet40, KeypointNet, SMPL meshes and scene-level datasets 3DMatch and Redwood. Intrinsic shape awareness brings several advantages as follows. (1) SNAKE generates 3D keypoints consistent with human semantic annotation, even without such supervision. (2) SNAKE outperforms counterparts in terms of repeatability, especially when the input point clouds are down-sampled. (3) the generated keypoints allow accurate geometric registration, notably in a zero-shot setting. Codes are available at https://github.com/zhongcl-thu/SNAKE
abstract_zh: 从点云中检测 3D 关键点对于形状重建非常重要，而这项工作研究了双重问题：形状重建是否有利于 3D 关键点检测？现有的方法要么根据不同阶的统计来寻找显着特征，要么学习预测对变换不变的关键点。然而，将形状重建纳入 3D 关键点检测的想法尚未得到充分探索。我们认为这是受到以前问题表述的限制。为此，提出了一种名为 SNAKE 的新型无监督范式，它是形状感知神经 3D 关键点场的缩写。与最近基于坐标的辐射度或距离场类似，我们的网络以 3D 坐标作为输入，同时预测隐式形状指示器和关键点显着性，从而自然地将 3D 关键点检测和形状重建结合起来。我们在各种公共基准测试中实现了卓越的性能，包括独立对象数据集 ModelNet40、KeypointNet、SMPL 网格以及场景级数据集 3DMatch 和 Redwood。内在形状意识带来了以下几个优点。 (1) 即使没有这种监督，SNAKE 也会生成与人类语义注释一致的 3D 关键点。 (2) SNAKE 在可重复性方面优于同行，特别是当输入点云被下采样时。 (3) 生成的关键点允许精确的几何配准，特别是在零样本设置中。代码可在 https://github.com/zhongcl-thu/SNAKE 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SNAKE的无监督方法，通过将形状重建与3D关键点检测结合，实现从点云中检测3D关键点的任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么依赖统计特征提取，要么追求变换不变性，但未充分探索形状重建对关键点检测的促进作用，传统框架限制了两者的融合。
AI.method: SNAKE以3D坐标为输入，同时预测隐式形状指标和关键点显著性，通过坐标编码器和形状-关键点联合解码器实现形状感知的关键点检测。
AI.result: 在ModelNet40、KeypointNet等基准数据集上取得优异性能，无需监督即可生成符合人类语义标注的关键点，且在点云下采样和零样本注册场景中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: SNAKE通过形状感知的联合优化，提升了关键点检测的鲁棒性和几何一致性，为点云分析提供了新的范式。

search_text: SNAKE: Shape-aware Neural 3D Keypoint Field SNAKE：形状感知神经 3D 关键点场 Detecting 3D keypoints from point clouds is important for shape reconstruction, while this work investigates the dual question: can shape reconstruction benefit 3D keypoint detection? Existing methods either seek salient features according to statistics of different orders or learn to predict keypoints that are invariant to transformation. Nevertheless, the idea of incorporating shape reconstruction into 3D keypoint detection is under-explored. We argue that this is restricted by former problem formulations. To this end, a novel unsupervised paradigm named SNAKE is proposed, which is short for shape-aware neural 3D keypoint field. Similar to recent coordinate-based radiance or distance field, our network takes 3D coordinates as inputs and predicts implicit shape indicators and keypoint saliency simultaneously, thus naturally entangling 3D keypoint detection and shape reconstruction. We achieve superior performance on various public benchmarks, including standalone object datasets ModelNet40, KeypointNet, SMPL meshes and scene-level datasets 3DMatch and Redwood. Intrinsic shape awareness brings several advantages as follows. (1) SNAKE generates 3D keypoints consistent with human semantic annotation, even without such supervision. (2) SNAKE outperforms counterparts in terms of repeatability, especially when the input point clouds are down-sampled. (3) the generated keypoints allow accurate geometric registration, notably in a zero-shot setting. Codes are available at https://github.com/zhongcl-thu/SNAKE 从点云中检测 3D 关键点对于形状重建非常重要，而这项工作研究了双重问题：形状重建是否有利于 3D 关键点检测？现有的方法要么根据不同阶的统计来寻找显着特征，要么学习预测对变换不变的关键点。然而，将形状重建纳入 3D 关键点检测的想法尚未得到充分探索。我们认为这是受到以前问题表述的限制。为此，提出了一种名为 SNAKE 的新型无监督范式，它是形状感知神经 3D 关键点场的缩写。与最近基于坐标的辐射度或距离场类似，我们的网络以 3D 坐标作为输入，同时预测隐式形状指示器和关键点显着性，从而自然地将 3D 关键点检测和形状重建结合起来。我们在各种公共基准测试中实现了卓越的性能，包括独立对象数据集 ModelNet40、KeypointNet、SMPL 网格以及场景级数据集 3DMatch 和 Redwood。内在形状意识带来了以下几个优点。 (1) 即使没有这种监督，SNAKE 也会生成与人类语义注释一致的 3D 关键点。 (2) SNAKE 在可重复性方面优于同行，特别是当输入点云被下采样时。 (3) 生成的关键点允许精确的几何配准，特别是在零样本设置中。代码可在 https://github.com/zhongcl-thu/SNAKE 获取 本文提出了一种名为SNAKE的无监督方法，通过将形状重建与3D关键点检测结合，实现从点云中检测3D关键点的任务。 Chengliang Zhong,Peixing You,Xiaoxue Chen,Hao Zhao,Fuchun Sun,Guyue Zhou,Xiaodong Mu,Chuang Gan,Wenbing Huang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: David Bayani
title: A Learning-Based Method for Automatic Operator Selection in the Fanoos XAI System
title_zh: Fanoos XAI 系统中基于学习的自动操作员选择方法
comment: 23 pages; update d8M6y2022: corrected github url (the .com was missing in the address)
comments: 23 pages; update d8M6y2022: corrected github url (the .com was missing in the address)
abstract: We describe an extension of the Fanoos XAI system [Bayani et al 2022] which enables the system to learn the appropriate action to take in order to satisfy a user's request for description to be made more or less abstract. Specifically, descriptions of systems under analysis are stored in states, and in order to make a description more or less abstract, Fanoos selects an operator from a large library to apply to the state and generate a new description. Prior work on Fanoos predominately used hand-written methods for operator-selection; this current work allows Fanoos to leverage experience to learn the best operator to apply in a particular situation, balancing exploration and exploitation, leveraging expert insights when available, and utilizing similarity between the current state and past states. Additionally, in order to bootstrap the learning process (i.e., like in curriculum learning), we describe a simulated user which we implemented; this simulation allows Fanoos to gain general insights that enable reasonable courses of action, insights which later can be refined by experience with real users, as opposed to interacting with humans completely from scratch. Code implementing the methods described in the paper can be found at https://github/DBay-ani/Operator_Selection_Learning_Extensions_For_Fanoos.
summary: We describe an extension of the Fanoos XAI system [Bayani et al 2022] which enables the system to learn the appropriate action to take in order to satisfy a user's request for description to be made more or less abstract. Specifically, descriptions of systems under analysis are stored in states, and in order to make a description more or less abstract, Fanoos selects an operator from a large library to apply to the state and generate a new description. Prior work on Fanoos predominately used hand-written methods for operator-selection; this current work allows Fanoos to leverage experience to learn the best operator to apply in a particular situation, balancing exploration and exploitation, leveraging expert insights when available, and utilizing similarity between the current state and past states. Additionally, in order to bootstrap the learning process (i.e., like in curriculum learning), we describe a simulated user which we implemented; this simulation allows Fanoos to gain general insights that enable reasonable courses of action, insights which later can be refined by experience with real users, as opposed to interacting with humans completely from scratch. Code implementing the methods described in the paper can be found at https://github/DBay-ani/Operator_Selection_Learning_Extensions_For_Fanoos.
abstract_zh: 我们描述了 Fanoos XAI 系统的扩展 [Bayani et al 2022]，它使系统能够学习采取适当的操作，以满足用户对描述或多或少抽象的要求。具体来说，被分析系统的描述存储在状态中，为了使描述或多或少抽象，Fanoos从大型库中选择一个算子应用于状态并生成新的描述。 Fanoos 之前的工作主要使用手写方法来选择操作员；目前的工作使 Fanoos 能够利用经验来学习在特定情况下应用的最佳算子，平衡探索和利用，利用可用的专家见解，并利用当前状态和过去状态之间的相似性。此外，为了引导学习过程（即，像课程学习一样），我们描述了我们实现的模拟用户；这种模拟使 Fanoos 能够获得一般洞察力，从而实现合理的行动方案，这些洞察力随后可以通过与真实用户的经验来完善，而不是完全从头开始与人类交互。实现本文所述方法的代码可以在 https://github/DBay-ani/Operator_Selection_Learning_Extensions_For_Fanoos 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于学习的自动操作符选择方法，用于Fanoos可解释AI系统中根据用户需求调整描述抽象层级。
AI.motivation: 传统Fanoos系统依赖人工编写的操作符选择方法，难以灵活适应用户对描述抽象程度的动态需求，需通过学习机制提升系统自主决策能力。
AI.method: 构建状态-操作符映射模型，结合探索与利用策略、专家知识及状态相似性进行操作符学习，并设计模拟用户引导初始学习过程。
AI.result: 系统能根据用户需求自动选择操作符生成适配抽象层级的描述，模拟用户辅助实现无监督预训练，后续通过真实用户交互优化决策。
AI.conclusion: 该方法使Fanoos具备自主学习能力，在保持可解释性的同时提升描述生成的灵活性，为XAI系统动态适应用户需求提供新思路。

search_text: A Learning-Based Method for Automatic Operator Selection in the Fanoos XAI System Fanoos XAI 系统中基于学习的自动操作员选择方法 We describe an extension of the Fanoos XAI system [Bayani et al 2022] which enables the system to learn the appropriate action to take in order to satisfy a user's request for description to be made more or less abstract. Specifically, descriptions of systems under analysis are stored in states, and in order to make a description more or less abstract, Fanoos selects an operator from a large library to apply to the state and generate a new description. Prior work on Fanoos predominately used hand-written methods for operator-selection; this current work allows Fanoos to leverage experience to learn the best operator to apply in a particular situation, balancing exploration and exploitation, leveraging expert insights when available, and utilizing similarity between the current state and past states. Additionally, in order to bootstrap the learning process (i.e., like in curriculum learning), we describe a simulated user which we implemented; this simulation allows Fanoos to gain general insights that enable reasonable courses of action, insights which later can be refined by experience with real users, as opposed to interacting with humans completely from scratch. Code implementing the methods described in the paper can be found at https://github/DBay-ani/Operator_Selection_Learning_Extensions_For_Fanoos. 我们描述了 Fanoos XAI 系统的扩展 [Bayani et al 2022]，它使系统能够学习采取适当的操作，以满足用户对描述或多或少抽象的要求。具体来说，被分析系统的描述存储在状态中，为了使描述或多或少抽象，Fanoos从大型库中选择一个算子应用于状态并生成新的描述。 Fanoos 之前的工作主要使用手写方法来选择操作员；目前的工作使 Fanoos 能够利用经验来学习在特定情况下应用的最佳算子，平衡探索和利用，利用可用的专家见解，并利用当前状态和过去状态之间的相似性。此外，为了引导学习过程（即，像课程学习一样），我们描述了我们实现的模拟用户；这种模拟使 Fanoos 能够获得一般洞察力，从而实现合理的行动方案，这些洞察力随后可以通过与真实用户的经验来完善，而不是完全从头开始与人类交互。实现本文所述方法的代码可以在 https://github/DBay-ani/Operator_Selection_Learning_Extensions_For_Fanoos 找到。 本文提出了一种基于学习的自动操作符选择方法，用于Fanoos可解释AI系统中根据用户需求调整描述抽象层级。 David Bayani cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.HC

authors_text: Shyamal Buch,Cristóbal Eyzaguirre,Adrien Gaidon,Jiajun Wu,Li Fei-Fei,Juan Carlos Niebles
title: Revisiting the "Video" in Video-Language Understanding
title_zh: 重温视频语言理解中的“视频”
abstract: What makes a video task uniquely suited for videos, beyond what can be understood from a single image? Building on recent progress in self-supervised image-language models, we revisit this question in the context of video and language tasks. We propose the atemporal probe (ATP), a new model for video-language analysis which provides a stronger bound on the baseline accuracy of multimodal models constrained by image-level understanding. By applying this model to standard discriminative video and language tasks, such as video question answering and text-to-video retrieval, we characterize the limitations and potential of current video-language benchmarks. We find that understanding of event temporality is often not necessary to achieve strong or state-of-the-art performance, even compared with recent large-scale video-language models and in contexts intended to benchmark deeper video-level understanding. We also demonstrate how ATP can improve both video-language dataset and model design. We describe a technique for leveraging ATP to better disentangle dataset subsets with a higher concentration of temporally challenging data, improving benchmarking efficacy for causal and temporal understanding. Further, we show that effectively integrating ATP into full video-level temporal models can improve efficiency and state-of-the-art accuracy.
summary: What makes a video task uniquely suited for videos, beyond what can be understood from a single image? Building on recent progress in self-supervised image-language models, we revisit this question in the context of video and language tasks. We propose the atemporal probe (ATP), a new model for video-language analysis which provides a stronger bound on the baseline accuracy of multimodal models constrained by image-level understanding. By applying this model to standard discriminative video and language tasks, such as video question answering and text-to-video retrieval, we characterize the limitations and potential of current video-language benchmarks. We find that understanding of event temporality is often not necessary to achieve strong or state-of-the-art performance, even compared with recent large-scale video-language models and in contexts intended to benchmark deeper video-level understanding. We also demonstrate how ATP can improve both video-language dataset and model design. We describe a technique for leveraging ATP to better disentangle dataset subsets with a higher concentration of temporally challenging data, improving benchmarking efficacy for causal and temporal understanding. Further, we show that effectively integrating ATP into full video-level temporal models can improve efficiency and state-of-the-art accuracy.
abstract_zh: 是什么让视频任务特别适合视频，超出了单张图像所能理解的范围？基于自监督图像语言模型的最新进展，我们在视频和语言任务的背景下重新审视这个问题。我们提出了非时间探针（ATP），这是一种用于视频语言分析的新模型，它为受图像级理解约束的多模态模型的基线精度提供了更强的界限。通过将该模型应用于标准的判别性视频和语言任务，例如视频问答和文本到视频检索，我们描述了当前视频语言基准的局限性和潜力。我们发现，即使与最近的大规模视频语言模型相比，以及在旨在对更深层次的视频级理解进行基准测试的上下文中，对事件时间性的理解通常也不是实现强大或最先进性能所必需的。我们还演示了 ATP 如何改进视频语言数据集和模型设计。我们描述了一种利用 ATP 更好地解开数据集子集与更集中的时间挑战性数据的技术，从而提高因果和时间理解的基准测试效率。此外，我们还表明，有效地将 ATP 集成到完整的视频级时间模型中可以提高效率和最先进的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的视频-语言分析模型ATP，用于评估当前视频-语言基准的局限性，并探讨时间因素在视频理解中的作用。
AI.motivation: 尽管图像-语言模型取得进展，但视频任务的独特性（如时间因素）仍不明确，需要重新评估现有基准的局限性。
AI.method: 提出atemporal probe（ATP）模型，用于分析视频-语言任务的基线准确性，并改进数据集设计和模型整合，以提升因果和时间理解的基准效果。
AI.result: 发现时间事件理解并非达到高性能的必要条件，ATP能提升数据集子集分离效果，并改善模型效率和准确率。
AI.conclusion: 现有视频-语言基准可能低估了时间理解的重要性，ATP为更有效的基准测试和模型设计提供了新方法。

search_text: Revisiting the "Video" in Video-Language Understanding 重温视频语言理解中的“视频” What makes a video task uniquely suited for videos, beyond what can be understood from a single image? Building on recent progress in self-supervised image-language models, we revisit this question in the context of video and language tasks. We propose the atemporal probe (ATP), a new model for video-language analysis which provides a stronger bound on the baseline accuracy of multimodal models constrained by image-level understanding. By applying this model to standard discriminative video and language tasks, such as video question answering and text-to-video retrieval, we characterize the limitations and potential of current video-language benchmarks. We find that understanding of event temporality is often not necessary to achieve strong or state-of-the-art performance, even compared with recent large-scale video-language models and in contexts intended to benchmark deeper video-level understanding. We also demonstrate how ATP can improve both video-language dataset and model design. We describe a technique for leveraging ATP to better disentangle dataset subsets with a higher concentration of temporally challenging data, improving benchmarking efficacy for causal and temporal understanding. Further, we show that effectively integrating ATP into full video-level temporal models can improve efficiency and state-of-the-art accuracy. 是什么让视频任务特别适合视频，超出了单张图像所能理解的范围？基于自监督图像语言模型的最新进展，我们在视频和语言任务的背景下重新审视这个问题。我们提出了非时间探针（ATP），这是一种用于视频语言分析的新模型，它为受图像级理解约束的多模态模型的基线精度提供了更强的界限。通过将该模型应用于标准的判别性视频和语言任务，例如视频问答和文本到视频检索，我们描述了当前视频语言基准的局限性和潜力。我们发现，即使与最近的大规模视频语言模型相比，以及在旨在对更深层次的视频级理解进行基准测试的上下文中，对事件时间性的理解通常也不是实现强大或最先进性能所必需的。我们还演示了 ATP 如何改进视频语言数据集和模型设计。我们描述了一种利用 ATP 更好地解开数据集子集与更集中的时间挑战性数据的技术，从而提高因果和时间理解的基准测试效率。此外，我们还表明，有效地将 ATP 集成到完整的视频级时间模型中可以提高效率和最先进的准确性。 本文提出了一种新的视频-语言分析模型ATP，用于评估当前视频-语言基准的局限性，并探讨时间因素在视频理解中的作用。 Shyamal Buch,Cristóbal Eyzaguirre,Adrien Gaidon,Jiajun Wu,Li Fei-Fei,Juan Carlos Niebles cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Dustin Schwenk,Apoorv Khandelwal,Christopher Clark,Kenneth Marino,Roozbeh Mottaghi
title: A-OKVQA: A Benchmark for Visual Question Answering using World Knowledge
title_zh: A-OKVQA：使用世界知识进行视觉问答的基准
abstract: The Visual Question Answering (VQA) task aspires to provide a meaningful testbed for the development of AI models that can jointly reason over visual and natural language inputs. Despite a proliferation of VQA datasets, this goal is hindered by a set of common limitations. These include a reliance on relatively simplistic questions that are repetitive in both concepts and linguistic structure, little world knowledge needed outside of the paired image, and limited reasoning required to arrive at the correct answer. We introduce A-OKVQA, a crowdsourced dataset composed of a diverse set of about 25K questions requiring a broad base of commonsense and world knowledge to answer. In contrast to the existing knowledge-based VQA datasets, the questions generally cannot be answered by simply querying a knowledge base, and instead require some form of commonsense reasoning about the scene depicted in the image. We demonstrate the potential of this new dataset through a detailed analysis of its contents and baseline performance measurements over a variety of state-of-the-art vision-language models. Project page: http://a-okvqa.allenai.org/
summary: The Visual Question Answering (VQA) task aspires to provide a meaningful testbed for the development of AI models that can jointly reason over visual and natural language inputs. Despite a proliferation of VQA datasets, this goal is hindered by a set of common limitations. These include a reliance on relatively simplistic questions that are repetitive in both concepts and linguistic structure, little world knowledge needed outside of the paired image, and limited reasoning required to arrive at the correct answer. We introduce A-OKVQA, a crowdsourced dataset composed of a diverse set of about 25K questions requiring a broad base of commonsense and world knowledge to answer. In contrast to the existing knowledge-based VQA datasets, the questions generally cannot be answered by simply querying a knowledge base, and instead require some form of commonsense reasoning about the scene depicted in the image. We demonstrate the potential of this new dataset through a detailed analysis of its contents and baseline performance measurements over a variety of state-of-the-art vision-language models. Project page: http://a-okvqa.allenai.org/
abstract_zh: 视觉问答（VQA）任务旨在为人工智能模型的开发提供一个有意义的测试平台，这些模型可以对视觉和自然语言输入进行联合推理。尽管 VQA 数据集激增，但这一目标仍受到一系列常见限制的阻碍。其中包括依赖于概念和语言结构重复的相对简单的问题、配对图像之外所需的很少的世界知识以及得出正确答案所需的有限推理。我们引入了 A-OKVQA，这是一个众包数据集，由大约 25000 个不同的问题组成，需要广泛的常识和世界知识来回答。与现有的基于知识的 VQA 数据集相比，这些问题通常不能通过简单地查询知识库来回答，而是需要对图像中描绘的场景进行某种形式的常识推理。我们通过对各种最先进的视觉语言模型的内容和基线性能测量的详细分析来展示这个新数据集的潜力。项目页面：http://a-okvqa.allenai.org/

AI.tldr: 本文提出A-OKVQA数据集，用于评估视觉问答任务中模型对世界常识知识的推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有VQA数据集存在问题：问题简单重复、依赖图像内知识且推理需求低，难以全面评估模型能力。
AI.method: 通过众包构建包含约25K问题的数据集，问题需结合图像内容与广泛常识推理，无法仅靠知识库回答。
AI.result: 分析数据集特性并测试多种前沿视觉-语言模型的基线性能，验证其有效性。
AI.conclusion: A-OKVQA为评估模型常识推理能力提供新基准，推动更复杂VQA模型的发展。

authors_text: Nan Liu,Shuang Li,Yilun Du,Antonio Torralba,Joshua B. Tenenbaum
title: Compositional Visual Generation with Composable Diffusion Models
title_zh: 使用可组合扩散模型的组合视觉生成
comment: ECCV 2022. First three authors contributed equally. Project website: https://energy-based-model.github.io/Compositional-Visual-Generation-with-Composable-Diffusion-Models/
comments: ECCV 2022. First three authors contributed equally. Project website: https://energy-based-model.github.io/Compositional-Visual-Generation-with-Composable-Diffusion-Models/
abstract: Large text-guided diffusion models, such as DALLE-2, are able to generate stunning photorealistic images given natural language descriptions. While such models are highly flexible, they struggle to understand the composition of certain concepts, such as confusing the attributes of different objects or relations between objects. In this paper, we propose an alternative structured approach for compositional generation using diffusion models. An image is generated by composing a set of diffusion models, with each of them modeling a certain component of the image. To do this, we interpret diffusion models as energy-based models in which the data distributions defined by the energy functions may be explicitly combined. The proposed method can generate scenes at test time that are substantially more complex than those seen in training, composing sentence descriptions, object relations, human facial attributes, and even generalizing to new combinations that are rarely seen in the real world. We further illustrate how our approach may be used to compose pre-trained text-guided diffusion models and generate photorealistic images containing all the details described in the input descriptions, including the binding of certain object attributes that have been shown difficult for DALLE-2. These results point to the effectiveness of the proposed method in promoting structured generalization for visual generation. Project page: https://energy-based-model.github.io/Compositional-Visual-Generation-with-Composable-Diffusion-Models/
summary: Large text-guided diffusion models, such as DALLE-2, are able to generate stunning photorealistic images given natural language descriptions. While such models are highly flexible, they struggle to understand the composition of certain concepts, such as confusing the attributes of different objects or relations between objects. In this paper, we propose an alternative structured approach for compositional generation using diffusion models. An image is generated by composing a set of diffusion models, with each of them modeling a certain component of the image. To do this, we interpret diffusion models as energy-based models in which the data distributions defined by the energy functions may be explicitly combined. The proposed method can generate scenes at test time that are substantially more complex than those seen in training, composing sentence descriptions, object relations, human facial attributes, and even generalizing to new combinations that are rarely seen in the real world. We further illustrate how our approach may be used to compose pre-trained text-guided diffusion models and generate photorealistic images containing all the details described in the input descriptions, including the binding of certain object attributes that have been shown difficult for DALLE-2. These results point to the effectiveness of the proposed method in promoting structured generalization for visual generation. Project page: https://energy-based-model.github.io/Compositional-Visual-Generation-with-Composable-Diffusion-Models/
abstract_zh: 大型文本引导扩散模型（例如 DALLE-2）能够根据自然语言描述生成令人惊叹的逼真图像。虽然此类模型非常灵活，但它们很难理解某些概念的组成，例如混淆不同对象的属性或对象之间的关系。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用扩散模型进行合成生成的替代结构化方法。图像是通过组合一组扩散模型来生成的，每个模型都对图像的某个组成部分进行建模。为此，我们将扩散模型解释为基于能量的模型，其中可以显式组合由能量函数定义的数据分布。所提出的方法可以在测试时生成比训练中看到的场景要复杂得多的场景，组成句子描述、对象关系、人脸属性，甚至泛化到现实世界中很少见的新组合。我们进一步说明了如何使用我们的方法来构建预先训练的文本引导扩散模型，并生成包含输入描述中描述的所有细节的真实图像，包括对 DALLE-2 来说很难的某些对象属性的绑定。这些结果表明所提出的方法在促进视觉生成的结构化泛化方面的有效性。项目页面：https://energy-based-model.github.io/Compositional-Visual-Generation-with-Composable-Diffusion-Models/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可组合扩散模型的结构化方法，通过组合多个扩散模型来生成更具组合性的视觉内容。
AI.motivation: 现有大型文本引导扩散模型（如DALL-E 2）在理解复杂概念组合（如物体属性、关系）时存在局限性，难以生成结构化复杂场景。
AI.method: 将扩散模型视为能量模型，通过显式组合能量函数实现多模型协作，每个模型负责图像的不同组件，支持测试时生成训练数据未见的新组合。
AI.result: 成功生成包含复杂场景、对象关系、人脸属性及罕见组合的高质量图像，解决了DALL-E 2在属性绑定上的困难。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结构化组合提升了视觉生成的组合泛化能力，为复杂场景生成提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可组合扩散模型的结构化方法，通过组合多个扩散模型来生成更具组合性的视觉内容。
motivation: 现有大型文本引导扩散模型（如DALL-E 2）在理解复杂概念组合（如物体属性、关系）时存在局限性，难以生成结构化复杂场景。
method: 将扩散模型视为能量模型，通过显式组合能量函数实现多模型协作，每个模型负责图像的不同组件，支持测试时生成训练数据未见的新组合。
result: 成功生成包含复杂场景、对象关系、人脸属性及罕见组合的高质量图像，解决了DALL-E 2在属性绑定上的困难。
conclusion: 该方法通过结构化组合提升了视觉生成的组合泛化能力，为复杂场景生成提供了新思路。
search_text: Compositional Visual Generation with Composable Diffusion Models 使用可组合扩散模型的组合视觉生成 Large text-guided diffusion models, such as DALLE-2, are able to generate stunning photorealistic images given natural language descriptions. While such models are highly flexible, they struggle to understand the composition of certain concepts, such as confusing the attributes of different objects or relations between objects. In this paper, we propose an alternative structured approach for compositional generation using diffusion models. An image is generated by composing a set of diffusion models, with each of them modeling a certain component of the image. To do this, we interpret diffusion models as energy-based models in which the data distributions defined by the energy functions may be explicitly combined. The proposed method can generate scenes at test time that are substantially more complex than those seen in training, composing sentence descriptions, object relations, human facial attributes, and even generalizing to new combinations that are rarely seen in the real world. We further illustrate how our approach may be used to compose pre-trained text-guided diffusion models and generate photorealistic images containing all the details described in the input descriptions, including the binding of certain object attributes that have been shown difficult for DALLE-2. These results point to the effectiveness of the proposed method in promoting structured generalization for visual generation. Project page: https://energy-based-model.github.io/Compositional-Visual-Generation-with-Composable-Diffusion-Models/ 大型文本引导扩散模型（例如 DALLE-2）能够根据自然语言描述生成令人惊叹的逼真图像。虽然此类模型非常灵活，但它们很难理解某些概念的组成，例如混淆不同对象的属性或对象之间的关系。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用扩散模型进行合成生成的替代结构化方法。图像是通过组合一组扩散模型来生成的，每个模型都对图像的某个组成部分进行建模。为此，我们将扩散模型解释为基于能量的模型，其中可以显式组合由能量函数定义的数据分布。所提出的方法可以在测试时生成比训练中看到的场景要复杂得多的场景，组成句子描述、对象关系、人脸属性，甚至泛化到现实世界中很少见的新组合。我们进一步说明了如何使用我们的方法来构建预先训练的文本引导扩散模型，并生成包含输入描述中描述的所有细节的真实图像，包括对 DALLE-2 来说很难的某些对象属性的绑定。这些结果表明所提出的方法在促进视觉生成的结构化泛化方面的有效性。项目页面：https://energy-based-model.github.io/Compositional-Visual-Generation-with-Composable-Diffusion-Models/ 本文提出了一种基于可组合扩散模型的结构化方法，通过组合多个扩散模型来生成更具组合性的视觉内容。 Nan Liu,Shuang Li,Yilun Du,Antonio Torralba,Joshua B. Tenenbaum cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Robert Ganian,Filip Pokrývka,André Schidler,Kirill Simonov,Stefan Szeider
title: Weighted Model Counting with Twin-Width
title_zh: 双宽度加权模型计数
abstract: Bonnet et al. (FOCS 2020) introduced the graph invariant twin-width and showed that many NP-hard problems are tractable for graphs of bounded twin-width, generalizing similar results for other width measures, including treewidth and clique-width. In this paper, we investigate the use of twin-width for solving the propositional satisfiability problem (SAT) and propositional model counting. We particularly focus on Bounded-ones Weighted Model Counting (BWMC), which takes as input a CNF formula $F$ along with a bound $k$ and asks for the weighted sum of all models with at most $k$ positive literals. BWMC generalizes not only SAT but also (weighted) model counting. We develop the notion of "signed" twin-width of CNF formulas and establish that BWMC is fixed-parameter tractable when parameterized by the certified signed twin-width of $F$ plus $k$. We show that this result is tight: it is neither possible to drop the bound $k$ nor use the vanilla twin-width instead if one wishes to retain fixed-parameter tractability, even for the easier problem SAT. Our theoretical results are complemented with an empirical evaluation and comparison of signed twin-width on various classes of CNF formulas.
summary: Bonnet et al. (FOCS 2020) introduced the graph invariant twin-width and showed that many NP-hard problems are tractable for graphs of bounded twin-width, generalizing similar results for other width measures, including treewidth and clique-width. In this paper, we investigate the use of twin-width for solving the propositional satisfiability problem (SAT) and propositional model counting. We particularly focus on Bounded-ones Weighted Model Counting (BWMC), which takes as input a CNF formula $F$ along with a bound $k$ and asks for the weighted sum of all models with at most $k$ positive literals. BWMC generalizes not only SAT but also (weighted) model counting. We develop the notion of "signed" twin-width of CNF formulas and establish that BWMC is fixed-parameter tractable when parameterized by the certified signed twin-width of $F$ plus $k$. We show that this result is tight: it is neither possible to drop the bound $k$ nor use the vanilla twin-width instead if one wishes to retain fixed-parameter tractability, even for the easier problem SAT. Our theoretical results are complemented with an empirical evaluation and comparison of signed twin-width on various classes of CNF formulas.
abstract_zh: 邦内特等人。 (FOCS 2020) 引入了图不变孪生宽度，并表明许多 NP 难题对于有界孪生宽度图来说是可以处理的，概括了其他宽度度量的类似结果，包括树宽度和团宽度。在本文中，我们研究了使用双宽度来解决命题可满足性问题（SAT）和命题模型计数。我们特别关注有界加权模型计数（BWMC），它以 CNF 公式 $F$ 和绑定 $k$ 作为输入，并要求具有最多 $k$ 正文字的所有模型的加权和。 BWMC 不仅概括了 SAT，还概括了（加权）模型计数。我们开发了 CNF 公式的“有符号”双宽概念，并确定当通过经过认证的有符号双宽 $F$ 加 $k$ 进行参数化时，BWMC 是固定参数可处理的。我们证明这个结果是严格的：如果希望保留固定参数的易处理性，即使对于更简单的 SAT 问题，也不可能放弃 $k$ 约束，也不可能使用普通双宽。我们的理论结果得到了对各类 CNF 公式上有符号孪生宽度的实证评估和比较的补充。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了利用图不变量twin-width解决命题可满足性问题（SAT）和命题模型计数问题，特别是有界一元加权模型计数（BWMC）问题，并提出了带符号的twin-width概念。
AI.motivation: twin-width作为图的度量，已被证明能有效处理多种NP难问题。本文旨在探索其在SAT和模型计数中的应用，解决传统方法在处理复杂约束时的效率问题。
AI.method: 提出CNF公式的带符号twin-width概念，结合参数化复杂度理论，证明BWMC在认证带符号twin-width和k的联合参数下具有固定参数可解性，并通过实验验证理论结果。
AI.result: 证明BWMC在认证带符号twin-width和k参数下固定参数可解，且该结果具有紧性；实验显示带符号twin-width在不同CNF类中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 带符号twin-width为BWMC提供了新的参数化视角，理论分析与实验验证共同表明其有效性，同时明确了参数k和认证twin-width的必要性。

authors_text: Nikola Popovic,Danda Pani Paudel,Thomas Probst,Luc Van Gool
title: Gradient Obfuscation Checklist Test Gives a False Sense of Security
title_zh: 梯度混淆检查表测试给人一种错误的安全感
abstract: One popular group of defense techniques against adversarial attacks is based on injecting stochastic noise into the network. The main source of robustness of such stochastic defenses however is often due to the obfuscation of the gradients, offering a false sense of security. Since most of the popular adversarial attacks are optimization-based, obfuscated gradients reduce their attacking ability, while the model is still susceptible to stronger or specifically tailored adversarial attacks. Recently, five characteristics have been identified, which are commonly observed when the improvement in robustness is mainly caused by gradient obfuscation. It has since become a trend to use these five characteristics as a sufficient test, to determine whether or not gradient obfuscation is the main source of robustness. However, these characteristics do not perfectly characterize all existing cases of gradient obfuscation, and therefore can not serve as a basis for a conclusive test. In this work, we present a counterexample, showing this test is not sufficient for concluding that gradient obfuscation is not the main cause of improvements in robustness.
summary: One popular group of defense techniques against adversarial attacks is based on injecting stochastic noise into the network. The main source of robustness of such stochastic defenses however is often due to the obfuscation of the gradients, offering a false sense of security. Since most of the popular adversarial attacks are optimization-based, obfuscated gradients reduce their attacking ability, while the model is still susceptible to stronger or specifically tailored adversarial attacks. Recently, five characteristics have been identified, which are commonly observed when the improvement in robustness is mainly caused by gradient obfuscation. It has since become a trend to use these five characteristics as a sufficient test, to determine whether or not gradient obfuscation is the main source of robustness. However, these characteristics do not perfectly characterize all existing cases of gradient obfuscation, and therefore can not serve as a basis for a conclusive test. In this work, we present a counterexample, showing this test is not sufficient for concluding that gradient obfuscation is not the main cause of improvements in robustness.
abstract_zh: 针对对抗性攻击的一组流行的防御技术是基于向网络中注入随机噪声。然而，这种随机防御的稳健性的主要来源通常是由于梯度的混淆，提供了错误的安全感。由于大多数流行的对抗性攻击都是基于优化的，混淆的梯度会降低其攻击能力，而模型仍然容易受到更强或专门定制的对抗性攻击。最近，已经确定了五个特征，当鲁棒性的提高主要由梯度混淆引起时，通常会观察到这些特征。此后，使用这五个特征作为充分的测试已成为一种趋势，以确定梯度混淆是否是鲁棒性的主要来源。然而，这些特征并不能完美地表征所有现有的梯度混淆案例，因此不能作为结论性测试的基础。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个反例，表明该测试不足以得出梯度混淆不是鲁棒性改进的主要原因的结论。

AI.tldr: 本文指出基于梯度混淆的对抗防御方法存在缺陷，现有检查清单测试无法准确判断其是否为鲁棒性提升的主要原因。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗防御中通过注入随机噪声实现鲁棒性的方法依赖梯度混淆，但其有效性可能被误认为是真正的防御能力，而现有五项特征检查清单测试存在局限性。
AI.method: 通过构造反例，验证五项特征检查清单测试无法覆盖所有梯度混淆场景，从而证明该测试的不充分性。
AI.result: 实验表明，检查清单测试可能错误排除梯度混淆作为鲁棒性提升的主要因素，导致安全评估失真。
AI.conclusion: 现有检查清单测试不足以作为判断梯度混淆防御有效性的结论依据，需进一步完善评估标准。

In this work, we present a counterexample, showing this test is not sufficient for concluding that gradient obfuscation is not the main cause of improvements in robustness. 针对对抗性攻击的一组流行的防御技术是基于向网络中注入随机噪声。然而，这种随机防御的稳健性的主要来源通常是由于梯度的混淆，提供了错误的安全感。由于大多数流行的对抗性攻击都是基于优化的，混淆的梯度会降低其攻击能力，而模型仍然容易受到更强或专门定制的对抗性攻击。最近，已经确定了五个特征，当鲁棒性的提高主要由梯度混淆引起时，通常会观察到这些特征。此后，使用这五个特征作为充分的测试已成为一种趋势，以确定梯度混淆是否是鲁棒性的主要来源。然而，这些特征并不能完美地表征所有现有的梯度混淆案例，因此不能作为结论性测试的基础。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个反例，表明该测试不足以得出梯度混淆不是鲁棒性改进的主要原因的结论。 本文指出基于梯度混淆的对抗防御方法存在缺陷，现有检查清单测试无法准确判断其是否为鲁棒性提升的主要原因。 Nikola Popovic,Danda Pani Paudel,Thomas Probst,Luc Van Gool cs.CV

authors_text: Mouxiang Chen,Chenghao Liu,Zemin Liu,Jianling Sun
title: Scalar is Not Enough: Vectorization-based Unbiased Learning to Rank
title_zh: 标量是不够的：基于矢量化的无偏学习排序
abstract: Unbiased learning to rank (ULTR) aims to train an unbiased ranking model from biased user click logs. Most of the current ULTR methods are based on the examination hypothesis (EH), which assumes that the click probability can be factorized into two scalar functions, one related to ranking features and the other related to bias factors. Unfortunately, the interactions among features, bias factors and clicks are complicated in practice, and usually cannot be factorized in this independent way. Fitting click data with EH could lead to model misspecification and bring the approximation error. In this paper, we propose a vector-based EH and formulate the click probability as a dot product of two vector functions. This solution is complete due to its universality in fitting arbitrary click functions. Based on it, we propose a novel model named Vectorization to adaptively learn the relevance embeddings and sort documents by projecting embeddings onto a base vector. Extensive experiments show that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art ULTR methods on complex real clicks as well as simple simulated clicks.
summary: Unbiased learning to rank (ULTR) aims to train an unbiased ranking model from biased user click logs. Most of the current ULTR methods are based on the examination hypothesis (EH), which assumes that the click probability can be factorized into two scalar functions, one related to ranking features and the other related to bias factors. Unfortunately, the interactions among features, bias factors and clicks are complicated in practice, and usually cannot be factorized in this independent way. Fitting click data with EH could lead to model misspecification and bring the approximation error. In this paper, we propose a vector-based EH and formulate the click probability as a dot product of two vector functions. This solution is complete due to its universality in fitting arbitrary click functions. Based on it, we propose a novel model named Vectorization to adaptively learn the relevance embeddings and sort documents by projecting embeddings onto a base vector. Extensive experiments show that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art ULTR methods on complex real clicks as well as simple simulated clicks.
abstract_zh: 无偏见学习排名（ULTR）旨在从有偏见的用户点击日志中训练无偏见的排名模型。目前大多数的 ULTR 方法都是基于检查假设（EH），它假设点击概率可以分解为两个标量函数，一个与排名特征相关，另一个与偏差因子相关。不幸的是，特征、偏差因素和点击之间的相互作用在实践中很复杂，通常不能以这种独立的方式分解。用 EH 拟合点击数据可能会导致模型指定错误并带来近似误差。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于向量的 EH，并将点击概率表示为两个向量函数的点积。该解决方案是完整的，因为它在拟合任意点击函数方面具有通用性。基于此，我们提出了一种名为“向量化”的新颖模型，通过将嵌入投影到基向量上来自适应学习相关嵌入并对文档进行排序。大量实验表明，我们的方法在复杂的真实点击以及简单的模拟点击方面明显优于最先进的 ULTR 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于向量化的无偏学习排序方法，以解决传统方法在处理复杂特征与偏差因素交互时的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有ULTR方法基于标量分解的检验假设，难以捕捉复杂的特征-偏差-点击交互，导致模型误设和近似误差。
AI.method: 提出向量化的检验假设，将点击概率建模为两个向量函数的点积，并设计Vectorization模型自适应学习相关性嵌入，通过投影基向量进行排序。
AI.result: 在复杂真实点击数据和简单模拟点击数据上，该方法显著优于现有最先进的ULTR方法。
AI.conclusion: 向量化的无偏学习排序方法能有效捕捉复杂交互，减少模型误设，提升排序性能。

authors_text: Bhuvan Khoshoo,Julian Blank,Thang Q. Pham,Kalyanmoy Deb,Shanelle N. Foster
title: Optimal Design of Electric Machine with Efficient Handling of Constraints and Surrogate Assistance
title_zh: 有效处理约束和替代辅助的电机优化设计
abstract: Electric machine design optimization is a computationally expensive multi-objective optimization problem. While the objectives require time-consuming finite element analysis, optimization constraints can often be based on mathematical expressions, such as geometric constraints. This article investigates this optimization problem of mixed computationally expensive nature by proposing an optimization method incorporated into a popularly-used evolutionary multi-objective optimization algorithm - NSGA-II. The proposed method exploits the inexpensiveness of geometric constraints to generate feasible designs by using a custom repair operator. The proposed method also addresses the time-consuming objective functions by incorporating surrogate models for predicting machine performance. The article successfully establishes the superiority of the proposed method over the conventional optimization approach. This study clearly demonstrates how a complex engineering design can be optimized for multiple objectives and constraints requiring heterogeneous evaluation times and optimal solutions can be analyzed to select a single preferred solution and importantly harnessed to reveal vital design features common to optimal solutions as design principles.
summary: Electric machine design optimization is a computationally expensive multi-objective optimization problem. While the objectives require time-consuming finite element analysis, optimization constraints can often be based on mathematical expressions, such as geometric constraints. This article investigates this optimization problem of mixed computationally expensive nature by proposing an optimization method incorporated into a popularly-used evolutionary multi-objective optimization algorithm - NSGA-II. The proposed method exploits the inexpensiveness of geometric constraints to generate feasible designs by using a custom repair operator. The proposed method also addresses the time-consuming objective functions by incorporating surrogate models for predicting machine performance. The article successfully establishes the superiority of the proposed method over the conventional optimization approach. This study clearly demonstrates how a complex engineering design can be optimized for multiple objectives and constraints requiring heterogeneous evaluation times and optimal solutions can be analyzed to select a single preferred solution and importantly harnessed to reveal vital design features common to optimal solutions as design principles.
abstract_zh: 电机设计优化是一个计算量大的多目标优化问题。虽然目标需要耗时的有限元分析，但优化约束通常可以基于数学表达式，例如几何约束。本文通过提出一种结合到常用的进化多目标优化算法 - NSGA-II 中的优化方法，研究了这种混合计算成本高的优化问题。所提出的方法利用几何约束的廉价性，通过使用定制修复算子来生成可行的设计。所提出的方法还通过结合用于预测机器性能的代理模型来解决耗时的目标函数。本文成功地证明了所提出的方法相对于传统优化方法的优越性。这项研究清楚地展示了如何针对需要异构评估时间的多个目标和约束来优化复杂的工程设计，并且可以分析最佳解决方案以选择单个首选解决方案，并重要地利用它来揭示最佳解决方案所共有的重要设计特征作为设计原则。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合约束修复算子和代理模型的NSGA-II算法，用于解决电动机多目标优化设计中计算成本高、约束条件复杂的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统优化方法因有限元分析计算量大且约束处理效率低，难以满足复杂工程设计需求，需开发更高效的混合优化策略。
AI.method: 基于NSGA-II算法，设计自定义修复算子处理几何约束生成可行解，并引入代理模型加速目标函数计算，实现异构评估时间下的多目标优化。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法在计算效率和优化质量上优于传统方法，成功揭示了最优解共有的关键设计特征作为设计原则。
AI.conclusion: 通过约束修复与代理模型协同，可有效解决复杂工程设计的多目标优化问题，并为设计原则提炼提供依据。

authors_text: Shiva Omrani Sabbaghi,Aylin Caliskan
title: Measuring Gender Bias in Word Embeddings of Gendered Languages Requires Disentangling Grammatical Gender Signals
title_zh: 测量性别语言词嵌入中的性别偏见需要解开语法性别信号
abstract: Does the grammatical gender of a language interfere when measuring the semantic gender information captured by its word embeddings? A number of anomalous gender bias measurements in the embeddings of gendered languages suggest this possibility. We demonstrate that word embeddings learn the association between a noun and its grammatical gender in grammatically gendered languages, which can skew social gender bias measurements. Consequently, word embedding post-processing methods are introduced to quantify, disentangle, and evaluate grammatical gender signals. The evaluation is performed on five gendered languages from the Germanic, Romance, and Slavic branches of the Indo-European language family. Our method reduces the strength of grammatical gender signals, which is measured in terms of effect size (Cohen's d), by a significant average of d = 1.3 for French, German, and Italian, and d = 0.56 for Polish and Spanish. Once grammatical gender is disentangled, the association between over 90% of 10,000 inanimate nouns and their assigned grammatical gender weakens, and cross-lingual bias results from the Word Embedding Association Test (WEAT) become more congruent with country-level implicit bias measurements. The results further suggest that disentangling grammatical gender signals from word embeddings may lead to improvement in semantic machine learning tasks.
summary: Does the grammatical gender of a language interfere when measuring the semantic gender information captured by its word embeddings? A number of anomalous gender bias measurements in the embeddings of gendered languages suggest this possibility. We demonstrate that word embeddings learn the association between a noun and its grammatical gender in grammatically gendered languages, which can skew social gender bias measurements. Consequently, word embedding post-processing methods are introduced to quantify, disentangle, and evaluate grammatical gender signals. The evaluation is performed on five gendered languages from the Germanic, Romance, and Slavic branches of the Indo-European language family. Our method reduces the strength of grammatical gender signals, which is measured in terms of effect size (Cohen's d), by a significant average of d = 1.3 for French, German, and Italian, and d = 0.56 for Polish and Spanish. Once grammatical gender is disentangled, the association between over 90% of 10,000 inanimate nouns and their assigned grammatical gender weakens, and cross-lingual bias results from the Word Embedding Association Test (WEAT) become more congruent with country-level implicit bias measurements. The results further suggest that disentangling grammatical gender signals from word embeddings may lead to improvement in semantic machine learning tasks.
abstract_zh: 在测量其词嵌入捕获的语义性别信息时，语言的语法性别是否会产生干扰？性别语言嵌入中的许多异常性别偏见测量表明了这种可能性。我们证明，词嵌入可以学习语法性别语言中名词与其语法性别之间的关联，这可能会扭曲社会性别偏见测量。因此，引入词嵌入后处理方法来量化、解开和评估语法性别信号。该评估针对印欧语系日耳曼语系、罗曼语系和斯拉夫语支的五种性别语言进行。我们的方法降低了语法性别信号的强度，这是根据效应大小（Cohen's d）来衡量的，法语、德语和意大利语的显着平均值为 d = 1.3，波兰语和西班牙语的显着平均值为 d = 0.56。一旦语法性别被解开，10,000 个无生命名词中的 90% 以上与其指定的语法性别之间的关联就会减弱，词嵌入关联测试 (WEAT) 的跨语言偏差结果将变得与国家级隐性偏差测量更加一致。结果进一步表明，从词嵌入中分离出语法性别信号可能会导致语义机器学习任务的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何通过分离语法性别信号来更准确地测量性别化语言的词嵌入中的性别偏见。
AI.motivation: 语法性别可能干扰词嵌入中语义性别信息的测量，导致性别偏见评估出现异常结果。
AI.method: 提出词嵌入后处理方法，量化并分离语法性别信号，并在五种性别化语言上进行评估。
AI.result: 方法显著降低了法语、德语、意大利语的语法性别信号（d=1.3），波兰语和西班牙语（d=0.56），且90%以上无生命名词的性别关联减弱，跨语言偏见结果更符合国家层面的隐性偏见测量。
AI.conclusion: 分离语法性别信号可提升词嵌入的语义机器学习任务表现。

search_text: Measuring Gender Bias in Word Embeddings of Gendered Languages Requires Disentangling Grammatical Gender Signals 测量性别语言词嵌入中的性别偏见需要解开语法性别信号 Does the grammatical gender of a language interfere when measuring the semantic gender information captured by its word embeddings? A number of anomalous gender bias measurements in the embeddings of gendered languages suggest this possibility. We demonstrate that word embeddings learn the association between a noun and its grammatical gender in grammatically gendered languages, which can skew social gender bias measurements. Consequently, word embedding post-processing methods are introduced to quantify, disentangle, and evaluate grammatical gender signals. The evaluation is performed on five gendered languages from the Germanic, Romance, and Slavic branches of the Indo-European language family. Our method reduces the strength of grammatical gender signals, which is measured in terms of effect size (Cohen's d), by a significant average of d = 1.3 for French, German, and Italian, and d = 0.56 for Polish and Spanish. Once grammatical gender is disentangled, the association between over 90% of 10,000 inanimate nouns and their assigned grammatical gender weakens, and cross-lingual bias results from the Word Embedding Association Test (WEAT) become more congruent with country-level implicit bias measurements. The results further suggest that disentangling grammatical gender signals from word embeddings may lead to improvement in semantic machine learning tasks. 在测量其词嵌入捕获的语义性别信息时，语言的语法性别是否会产生干扰？性别语言嵌入中的许多异常性别偏见测量表明了这种可能性。我们证明，词嵌入可以学习语法性别语言中名词与其语法性别之间的关联，这可能会扭曲社会性别偏见测量。因此，引入词嵌入后处理方法来量化、解开和评估语法性别信号。该评估针对印欧语系日耳曼语系、罗曼语系和斯拉夫语支的五种性别语言进行。我们的方法降低了语法性别信号的强度，这是根据效应大小（Cohen's d）来衡量的，法语、德语和意大利语的显着平均值为 d = 1.3，波兰语和西班牙语的显着平均值为 d = 0.56。一旦语法性别被解开，10,000 个无生命名词中的 90% 以上与其指定的语法性别之间的关联就会减弱，词嵌入关联测试 (WEAT) 的跨语言偏差结果将变得与国家级隐性偏差测量更加一致。结果进一步表明，从词嵌入中分离出语法性别信号可能会导致语义机器学习任务的改进。 本文研究了如何通过分离语法性别信号来更准确地测量性别化语言的词嵌入中的性别偏见。 Shiva Omrani Sabbaghi,Aylin Caliskan cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Arnav Chavan,Rishabh Tiwari,Udbhav Bamba,Deepak K. Gupta
title: Dynamic Kernel Selection for Improved Generalization and Memory Efficiency in Meta-learning
title_zh: 动态内核选择可提高元学习中的泛化和内存效率
abstract: Gradient based meta-learning methods are prone to overfit on the meta-training set, and this behaviour is more prominent with large and complex networks. Moreover, large networks restrict the application of meta-learning models on low-power edge devices. While choosing smaller networks avoid these issues to a certain extent, it affects the overall generalization leading to reduced performance. Clearly, there is an approximately optimal choice of network architecture that is best suited for every meta-learning problem, however, identifying it beforehand is not straightforward. In this paper, we present MetaDOCK, a task-specific dynamic kernel selection strategy for designing compressed CNN models that generalize well on unseen tasks in meta-learning. Our method is based on the hypothesis that for a given set of similar tasks, not all kernels of the network are needed by each individual task. Rather, each task uses only a fraction of the kernels, and the selection of the kernels per task can be learnt dynamically as a part of the inner update steps. MetaDOCK compresses the meta-model as well as the task-specific inner models, thus providing significant reduction in model size for each task, and through constraining the number of active kernels for every task, it implicitly mitigates the issue of meta-overfitting. We show that for the same inference budget, pruned versions of large CNN models obtained using our approach consistently outperform the conventional choices of CNN models. MetaDOCK couples well with popular meta-learning approaches such as iMAML. The efficacy of our method is validated on CIFAR-fs and mini-ImageNet datasets, and we have observed that our approach can provide improvements in model accuracy of up to 2% on standard meta-learning benchmark, while reducing the model size by more than 75%.
summary: Gradient based meta-learning methods are prone to overfit on the meta-training set, and this behaviour is more prominent with large and complex networks. Moreover, large networks restrict the application of meta-learning models on low-power edge devices. While choosing smaller networks avoid these issues to a certain extent, it affects the overall generalization leading to reduced performance. Clearly, there is an approximately optimal choice of network architecture that is best suited for every meta-learning problem, however, identifying it beforehand is not straightforward. In this paper, we present MetaDOCK, a task-specific dynamic kernel selection strategy for designing compressed CNN models that generalize well on unseen tasks in meta-learning. Our method is based on the hypothesis that for a given set of similar tasks, not all kernels of the network are needed by each individual task. Rather, each task uses only a fraction of the kernels, and the selection of the kernels per task can be learnt dynamically as a part of the inner update steps. MetaDOCK compresses the meta-model as well as the task-specific inner models, thus providing significant reduction in model size for each task, and through constraining the number of active kernels for every task, it implicitly mitigates the issue of meta-overfitting. We show that for the same inference budget, pruned versions of large CNN models obtained using our approach consistently outperform the conventional choices of CNN models. MetaDOCK couples well with popular meta-learning approaches such as iMAML. The efficacy of our method is validated on CIFAR-fs and mini-ImageNet datasets, and we have observed that our approach can provide improvements in model accuracy of up to 2% on standard meta-learning benchmark, while reducing the model size by more than 75%.
abstract_zh: 基于梯度的元学习方法很容易在元训练集上出现过拟合，这种行为在大型复杂网络中更为突出。此外，大型网络限制了元学习模型在低功耗边缘设备上的应用。虽然选择较小的网络可以在一定程度上避免这些问题，但它会影响整体泛化，导致性能下降。显然，有一个最适合每个元学习问题的网络架构的近似最佳选择，但是，预先识别它并不简单。在本文中，我们提出了 MetaDOCK，这是一种特定于任务的动态内核选择策略，用于设计压缩 CNN 模型，该模型可以很好地泛化元学习中未见过的任务。我们的方法基于这样的假设：对于给定的一组相似任务，并非每个单独的任务都需要网络的所有内核。相反，每个任务仅使用一小部分内核，并且每个任务的内核选择可以作为内部更新步骤的一部分动态学习。 MetaDOCK 压缩元模型以及特定于任务的内部模型，从而显着减小每个任务的模型大小，并且通过限制每个任务的活动内核的数量，它隐式地缓解了元过拟合问题。我们表明，对于相同的推理预算，使用我们的方法获得的大型 CNN 模型的修剪版本始终优于 CNN 模型的传统选择。 MetaDOCK 与 iMAML 等流行的元学习方法完美结合。我们的方法的有效性在 CIFAR-fs 和 mini-ImageNet 数据集上得到了验证，我们观察到我们的方法可以在标准元学习基准上将模型精度提高高达 2%，同时将模型大小减少 75% 以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MetaDOCK方法，通过动态选择任务相关的卷积核来设计压缩CNN模型，以提升元学习的泛化能力和内存效率。
AI.motivation: 现有元学习方法在大网络上易过拟合且难以部署于边缘设备，而小网络泛化能力不足，需在模型复杂度与性能间寻找平衡。
AI.method: MetaDOCK在内部更新步骤中动态学习每个任务所需的卷积核，压缩元模型和任务模型，通过限制每任务激活核数量缓解过拟合。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-fs和mini-ImageNet数据集上，模型准确率提升最高达2%，模型大小缩减超75%，且兼容iMAML等主流元学习方法。
AI.conclusion: MetaDOCK通过动态卷积核选择有效提升了元学习的泛化能力与内存效率，为边缘设备应用提供了更优解决方案。

authors_text: Gonzalo Navarro,Cristian Urbina
title: L-systems for Measuring Repetitiveness*
title_zh: 用于测量重复性的 L 系统*
comment: Funded in part by Basal Funds FB0001, Fondecyt Grant 1-200038, and a Conicyt Doctoral Scholarship, ANID, Chile
comments: Funded in part by Basal Funds FB0001, Fondecyt Grant 1-200038, and a Conicyt Doctoral Scholarship, ANID, Chile
abstract: An L-system (for lossless compression) is a CPD0L-system extended with two parameters $d$ and $n$, which determines unambiguously a string $w = τ(\varphi^d(s))[1:n]$, where $\varphi$ is the morphism of the system, $s$ is its axiom, and $τ$ is its coding. The length of the shortest description of an L-system generating $w$ is known as $\ell$, and is arguably a relevant measure of repetitiveness that builds on the self-similarities that arise in the sequence. In this paper we deepen the study of the measure $\ell$ and its relation with $δ$, a better established lower bound that builds on substring complexity. Our results show that $\ell$ and $δ$ are largely orthogonal, in the sense that one can be much larger than the other depending on the case. This suggests that both sources of repetitiveness are mostly unrelated. We also show that the recently introduced NU-systems, which combine the capabilities of L-systems with bidirectional macro-schemes, can be asymptotically strictly smaller than both mechanisms, which makes the size $ν$ of the smallest NU-system the unique smallest reachable repetitiveness measure to date.
summary: An L-system (for lossless compression) is a CPD0L-system extended with two parameters $d$ and $n$, which determines unambiguously a string $w = τ(\varphi^d(s))[1:n]$, where $\varphi$ is the morphism of the system, $s$ is its axiom, and $τ$ is its coding. The length of the shortest description of an L-system generating $w$ is known as $\ell$, and is arguably a relevant measure of repetitiveness that builds on the self-similarities that arise in the sequence. In this paper we deepen the study of the measure $\ell$ and its relation with $δ$, a better established lower bound that builds on substring complexity. Our results show that $\ell$ and $δ$ are largely orthogonal, in the sense that one can be much larger than the other depending on the case. This suggests that both sources of repetitiveness are mostly unrelated. We also show that the recently introduced NU-systems, which combine the capabilities of L-systems with bidirectional macro-schemes, can be asymptotically strictly smaller than both mechanisms, which makes the size $ν$ of the smallest NU-system the unique smallest reachable repetitiveness measure to date.
abstract_zh: L-系统（用于无损压缩）是用两个参数 $d$ 和 $n$ 扩展的 CPD0L-系统，它明确地确定字符串 $w = τ(\varphi^d(s))[1:n]$，其中 $\varphi$ 是系统的态射，$s$ 是其公理，$τ$ 是其编码。生成 $w$ 的 L 系统的最短描述的长度被称为 $\ell$，并且可以说是建立在序列中出现的自相似性之上的重复性的相关度量。在本文中，我们深入研究了度量 $\ell$ 及其与 $δ$ 的关系，$δ$ 是一个建立在子串复杂性基础上的更好的下界。我们的结果表明 $\ell$ 和 $δ$ 在很大程度上是正交的，从某种意义上说，根据情况，一个可以比另一个大得多。这表明这两种重复性来源大多是不相关的。我们还表明，最近引入的 NU 系统将 L 系统的功能与双向宏观方案相结合，可以渐近地严格小于这两种机制，这使得最小 NU 系统的大小 $ν$ 成为迄今为止唯一的最小可达重复性度量。

AI.tldr: 本文研究L系统在衡量序列重复性中的应用，探讨其与现有重复性度量δ的关系，并引入NU系统以改进重复性测量。
AI.motivation: 现有重复性度量（如δ）基于子串复杂度，但可能无法全面反映序列的自相似性特征，需探索更有效的重复性测量方法。
AI.method: 通过扩展L系统参数d和n生成字符串，分析其最短描述长度ℓ与δ的关联；引入结合双向宏方案的NU系统进行对比实验。
AI.result: ℓ与δ在多数情况下相互独立，且NU系统的最小描述长度ν可严格优于L系统和δ，成为当前最优重复性度量。
AI.conclusion: NU系统通过融合L系统与双向宏方案，提供了更精确的重复性测量方法，表明传统度量存在局限性。

search_text: L-systems for Measuring Repetitiveness* 用于测量重复性的 L 系统* An L-system (for lossless compression) is a CPD0L-system extended with two parameters $d$ and $n$, which determines unambiguously a string $w = τ(\varphi^d(s))[1:n]$, where $\varphi$ is the morphism of the system, $s$ is its axiom, and $τ$ is its coding. The length of the shortest description of an L-system generating $w$ is known as $\ell$, and is arguably a relevant measure of repetitiveness that builds on the self-similarities that arise in the sequence. In this paper we deepen the study of the measure $\ell$ and its relation with $δ$, a better established lower bound that builds on substring complexity. Our results show that $\ell$ and $δ$ are largely orthogonal, in the sense that one can be much larger than the other depending on the case. This suggests that both sources of repetitiveness are mostly unrelated. We also show that the recently introduced NU-systems, which combine the capabilities of L-systems with bidirectional macro-schemes, can be asymptotically strictly smaller than both mechanisms, which makes the size $ν$ of the smallest NU-system the unique smallest reachable repetitiveness measure to date. L-系统（用于无损压缩）是用两个参数 $d$ 和 $n$ 扩展的 CPD0L-系统，它明确地确定字符串 $w = τ(\varphi^d(s))[1:n]$，其中 $\varphi$ 是系统的态射，$s$ 是其公理，$τ$ 是其编码。生成 $w$ 的 L 系统的最短描述的长度被称为 $\ell$，并且可以说是建立在序列中出现的自相似性之上的重复性的相关度量。在本文中，我们深入研究了度量 $\ell$ 及其与 $δ$ 的关系，$δ$ 是一个建立在子串复杂性基础上的更好的下界。我们的结果表明 $\ell$ 和 $δ$ 在很大程度上是正交的，从某种意义上说，根据情况，一个可以比另一个大得多。这表明这两种重复性来源大多是不相关的。我们还表明，最近引入的 NU 系统将 L 系统的功能与双向宏观方案相结合，可以渐近地严格小于这两种机制，这使得最小 NU 系统的大小 $ν$ 成为迄今为止唯一的最小可达重复性度量。 本文研究L系统在衡量序列重复性中的应用，探讨其与现有重复性度量δ的关系，并引入NU系统以改进重复性测量。 Gonzalo Navarro,Cristian Urbina cs.DS,cs.FL

authors_text: Juliette Millet,Charlotte Caucheteux,Pierre Orhan,Yves Boubenec,Alexandre Gramfort,Ewan Dunbar,Christophe Pallier,Jean-Remi King
title: Toward a realistic model of speech processing in the brain with self-supervised learning
title_zh: 通过自我监督学习建立大脑中语音处理的现实模型
abstract: Several deep neural networks have recently been shown to generate activations similar to those of the brain in response to the same input. These algorithms, however, remain largely implausible: they require (1) extraordinarily large amounts of data, (2) unobtainable supervised labels, (3) textual rather than raw sensory input, and / or (4) implausibly large memory (e.g. thousands of contextual words). These elements highlight the need to identify algorithms that, under these limitations, would suffice to account for both behavioral and brain responses. Focusing on the issue of speech processing, we here hypothesize that self-supervised algorithms trained on the raw waveform constitute a promising candidate. Specifically, we compare a recent self-supervised architecture, Wav2Vec 2.0, to the brain activity of 412 English, French, and Mandarin individuals recorded with functional Magnetic Resonance Imaging (fMRI), while they listened to ~1h of audio books. Our results are four-fold. First, we show that this algorithm learns brain-like representations with as little as 600 hours of unlabelled speech -- a quantity comparable to what infants can be exposed to during language acquisition. Second, its functional hierarchy aligns with the cortical hierarchy of speech processing. Third, different training regimes reveal a functional specialization akin to the cortex: Wav2Vec 2.0 learns sound-generic, speech-specific and language-specific representations similar to those of the prefrontal and temporal cortices. Fourth, we confirm the similarity of this specialization with the behavior of 386 additional participants. These elements, resulting from the largest neuroimaging benchmark to date, show how self-supervised learning can account for a rich organization of speech processing in the brain, and thus delineate a path to identify the laws of language acquisition which shape the human brain.

These algorithms, however, remain largely implausible: they require (1) extraordinarily large amounts of data, (2) unobtainable supervised labels, (3) textual rather than raw sensory input, and / or (4) implausibly large memory (e.g. thousands of contextual words). These elements highlight the need to identify algorithms that, under these limitations, would suffice to account for both behavioral and brain responses. Focusing on the issue of speech processing, we here hypothesize that self-supervised algorithms trained on the raw waveform constitute a promising candidate. Specifically, we compare a recent self-supervised architecture, Wav2Vec 2.0, to the brain activity of 412 English, French, and Mandarin individuals recorded with functional Magnetic Resonance Imaging (fMRI), while they listened to ~1h of audio books. Our results are four-fold. First, we show that this algorithm learns brain-like representations with as little as 600 hours of unlabelled speech -- a quantity comparable to what infants can be exposed to during language acquisition. Second, its functional hierarchy aligns with the cortical hierarchy of speech processing. Third, different training regimes reveal a functional specialization akin to the cortex: Wav2Vec 2.0 learns sound-generic, speech-specific and language-specific representations similar to those of the prefrontal and temporal cortices. Fourth, we confirm the similarity of this specialization with the behavior of 386 additional participants. These elements, resulting from the largest neuroimaging benchmark to date, show how self-supervised learning can account for a rich organization of speech processing in the brain, and thus delineate a path to identify the laws of language acquisition which shape the human brain.
abstract_zh: 最近，一些深度神经网络被证明可以产生与大脑相似的激活，以响应相同的输入。然而，这些算法在很大程度上仍然令人难以置信：它们需要（1）非常大量的数据，（2）无法获得的监督标签，（3）文本而不是原始感官输入，和/或（4）难以置信的大内存（例如数千个上下文单词）。这些要素强调需要确定在这些限制下足以解释行为和大脑反应的算法。着眼于语音处理问题，我们假设在原始波形上训练的自监督算法是一个有前途的候选算法。具体来说，我们将最近的自监督架构 Wav2Vec 2.0 与 412 名英语、法语和普通话个体在听约 1 小时有声读物时用功能性磁共振成像 (fMRI) 记录的大脑活动进行比较。我们的成果有四倍。首先，我们证明该算法只需 600 小时的未标记语音即可学习类似大脑的表征——这个数量与婴儿在语言习得过程中接触到的数量相当。其次，其功能层次结构与语音处理的皮质层次结构一致。第三，不同的训练方案揭示了类似于皮质的功能专业化：Wav2Vec 2.0 学习类似于前额叶和颞叶皮质的声音通用、语音特定和语言特定表示。第四，我们确认了该专业化与 386 名其他参与者的行为的相似性。这些元素源自迄今为止最大的神经影像基准，展示了自我监督学习如何解释大脑中丰富的语音处理组织，从而描绘出一条识别塑造人类大脑的语言习得规律的路径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督学习的语音处理脑模型，通过比较Wav2Vec 2.0算法与人类大脑fMRI数据，验证其在少量未标注语音数据下模拟大脑语音处理机制的可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度神经网络模型在语音处理中存在数据需求大、依赖监督标签、依赖文本输入等生物合理性不足的问题，需探索更符合大脑处理机制的算法。
AI.method: 使用Wav2Vec 2.0自监督模型处理原始语音波形，与412名英语、法语、汉语受试者在听有声书时的fMRI数据进行对比分析，并验证不同训练模式下的功能特化。
AI.result: 模型仅需600小时未标注语音即可学习脑样表征，其功能层级与语音皮层层级一致，且呈现与前额叶和颞叶皮层相似的声学通用性、语音特异性及语言特异性表征，结果在386名额外受试者中得到验证。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习为解释大脑语音处理的组织结构提供了新路径，揭示了语言习得规律对人类大脑塑造的潜在机制。

authors_text: Wenji Liu,Kai Bai,Xuming He,Shuran Song,Changxi Zheng,Xiaopei Liu
title: FishGym: A High-Performance Physics-based Simulation Framework for Underwater Robot Learning
title_zh: FishGym：用于水下机器人学习的高性能基于物理的仿真框架
abstract: Bionic underwater robots have demonstrated their superiority in many applications. Yet, training their intelligence for a variety of tasks that mimic the behavior of underwater creatures poses a number of challenges in practice, mainly due to lack of a large amount of available training data as well as the high cost in real physical environment. Alternatively, simulation has been considered as a viable and important tool for acquiring datasets in different environments, but it mostly targeted rigid and soft body systems. There is currently dearth of work for more complex fluid systems interacting with immersed solids that can be efficiently and accurately simulated for robot training purposes. In this paper, we propose a new platform called "FishGym", which can be used to train fish-like underwater robots. The framework consists of a robotic fish modeling module using articulated body with skinning, a GPU-based high-performance localized two-way coupled fluid-structure interaction simulation module that handles both finite and infinitely large domains, as well as a reinforcement learning module. We leveraged existing training methods with adaptations to underwater fish-like robots and obtained learned control policies for multiple benchmark tasks. The training results are demonstrated with reasonable motion trajectories, with comparisons and analyses to empirical models as well as known real fish swimming behaviors to highlight the advantages of the proposed platform.
summary: Bionic underwater robots have demonstrated their superiority in many applications. Yet, training their intelligence for a variety of tasks that mimic the behavior of underwater creatures poses a number of challenges in practice, mainly due to lack of a large amount of available training data as well as the high cost in real physical environment. Alternatively, simulation has been considered as a viable and important tool for acquiring datasets in different environments, but it mostly targeted rigid and soft body systems. There is currently dearth of work for more complex fluid systems interacting with immersed solids that can be efficiently and accurately simulated for robot training purposes. In this paper, we propose a new platform called "FishGym", which can be used to train fish-like underwater robots. The framework consists of a robotic fish modeling module using articulated body with skinning, a GPU-based high-performance localized two-way coupled fluid-structure interaction simulation module that handles both finite and infinitely large domains, as well as a reinforcement learning module. We leveraged existing training methods with adaptations to underwater fish-like robots and obtained learned control policies for multiple benchmark tasks. The training results are demonstrated with reasonable motion trajectories, with comparisons and analyses to empirical models as well as known real fish swimming behaviors to highlight the advantages of the proposed platform.
abstract_zh: 仿生水下机器人在许多应用中展现了其优越性。然而，训练它们的智力以完成模仿水下生物行为的各种任务在实践中提出了许多挑战，主要是由于缺乏大量可用的训练数据以及真实物理环境中的高昂成本。另外，仿真被认为是在不同环境中获取数据集的可行且重要的工具，但它主要针对刚体和软体系统。目前还缺乏与浸入固体相互作用的更复杂的流体系统的工作，这些系统可以有效、准确地模拟以用于机器人训练目的。在本文中，我们提出了一个名为“FishGym”的新平台，可用于训练类鱼水下机器人。该框架由使用带有蒙皮的关节体的机器鱼建模模块、基于 GPU 的高性能局部双向耦合流固耦合仿真模块（可处理有限域和无限大域）以及强化学习模块组成。我们利用现有的训练方法来适应水下类鱼机器人，并获得了多个基准任务的学习控制策略。训练结果以合理的运动轨迹进行展示，并与经验模型以及已知的真实鱼类游泳行为进行比较和分析，以凸显该平台的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FishGym平台，用于训练仿生水下机器人的智能控制策略，解决实际训练中数据不足和成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有仿真工具难以高效模拟复杂流体与浸入固体的相互作用，而水下机器人训练缺乏大规模数据和低成本环境。
AI.method: 构建包含骨骼皮肤化机械鱼模型、GPU加速双向流固耦合仿真模块（支持有限/无限域）及强化学习模块的框架，并适配水下任务训练方法。
AI.result: 成功获得多类基准任务的控制策略，生成运动轨迹与真实鱼类行为及经验模型对比验证了平台有效性。
AI.conclusion: FishGym为水下机器人学习提供了高效精准的仿真解决方案，推动了仿生水下智能体的研究进展。

search_text: FishGym: A High-Performance Physics-based Simulation Framework for Underwater Robot Learning FishGym：用于水下机器人学习的高性能基于物理的仿真框架 Bionic underwater robots have demonstrated their superiority in many applications. Yet, training their intelligence for a variety of tasks that mimic the behavior of underwater creatures poses a number of challenges in practice, mainly due to lack of a large amount of available training data as well as the high cost in real physical environment. Alternatively, simulation has been considered as a viable and important tool for acquiring datasets in different environments, but it mostly targeted rigid and soft body systems. There is currently dearth of work for more complex fluid systems interacting with immersed solids that can be efficiently and accurately simulated for robot training purposes. In this paper, we propose a new platform called "FishGym", which can be used to train fish-like underwater robots. The framework consists of a robotic fish modeling module using articulated body with skinning, a GPU-based high-performance localized two-way coupled fluid-structure interaction simulation module that handles both finite and infinitely large domains, as well as a reinforcement learning module. We leveraged existing training methods with adaptations to underwater fish-like robots and obtained learned control policies for multiple benchmark tasks. The training results are demonstrated with reasonable motion trajectories, with comparisons and analyses to empirical models as well as known real fish swimming behaviors to highlight the advantages of the proposed platform. 仿生水下机器人在许多应用中展现了其优越性。然而，训练它们的智力以完成模仿水下生物行为的各种任务在实践中提出了许多挑战，主要是由于缺乏大量可用的训练数据以及真实物理环境中的高昂成本。另外，仿真被认为是在不同环境中获取数据集的可行且重要的工具，但它主要针对刚体和软体系统。目前还缺乏与浸入固体相互作用的更复杂的流体系统的工作，这些系统可以有效、准确地模拟以用于机器人训练目的。在本文中，我们提出了一个名为“FishGym”的新平台，可用于训练类鱼水下机器人。该框架由使用带有蒙皮的关节体的机器鱼建模模块、基于 GPU 的高性能局部双向耦合流固耦合仿真模块（可处理有限域和无限大域）以及强化学习模块组成。我们利用现有的训练方法来适应水下类鱼机器人，并获得了多个基准任务的学习控制策略。训练结果以合理的运动轨迹进行展示，并与经验模型以及已知的真实鱼类游泳行为进行比较和分析，以凸显该平台的优势。 本文提出FishGym平台，用于训练仿生水下机器人的智能控制策略，解决实际训练中数据不足和成本高的问题。 Wenji Liu,Kai Bai,Xuming He,Shuran Song,Changxi Zheng,Xiaopei Liu cs.RO

authors_text: Shiva Rezvan,John A. Bargh
title: Toward a Sensitivity-based Implicit Measure of Patients' Important Goal Pursuits
title_zh: 对患者重要目标追求进行基于敏感性的内隐测量
comment: 35 pages, 1 figure, was accepted for presentation at the Connecticut Psychological Association convention, November 2022. No acknowledgement has been added yet
comments: 35 pages, 1 figure, was accepted for presentation at the Connecticut Psychological Association convention, November 2022. No acknowledgement has been added yet
abstract: When individuals arrive to receive help from mental health providers, they do not always have well specified and well established goals. It is the mental health providers responsibility to work collaboratively with patients to clarify their goals in the therapy sessions as well as life in general through clinical interviews, diagnostic assessments, and thorough observations. However, recognizing individuals important life goals is not always straightforward. Here we introduce a novel method that gauges a patient important goal pursuits from their relative sensitivity to goal related words. Past research has shown that a person active goal pursuits cause them to be more sensitive to the presence of goal related stimuli in the environment being able to consciously report those stimuli when others cannot see them. By presenting words related to a variety of different life goal pursuits very quickly for 50 msec or less, the patient would be expected to notice and be aware of words related to their strongest motivations but not the other goal related words. These may or may not be among the goals they have identified in therapy sessions, and the ones not previously identified can be fertile grounds for further discussion and exploration in subsequent therapy sessions. Results from eight patient volunteers are described and discussed in terms of the potential utility of this supplemental personal therapy aid.
summary: When individuals arrive to receive help from mental health providers, they do not always have well specified and well established goals. It is the mental health providers responsibility to work collaboratively with patients to clarify their goals in the therapy sessions as well as life in general through clinical interviews, diagnostic assessments, and thorough observations. However, recognizing individuals important life goals is not always straightforward. Here we introduce a novel method that gauges a patient important goal pursuits from their relative sensitivity to goal related words. Past research has shown that a person active goal pursuits cause them to be more sensitive to the presence of goal related stimuli in the environment being able to consciously report those stimuli when others cannot see them. By presenting words related to a variety of different life goal pursuits very quickly for 50 msec or less, the patient would be expected to notice and be aware of words related to their strongest motivations but not the other goal related words. These may or may not be among the goals they have identified in therapy sessions, and the ones not previously identified can be fertile grounds for further discussion and exploration in subsequent therapy sessions. Results from eight patient volunteers are described and discussed in terms of the potential utility of this supplemental personal therapy aid.
abstract_zh: 当人们前来接受心理健康服务提供者的帮助时，他们并不总是有明确且明确的目标。心理健康服务提供者有责任与患者合作，通过临床访谈、诊断评估和彻底观察来明确他们在治疗过程中以及一般生活中的目标。然而，认识到个人重要的人生目标并不总是那么简单。在这里，我们介绍一种新颖的方法，可以根据患者对目标相关词语的相对敏感性来衡量患者的重要目标追求。过去的研究表明，一个人积极的目标追求使他们对环境中存在的与目标相关的刺激更加敏感，能够在其他人看不到这些刺激时有意识地报告这些刺激。通过在 50 毫秒或更短的时间内非常快速地呈现与各种不同的生活目标追求相关的单词，患者将被期望注意到并意识到与他们最强烈的动机相关的单词，而不是其他与目标相关的单词。这些可能是也可能不是他们在治疗过程中确定的目标，而之前未确定的目标可以成为后续治疗过程中进一步讨论和探索的沃土。描述和讨论了八名患者志愿者的结果，并讨论了这种补充个人治疗辅助工具的潜在效用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于敏感度的隐性测量方法，通过患者对目标相关词汇的反应，辅助识别其重要的生活目标追求。
AI.motivation: 患者在接受心理治疗时往往缺乏明确的生活目标，治疗师需通过访谈等方式帮助其澄清目标，但现有方法难以有效识别隐性目标。
AI.method: 快速闪现（50毫秒以内）与不同生活目标相关的词汇，通过患者是否能察觉目标相关词汇的敏感度，评估其潜在的重要目标。
AI.result: 对8名患者志愿者的测试结果表明，该方法能识别出患者未明确表达的目标，为后续治疗提供讨论方向。
AI.conclusion: 该隐性测量方法可作为治疗辅助工具，帮助治疗师发现患者未被识别的重要目标，促进个性化治疗方案的制定。

Bargh cs.HC

authors_text: Omid Kashefi,Tazin Afrin,Meghan Dale,Christopher Olshefski,Amanda Godley,Diane Litman,Rebecca Hwa
title: ArgRewrite V.2: an Annotated Argumentative Revisions Corpus
title_zh: ArgRewrite V.2：带注释的论证修订语料库
abstract: Analyzing how humans revise their writings is an interesting research question, not only from an educational perspective but also in terms of artificial intelligence. Better understanding of this process could facilitate many NLP applications, from intelligent tutoring systems to supportive and collaborative writing environments. Developing these applications, however, requires revision corpora, which are not widely available. In this work, we present ArgRewrite V.2, a corpus of annotated argumentative revisions, collected from two cycles of revisions to argumentative essays about self-driving cars. Annotations are provided at different levels of purpose granularity (coarse and fine) and scope (sentential and subsentential). In addition, the corpus includes the revision goal given to each writer, essay scores, annotation verification, pre- and post-study surveys collected from participants as meta-data. The variety of revision unit scope and purpose granularity levels in ArgRewrite, along with the inclusion of new types of meta-data, can make it a useful resource for research and applications that involve revision analysis. We demonstrate some potential applications of ArgRewrite V.2 in the development of automatic revision purpose predictors, as a training source and benchmark.
summary: Analyzing how humans revise their writings is an interesting research question, not only from an educational perspective but also in terms of artificial intelligence. Better understanding of this process could facilitate many NLP applications, from intelligent tutoring systems to supportive and collaborative writing environments. Developing these applications, however, requires revision corpora, which are not widely available. In this work, we present ArgRewrite V.2, a corpus of annotated argumentative revisions, collected from two cycles of revisions to argumentative essays about self-driving cars. Annotations are provided at different levels of purpose granularity (coarse and fine) and scope (sentential and subsentential). In addition, the corpus includes the revision goal given to each writer, essay scores, annotation verification, pre- and post-study surveys collected from participants as meta-data. The variety of revision unit scope and purpose granularity levels in ArgRewrite, along with the inclusion of new types of meta-data, can make it a useful resource for research and applications that involve revision analysis. We demonstrate some potential applications of ArgRewrite V.2 in the development of automatic revision purpose predictors, as a training source and benchmark.
abstract_zh: 分析人类如何修改自己的著作是一个有趣的研究问题，不仅从教育角度来看，而且从人工智能角度来看也是如此。更好地理解这一过程可以促进许多 NLP 应用，从智能辅导系统到支持性和协作性写作环境。然而，开发这些应用程序需要修订语料库，而这些语料库并未广泛使用。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ArgRewrite V.2，这是一个带注释的论证性修订的语料库，收集自有关自动驾驶汽车的论证性文章的两个修订周期。注释以不同级别的目的粒度（粗略和精细）和范围（句子和次句子）提供。此外，语料库还包括每个作者的复习目标、论文分数、注释验证、从参与者收集的作为元数据的学习前和学习后调查。 ArgRewrite 中的各种修订单元范围和目的粒度级别，以及新类型的元数据的包含，可以使其成为涉及修订分析的研究和应用程序的有用资源。我们展示了 ArgRewrite V.2 在自动修订目的预测器开发中的一些潜在应用，作为训练源和基准。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了ArgRewrite V.2，一个包含论证性文章修订标注的语料库，用于支持自然语言处理和教育领域的研究。
AI.motivation: 分析人类写作修订过程对教育和人工智能应用具有重要意义，但现有修订语料库资源匮乏，亟需高质量数据支持相关研究。
AI.method: 通过收集两轮关于自动驾驶汽车的论证性作文修订数据，按修订目的粒度（粗粒度/细粒度）和范围（句级/子句级）进行标注，并补充修订目标、作文评分、验证信息及元数据等信息。
AI.result: 构建了包含多粒度标注和元数据的修订语料库，并展示了其在自动修订目的预测模型开发中的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: ArgRewrite V.2通过多维度标注和丰富元数据，为修订分析研究提供了有价值的资源，可支持智能写作辅助系统等应用开发。
