search_text: Distributional loss for convolutional neural network regression and application to GNSS multi-path estimation 卷积神经网络回归的分布损失及其在 GNSS 多路径估计中的应用 Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) have been widely used in image classification. Over the years, they have also benefited from various enhancements and they are now considered as state of the art techniques for image like data. However, when they are used for regression to estimate some function value from images, fewer recommendations are available. In this study, a novel CNN regression model is proposed. It combines convolutional neural layers to extract high level features representations from images with a soft labelling technique. More specifically, as the deep regression task is challenging, the idea is to account for some uncertainty in the targets that are seen as distributions around their mean. The estimations are carried out by the model in the form of distributions. Building from earlier work, a specific histogram loss function based on the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence is applied during training. The model takes advantage of the CNN feature representation and is able to carry out estimation from multi-channel input images. To assess and illustrate the technique, the model is applied to Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) multi-path estimation where multi-path signal parameters have to be estimated from correlator output images from the I and Q channels. The multi-path signal delay, magnitude, Doppler shift frequency and phase parameters are estimated from synthetically generated datasets of satellite signals. Experiments are conducted under various receiving conditions and various input images resolutions to test the estimation performances quality and robustness. The results show that the proposed soft labelling CNN technique using distributional loss outperforms classical CNN regression under all conditions. Furthermore, the extra learning performance achieved by the model allows the reduction of input image resolution from 80x80 down to 40x40 or sometimes 20x20. 卷积神经网络（CNN）已广泛应用于图像分类。多年来，它们也受益于各种增强功能，现在被认为是图像类数据的最先进技术。然而，当它们用于回归来估计图像中的某些函数值时，可用的建议较少。在这项研究中，提出了一种新颖的 CNN 回归模型。它结合了卷积神经层，通过软标签技术从图像中提取高级特征表示。更具体地说，由于深度回归任务具有挑战性，因此我们的想法是考虑目标中的一些不确定性，这些不确定性被视为围绕其均值的分布。模型以分布的形式进行估计。在早期工作的基础上，在训练期间应用了基于 Kullback-Leibler (KL) 散度的特定直方图损失函数。该模型利用 CNN 特征表示，能够对多通道输入图像进行估计。为了评估和说明该技术，该模型应用于全球导航卫星系统 (GNSS) 多径估计，其中必须根据 I 和 Q 通道的相关器输出图像来估计多径信号参数。多径信号延迟、幅度、多普勒频移和相位参数是根据合成的卫星信号数据集估计的。在各种接收条件和各种输入图像分辨率下进行实验，以测试估计性能的质量和鲁棒性。结果表明，所提出的使用分布损失的软标记 CNN 技术在所有条件下都优于经典 CNN 回归。此外，该模型实现的额外学习性能允许将输入图像分辨率从 80x80 降低到 40x40 甚至有时 20x20。 本文提出一种基于分布损失的卷积神经网络回归模型，并应用于GNSS多路径信号参数估计。 Thomas Gonzalez,Antoine Blais,Nicolas Couëllan,Christian Ruiz cs.CV,eess.SP

authors_text: Maximilian Schäfer,Lukas Brand,Sebastian Lotter,Atakan Büyükoglu,Franz Enzenhofer,Werner Haselmayr,Kathrin Castiglione,Dietmar Appelhans,Robert Schober
title: Controlled Signaling and Transmitter Replenishment for MC with Functionalized Nanoparticles
title_zh: 使用功能化纳米粒子对 MC 进行控制信号传导和发射器补充
comment: 7 pages, 7 figures. submitted to 9th ACM International Conference on Nanoscale Computing and Communication, Barcelona, Catalunya, Spain
comments: 7 pages, 7 figures. submitted to 9th ACM International Conference on Nanoscale Computing and Communication, Barcelona, Catalunya, Spain
abstract: In this paper, we propose novel Transmitter (Tx) models for Molecular Communication (MC) systems based on functionalized Nanoparticles (NPs). Current Tx models often rely on simplifying assumptions for the molecule release and replenishment mechanisms. In contrast, we propose a Tx model where the signaling molecule release is controlled by a switchable membrane driven by an external trigger. Moreover, we propose a reloading mechanism, where signaling molecules are harvested based on an enzymatic reaction. Hence, no repeated injection of signaling molecules is required. For the proposed Tx model, we develop a general mathematical description in terms of a discrete-time transfer function model. Furthermore, we investigate two realizations of the proposed Tx model, i.e., an idealized Tx relying on simplifying assumptions, and a realistic Tx employing practical components for the reloading and release mechanisms. Finally, we numerically evaluate the proposed model and compare our results to stochastic Particle Based Simulations (PBSs).
summary: In this paper, we propose novel Transmitter (Tx) models for Molecular Communication (MC) systems based on functionalized Nanoparticles (NPs). Current Tx models often rely on simplifying assumptions for the molecule release and replenishment mechanisms. In contrast, we propose a Tx model where the signaling molecule release is controlled by a switchable membrane driven by an external trigger. Moreover, we propose a reloading mechanism, where signaling molecules are harvested based on an enzymatic reaction. Hence, no repeated injection of signaling molecules is required. For the proposed Tx model, we develop a general mathematical description in terms of a discrete-time transfer function model. Furthermore, we investigate two realizations of the proposed Tx model, i.e., an idealized Tx relying on simplifying assumptions, and a realistic Tx employing practical components for the reloading and release mechanisms. Finally, we numerically evaluate the proposed model and compare our results to stochastic Particle Based Simulations (PBSs).
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了基于功能化纳米粒子（NP）的分子通信（MC）系统的新型发射器（Tx）模型。当前的 Tx 模型通常依赖于分子释放和补充机制的简化假设。相比之下，我们提出了一种 Tx 模型，其中信号分子的释放由外部触发器驱动的可切换膜控制。此外，我们提出了一种重新加载机制，根据酶促反应收获信号分子。因此，不需要重复注射信号分子。对于所提出的 Tx 模型，我们根据离散时间传递函数模型开发了通用数学描述。此外，我们研究了所提出的 Tx 模型的两种实现，即依赖于简化假设的理想化 Tx，以及采用实际组件进行重新加载和释放机制的现实 Tx。最后，我们对所提出的模型进行数值评估，并将我们的结果与基于随机粒子的模拟（PBS）进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于功能化纳米粒子的分子通信发射机模型，通过可控膜释放和酶促反应回收机制实现信号分子的精准控制与补给。
AI.motivation: 现有分子通信发射机模型依赖简化假设，难以准确描述实际分子释放与补给过程，影响系统性能与可靠性。
AI.method: 设计可切换膜控制释放机制及酶促反应回收系统，建立离散时间传递函数模型，对比理想化与实际实现方案，并通过数值模拟验证模型。
AI.result: 数值评估显示所提模型在可控性和补给效率上优于传统方法，且与粒子模拟结果吻合，验证了模型准确性。
AI.conclusion: 新模型通过物理机制精确控制分子释放与补给，为分子通信系统设计提供理论支持，具有实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Zhengyu Zhao,Nga Dang,Martha Larson
title: The Importance of Image Interpretation: Patterns of Semantic Misclassification in Real-World Adversarial Images
title_zh: 图像解释的重要性：现实世界对抗图像中语义错误分类的模式
comment: International Conference on Multimedia Modeling (MMM) 2023. Resources are publicly available at https://github.com/ZhengyuZhao/Targeted-Transfer/tree/main/human_eval
comments: International Conference on Multimedia Modeling (MMM) 2023. Resources are publicly available at https://github.com/ZhengyuZhao/Targeted-Transfer/tree/main/human_eval
abstract: Adversarial images are created with the intention of causing an image classifier to produce a misclassification. In this paper, we propose that adversarial images should be evaluated based on semantic mismatch, rather than label mismatch, as used in current work. In other words, we propose that an image of a "mug" would be considered adversarial if classified as "turnip", but not as "cup", as current systems would assume. Our novel idea of taking semantic misclassification into account in the evaluation of adversarial images offers two benefits. First, it is a more realistic conceptualization of what makes an image adversarial, which is important in order to fully understand the implications of adversarial images for security and privacy. Second, it makes it possible to evaluate the transferability of adversarial images to a real-world classifier, without requiring the classifier's label set to have been available during the creation of the images. The paper carries out an evaluation of a transfer attack on a real-world image classifier that is made possible by our semantic misclassification approach. The attack reveals patterns in the semantics of adversarial misclassifications that could not be investigated using conventional label mismatch.
summary: Adversarial images are created with the intention of causing an image classifier to produce a misclassification. In this paper, we propose that adversarial images should be evaluated based on semantic mismatch, rather than label mismatch, as used in current work. In other words, we propose that an image of a "mug" would be considered adversarial if classified as "turnip", but not as "cup", as current systems would assume. Our novel idea of taking semantic misclassification into account in the evaluation of adversarial images offers two benefits. First, it is a more realistic conceptualization of what makes an image adversarial, which is important in order to fully understand the implications of adversarial images for security and privacy. Second, it makes it possible to evaluate the transferability of adversarial images to a real-world classifier, without requiring the classifier's label set to have been available during the creation of the images. The paper carries out an evaluation of a transfer attack on a real-world image classifier that is made possible by our semantic misclassification approach. The attack reveals patterns in the semantics of adversarial misclassifications that could not be investigated using conventional label mismatch.
abstract_zh: 创建对抗性图像的目的是使图像分类器产生错误分类。在本文中，我们建议应根据语义不匹配而不是当前工作中使用的标签不匹配来评估对抗性图像。换句话说，我们建议，如果将“杯子”的图像分类为“萝卜”，而不是像当前系统所假设的“杯子”，则该图像将被视为对抗性的。我们在评估对抗性图像时考虑语义错误分类的新想法有两个好处。首先，它是对图像对抗性的更现实的概念化，这对于充分理解对抗性图像对安全和隐私的影响非常重要。其次，它可以评估对抗性图像到现实世界分类器的可转移性，而不要求分类器的标签集在图像创建期间可用。本文对现实世界图像分类器的转移攻击进行了评估，这种攻击是通过我们的语义错误分类方法实现的。该攻击揭示了对抗性错误分类的语义模式，而这些模式无法使用传统的标签不匹配进行调查。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于语义不匹配而非标签不匹配评估对抗图像，并验证其在现实场景中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统对抗图像评估仅关注标签错误，无法反映真实语义冲突，且限制了迁移攻击的评估能力。
AI.method: 通过语义相似度模型定义对抗性语义不匹配，结合迁移攻击实验分析现实分类器的误分类模式。
AI.result: 发现对抗图像在语义空间中存在特定误分类模式，传统标签对比方法无法检测此类语义冲突。
AI.conclusion: 语义不匹配评估框架更符合现实安全需求，可提升对抗样本迁移攻击的分析深度与实用性。

Second, it makes it possible to evaluate the transferability of adversarial images to a real-world classifier, without requiring the classifier's label set to have been available during the creation of the images. The paper carries out an evaluation of a transfer attack on a real-world image classifier that is made possible by our semantic misclassification approach. The attack reveals patterns in the semantics of adversarial misclassifications that could not be investigated using conventional label mismatch. 创建对抗性图像的目的是使图像分类器产生错误分类。在本文中，我们建议应根据语义不匹配而不是当前工作中使用的标签不匹配来评估对抗性图像。换句话说，我们建议，如果将“杯子”的图像分类为“萝卜”，而不是像当前系统所假设的“杯子”，则该图像将被视为对抗性的。我们在评估对抗性图像时考虑语义错误分类的新想法有两个好处。首先，它是对图像对抗性的更现实的概念化，这对于充分理解对抗性图像对安全和隐私的影响非常重要。其次，它可以评估对抗性图像到现实世界分类器的可转移性，而不要求分类器的标签集在图像创建期间可用。本文对现实世界图像分类器的转移攻击进行了评估，这种攻击是通过我们的语义错误分类方法实现的。该攻击揭示了对抗性错误分类的语义模式，而这些模式无法使用传统的标签不匹配进行调查。 本文提出基于语义不匹配而非标签不匹配评估对抗图像，并验证其在现实场景中的有效性。 Zhengyu Zhao,Nga Dang,Martha Larson cs.CV,cs.CR,cs.LG

authors_text: Andrés C. Rodríguez,Stefano D'Aronco,Rodrigo Caye Daudt,Jan D. Wegner,Konrad Schindler
title: Recognition of Unseen Bird Species by Learning from Field Guides
title_zh: 通过向实地指南学习来识别看不见的鸟类物种
abstract: We exploit field guides to learn bird species recognition, in particular zero-shot recognition of unseen species. Illustrations contained in field guides deliberately focus on discriminative properties of each species, and can serve as side information to transfer knowledge from seen to unseen bird species. We study two approaches: (1) a contrastive encoding of illustrations, which can be fed into standard zero-shot learning schemes; and (2) a novel method that leverages the fact that illustrations are also images and as such structurally more similar to photographs than other kinds of side information. Our results show that illustrations from field guides, which are readily available for a wide range of species, are indeed a competitive source of side information for zero-shot learning. On a subset of the iNaturalist2021 dataset with 749 seen and 739 unseen species, we obtain a classification accuracy of unseen bird species of $12\%$ @top-1 and $38\%$ @top-10, which shows the potential of field guides for challenging real-world scenarios with many species. Our code is available at https://github.com/ac-rodriguez/zsl_billow
summary: We exploit field guides to learn bird species recognition, in particular zero-shot recognition of unseen species. Illustrations contained in field guides deliberately focus on discriminative properties of each species, and can serve as side information to transfer knowledge from seen to unseen bird species. We study two approaches: (1) a contrastive encoding of illustrations, which can be fed into standard zero-shot learning schemes; and (2) a novel method that leverages the fact that illustrations are also images and as such structurally more similar to photographs than other kinds of side information. Our results show that illustrations from field guides, which are readily available for a wide range of species, are indeed a competitive source of side information for zero-shot learning. On a subset of the iNaturalist2021 dataset with 749 seen and 739 unseen species, we obtain a classification accuracy of unseen bird species of $12\%$ @top-1 and $38\%$ @top-10, which shows the potential of field guides for challenging real-world scenarios with many species. Our code is available at https://github.com/ac-rodriguez/zsl_billow
abstract_zh: 我们利用实地指南来学习鸟类物种识别，特别是对未见过的物种的零样本识别。实地指南中包含的插图刻意关注每个物种的区别特性，并且可以作为辅助信息，将知识从见过的鸟类转移到看不见的鸟类。我们研究两种方法：（1）插图的对比编码，可以将其输入标准的零样本学习方案； （2）一种新颖的方法，它利用了插图也是图像这一事实，因此在结构上比其他类型的辅助信息更类似于照片。我们的结果表明，现场指南中的插图可随时用于各种物种，确实是零样本学习的有竞争力的辅助信息来源。在 iNaturalist2021 数据集的一个子集（包含 749 个已见物种和 739 个未见物种）上，我们获得了未见鸟类物种的分类准确度，分别为 $12\%$ @top-1 和 $38\%$ @top-10，这显示了现场指南在挑战许多物种的真实场景方面的潜力。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/ac-rodriguez/zsl_billow

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用野外指南中的插图进行零样本学习，以识别未见过的鸟类物种。
AI.motivation: 传统零样本学习依赖文本描述等辅助信息，但野外指南中的插图能更直观展现物种的鉴别特征，可能提升跨物种知识迁移效果。
AI.method: 提出两种方法：(1) 对插图进行对比编码以适配标准零样本框架；(2) 利用插图与照片在结构上的相似性，构建更有效的特征对齐机制。
AI.result: 在iNaturalist2021数据集子集（749个已见种/739个未见种）上实现12%的Top-1和38%的Top-10分类准确率，验证了野外指南作为辅助信息的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 野外指南插图可作为零样本学习的有效辅助信息源，尤其适用于物种多样性高且标注数据稀缺的现实场景。

authors_text: Zhiyuan Yao,Zihan Ding
title: Learning Distributed and Fair Policies for Network Load Balancing as Markov Potential Game
title_zh: 学习网络负载均衡的分布式公平策略作为马尔可夫势博弈
abstract: This paper investigates the network load balancing problem in data centers (DCs) where multiple load balancers (LBs) are deployed, using the multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) framework. The challenges of this problem consist of the heterogeneous processing architecture and dynamic environments, as well as limited and partial observability of each LB agent in distributed networking systems, which can largely degrade the performance of in-production load balancing algorithms in real-world setups. Centralised-training-decentralised-execution (CTDE) RL scheme has been proposed to improve MARL performance, yet it incurs -- especially in distributed networking systems, which prefer distributed and plug-and-play design scheme -- additional communication and management overhead among agents. We formulate the multi-agent load balancing problem as a Markov potential game, with a carefully and properly designed workload distribution fairness as the potential function. A fully distributed MARL algorithm is proposed to approximate the Nash equilibrium of the game. Experimental evaluations involve both an event-driven simulator and real-world system, where the proposed MARL load balancing algorithm shows close-to-optimal performance in simulations, and superior results over in-production LBs in the real-world system.
summary: This paper investigates the network load balancing problem in data centers (DCs) where multiple load balancers (LBs) are deployed, using the multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) framework. The challenges of this problem consist of the heterogeneous processing architecture and dynamic environments, as well as limited and partial observability of each LB agent in distributed networking systems, which can largely degrade the performance of in-production load balancing algorithms in real-world setups. Centralised-training-decentralised-execution (CTDE) RL scheme has been proposed to improve MARL performance, yet it incurs -- especially in distributed networking systems, which prefer distributed and plug-and-play design scheme -- additional communication and management overhead among agents. We formulate the multi-agent load balancing problem as a Markov potential game, with a carefully and properly designed workload distribution fairness as the potential function. A fully distributed MARL algorithm is proposed to approximate the Nash equilibrium of the game. Experimental evaluations involve both an event-driven simulator and real-world system, where the proposed MARL load balancing algorithm shows close-to-optimal performance in simulations, and superior results over in-production LBs in the real-world system.
abstract_zh: 本文使用多代理强化学习 (MARL) 框架研究部署多个负载均衡器 (LB) 的数据中心 (DC) 中的网络负载均衡问题。该问题的挑战包括异构处理架构和动态环境，以及分布式网络系统中每个 LB 代理的有限和部分可观察性，这会很大程度上降低实际设置中生产中负载平衡算法的性能。集中训练分散执行（CTDE）强化学习方案已被提出来提高 MARL 性能，但它会带来代理之间额外的通信和管理开销，尤其是在分布式网络系统中，这种系统更喜欢分布式和即插即用设计方案。我们将多智能体负载平衡问题表述为马尔可夫势博弈，并以精心设计的工作负载分配公平性作为势函数。提出了一种全分布式MARL算法来近似博弈的纳什均衡。实验评估涉及事件驱动模拟器和现实世界系统，其中所提出的 MARL 负载平衡算法在模拟中显示出接近最佳的性能，并且比现实世界系统中的生产中的 LB 具有更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究数据中心中基于多智能体强化学习的分布式负载均衡问题，提出一种完全分布式的MARL算法以解决异构架构和动态环境下的负载均衡挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有负载均衡算法在部分可观测和动态环境中性能下降，而集中式训练方案会增加分布式系统的通信开销，需设计无需中心协调的公平策略。
AI.method: 将多智能体负载均衡建模为马尔可夫潜在博弈，以工作负载分布公平性为潜在函数，设计完全分布式MARL算法逼近纳什均衡。
AI.result: 仿真测试接近最优性能，真实系统实验中优于现有生产环境负载均衡算法，且保持低通信开销的分布式特性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过博弈论与强化学习结合，在保证系统分布式特性的前提下实现了高效公平的负载均衡，适用于实际数据中心部署。

authors_text: Paula Delgado-Santos,Ruben Tolosana,Richard Guest,Farzin Deravi,Ruben Vera-Rodriguez
title: Exploring Transformers for Behavioural Biometrics: A Case Study in Gait Recognition
title_zh: 探索行为生物识别的 Transformer：步态识别案例研究
abstract: Biometrics on mobile devices has attracted a lot of attention in recent years as it is considered a user-friendly authentication method. This interest has also been motivated by the success of Deep Learning (DL). Architectures based on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) have been established to be convenient for the task, improving the performance and robustness in comparison to traditional machine learning techniques. However, some aspects must still be revisited and improved. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first article that intends to explore and propose novel gait biometric recognition systems based on Transformers, which currently obtain state-of-the-art performance in many applications. Several state-of-the-art architectures (Vanilla, Informer, Autoformer, Block-Recurrent Transformer, and THAT) are considered in the experimental framework. In addition, new configurations of the Transformers are proposed to further increase the performance. Experiments are carried out using the two popular public databases whuGAIT and OU-ISIR. The results achieved prove the high ability of the proposed Transformer, outperforming state-of-the-art CNN and RNN architectures.
summary: Biometrics on mobile devices has attracted a lot of attention in recent years as it is considered a user-friendly authentication method. This interest has also been motivated by the success of Deep Learning (DL). Architectures based on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) have been established to be convenient for the task, improving the performance and robustness in comparison to traditional machine learning techniques. However, some aspects must still be revisited and improved. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first article that intends to explore and propose novel gait biometric recognition systems based on Transformers, which currently obtain state-of-the-art performance in many applications. Several state-of-the-art architectures (Vanilla, Informer, Autoformer, Block-Recurrent Transformer, and THAT) are considered in the experimental framework. In addition, new configurations of the Transformers are proposed to further increase the performance. Experiments are carried out using the two popular public databases whuGAIT and OU-ISIR. The results achieved prove the high ability of the proposed Transformer, outperforming state-of-the-art CNN and RNN architectures.
abstract_zh: 近年来，移动设备上的生物识别技术引起了广泛关注，因为它被认为是一种用户友好的身份验证方法。深度学习（DL）的成功也激发了这种兴趣。基于卷积神经网络（CNN）和循环神经网络（RNN）的架构已经被建立起来，以方便执行任务，与传统的机器学习技术相比，提高了性能和鲁棒性。但有些方面仍需重新审视和改进。据我们所知，这是第一篇旨在探索和提出基于 Transformers 的新型步态生物识别系统的文章，该系统目前在许多应用中获得了最先进的性能。实验框架中考虑了几种最先进的架构（Vanilla、Informer、Autoformer、Block-Recurrent Transformer 等）。此外，还提出了变压器的新配置以进一步提高性能。使用两个流行的公共数据库 whuGAIT 和 OU-ISIR 进行实验。所取得的结果证明了所提出的 Transformer 的高能力，优于最先进的 CNN 和 RNN 架构。

AI.tldr: 本文探索使用Transformer模型进行步态识别，提出基于Transformer的新型行为生物特征识别系统。
AI.motivation: 尽管CNN和RNN在行为生物特征识别中表现良好，但仍有改进空间。Transformer在多个领域取得最先进性能，尚未被应用于步态识别。
AI.method: 实验采用Vanilla、Informer、Autoformer等主流Transformer架构，并设计新配置，在WHU-GAIT和OU-ISIR数据集上进行对比测试。
AI.result: 提出的Transformer方法在步态识别任务中超越了现有CNN和RNN模型的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: Transformer架构在步态识别中展现出显著优势，为行为生物特征识别提供了新的有效解决方案。

authors_text: Swaminath Venkateswaran,Damien Chablat
title: Stability analysis of tensegrity mechanism coupled with a bio-inspired piping inspection robot
title_zh: 张拉整体机构与仿生管道检测机器人耦合的稳定性分析
abstract: Piping inspection robots play an essential role for industries as they can reduce human effort and pose a lesser risk to their lives. Generally, the locomotion techniques of these robots can be classified into mechanical and bioinspired. By using slot-follower leg mechanisms, DC-motors, and control units, a rigid caterpillar type inspection robot was designed and developed at LS2N, France . This rigid prototype helped in identifying the static forces required to accomplish good contact forces with the pipeline walls. In order to work inside curvatures, a tensegrity mechanism that uses three tension springs and a passive universal joint was introduced between each module of this robot. The optimal parameters of the robot assembly were identified by considering a preload of the cables, which ensured the stability of the entire robot. However, under static conditions, there exist some forces on the robot, especially on the tensegrity mechanism when one end of the leg mechanism is clamped with the pipeline walls. These forces are dominant when the orientation of the pipeline is horizontal. The objective of this article is to understand the effect of the stiffness of the spring on the static stability of the tensegrity mechanism under the self-weight of the robot assembly.

In order to work inside curvatures, a tensegrity mechanism that uses three tension springs and a passive universal joint was introduced between each module of this robot. The optimal parameters of the robot assembly were identified by considering a preload of the cables, which ensured the stability of the entire robot. However, under static conditions, there exist some forces on the robot, especially on the tensegrity mechanism when one end of the leg mechanism is clamped with the pipeline walls. abstract_zh: 管道检查机器人在工业中发挥着重要作用，因为它们可以减少人力并降低生命风险。一般来说，这些机器人的运动技术可分为机械式和仿生式。法国LS2N采用槽从动腿机构、直流电机和控制单元设计和开发了刚性履带式检测机器人。该刚性原型有助于确定与管道壁实现良好接触力所需的静力。为了在曲率内工作，在该机器人的每个模块之间引入了使用三个拉伸弹簧和被动万向节的张拉整体机构。通过考虑电缆的预紧力，确定了机器人装配的最佳参数，保证了整个机器人的稳定性。然而，在静态条件下，机器人上存在一定的力，特别是当腿部机构的一端与管道壁夹紧时，张拉整体机构上会受到一定的力。当管道方向为水平时，这些力占主导地位。本文的目的是了解弹簧刚度对机器人组件自重作用下张拉整体机构静态稳定性的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了与仿生管道检测机器人耦合的张力结构机制的稳定性。
AI.motivation: 管道检测机器人在工业中具有重要作用，但其在水平管道中运行时，张力结构机制的静态稳定性问题需要解决。
AI.method: 通过考虑缆索预紧力，确定了机器人组件的最优参数，并分析了弹簧刚度对张力结构机制静态稳定性的影响。
AI.result: 研究发现，在水平管道中，弹簧刚度对张力结构机制的静态稳定性有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 张力结构机制的设计应考虑弹簧刚度，以确保机器人在水平管道中的稳定运行。

authors_text: Eric Bezzam,Sepand Kashani,Martin Vetterli,Matthieu Simeoni
title: LenslessPiCam: A Hardware and Software Platform for Lensless Computational Imaging with a Raspberry Pi
title_zh: LenslessPiCam：使用 Raspberry Pi 进行无透镜计算成像的硬件和软件平台
abstract: Lensless imaging seeks to replace/remove the lens in a conventional imaging system. The earliest cameras were in fact lensless, relying on long exposure times to form images on the other end of a small aperture in a darkened room/container (camera obscura). The introduction of a lens allowed for more light throughput and therefore shorter exposure times, while retaining sharp focus. The incorporation of digital sensors readily enabled the use of computational imaging techniques to post-process and enhance raw images (e.g. via deblurring, inpainting, denoising, sharpening). Recently, imaging scientists have started leveraging computational imaging as an integral part of lensless imaging systems, allowing them to form viewable images from the highly multiplexed raw measurements of lensless cameras (see [5] and references therein for a comprehensive treatment of lensless imaging). This represents a real paradigm shift in camera system design as there is more flexibility to cater the hardware to the application at hand (e.g. lightweight or flat designs). This increased flexibility comes however at the price of a more demanding post-processing of the raw digital recordings and a tighter integration of sensing and computation, often difficult to achieve in practice due to inefficient interactions between the various communities of scientists involved. With LenslessPiCam, we provide an easily accessible hardware and software framework to enable researchers, hobbyists, and students to implement and explore practical and computational aspects of lensless imaging. We also provide detailed guides and exercises so that LenslessPiCam can be used as an educational resource, and point to results from our graduate-level signal processing course.
summary: Lensless imaging seeks to replace/remove the lens in a conventional imaging system. The earliest cameras were in fact lensless, relying on long exposure times to form images on the other end of a small aperture in a darkened room/container (camera obscura). The introduction of a lens allowed for more light throughput and therefore shorter exposure times, while retaining sharp focus. The incorporation of digital sensors readily enabled the use of computational imaging techniques to post-process and enhance raw images (e.g. via deblurring, inpainting, denoising, sharpening). Recently, imaging scientists have started leveraging computational imaging as an integral part of lensless imaging systems, allowing them to form viewable images from the highly multiplexed raw measurements of lensless cameras (see [5] and references therein for a comprehensive treatment of lensless imaging). This represents a real paradigm shift in camera system design as there is more flexibility to cater the hardware to the application at hand (e.g. lightweight or flat designs). This increased flexibility comes however at the price of a more demanding post-processing of the raw digital recordings and a tighter integration of sensing and computation, often difficult to achieve in practice due to inefficient interactions between the various communities of scientists involved. With LenslessPiCam, we provide an easily accessible hardware and software framework to enable researchers, hobbyists, and students to implement and explore practical and computational aspects of lensless imaging. We also provide detailed guides and exercises so that LenslessPiCam can be used as an educational resource, and point to results from our graduate-level signal processing course.
abstract_zh: 无透镜成像寻求替换/移除传统成像系统中的透镜。最早的相机实际上是无镜头的，依靠长曝光时间在黑暗的房间/容器（暗箱）中的小光圈的另一端形成图像。镜头的引入可以提高光通量，从而缩短曝光时间，同时保持清晰的焦点。数字传感器的结合很容易使用计算成像技术来后处理和增强原始图像（例如通过去模糊、修复、去噪、锐化）。最近，成像科学家已经开始利用计算成像作为无透镜成像系统的一个组成部分，使他们能够从无透镜相机的高度多路复用的原始测量中形成可视图像（有关无透镜成像的综合处理，请参阅[5]和其中的参考文献）。这代表了相机系统设计的真正范式转变，因为硬件可以更加灵活地适应当前的应用（例如轻量级或扁平化设计）。然而，这种灵活性的提高是以原始数字记录的后处理要求更高以及传感和计算的更紧密集成为代价的，而由于所涉及的各个科学家群体之间的互动效率低下，这些在实践中通常很难实现。借助 LenslessPiCam，我们提供了易于访问的硬件和软件框架，使研究人员、业余爱好者和学生能够实现和探索无透镜成像的实际和计算方面。我们还提供详细的指南和练习，以便 LenslessPiCam 可以用作教育资源，并指出我们研究生水平信号处理课程的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于树莓派的硬件和软件平台LenslessPiCam，用于实现无透镜计算成像技术，帮助研究者和学生探索无透镜成像的计算方法。
AI.motivation: 传统相机依赖透镜实现快速成像，但无透镜成像系统通过计算方法可实现更灵活的轻量化设计，然而其复杂的后期处理和传感与计算的紧密集成在实践中面临挑战。
AI.method: 开发了包含硬件搭建和软件框架的LenslessPiCam平台，并提供详细教程和课程案例，用于教学和研究实践。
AI.result: 成功构建了可操作的无透镜成像系统，并在研究生信号处理课程中验证了其教育价值和实用性。
AI.conclusion: LenslessPiCam为无透镜计算成像提供了可访问的实验平台，促进了该领域的研究与教学应用。

search_text: LenslessPiCam: A Hardware and Software Platform for Lensless Computational Imaging with a Raspberry Pi LenslessPiCam：使用 Raspberry Pi 进行无透镜计算成像的硬件和软件平台 Lensless imaging seeks to replace/remove the lens in a conventional imaging system. The earliest cameras were in fact lensless, relying on long exposure times to form images on the other end of a small aperture in a darkened room/container (camera obscura). The introduction of a lens allowed for more light throughput and therefore shorter exposure times, while retaining sharp focus. The incorporation of digital sensors readily enabled the use of computational imaging techniques to post-process and enhance raw images (e.g. via deblurring, inpainting, denoising, sharpening). Recently, imaging scientists have started leveraging computational imaging as an integral part of lensless imaging systems, allowing them to form viewable images from the highly multiplexed raw measurements of lensless cameras (see [5] and references therein for a comprehensive treatment of lensless imaging). This represents a real paradigm shift in camera system design as there is more flexibility to cater the hardware to the application at hand (e.g. lightweight or flat designs). This increased flexibility comes however at the price of a more demanding post-processing of the raw digital recordings and a tighter integration of sensing and computation, often difficult to achieve in practice due to inefficient interactions between the various communities of scientists involved. With LenslessPiCam, we provide an easily accessible hardware and software framework to enable researchers, hobbyists, and students to implement and explore practical and computational aspects of lensless imaging. We also provide detailed guides and exercises so that LenslessPiCam can be used as an educational resource, and point to results from our graduate-level signal processing course. 无透镜成像寻求替换/移除传统成像系统中的透镜。最早的相机实际上是无镜头的，依靠长曝光时间在黑暗的房间/容器（暗箱）中的小光圈的另一端形成图像。镜头的引入可以提高光通量，从而缩短曝光时间，同时保持清晰的焦点。数字传感器的结合很容易使用计算成像技术来后处理和增强原始图像（例如通过去模糊、修复、去噪、锐化）。最近，成像科学家已经开始利用计算成像作为无透镜成像系统的一个组成部分，使他们能够从无透镜相机的高度多路复用的原始测量中形成可视图像（有关无透镜成像的综合处理，请参阅[5]和其中的参考文献）。这代表了相机系统设计的真正范式转变，因为硬件可以更加灵活地适应当前的应用（例如轻量级或扁平化设计）。然而，这种灵活性的提高是以原始数字记录的后处理要求更高以及传感和计算的更紧密集成为代价的，而由于所涉及的各个科学家群体之间的互动效率低下，这些在实践中通常很难实现。借助 LenslessPiCam，我们提供了易于访问的硬件和软件框架，使研究人员、业余爱好者和学生能够实现和探索无透镜成像的实际和计算方面。我们还提供详细的指南和练习，以便 LenslessPiCam 可以用作教育资源，并指出我们研究生水平信号处理课程的结果。 本文提出了一种基于树莓派的硬件和软件平台LenslessPiCam，用于实现无透镜计算成像技术，帮助研究者和学生探索无透镜成像的计算方法。 Eric Bezzam,Sepand Kashani,Martin Vetterli,Matthieu Simeoni eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Eric Bezzam,Martin Vetterli,Matthieu Simeoni
title: Learning rich optical embeddings for privacy-preserving lensless image classification
title_zh: 学习丰富的光学嵌入以保护隐私的无透镜图像分类
abstract: By replacing the lens with a thin optical element, lensless imaging enables new applications and solutions beyond those supported by traditional camera design and post-processing, e.g. compact and lightweight form factors and visual privacy. The latter arises from the highly multiplexed measurements of lensless cameras, which require knowledge of the imaging system to recover a recognizable image. In this work, we exploit this unique multiplexing property: casting the optics as an encoder that produces learned embeddings directly at the camera sensor. We do so in the context of image classification, where we jointly optimize the encoder's parameters and those of an image classifier in an end-to-end fashion. Our experiments show that jointly learning the lensless optical encoder and the digital processing allows for lower resolution embeddings at the sensor, and hence better privacy as it is much harder to recover meaningful images from these measurements. Additional experiments show that such an optimization allows for lensless measurements that are more robust to typical real-world image transformations. While this work focuses on classification, the proposed programmable lensless camera and end-to-end optimization can be applied to other computational imaging tasks.
summary: By replacing the lens with a thin optical element, lensless imaging enables new applications and solutions beyond those supported by traditional camera design and post-processing, e.g. compact and lightweight form factors and visual privacy. The latter arises from the highly multiplexed measurements of lensless cameras, which require knowledge of the imaging system to recover a recognizable image. In this work, we exploit this unique multiplexing property: casting the optics as an encoder that produces learned embeddings directly at the camera sensor. We do so in the context of image classification, where we jointly optimize the encoder's parameters and those of an image classifier in an end-to-end fashion. Our experiments show that jointly learning the lensless optical encoder and the digital processing allows for lower resolution embeddings at the sensor, and hence better privacy as it is much harder to recover meaningful images from these measurements. Additional experiments show that such an optimization allows for lensless measurements that are more robust to typical real-world image transformations. While this work focuses on classification, the proposed programmable lensless camera and end-to-end optimization can be applied to other computational imaging tasks.
abstract_zh: 通过用薄光学元件替换镜头，无镜头成像可以实现超出传统相机设计和后处理支持的新应用和解决方案，例如：紧凑、轻便的外形尺寸和视觉隐私。后者源于无镜头相机的高度多路复用测量，这需要成像系统的知识才能恢复可识别的图像。在这项工作中，我们利用了这种独特的多路复用特性：将光学器件作为编码器，直接在相机传感器上产生学习嵌入。我们在图像分类的背景下这样做，我们以端到端的方式联合优化编码器的参数和图像分类器的参数。我们的实验表明，联合学习无透镜光学编码器和数字处理可以在传感器上实现较低分辨率的嵌入，从而提高隐私性，因为从这些测量中恢复有意义的图像要困难得多。其他实验表明，这种优化允许无透镜测量，对典型的现实世界图像转换更加鲁棒。虽然这项工作的重点是分类，但所提出的可编程无镜头相机和端到端优化可以应用于其他计算成像任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无透镜相机系统，通过学习光学嵌入实现隐私保护的图像分类。
AI.motivation: 传统相机设计难以兼顾隐私保护与计算效率，而无透镜成像通过光学复用特性可提升隐私性，但需结合系统知识恢复图像。
AI.method: 将光学元件作为编码器直接生成传感器嵌入，与分类器进行端到端联合优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，联合学习可降低嵌入分辨率，增强隐私性，同时提高对现实图像变换的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该可编程无透镜相机和端到端优化方法可推广至其他计算成像任务。

authors_text: Sofia Yfantidou,Pavlos Sermpezis,Athena Vakali
title: 12 Years of Self-tracking for Promoting Physical Activity from a User Diversity Perspective: Taking Stock and Thinking Ahead
title_zh: 从用户多样性角度促进身体活动的 12 年自我跟踪：盘点与超前思考
abstract: Despite the indisputable personal and societal benefits of regular physical activity, a large portion of the population does not follow the recommended guidelines, harming their health and wellness. The World Health Organization has called upon governments, practitioners, and researchers to accelerate action to address the global prevalence of physical inactivity. To this end, an emerging wave of research in ubiquitous computing has been exploring the potential of interactive self-tracking technology in encouraging positive health behavior change. Numerous findings indicate the benefits of personalization and inclusive design regarding increasing the motivational appeal and overall effectiveness of behavior change systems, with the ultimate goal of empowering and facilitating people to achieve their goals. However, most interventions still adopt a "one-size-fits-all" approach to their design, assuming equal effectiveness for all system features in spite of individual and collective user differences. To this end, we analyze a corpus of 12 years of research in self-tracking technology for health behavior change, focusing on physical activity, to identify those design elements that have proven most effective in inciting desirable behavior across diverse population segments. We then provide actionable recommendations for designing and evaluating behavior change self-tracking technology based on age, gender, occupation, fitness, and health condition. Finally, we engage in a critical commentary on the diversity of the domain and discuss ethical concerns surrounding tailored interventions and directions for moving forward.
summary: Despite the indisputable personal and societal benefits of regular physical activity, a large portion of the population does not follow the recommended guidelines, harming their health and wellness. The World Health Organization has called upon governments, practitioners, and researchers to accelerate action to address the global prevalence of physical inactivity. To this end, an emerging wave of research in ubiquitous computing has been exploring the potential of interactive self-tracking technology in encouraging positive health behavior change. Numerous findings indicate the benefits of personalization and inclusive design regarding increasing the motivational appeal and overall effectiveness of behavior change systems, with the ultimate goal of empowering and facilitating people to achieve their goals. However, most interventions still adopt a "one-size-fits-all" approach to their design, assuming equal effectiveness for all system features in spite of individual and collective user differences. To this end, we analyze a corpus of 12 years of research in self-tracking technology for health behavior change, focusing on physical activity, to identify those design elements that have proven most effective in inciting desirable behavior across diverse population segments. We then provide actionable recommendations for designing and evaluating behavior change self-tracking technology based on age, gender, occupation, fitness, and health condition. Finally, we engage in a critical commentary on the diversity of the domain and discuss ethical concerns surrounding tailored interventions and directions for moving forward.
abstract_zh: 尽管定期体育活动对个人和社会都有无可争议的好处，但很大一部分人没有遵循建议的指导方针，从而损害了他们的健康和保健。世界卫生组织呼吁各国政府、从业者和研究人员加快行动，解决全球普遍存在的缺乏身体活动的问题。为此，新兴的普适计算研究浪潮一直在探索交互式自我跟踪技术在鼓励积极的健康行为改变方面的潜力。大量研究结果表明，个性化和包容性设计可以提高行为改变系统的动机吸引力和整体有效性，最终目标是赋予人们权力并促进人们实现其目标。然而，大多数干预措施仍然采用“一刀切”的设计方法，假设所有系统功能都具有相同的有效性，尽管个人和集体用户存在差异。为此，我们分析了 12 年健康行为改变自我跟踪技术研究的语料库，重点关注身体活动，以确定那些已被证明在激发不同人群的理想行为方面最有效的设计元素。然后，我们根据年龄、性别、职业、健康状况和健康状况，提供设计和评估行为改变自我跟踪技术的可行建议。最后，我们对该领域的多样性进行了批判性评论，并讨论了围绕定制干预措施和前进方向的道德问题。

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了12年关于自我追踪技术促进身体活动的研究，从用户多样性视角分析设计要素并提出优化建议。
AI.motivation: 现有干预措施多采用‘一刀切’设计，忽视用户个体差异，难以有效提升全民身体活动水平，需通过个性化设计解决这一问题。
AI.method: 系统分析12年相关文献，聚焦身体活动领域，识别对不同人口群体有效的设计元素，并基于年龄、性别等因素提出设计与评估建议。
AI.result: 确定了提升动机和效果的关键设计要素，提出针对不同用户群体的可操作性设计指南，同时讨论了个性化干预的伦理挑战。
AI.conclusion: 需加强用户多样性研究，推动包容性设计框架，同时建立伦理规范以确保个性化干预的公平性与可持续性。

We then provide actionable recommendations for designing and evaluating behavior change self-tracking technology based on age, gender, occupation, fitness, and health condition. Finally, we engage in a critical commentary on the diversity of the domain and discuss ethical concerns surrounding tailored interventions and directions for moving forward. 尽管定期体育活动对个人和社会都有无可争议的好处，但很大一部分人没有遵循建议的指导方针，从而损害了他们的健康和保健。世界卫生组织呼吁各国政府、从业者和研究人员加快行动，解决全球普遍存在的缺乏身体活动的问题。为此，新兴的普适计算研究浪潮一直在探索交互式自我跟踪技术在鼓励积极的健康行为改变方面的潜力。大量研究结果表明，个性化和包容性设计可以提高行为改变系统的动机吸引力和整体有效性，最终目标是赋予人们权力并促进人们实现其目标。然而，大多数干预措施仍然采用“一刀切”的设计方法，假设所有系统功能都具有相同的有效性，尽管个人和集体用户存在差异。为此，我们分析了 12 年健康行为改变自我跟踪技术研究的语料库，重点关注身体活动，以确定那些已被证明在激发不同人群的理想行为方面最有效的设计元素。然后，我们根据年龄、性别、职业、健康状况和健康状况，提供设计和评估行为改变自我跟踪技术的可行建议。最后，我们对该领域的多样性进行了批判性评论，并讨论了围绕定制干预措施和前进方向的道德问题。 本文回顾了12年关于自我追踪技术促进身体活动的研究，从用户多样性视角分析设计要素并提出优化建议。 Sofia Yfantidou,Pavlos Sermpezis,Athena Vakali cs.HC

authors_text: Olivier Risser-Maroix,Amine Marzouki,Hala Djeghim,Camille Kurtz,Nicolas Lomenie
title: Learning an Adaptation Function to Assess Image Visual Similarities
title_zh: 学习适应函数来评估图像视觉相似性
comment: ef:ORASIS 2021, Centre National de la Recherche Scientifique [CNRS], Sep 2021, Saint Ferr{é}ol, France
comments: ef:ORASIS 2021, Centre National de la Recherche Scientifique [CNRS], Sep 2021, Saint Ferr{é}ol, France
abstract: Human perception is routinely assessing the similarity between images, both for decision making and creative thinking. But the underlying cognitive process is not really well understood yet, hence difficult to be mimicked by computer vision systems. State-of-the-art approaches using deep architectures are often based on the comparison of images described as feature vectors learned for image categorization task. As a consequence, such features are powerful to compare semantically related images but not really efficient to compare images visually similar but semantically unrelated. Inspired by previous works on neural features adaptation to psycho-cognitive representations, we focus here on the specific task of learning visual image similarities when analogy matters. We propose to compare different supervised, semi-supervised and self-supervised networks, pre-trained on distinct scales and contents datasets (such as ImageNet-21k, ImageNet-1K or VGGFace2) to conclude which model may be the best to approximate the visual cortex and learn only an adaptation function corresponding to the approximation of the the primate IT cortex through the metric learning framework. Our experiments conducted on the Totally Looks Like image dataset highlight the interest of our method, by increasing the retrieval scores of the best model @1 by 2.25x. This research work was recently accepted for publication at the ICIP 2021 international conference [1]. In this new article, we expand on this previous work by using and comparing new pre-trained feature extractors on other datasets.

But the underlying cognitive process is not really well understood yet, hence difficult to be mimicked by computer vision systems. State-of-the-art approaches using deep architectures are often based on the comparison of images described as feature vectors learned for image categorization task. As a consequence, such features are powerful to compare semantically related images but not really efficient to compare images visually similar but semantically unrelated. Inspired by previous works on neural features adaptation to psycho-cognitive representations, we focus here on the specific task of learning visual image similarities when analogy matters. We propose to compare different supervised, semi-supervised and self-supervised networks, pre-trained on distinct scales and contents datasets (such as ImageNet-21k, ImageNet-1K or VGGFace2) to conclude which model may be the best to approximate the visual cortex and learn only an adaptation function corresponding to the approximation of the the primate IT cortex through the metric learning framework. Our experiments conducted on the Totally Looks Like image dataset highlight the interest of our method, by increasing the retrieval scores of the best model @1 by 2.25x. This research work was recently accepted for publication at the ICIP 2021 international conference [1]. In this new article, we expand on this previous work by using and comparing new pre-trained feature extractors on other datasets.
abstract_zh: 人类感知通常会评估图像之间的相似性，以用于决策和创造性思维。但潜在的认知过程尚未得到很好的理解，因此很难被计算机视觉系统模仿。使用深度架构的最先进的方法通常基于对图像的比较，这些图像被描述为为图像分类任务学习的特征向量。因此，这些特征对于比较语义相关的图像非常强大，但对于比较视觉上相似但语义不相关的图像并不真正有效。受到之前关于神经特征适应心理认知表征的工作的启发，我们在这里重点关注在类比很重要时学习视觉图像相似性的具体任务。我们建议比较不同的监督、半监督和自监督网络，在不同的尺度和内容数据集（例如 ImageNet-21k、ImageNet-1K 或 VGGFace2）上进行预训练，以得出哪种模型最适合近似视觉皮层，并通过度量学习框架仅学习与灵长类 IT 皮层近似相对应的适应函数。我们在 Totally Looks Like 图像数据集上进行的实验通过将最佳模型 @1 的检索分数提高了 2.25 倍，突出了我们方法的兴趣。该研究工作最近在ICIP 2021国际会议上接受发表[1]。在这篇新文章中，我们通过在其他数据集上使用和比较新的预训练特征提取器来扩展之前的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在学习一种适应函数，以评估图像的视觉相似性，特别是在类比场景下。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在语义相关图像比较上表现良好，但难以有效处理视觉相似但语义无关的图像比较，需借鉴人类视觉皮层机制改进模型。
AI.method: 通过对比监督、半监督和自监督网络在不同数据集（如ImageNet-21k、VGGFace2）上的预训练模型，学习近似灵长类IT皮层的适应函数，并采用度量学习框架优化。
AI.result: 在Totally Looks Like数据集上的实验表明，最佳模型的@1检索得分提升2.25倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效逼近视觉皮层机制，后续研究扩展至更多预训练特征提取器的对比分析。

authors_text: Claudio Zito,Eliseo Ferrante
title: One-shot Learning for Autonomous Aerial Manipulation
title_zh: 自主空中操纵的一次性学习
comment: aerial manipulation, aerial grasping, one-shot learning, collaborative transportation
comments: aerial manipulation, aerial grasping, one-shot learning, collaborative transportation
abstract: This paper is concerned with learning transferable contact models for aerial manipulation tasks. We investigate a contact-based approach for enabling unmanned aerial vehicles with cable-suspended passive grippers to compute the attach points on novel payloads for aerial transportation. This is the first time that the problem of autonomously generating contact points for such tasks has been investigated. Our approach builds on the underpinning idea that we can learn a probability density of contacts over objects' surfaces from a single demonstration. We enhance this formulation for encoding aerial transportation tasks while maintaining the one-shot learning paradigm without handcrafting task-dependent features or employing ad-hoc heuristics; the only prior is extrapolated directly from a single demonstration. Our models only rely on the geometrical properties of the payloads computed from a point cloud, and they are robust to partial views. The effectiveness of our approach is evaluated in simulation, in which one or three quadropters are requested to transport previously unseen payloads along a desired trajectory. The contact points and the quadroptors configurations are computed on-the-fly for each test by our apporach and compared with a baseline method, a modified grasp learning algorithm from the literature. Empirical experiments show that the contacts generated by our approach yield a better controllability of the payload for a transportation task. We conclude this paper with a discussion on the strengths and limitations of the presented idea, and our suggested future research directions.

We conclude this paper with a discussion on the strengths and limitations of the presented idea, and our suggested future research directions.
abstract_zh: 本文涉及学习空中操纵任务的可转移接触模型。我们研究了一种基于接触的方法，使带有电缆悬挂被动夹具的无人机能够计算空中运输新型有效载荷上的附着点。这是首次研究为此类任务自动生成接触点的问题。我们的方法建立在这样的基础之上：我们可以从一次演示中了解物体表面接触的概率密度。我们增强了这种编码空中运输任务的公式，同时保持一次性学习范式，无需手工制作依赖于任务的特征或采用临时启发式；唯一的先验是直接从单个演示中推断出来的。我们的模型仅依赖于从点云计算的有效负载的几何属性，并且它们对部分视图具有鲁棒性。我们的方法的有效性在模拟中进行了评估，其中要求一个或三个四轴飞行器沿着所需的轨迹运输以前未见过的有效载荷。我们的方法会在每次测试时即时计算接触点和四点飞行器配置，并与基线方法（文献中改进的抓取学习算法）进行比较。实证实验表明，我们的方法生成的接触可以为运输任务的有效负载提供更好的可控性。我们通过讨论所提出的想法的优点和局限性以及我们建议的未来研究方向来结束本文。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种单次学习方法，用于自主空中机械臂操作，通过学习可转移的接触模型，使无人机能够自主生成新载荷的抓取点。
AI.motivation: 传统空中抓取任务依赖手工设计的特征或启发式方法，缺乏对新型载荷的适应性，需开发无需人工特征的单次学习方案。
AI.method: 基于单次演示学习物体表面接触点的概率密度分布，利用点云提取载荷几何特征，无需手工特征或启发式规则，实时生成接触点与无人机配置。
AI.result: 仿真验证显示，该方法在运输未知载荷时比基线方法具有更好的控制性，且对部分视角鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在单次学习框架下实现了空中抓取的泛化能力，但受限于点云质量与动态环境适应性，未来需探索更复杂的场景应用。

We conclude this paper with a discussion on the strengths and limitations of the presented idea, and our suggested future research directions. 本文涉及学习空中操纵任务的可转移接触模型。我们研究了一种基于接触的方法，使带有电缆悬挂被动夹具的无人机能够计算空中运输新型有效载荷上的附着点。这是首次研究为此类任务自动生成接触点的问题。我们的方法建立在这样的基础之上：我们可以从一次演示中了解物体表面接触的概率密度。我们增强了这种编码空中运输任务的公式，同时保持一次性学习范式，无需手工制作依赖于任务的特征或采用临时启发式；唯一的先验是直接从单个演示中推断出来的。我们的模型仅依赖于从点云计算的有效负载的几何属性，并且它们对部分视图具有鲁棒性。我们的方法的有效性在模拟中进行了评估，其中要求一个或三个四轴飞行器沿着所需的轨迹运输以前未见过的有效载荷。我们的方法会在每次测试时即时计算接触点和四点飞行器配置，并与基线方法（文献中改进的抓取学习算法）进行比较。实证实验表明，我们的方法生成的接触可以为运输任务的有效负载提供更好的可控性。我们通过讨论所提出的想法的优点和局限性以及我们建议的未来研究方向来结束本文。 本文提出了一种单次学习方法，用于自主空中机械臂操作，通过学习可转移的接触模型，使无人机能够自主生成新载荷的抓取点。 Claudio Zito,Eliseo Ferrante cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Modar Sulaiman,Kallol Roy
title: Fair Classification via Transformer Neural Networks: Case Study of an Educational Domain
title_zh: 通过 Transformer 神经网络进行公平分类：教育领域的案例研究
abstract: Educational technologies nowadays increasingly use data and Machine Learning (ML) models. This gives the students, instructors, and administrators support and insights for the optimum policy. However, it is well acknowledged that ML models are subject to bias, which raises concerns about the fairness, bias, and discrimination of using these automated ML algorithms in education and its unintended and unforeseen negative consequences. The contribution of bias during the decision-making comes from datasets used for training ML models and the model architecture. This paper presents a preliminary investigation of the fairness of transformer neural networks on the two tabular datasets: Law School and Student-Mathematics. In contrast to classical ML models, the transformer-based models transform these tabular datasets into a richer representation while solving the classification task. We use different fairness metrics for evaluation and check the trade-off between fairness and accuracy of the transformer-based models over the tabular datasets. Empirically, our approach shows impressive results regarding the trade-off between fairness and performance on the Law School dataset.
summary: Educational technologies nowadays increasingly use data and Machine Learning (ML) models. This gives the students, instructors, and administrators support and insights for the optimum policy. However, it is well acknowledged that ML models are subject to bias, which raises concerns about the fairness, bias, and discrimination of using these automated ML algorithms in education and its unintended and unforeseen negative consequences. The contribution of bias during the decision-making comes from datasets used for training ML models and the model architecture. This paper presents a preliminary investigation of the fairness of transformer neural networks on the two tabular datasets: Law School and Student-Mathematics. In contrast to classical ML models, the transformer-based models transform these tabular datasets into a richer representation while solving the classification task. We use different fairness metrics for evaluation and check the trade-off between fairness and accuracy of the transformer-based models over the tabular datasets. Empirically, our approach shows impressive results regarding the trade-off between fairness and performance on the Law School dataset.
abstract_zh: 如今，教育技术越来越多地使用数据和机器学习 (ML) 模型。这为学生、教师和管理人员提供了最佳政策的支持和见解。然而，众所周知，机器学习模型容易受到偏见的影响，这引发了人们对在教育中使用这些自动化机器学习算法的公平性、偏见和歧视及其意外和不可预见的负面后果的担忧。决策过程中偏差的贡献来自于用于训练 ML 模型和模型架构的数据集。本文对变压器神经网络在法学院和学生数学这两个表格数据集上的公平性进行了初步研究。与经典的机器学习模型相比，基于转换器的模型在解决分类任务时将这些表格数据集转换为更丰富的表示形式。我们使用不同的公平性指标进行评估，并检查表格数据集上基于变压器的模型的公平性和准确性之间的权衡。根据经验，我们的方法在法学院数据集的公平性和性能之间的权衡方面显示出令人印象深刻的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在教育领域中使用Transformer神经网络进行公平分类的方法，探讨其在两个表格数据集上的公平性与准确率的权衡。
AI.motivation: 当前教育技术中使用的机器学习模型可能存在偏见，导致不公平决策。传统模型难以有效平衡公平性与性能，因此需探索新型架构如Transformer以解决这一问题。
AI.method: 采用基于Transformer的模型处理Law School和Student-Mathematics两个表格数据集，通过多种公平性指标评估模型，并分析其公平性与准确率的权衡关系。
AI.result: 实验证明，基于Transformer的方法在Law School数据集上展现了令人印象深刻的公平性与性能的平衡效果。
AI.conclusion: Transformer神经网络在教育领域的公平分类任务中具有潜力，能够有效缓解传统模型的偏见问题，为未来研究提供方向。

authors_text: Yixiong Chen,Li Liu,Jingxian Li,Hua Jiang,Chris Ding,Zongwei Zhou
title: MetaLR: Meta-tuning of Learning Rates for Transfer Learning in Medical Imaging
title_zh: MetaLR：医学成像中迁移学习学习率的元调整
abstract: In medical image analysis, transfer learning is a powerful method for deep neural networks (DNNs) to generalize well on limited medical data. Prior efforts have focused on developing pre-training algorithms on domains such as lung ultrasound, chest X-ray, and liver CT to bridge domain gaps. However, we find that model fine-tuning also plays a crucial role in adapting medical knowledge to target tasks. The common fine-tuning method is manually picking transferable layers (e.g., the last few layers) to update, which is labor-expensive. In this work, we propose a meta-learning-based LR tuner, named MetaLR, to make different layers automatically co-adapt to downstream tasks based on their transferabilities across domains. MetaLR learns appropriate LRs for different layers in an online manner, preventing highly transferable layers from forgetting their medical representation abilities and driving less transferable layers to adapt actively to new domains. Extensive experiments on various medical applications show that MetaLR outperforms previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) fine-tuning strategies. Codes are released.
summary: In medical image analysis, transfer learning is a powerful method for deep neural networks (DNNs) to generalize well on limited medical data. Prior efforts have focused on developing pre-training algorithms on domains such as lung ultrasound, chest X-ray, and liver CT to bridge domain gaps. However, we find that model fine-tuning also plays a crucial role in adapting medical knowledge to target tasks. The common fine-tuning method is manually picking transferable layers (e.g., the last few layers) to update, which is labor-expensive. In this work, we propose a meta-learning-based LR tuner, named MetaLR, to make different layers automatically co-adapt to downstream tasks based on their transferabilities across domains. MetaLR learns appropriate LRs for different layers in an online manner, preventing highly transferable layers from forgetting their medical representation abilities and driving less transferable layers to adapt actively to new domains. Extensive experiments on various medical applications show that MetaLR outperforms previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) fine-tuning strategies. Codes are released.
abstract_zh: 在医学图像分析中，迁移学习是深度神经网络 (DNN) 的一种强大方法，可以很好地概括有限的医学数据。之前的工作重点是开发肺部超声、胸部 X 射线和肝脏 CT 等领域的预训练算法，以弥合领域差距。然而，我们发现模型微调在使医学知识适应目标任务方面也发挥着至关重要的作用。常见的微调方法是手动选择可转移层（例如最后几层）进行更新，这是一种耗费人力的方法。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于元学习的 LR 调优器，名为 MetaLR，使不同层根据跨域的可迁移性自动共同适应下游任务。 MetaLR 以在线方式为不同层学习适当的 LR，防止可转移性高的层忘记其医学表示能力，并驱动可转移性较低的层主动适应新领域。对各种医学应用的大量实验表明，MetaLR 优于以前最先进的 (SOTA) 微调策略。代码已发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MetaLR方法，通过元学习动态调整不同层的学习率，以提升医学影像迁移学习中的模型微调效果。
AI.motivation: 医学影像数据有限，传统手动选择可迁移层进行微调的方法效率低且依赖经验，难以有效平衡各层的适应性与知识保留。
AI.method: 基于元学习设计MetaLR，自动根据各层跨域可迁移性动态分配学习率，使高可迁移层保留医学表征能力，低可迁移层主动适应新领域。
AI.result: 在多种医学影像任务中，MetaLR优于现有最先进微调策略，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: MetaLR通过自动学习率调整机制，有效提升了医学影像迁移学习的性能，为模型微调提供了新思路。

search_text: MetaLR: Meta-tuning of Learning Rates for Transfer Learning in Medical Imaging MetaLR：医学成像中迁移学习学习率的元调整 In medical image analysis, transfer learning is a powerful method for deep neural networks (DNNs) to generalize well on limited medical data. Prior efforts have focused on developing pre-training algorithms on domains such as lung ultrasound, chest X-ray, and liver CT to bridge domain gaps. However, we find that model fine-tuning also plays a crucial role in adapting medical knowledge to target tasks. The common fine-tuning method is manually picking transferable layers (e.g., the last few layers) to update, which is labor-expensive. In this work, we propose a meta-learning-based LR tuner, named MetaLR, to make different layers automatically co-adapt to downstream tasks based on their transferabilities across domains. MetaLR learns appropriate LRs for different layers in an online manner, preventing highly transferable layers from forgetting their medical representation abilities and driving less transferable layers to adapt actively to new domains. Extensive experiments on various medical applications show that MetaLR outperforms previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) fine-tuning strategies. Codes are released. 在医学图像分析中，迁移学习是深度神经网络 (DNN) 的一种强大方法，可以很好地概括有限的医学数据。之前的工作重点是开发肺部超声、胸部 X 射线和肝脏 CT 等领域的预训练算法，以弥合领域差距。然而，我们发现模型微调在使医学知识适应目标任务方面也发挥着至关重要的作用。常见的微调方法是手动选择可转移层（例如最后几层）进行更新，这是一种耗费人力的方法。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于元学习的 LR 调优器，名为 MetaLR，使不同层根据跨域的可迁移性自动共同适应下游任务。 MetaLR 以在线方式为不同层学习适当的 LR，防止可转移性高的层忘记其医学表示能力，并驱动可转移性较低的层主动适应新领域。对各种医学应用的大量实验表明，MetaLR 优于以前最先进的 (SOTA) 微调策略。代码已发布。 本文提出MetaLR方法，通过元学习动态调整不同层的学习率，以提升医学影像迁移学习中的模型微调效果。 Yixiong Chen,Li Liu,Jingxian Li,Hua Jiang,Chris Ding,Zongwei Zhou cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Angelo Borsotti,Ulya Trafimovich
title: A closer look at TDFA
title_zh: 仔细观察 TDFA
abstract: We present an algorithm for regular expression parsing and submatch extraction based on tagged deterministic finite automata. The algorithm works with different disambiguation policies. We give detailed pseudocode for the algorithm, covering important practical optimizations. All transformations from a regular expression to an optimized automaton are explained on a step-by-step example. We consider both ahead-of-time and just-in-time determinization and describe variants of the algorithm suited to each setting. We provide benchmarks showing that the algorithm is very fast in practice. Our research is based on two independent implementations: an open-source lexer generator RE2C and an experimental Java library.
summary: We present an algorithm for regular expression parsing and submatch extraction based on tagged deterministic finite automata. The algorithm works with different disambiguation policies. We give detailed pseudocode for the algorithm, covering important practical optimizations. All transformations from a regular expression to an optimized automaton are explained on a step-by-step example. We consider both ahead-of-time and just-in-time determinization and describe variants of the algorithm suited to each setting. We provide benchmarks showing that the algorithm is very fast in practice. Our research is based on two independent implementations: an open-source lexer generator RE2C and an experimental Java library.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于标记确定性有限自动机的正则表达式解析和子匹配提取算法。该算法适用于不同的消歧策略。我们给出了该算法的详细伪代码，涵盖了重要的实际优化。从正则表达式到优化自动机的所有转换都通过分步示例进行解释。我们考虑提前确定和即时确定，并描述适合每种设置的算法变体。我们提供的基准表明该算法在实践中非常快。我们的研究基于两个独立的实现：开源词法分析器生成器 RE2C 和实验性 Java 库。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于标记确定有限自动机（TDFA）的正则表达式解析与子匹配提取算法，支持多种消歧策略并优化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有正则表达式处理方法在复杂模式匹配和子匹配提取上存在效率或准确性不足，需更高效且灵活的算法。
AI.method: 基于标记确定有限自动机（TDFA），设计支持不同消歧策略的算法，提供优化伪代码，并实现两种确定化方式，通过RE2C和Java库验证。
AI.result: 基准测试显示算法在实际应用中具有很高的效率，两种实现均验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: TDFA算法在正则表达式处理中兼具高效性与灵活性，适用于不同应用场景，为相关工具开发提供新思路。

search_text: A closer look at TDFA 仔细观察 TDFA We present an algorithm for regular expression parsing and submatch extraction based on tagged deterministic finite automata. The algorithm works with different disambiguation policies. We give detailed pseudocode for the algorithm, covering important practical optimizations. All transformations from a regular expression to an optimized automaton are explained on a step-by-step example. We consider both ahead-of-time and just-in-time determinization and describe variants of the algorithm suited to each setting. We provide benchmarks showing that the algorithm is very fast in practice. Our research is based on two independent implementations: an open-source lexer generator RE2C and an experimental Java library. 我们提出了一种基于标记确定性有限自动机的正则表达式解析和子匹配提取算法。该算法适用于不同的消歧策略。我们给出了该算法的详细伪代码，涵盖了重要的实际优化。从正则表达式到优化自动机的所有转换都通过分步示例进行解释。我们考虑提前确定和即时确定，并描述适合每种设置的算法变体。我们提供的基准表明该算法在实践中非常快。我们的研究基于两个独立的实现：开源词法分析器生成器 RE2C 和实验性 Java 库。 提出一种基于标记确定有限自动机（TDFA）的正则表达式解析与子匹配提取算法，支持多种消歧策略并优化性能。 Angelo Borsotti,Ulya Trafimovich cs.FL,cs.DS

authors_text: Ruiming Cao,Fanglin Linda Liu,Li-Hao Yeh,Laura Waller
title: Dynamic Structured Illumination Microscopy with a Neural Space-time Model
title_zh: 具有神经时空模型的动态结构照明显微镜
comment: ef:IEEE International Conference on Computational Photography (ICCP) 2022
comments: ef:IEEE International Conference on Computational Photography (ICCP) 2022
abstract: Structured illumination microscopy (SIM) reconstructs a super-resolved image from multiple raw images captured with different illumination patterns; hence, acquisition speed is limited, making it unsuitable for dynamic scenes. We propose a new method, Speckle Flow SIM, that uses static patterned illumination with moving samples and models the sample motion during data capture in order to reconstruct the dynamic scene with super-resolution. Speckle Flow SIM relies on sample motion to capture a sequence of raw images. The spatio-temporal relationship of the dynamic scene is modeled using a neural space-time model with coordinate-based multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs), and the motion dynamics and the super-resolved scene are jointly recovered. We validate Speckle Flow SIM for coherent imaging in simulation and build a simple, inexpensive experimental setup with off-the-shelf components. We demonstrate that Speckle Flow SIM can reconstruct a dynamic scene with deformable motion and 1.88x the diffraction-limited resolution in experiment.
summary: Structured illumination microscopy (SIM) reconstructs a super-resolved image from multiple raw images captured with different illumination patterns; hence, acquisition speed is limited, making it unsuitable for dynamic scenes. We propose a new method, Speckle Flow SIM, that uses static patterned illumination with moving samples and models the sample motion during data capture in order to reconstruct the dynamic scene with super-resolution. Speckle Flow SIM relies on sample motion to capture a sequence of raw images. The spatio-temporal relationship of the dynamic scene is modeled using a neural space-time model with coordinate-based multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs), and the motion dynamics and the super-resolved scene are jointly recovered. We validate Speckle Flow SIM for coherent imaging in simulation and build a simple, inexpensive experimental setup with off-the-shelf components. We demonstrate that Speckle Flow SIM can reconstruct a dynamic scene with deformable motion and 1.88x the diffraction-limited resolution in experiment.
abstract_zh: 结构照明显微镜 (SIM) 从使用不同照明模式捕获的多个原始图像重建超分辨率图像；因此，采集速度有限，不适合动态场景。我们提出了一种新方法——散斑流 SIM，它使用静态图案照明和移动样本，并对数据捕获期间的样本运动进行建模，以便以超分辨率重建动态场景。散斑流 SIM 依靠样本运动来捕获一系列原始图像。使用具有基于坐标的多层感知器（MLP）的神经时空模型对动态场景的时空关系进行建模，并联合恢复运动动力学和超分辨率场景。我们验证了散斑流 SIM 在模拟中的相干成像，并使用现成的组件构建了一个简单、廉价的实验装置。我们在实验中证明了散斑流 SIM 可以重建具有可变形运动和 1.88 倍衍射极限分辨率的动态场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经时空模型的动态结构光照显微镜方法，用于实现动态场景的超分辨率成像。
AI.motivation: 传统结构光照显微镜（SIM）因需要多次曝光不同照明模式而速度受限，难以捕捉动态场景。
AI.method: 通过静态图案照明与样本运动结合，利用神经网络建模动态场景的时空关系，联合恢复运动动态与超分辨率图像。
AI.result: 在仿真与实验中验证了方法有效性，实现了1.88倍衍射极限分辨率的动态变形场景重建。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过样本运动与神经模型结合，突破了传统SIM的速度限制，为动态超分辨率成像提供了新方案。

search_text: Dynamic Structured Illumination Microscopy with a Neural Space-time Model 具有神经时空模型的动态结构照明显微镜 Structured illumination microscopy (SIM) reconstructs a super-resolved image from multiple raw images captured with different illumination patterns; hence, acquisition speed is limited, making it unsuitable for dynamic scenes. We demonstrate that Speckle Flow SIM can reconstruct a dynamic scene with deformable motion and 1.88x the diffraction-limited resolution in experiment. 结构照明显微镜 (SIM) 从使用不同照明模式捕获的多个原始图像重建超分辨率图像；因此，采集速度有限，不适合动态场景。我们提出了一种新方法——散斑流 SIM，它使用静态图案照明和移动样本，并对数据捕获期间的样本运动进行建模，以便以超分辨率重建动态场景。散斑流 SIM 依靠样本运动来捕获一系列原始图像。使用具有基于坐标的多层感知器（MLP）的神经时空模型对动态场景的时空关系进行建模，并联合恢复运动动力学和超分辨率场景。我们验证了散斑流 SIM 在模拟中的相干成像，并使用现成的组件构建了一个简单、廉价的实验装置。我们在实验中证明了散斑流 SIM 可以重建具有可变形运动和 1.88 倍衍射极限分辨率的动态场景。 本文提出了一种基于神经时空模型的动态结构光照显微镜方法，用于实现动态场景的超分辨率成像。 Ruiming Cao,Fanglin Linda Liu,Li-Hao Yeh,Laura Waller physics.optics,cs.CV,cs.GR,eess.IV,eess.SP

authors_text: Yuncheng Li,Zehao Xue,Yingying Wang,Liuhao Ge,Zhou Ren,Jonathan Rodriguez
title: End-to-End 3D Hand Pose Estimation from Stereo Cameras
title_zh: 通过立体相机进行端到端 3D 手势估计
abstract: This work proposes an end-to-end approach to estimate full 3D hand pose from stereo cameras. Most existing methods of estimating hand pose from stereo cameras apply stereo matching to obtain depth map and use depth-based solution to estimate hand pose. In contrast, we propose to bypass the stereo matching and directly estimate the 3D hand pose from the stereo image pairs. The proposed neural network architecture extends from any keypoint predictor to estimate the sparse disparity of the hand joints. In order to effectively train the model, we propose a large scale synthetic dataset that is composed of stereo image pairs and ground truth 3D hand pose annotations. Experiments show that the proposed approach outperforms the existing methods based on the stereo depth.
summary: This work proposes an end-to-end approach to estimate full 3D hand pose from stereo cameras. Most existing methods of estimating hand pose from stereo cameras apply stereo matching to obtain depth map and use depth-based solution to estimate hand pose. In contrast, we propose to bypass the stereo matching and directly estimate the 3D hand pose from the stereo image pairs. The proposed neural network architecture extends from any keypoint predictor to estimate the sparse disparity of the hand joints. In order to effectively train the model, we propose a large scale synthetic dataset that is composed of stereo image pairs and ground truth 3D hand pose annotations. Experiments show that the proposed approach outperforms the existing methods based on the stereo depth.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种端到端方法来估计立体相机的完整 3D 手部姿势。大多数现有的从立体相机估计手部姿势的方法应用立体匹配来获得深度图并使用基于深度的解决方案来估计手部姿势。相反，我们建议绕过立体匹配并直接从立体图像对估计 3D 手部姿势。所提出的神经网络架构从任何关键点预测器扩展到估计手关节的稀疏视差。为了有效地训练模型，我们提出了一个由立体图像对和地面实况 3D 手势注释组成的大规模合成数据集。实验表明，所提出的方法优于现有的基于立体深度的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端方法，直接从立体相机图像对估计3D手部姿态，无需生成深度图。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖立体匹配生成深度图再估计姿态，流程复杂且可能引入误差，直接从图像估计可提高效率和准确性。
AI.method: 扩展关键点预测网络以估计手部关节稀疏视差，构建包含立体图像对和3D姿态标注的大规模合成数据集训练模型。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在立体深度基础上优于现有基于深度图的估计方法。
AI.conclusion: 直接估计3D手部姿态优于传统两阶段方法，未来可优化网络结构或扩展数据集提升性能。

authors_text: Ninh Pham,Tao Liu
title: Falconn++: A Locality-sensitive Filtering Approach for Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search
title_zh: Falconn++：一种用于近似最近邻搜索的局部敏感过滤方法
abstract: We present Falconn++, a novel locality-sensitive filtering approach for approximate nearest neighbor search on angular distance. Falconn++ can filter out potential far away points in any hash bucket \textit{before} querying, which results in higher quality candidates compared to other hashing-based solutions. Theoretically, Falconn++ asymptotically achieves lower query time complexity than Falconn, an optimal locality-sensitive hashing scheme on angular distance. Empirically, Falconn++ achieves higher recall-speed tradeoffs than Falconn on many real-world data sets. Falconn++ is also competitive with HNSW, an efficient representative of graph-based solutions on high search recall regimes.
summary: We present Falconn++, a novel locality-sensitive filtering approach for approximate nearest neighbor search on angular distance. Falconn++ can filter out potential far away points in any hash bucket \textit{before} querying, which results in higher quality candidates compared to other hashing-based solutions. Theoretically, Falconn++ asymptotically achieves lower query time complexity than Falconn, an optimal locality-sensitive hashing scheme on angular distance. Empirically, Falconn++ achieves higher recall-speed tradeoffs than Falconn on many real-world data sets. Falconn++ is also competitive with HNSW, an efficient representative of graph-based solutions on high search recall regimes.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Falconn++，一种新颖的局部敏感过滤方法，用于角距离上的近似最近邻搜索。 Falconn++ 可以在查询之前过滤掉任何哈希桶 \textit{before} 中潜在的远点，与其他基于哈希的解决方案相比，这会产生更高质量的候选点。理论上，Falconn++ 渐进地实现了比 Falconn（角距离上最优局部敏感哈希方案）更低的查询时间复杂度。根据经验，Falconn++ 在许多实际数据集上比 Falconn 实现了更高的召回速度权衡。 Falconn++ 还与 HNSW 具有竞争力，HNSW 是高搜索召回率下基于图的解决方案的有效代表。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Falconn++方法，通过局部敏感过滤提升近似最近邻搜索的效率与效果。
AI.motivation: 现有哈希方法在过滤远点效率及召回率方面存在不足，需改进查询时间复杂度与实际性能。
AI.method: 在查询前通过局部敏感过滤机制预筛哈希桶中的远点，减少候选集规模。
AI.result: 理论时间复杂度低于Falconn，实际测试中召回率-速度权衡优于Falconn且与HNSW竞争。
AI.conclusion: Falconn++为高效率近似最近邻搜索提供了更优的哈希过滤解决方案。

search_text: Falconn++: A Locality-sensitive Filtering Approach for Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search Falconn++：一种用于近似最近邻搜索的局部敏感过滤方法 We present Falconn++, a novel locality-sensitive filtering approach for approximate nearest neighbor search on angular distance. Falconn++ can filter out potential far away points in any hash bucket \textit{before} querying, which results in higher quality candidates compared to other hashing-based solutions. Theoretically, Falconn++ asymptotically achieves lower query time complexity than Falconn, an optimal locality-sensitive hashing scheme on angular distance. Empirically, Falconn++ achieves higher recall-speed tradeoffs than Falconn on many real-world data sets. Falconn++ is also competitive with HNSW, an efficient representative of graph-based solutions on high search recall regimes. 我们提出了 Falconn++，一种新颖的局部敏感过滤方法，用于角距离上的近似最近邻搜索。 Falconn++ 可以在查询之前过滤掉任何哈希桶 \textit{before} 中潜在的远点，与其他基于哈希的解决方案相比，这会产生更高质量的候选点。理论上，Falconn++ 渐进地实现了比 Falconn（角距离上最优局部敏感哈希方案）更低的查询时间复杂度。根据经验，Falconn++ 在许多实际数据集上比 Falconn 实现了更高的召回速度权衡。 Falconn++ 还与 HNSW 具有竞争力，HNSW 是高搜索召回率下基于图的解决方案的有效代表。 本文提出Falconn++方法，通过局部敏感过滤提升近似最近邻搜索的效率与效果。 Ninh Pham,Tao Liu cs.DS,cs.CV

authors_text: Qiqi Ding,Peng Li,Xuefeng Yan,Ding Shi,Luming Liang,Weiming Wang,Haoran Xie,Jonathan Li,Mingqiang Wei
title: CF-YOLO: Cross Fusion YOLO for Object Detection in Adverse Weather with a High-quality Real Snow Dataset
title_zh: CF-YOLO：交叉融合 YOLO，利用高质量的真实雪数据集进行恶劣天气下的目标检测
abstract: Snow is one of the toughest adverse weather conditions for object detection (OD). Currently, not only there is a lack of snowy OD datasets to train cutting-edge detectors, but also these detectors have difficulties learning latent information beneficial for detection in snow. To alleviate the two above problems, we first establish a real-world snowy OD dataset, named RSOD. Besides, we develop an unsupervised training strategy with a distinctive activation function, called $Peak \ Act$, to quantitatively evaluate the effect of snow on each object. Peak Act helps grading the images in RSOD into four-difficulty levels. To our knowledge, RSOD is the first quantitatively evaluated and graded snowy OD dataset. Then, we propose a novel Cross Fusion (CF) block to construct a lightweight OD network based on YOLOv5s (call CF-YOLO). CF is a plug-and-play feature aggregation module, which integrates the advantages of Feature Pyramid Network and Path Aggregation Network in a simpler yet more flexible form. Both RSOD and CF lead our CF-YOLO to possess an optimization ability for OD in real-world snow. That is, CF-YOLO can handle unfavorable detection problems of vagueness, distortion and covering of snow. Experiments show that our CF-YOLO achieves better detection results on RSOD, compared to SOTAs. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/qqding77/CF-YOLO-and-RSOD.
summary: Snow is one of the toughest adverse weather conditions for object detection (OD). Currently, not only there is a lack of snowy OD datasets to train cutting-edge detectors, but also these detectors have difficulties learning latent information beneficial for detection in snow. To alleviate the two above problems, we first establish a real-world snowy OD dataset, named RSOD. Besides, we develop an unsupervised training strategy with a distinctive activation function, called $Peak \ Act$, to quantitatively evaluate the effect of snow on each object. Peak Act helps grading the images in RSOD into four-difficulty levels. To our knowledge, RSOD is the first quantitatively evaluated and graded snowy OD dataset. Then, we propose a novel Cross Fusion (CF) block to construct a lightweight OD network based on YOLOv5s (call CF-YOLO). CF is a plug-and-play feature aggregation module, which integrates the advantages of Feature Pyramid Network and Path Aggregation Network in a simpler yet more flexible form. Both RSOD and CF lead our CF-YOLO to possess an optimization ability for OD in real-world snow. That is, CF-YOLO can handle unfavorable detection problems of vagueness, distortion and covering of snow. Experiments show that our CF-YOLO achieves better detection results on RSOD, compared to SOTAs. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/qqding77/CF-YOLO-and-RSOD.
abstract_zh: 雪是物体检测 (OD) 中最恶劣的恶劣天气条件之一。目前，不仅缺乏训练尖端检测器的雪地 OD 数据集，而且这些检测器也难以学习有利于雪地检测的潜在信息。为了缓解上述两个问题，我们首先建立一个真实世界的雪天 OD 数据集，命名为 RSOD。此外，我们开发了一种具有独特激活函数的无监督训练策略，称为$Peak\Act$，以定量评估雪对每个对象的影响。 Peak Act 有助于将 RSOD 中的图像分为四个难度级别。据我们所知，RSOD 是第一个定量评估和分级的雪 OD 数据集。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的交叉融合（CF）块来构建基于 YOLOv5s 的轻量级 OD 网络（称为 CF-YOLO）。 CF是一个即插即用的特征聚合模块，它以更简单、更灵活的形式集成了特征金字塔网络和路径聚合网络的优点。 RSOD 和 CF 都使得我们的 CF-YOLO 拥有对现实雪中 OD 的优化能力。也就是说，CF-YOLO可以处理模糊、失真和雪覆盖等不利的检测问题。实验表明，与 SOTA 相比，我们的 CF-YOLO 在 RSOD 上取得了更好的检测结果。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/qqding77/CF-YOLO-and-RSOD 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CF-YOLO目标检测模型及RSOD雪天数据集，解决雪天环境下目标检测的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有检测模型在雪天场景下表现不佳，且缺乏高质量雪天数据集用于训练和评估。
AI.method: 构建首个量化分级的雪天数据集RSOD，设计Peak Act激活函数进行图像分级，并提出轻量级CF模块整合特征金字塔与路径聚合网络优势。
AI.result: CF-YOLO在RSOD数据集上优于现有SOTA方法，有效解决雪天模糊、遮挡等检测难题。
AI.conclusion: CF-YOLO与RSOD共同提升了雪天目标检测性能，为恶劣天气下的检测研究提供新思路。

search_text: CF-YOLO: Cross Fusion YOLO for Object Detection in Adverse Weather with a High-quality Real Snow Dataset CF-YOLO：交叉融合 YOLO，利用高质量的真实雪数据集进行恶劣天气下的目标检测 Snow is one of the toughest adverse weather conditions for object detection (OD). Currently, not only there is a lack of snowy OD datasets to train cutting-edge detectors, but also these detectors have difficulties learning latent information beneficial for detection in snow. To alleviate the two above problems, we first establish a real-world snowy OD dataset, named RSOD. Besides, we develop an unsupervised training strategy with a distinctive activation function, called $Peak \ Act$, to quantitatively evaluate the effect of snow on each object. Peak Act helps grading the images in RSOD into four-difficulty levels. To our knowledge, RSOD is the first quantitatively evaluated and graded snowy OD dataset. Then, we propose a novel Cross Fusion (CF) block to construct a lightweight OD network based on YOLOv5s (call CF-YOLO). CF is a plug-and-play feature aggregation module, which integrates the advantages of Feature Pyramid Network and Path Aggregation Network in a simpler yet more flexible form. Both RSOD and CF lead our CF-YOLO to possess an optimization ability for OD in real-world snow. That is, CF-YOLO can handle unfavorable detection problems of vagueness, distortion and covering of snow. Experiments show that our CF-YOLO achieves better detection results on RSOD, compared to SOTAs. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/qqding77/CF-YOLO-and-RSOD. 雪是物体检测 (OD) 中最恶劣的恶劣天气条件之一。目前，不仅缺乏训练尖端检测器的雪地 OD 数据集，而且这些检测器也难以学习有利于雪地检测的潜在信息。为了缓解上述两个问题，我们首先建立一个真实世界的雪天 OD 数据集，命名为 RSOD。此外，我们开发了一种具有独特激活函数的无监督训练策略，称为$Peak\Act$，以定量评估雪对每个对象的影响。 Peak Act 有助于将 RSOD 中的图像分为四个难度级别。据我们所知，RSOD 是第一个定量评估和分级的雪 OD 数据集。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的交叉融合（CF）块来构建基于 YOLOv5s 的轻量级 OD 网络（称为 CF-YOLO）。 CF是一个即插即用的特征聚合模块，它以更简单、更灵活的形式集成了特征金字塔网络和路径聚合网络的优点。 RSOD 和 CF 都使得我们的 CF-YOLO 拥有对现实雪中 OD 的优化能力。也就是说，CF-YOLO可以处理模糊、失真和雪覆盖等不利的检测问题。实验表明，与 SOTA 相比，我们的 CF-YOLO 在 RSOD 上取得了更好的检测结果。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/qqding77/CF-YOLO-and-RSOD 获取。 本文提出CF-YOLO目标检测模型及RSOD雪天数据集，解决雪天环境下目标检测的挑战。 Qiqi Ding,Peng Li,Xuefeng Yan,Ding Shi,Luming Liang,Weiming Wang,Haoran Xie,Jonathan Li,Mingqiang Wei cs.CV
